Text: नाटक करूनही सहानुभूती नाही मिळणार
translated_text: Even if you act, you won't get sympathy.
Justification: The phrase "सहानुभूती नाही मिळणार" (won't get sympathy) is dismissive but lacks emotion.

Text: आंदोलन करणे हाच उपाय आहे का त्याशिवाय न्याय मिळणार नाही का???
translated_text: Is protesting the only solution? Can't justice be achieved otherwise?
Justification: The rhetorical question implies anger and dissatisfaction with the system.

Text: असे तर फक्त आई वडीलच असतात! अशी अपेक्षा इतर कुणाही कडून फार दुःख देते!
translated_text: Only parents act this way! Expecting it from others is very painful!
Justification: The phrase "फार दुःख देते" (very painful) directly expresses sadness and disappointment.

Text: आणि नंतर पश्चाताप देखील करतात.. इतकी कशी ही अर्धवट म्हणून!!
translated_text: And then they regret it later… How can someone be so half-hearted?
Justification: The term "अर्धवट" (half-hearted) conveys frustration and disgust.

Text: अर्धवट ग्रुपचा नेता आहे हा
translated_text: This is the leader of the half-hearted group.
Justification: The statement is descriptive and does not contain strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: ज्या देशात आधी शिक्षणाला धंदा करून ठेवलं आहे तिथे अपेक्षा तरी काय करायची
translated_text: What can one expect in a country where education has been a business?
Justification: The sentence makes an observation without strong emotional intensity.

Text: मला हेच नाही समजल की कुणाला कु*चे भुंकणे कसे आवडू शकते.
translated_text: I don't understand how anyone can like a dog barking.
Justification: The use of "भुंकणे" (barking) metaphorically for people implies disdain.

Text: गद्दारी करुन, आपले टँक्स पैसे भष्टाचारी लोकांच्या हातात दिल्यामुळे लोकखत नि पुरस्कार दिला
translated_text: He was given a public letter and an award for betraying his tax money and giving it to corrupt people.
Justification: The accusation of betrayal and corruption expresses disgust.

Text: मुंबई हि मराठी माणसाची आहे तुज्या सारख्या भय्यां ची नाही
translated_text: Mumbai belongs to Marathi people, not to cowards like you.
Justification: The statement has regional bias but lacks high emotional intensity.

Text: कोणीतरी आपल्याला काहीतरी देतं म्हणून त्यांच्या सोबत जोडून राहणं मुळात ही अपेक्षाच चुकीची आहे
translated_text: It is fundamentally wrong to expect someone to stay attached to you just because they give you something.
Justification: The statement criticizes opportunism, expressing disgust.

Text: आज सणाचा बाजार आहे अन हा सकाळपासून मोक्कार पडतोय..
translated_text: Today is the festival market and it's been empty since morning.
Justification: This is a factual statement without strong emotion.

Text: अरे भुरट्या चोरा तुझ्या बापाचा नोकर आहे का राहुल गांधी तुझ्या प्रश्नाची उत्तरं द्यायला
translated_text: Hey you thief, is Rahul Gandhi your father's servant? He will answer your question.
Justification: Although slightly insulting, the phrase does not convey a strong emotional tone.

Text: उद्धव हा दुर्मिळ आहे - लाचार, निरुपयोगी आणि निर्लज्ज
translated_text: Uddhav is a rarity - helpless, useless, and shameless.
Justification: The use of "लाचार, निरुपयोगी आणि निर्लज्ज" (helpless, useless, shameless) conveys strong contempt.

Text: कुत्ते तो बेहतर होते हे, साले सुवर हे
translated_text: The dog was better than the pig.
Justification: Comparing people to animals (dog, pig) suggests disgust.

Text: तुम्हा लिलीपुट-कोंबडीचोर पिता पुत्रांपेक्षा या ब्रम्हांडा मध्ये कोणीही पणवती नाहीत हे जग जाहीर आहे
translated_text: It is a known fact that there are no bigger misfortunes in the universe than you Lilliputian chicken-thieving fathers and sons.
Justification: Though it contains insults, the tone remains more factual than highly emotional.

Text: नको रे बरसू असा अवकाळी तू वरुणराजा अन्नदात्याची नको रे बघूस अशी तू सत्वपरिक्षा
translated_text: Don't let it rain like this, O Varuna, the food giver, don't let it rain like this, you are a test of your truth.
Justification: The frustration toward untimely rain conveys anger.

Text: - ? कुठल्या जमान्यात आहेस? कमीत कमी पाहिजे आता..
translated_text: - ? What era are you in? At least now..
Justification: A rhetorical question without strong emotional charge.

Text: खरं सांगा फाटली होती ना साहेब
translated_text: Tell me the truth, sir, it was torn.
Justification: A rhetorical statement with mild aggression but not strongly emotional.

Text: आता बोला कोण विरोध करणार याला? आहे का हिम्मत?
translated_text: Now tell me, who will oppose this? Do you have the courage?
Justification: A challenging question without strong emotional charge.

Text: खरे आहे. पण हे खोके किती दिवस पुरणार? कधीतरी संपणार आहेतच. मग त्यानंतर काय?
translated_text: True. But how long will these boxes last? They're going to run out eventually. So what happens after that?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it presents a factual statement without emotional intensity.

Text: नाही देणार नाहिच चांगली झाली की गौशाळेत नेणार आहे तिला
translated_text: I won't give it to her, and when she gets better, I'll take her to the cowshed.
Justification: There is no evident strong emotion; it appears to be a statement of intent.

Text: गांडो वाकडा आनी गांडो मराठी माणूस! एकच राहिला होता वाघ तो पण झाला हिजडा!
translated_text: The crooked and the Marathi man are crazy! The only one left was the tiger, and he also became a hermaphrodite!
Justification: The use of "हिजडा" (hermaphrodite) and "गांडो" (crazy) as insults implies strong disgust.

Text: परतीचा पावसामुळे जे सोयाबीन शेतकरया च नुकसान झाले आहे त्या कडे पन लश दया.
translated_text: Please help the soybean farmers who have suffered losses due to the back rains.
Justification: A factual statement requesting help, without emotional intensity.

Text: काहीच कळलं नाही कृपया राष्ट्रभाषा मराठीत सांगा!
translated_text: I don't understand anything, please tell me in Marathi, the national language!
Justification: The plea for clarity indicates anxiety or fear of misunderstanding.

Text: तुमचं दुर्दैव हे आहे की "सहानभूती आणि मतं" दोन्हीपण लोक तुम्हांला देत नाहीत.
translated_text: Your misfortune is that people do not give you both "sympathy and opinions".
Justification: The statement is observational rather than emotional.

Text: फक्त गुजरातच नाहि तर त पण हरणाराच ही काळ्या दगडावरची पांढरी रेघ आहे.
translated_text: Not only Gujarat, but also Haryana is the white line on the black stone.
Justification: It makes a firm statement about an outcome but does not carry significant emotion.

Text: ला जनमताशी गद्दारी केली त्यांना जाळणार ही मशाल
translated_text: This torch will burn those who betrayed public opinion.
Justification: The statement conveys hostility and a sense of retribution, indicating anger.

Text: ताई,,,ज्याच्या बापाची आहे त्यांच्या कडून हिसकावून घेतली कुठे फेडाल हे पाप
translated_text: Aunty, how will you repay this sin of taking it from the one whose father it belongs to?
Justification: The phrase "पाप" (sin) and the accusatory tone suggest disgust.

Text: अरे कोरोना मध्ये मेला असतास तर बरे झाले असते...हा प्रश्न कुणी विचारला नसता
translated_text: Oh, it would have been better if you had died from Corona...no one would have asked this question.
Justification: Wishing death upon someone expresses deep negativity and sadness.

Text: ढु धुण्याच्या परंपरे मूळे सुद्धा बराच त्रास होत असेल.... तसेच येत असतील ऑफिसला
translated_text: The tradition of washing the feet must also be causing a lot of trouble.... Also, coming to the office
Justification: The sentence is speculative and lacks emotional intensity.

Text: जमल तर त्या तून अंधेरी एकदा नक्की बघून ये म्हणजे इज्जतीचा भाजीपाला होणार नाही
translated_text: If you can, come and see Andheri once, it won't be a vegetable of honor.
Justification: The sentence does not clearly convey strong emotions.

Text: नीट घासत नसणार मग तु त्यामुळे तर तुला टॅग केलय
translated_text: If you're not brushing properly, then you're tagged because of that.
Justification: The statement is casual and lacks strong emotion.

Text: या झोपलेल्या सरकारांना कोणाच्या हृदयाची अवस्था सांगा. बेरोजगारीमुळे अनेक रसिकांची मने उद्ध्वस्त झाली.
translated_text: Tell these sleeping governments whose hearts are in them. Unemployment has destroyed the hearts of many lovers.
Justification: The sentence criticizes the government but does not express a strong emotional charge beyond general disappointment.

Text: प्रकाश जर जाणकारांनी टाकायचा तर तुमची मशाल काय फक्त मिरवायची निशाणी आहे का
translated_text: If the light is to be shed by the knowledgeable, is your torch just a beacon to be pointed at?
Justification: The sentence questions the utility of something but lacks strong emotion.

Text: हो म्हणजे भाजपा व्यग्र असल्याचे दाखवते पण आळशीपणा हे खरे कारण आहे
translated_text: Yes, BJP shows that it is busy but laziness is the real reason.
Justification: The sentence critiques but does not carry a strong emotional tone.

Text: पडलेला तोंड सगळं काही सांगून जातोय..
translated_text: The expression on his face says it all..
Justification: The statement is observational and lacks strong emotion.

Text: तो भूमरे नाही दादा.... भुंकरे आहे.... भुंकण्याच काम करतोय...
translated_text: That's not a bumblebee, grandpa.... it's a bumblebee.... it's just a bumblebee...
Justification: The sentence uses wordplay but does not express strong emot

Text: उत्तरे देण्याची हिम्मत नसली की ब्लॉक करणाऱ्या फट्टु नेत्याला पुरस्कार म्हणजे हास्यास्पद आहे
translated_text: It's ridiculous to reward a stupid leader who blocks you if you don't have the courage to answer.
Justification: Words like "फट्टु" (coward) and "हास्यास्पद" (ridiculous) express strong disapproval and contempt, aligning with disgust.

Text: ज्यांनी मध्ये विलीन करून गहाण त्यांनी जास्त न्यान पाझळू नये
translated_text: Those who merge and mortgage should not worry too much.
Justification: The sentence is a commentary without a strong emotional expression, making it neutral.

Text: आता बोला आहेत त्याला महापालिकेला जबाबदार का धरू नये
translated_text: Now why shouldn't the municipal corporation be held responsible for what they are saying?
Justification: The rhetorical question demanding accountability shows frustration and anger.

Text: जनसेवा बंद होऊन काही वर्ष झाली.
translated_text: It has been a few years since the public service was closed.
Justification: The phrase indicates regret over lost public service, aligning with sadness.

Text: पवारसाहेब आणि अमेरिका ह्यांच्यात एक साम्य आहे ह्यांच्या भरवशावर राहणारे आयुष्यातून उठून जातात
translated_text: There is a similarity between Pawar Saheb and America. Those who rely on them will be thrown out of life.
Justification: The sentence is a critical observation without strong emotional expression.

Text: आम्हाला पूर्ण पत्ता पाठवा आम्ही तुम्हाला विनंती करतो तूम्ही दिलेला पत्ता पुरेसा नाही आहे.
translated_text: We request you to send us the full address. The address you provided is not sufficient.
Justification: A simple request without emotional intensity, making it neutral.

Text: साहेब येवला तालुक्यात पावसाने भरपूर नुकसान झाले येथील शेतकऱ्यांना सरसकट मदत मिळवण्यासाठी पाठपुरावा करा.
translated_text: Sir, there has been a lot of damage due to rain in Yeola taluka. Please follow up to get immediate help to the farmers here.
Justification: A formal request for assistance, making it neutral.

Text: हे आपल्यातीलच जयचंद गणोजी शिर्के फितुर हबशी...!!!
translated_text: This is our own Jaichand Ganoji Shirke Fitur Habashi...!!!
Justification: The words "फितुर" (traitor) and "हबशी" (offensive term) express strong disapproval and betrayal, making "Anger" appropriate.

Text: कठिन काळ विश्वप्रवक्ता यांनी निर्माण केला आहे त्यामुळे सदय परिस्थितीला तेच जबाबदार आहेत
translated_text: The difficult times have been created by the world's leaders, so they are responsible for the current situation.
Justification: The phrase "जवाबदार" (responsible) points blame but remains neutral in tone.

Text: आयोगावर विश्वास बसत नाही आणि कोर्टवर सुद्धा, कलयुग है
translated_text: The commission is not trusted and the court too, it is Kalyug.
Justification: The phrase "कलयुग" (Kalyug) suggests disillusionment but does not strongly convey anger or disgust.

Text: असे नसते तर.तसे केले असते...वेळ होती तेव्हा पळुन गेला.
translated_text: If it weren't for this, I would have done it that way...I ran away when it was time.
Justification: The word पळून गेला (ran away) suggests fear or avoidance of a situation.

Text: सारख्या मुरब्बी कॉंग्रेसींचा आदर होत नसेल तर असल्या आघाड्यांना कुलूपं ठोका.
translated_text: If you don't respect Congressmen like Murabbi, lock down such alliances.
Justification: Though critical, the statement does not contain strong emotional words.

Text: भावा याला माहित नाही पुणे काय आहे तर पुरा येड झवा आहे हा
translated_text: Brother, this guy doesn't know what Pune is, he's just a complete idiot.
Justification: The phrase येड झवा (idiot/madman) is derogatory, evoking disgust.

Text: तुझ्या सारखं लाळचाटे, सतरंजी उचल्यांच्या खरकट्यावर नाही जगत देशातील जनता?
translated_text: Don't the people of this country live on the backs of scoundrels and swindlers like you?
Justification: The words लाळचाटे (sycophant) and सतरंजी उचल्यांच्या (opportunist) are derogatory, conveying anger.

Text: स्वतःहून खड्डयात जायचा निर्णय घेतला असेल तर कोण थांबवणार.. विनाशकाले विपरीत बुद्धी
translated_text: If you decide to go into the pit on your own, who will stop you? Contrary to wisdom in times of destruction.
Justification: The phrase विनाशकाले विपरीत बुद्धी (foolishness in times of destruction) conveys frustration, justifying anger.

Text: पत्राच्या बदल्यात गृहखातं नाही, निदान तरी मिळेल का? - एक आशाळभूत मंदसैनिक
translated_text: If there is no home account in exchange for the letter, will I at least get one? - A hopeful soldier.
Justification: The phrase आशाळभूत (hopeful) has a slightly sarcastic tone but does not shift from neutrality.

Text: मानसिक त्रास होत आहे त्यांना
translated_text: They are suffering from mental distress.
Justification: The phrase मानसिक त्रास (mental distress) is factual, keeping it neutral.

Text: हे चिन्ह अडचणीत आहे , न पेटताच विझणार बहुतेक
translated_text: This symbol is in trouble, it will probably go out before it even lights up.
Justification: Metaphorical statement without strong emotional words, making it neutral.

Text: महाराष्ट्रात आता खरी तीच परिस्थिती निर्माण झाली आहे. आता सत्ताधारी काय काम करीत आहेत
translated_text: The same situation has now arisen in Maharashtra. What are the ruling party doing now?
Justification: The sentence presents an observation without strong emotional words, keeping it neutral.

Text: लाज शरम बाळगा थोडी तरी, देश रसातळाला चाललाय जन जागृती करा
translated_text: Have some shame, the country is going to the abyss, raise awareness among the people.
Justification: Expresses concern but remains neutral.

Text: सावधान, करोना . थेट इम्युनिटीवर करतोय हल्ला, थंडीत घालणार थैमान, ही लक्षणं धोक्याची
translated_text: Beware, Corona. It is directly attacking immunity, it will cause havoc in cold, these are the signs of danger.
Justification: A cautionary statement without emotional charge.

Text: दादा ही अंधभक्त त्याच्या मालका सारखे बांडगूळ आहेत..त्यांचं हिंदुत्व त्यांना हेच शिकवत..
translated_text: Dada is a blind devotee like his master..his Hinduism teaches him this..
Justification: A critical statement but without a strong emotional charge.

Text: काळू-बाळू यांचा तमाशा पहिला आहे का...? जबरदस्त असतो तुम्ही एकदा पहाच
translated_text: Have you seen the Kalu-Balu show? It's amazing, you should watch it once.
Justification: The word जबरदस्त (amazing) expresses excitement and joy.

Text: बरोबर आहे कारण 'गद्दार' हा शब्द पुसून पुसल्या जाणार नाही महाराष्ट्राच्या राजकारणातून.
translated_text: That's right, because the word 'traitor' will not be erased from Maharashtra politics.
Justification: A political observation, neutral in tone.

Text: तिकडे पण बाळासाहेबांचीच सेना आहे मग परत ह्या सेनेची महाराष्ट्राला गरज आहे का..
translated_text: But there is Balasaheb's army there, so does Maharashtra need this army again?
Justification: This rhetorical question doesn't contain strong emotional expressions, keeping the tone neutral.

Text: अशिच कार्टून काढ़ून मोदी-शाहा किंवा इतर नेत्याना शेरेबाज़ी केली तर तुम्हाला का झोंबते?
translated_text: Why do you care if someone draws a cartoon and criticizes Modi-Shah or other leaders?
Justification: शेरेबाज़ी (taunt) and "झोंबते" (it hurts you) reflect sarcastic contempt, evoking disgust.

Text: सरळ ऑफर लेटर,ये तो घोटाळा है रे बाबा
translated_text: Straight offer letter, ye to ghotala hai re baba
Justification: Though "घोटाळा" (scam) is used, the tone is casual and lacks intensity, thus it remains neutral.

Text: तू हे सांगणारा आहे कोन भाई
translated_text: Who are you to say this, brother?
Justification: The rhetorical "कोन भाई" (who are you) implies disbelief and evokes surprise.

Text: अभिव्यक्ती स्वातंत्र्य म्हणजे बंगल्यावर नेऊन बेदम मारहाण करणे
translated_text: Freedom of expression means being taken to a bungalow and beaten up.
Justification: बेदम मारहाण (beaten severely) in the context of rights abuse signals anger.

Text: हे कुचीड आहेत. नवीन ब्रीड आहे
translated_text: These are Kuchida. It is a new breed.
Justification: No clear emotional words used; tone is observational, hence neutral.

Text: कलाविश्वात पसरली शोककळा, बॉलिवूडचे ‘हे’ दिग्गज हरपले…
translated_text: Mourning spreads across the art world, Bollywood's 'this' veteran has passed away...
Justification: शोककळा (mourning) and "हरपले" (passed away) convey sorrow and loss, evoking sadness.

Text: वन्यप्राण्यांच्या हल्ल्यांमुळे झालेल्या नुकसानीची भरपाई दिवाळीपूर्वी देण्यात यावी – वन मंत्री सुधीर मुनगंटीवार
translated_text: Compensation for damage caused by wild animal attacks should be paid before Diwali – Forest Minister Sudhir Mungantiwar
Justification: While the topic is serious, the language is formal and lacks emotional charge, so it's neutral.

Text: इतक पण बघायच नाही की ती जवल येउन म्हनेल झाल का बघुन
translated_text: I don't even want to see if she'll come and say that.
Justification: The sentence has a dismissive tone but doesn't convey a specific emotion strongly.

Text: अतिशय दुर्दैवी.
translated_text: Very unfortunate.
Justification: The word "दुर्दैवी" (unfortunate) directly conveys sadness or pity.

Text: हा वेडा झालेला आहे खाजपच्या नादाने
translated_text: This guy is going crazy with the sound of the snoring.
Justification: The use of "वेडा" (crazy) with "खाजपच्या नादाने" implies irrational obsession, evoking disgust.

Text: एक आमदाराला ही भाषा शोभा देत नाही
translated_text: This language does not befit an MLA.
Justification: "ही भाषा शोभा देत नाही" reflects disapproval but stays within a neutral tone.

Text: याचा अर्थ तुमचं सरकार तपास करण्यास सक्षम नाही
translated_text: This means your government is not capable of investigating.
Justification: Analytical and judgmental, but doesn't display strong emotion.

Text: हा पोलिसाचा मार खायच्या लायकीचा आहे
translated_text: This is worthy of being beaten by the police.
Justification: "मार खायच्या लायकीचा" (deserves to be beaten) is harsh and derogatory, indicating disgust.

Text: सुपारी घेऊन काम करणारे आहेत म्हणे
translated_text: They say there are people who work with betel nuts.
Justification: "सुपारी घेऊन" may imply contract killing, but context lacks enough clarity for stronger sentiment.

Text: भातखळकर तुमच्या सारख्या गुलामांची तेवढी पण पात्रता नाही हो.
translated_text: Bhatkhalkar, slaves like you don't deserve that much.
Justification: Despite insult "गुलाम", it's stated factually, so remains neutral.

translated_text: Ha ha ha... ..... It's a market for fools...
Justification: Sarcastic but more humorous than emotionally aggressive.

Text: काँग्रेसला चांगले दिवस येतील अशी आशा वाटत होती पण ती फोलच ठरली
translated_text: Congress was hoping for better days but it turned out to be a failure.
Justification: "फोलच ठरली" (turned out empty) evokes disappointment and sadness.

Text: जे काही चालू आहे अतिशय घाणेरडं आहे.
translated_text: What is going on is very dirty.
Justification: The word "घाणेरडं" (filthy) is a strong expression of revulsion, indicating disgust.

Text: कोण बोलतो आहे गद्दार तुमच्या तोंडातून हे शब्द चांगले नाही वाटत
translated_text: Who is speaking, traitor? These words from your mouth do not sound good.
Justification: Use of "गद्दार" (traitor) and "तोंडातून हे शब्द" reflects contempt.

Text: हा पवार साहेबाना लावलेला तोंबना समजायचं
translated_text: This was supposed to be a slap in the face to Pawar Saheb.
Justification: "तोंबना" (slap in the face) expresses symbolic aggression, indicating anger.

Text: महाराष्ट्रात कृषी मंत्री आहे का जागेवर????
translated_text: Is there an Agriculture Minister in Maharashtra????
Justification: Questioning tone, but not emotionally intense.

Text: अंधेरी पूर्व विधानसभा पोटनिवडणुकीतून भाजपची माघार. आता सहानुभूतीला हे आपला विजय समजून वेड्यासारखे नाचणार!
translated_text: BJP withdraws from Andheri East assembly by-election. Now, they will dance like crazy to sympathize with this victory!
Justification: "वेड्यासारखे नाचणार" (dance like mad) and sarcasm create a tone of mockery and anger.

Text: सेक्युलर जन्त आहेत हे, स्वतः चा बाप सोडून शेजारच्या ला बाप म्हणणारे
translated_text: These are the secular people, who call their neighbor father instead of their own father.
Justification: The metaphor is sarcastic but not emotionally intense.

Text: अजून किती अच्छे दिन पाहिजेत...! चक्क, जाहिरात करत आहे..
translated_text: How many more good days are needed...! Really, I'm advertising..
Justification: Use of "अच्छे दिन" in a sarcastic exclamation suggests surprise.

Text: संगमनेर शहरातील नवीन नगर रोड पाण्यात, सायंकाळी झालेल्या कोसळधार पावसाने...
translated_text: Naveen Nagar Road in Sangamner city is under water due to heavy rains in the evening...
Justification: Description of a local issue; informative tone.

Text: ही वीरगर्जना करीत आहेत... ढुंला पाय लाऊन पळणारे...
translated_text: These heroes are roaring... Those who run with bare feet...
Justification: Phrase "वीरगर्जना" (heroic roar) conveys pride and energy, evoking joy.

Text: कोण आहे हा नमुना
translated_text: Who is this sample?
Justification: "नमुना" (sample) used sarcastically expresses astonishment and surprise.

Text: हे मानसिक रोगी वाचत नाहीत आणि शहानिशा न करता तिरस्कारयुक्त प्रचलित विचारांना स्विकारतात.
translated_text: These mentally ill people don't read and accept hateful mainstream ideas without questioning them.
Justification: The term "तिरस्कारयुक्त" (hateful) suggests deep negativity and disgust towards blind belief without reasoning.

Text: धक्कादायक! कळव्याकडून...
translated_text: Shocking! The road...
Justification: "धक्कादायक" (shocking) is an explicit word expressing surprise at the incident.

Text: ही महामानवाला, शिंदेशाही...
translated_text: Priceless gift...
Justification: No emotionally intense word; neutral contextual discussion.

Text: हे वाचुण तर मंदसैनिकांच्या बुडाला...
translated_text: Fire will burn...
Justification: The term "बुडाला आग" (burning bottom) metaphorically expresses disgust and irritation.

Text: राणे आणि कार्ट्यांना समजावा...
translated_text: Explain to Rane...
Justification: Despite addressing someone directly, no emotional word present.

Text: असे तर्कशुद्ध प्रश्न विचारणे...
translated_text: Asking rational questions...
Justification: Logical reflection, not driven by any emotionally heavy word.

Text: एक कोकणी म्हणून सहमत आहे...
translated_text: Same bad condition...
Justification: The reference to repeated failure "तीच दुरवस्था" expresses weariness and sadness.

Text: मराठी मिडिया खरा मुखवटा दाखवा. चमचे गिरी करु नका ही विनंती
translated_text: Marathi media, show your true face. Please don't be a hypocrite.
Justification: The phrase 'चमचे गिरी' is derogatory and signals disapproval, indicating disgust.

Text: एसबीआयच्या ग्राहकांसाठी वाईट बातमी! आता ईएमआयमध्ये होणार वाढ
translated_text: Bad news for SBI customers! Now EMI will increase
Justification: The phrase 'वाईट बातमी' and financial burden imply sadness.

Text: आपल्या पती देवाचं डोक खायच सोडून बाकी काही ही खा ताई..
translated_text: Except for eating the head of her husband, Dev, she ate everything else.
Justification: डोक खायच' implies abusive language, indicating disgust.

Text: अरे हे तर भाजपाचेच आहे
translated_text: Oh, this is BJP's.
Justification: Statement without strong emotion—neutral.

Text: जैसी नजर,वैसा नजारा. भाजप विरोधाची कावीळ झाल्यामुळे सगळे पिवळेच दिसत आहे
translated_text: As the eye sees, so the view. Everything looks yellow due to the jaundice of the BJP opposition.
Justification: Sarcastic metaphor but no overt emotion—neutral.

Text: मीडिया आंधळी झालीय का? ही दृश्ये दाखवत नाहीये.
translated_text: Is the media blind? It's not showing these scenes.
Justification: The Marathi word "आंधळी" expresses sudden shock or disbelief, leading to surprise.

Text: लम्पी चर्म रोग प्रादुर्भावामुळे शेतकरी, पशुपालक यांच्या मृत पावलेल्या पशुधनास अर्थसहाय्य
translated_text: Financial assistance to farmers and livestock keepers whose livestock died due to lumpy skin disease outbreak
Justification: The sentence lacks emotionally charged language, hence it is categorized as neutral.

translated_text: Are you ashamed to see the plight of farmers?
Justification: The word "दैना" evokes a strong negative reaction, fitting the emotion of disgust.

Text: महाराष्ट्रातून व देशातून हद्दपार करणे ही प्राथमिकता आहे. बाकी बघू नंतर.
translated_text: Deportation from Maharashtra and the country is the priority. We'll see about the rest later.
Justification: While the word "हद्दपार" may imply concern or topic relevance, it is stated calmly, making the tone neutral.

Text: म्हणुन तू महाराष्ट्र तोडण्याचा प्रयत्न केला का
translated_text: So did you try to break Maharashtra?
Justification: The sentence lacks emotionally charged language, hence it is categorized as neutral.

Text: एक भारतवासी म्हणून आज हरल्यासारख वाटतंय.........
translated_text: As an Indian, I feel like I've lost today.........
Justification: The word "हरल्यासारख" (feeling of loss) expresses sadness and emotional weight.

Text: लोकसभा निवडणुक येईपर्यंत कधी हत्येचा कट होणार, कधी हल्ले करण्याचा कट होणार.
translated_text: Until the Lok Sabha elections, sometimes there will be a conspiracy to kill, sometimes there will be a conspiracy to attack.
Justification: Discusses events as observations, not emotionally stated; categorized as neutral.

Text: विजय आपलाच आहे पण सर्वांनी सतर्क रहा
translated_text: Victory is ours, but everyone be vigilant.
Justification: Encouraging yet measured tone; not emotionally expressive.

Text: बिहारची अधोगती कशी होत गेली असेल, हेच अनुभवत आहोत आपण.
translated_text: We are experiencing how Bihar has been deteriorating.
Justification: A statement of decline but not emotionally expressed; neutral.

Text: आणि तुला कळायला तू कोण झेंड लागून गेलीस का ग कु ?
translated_text: And you know who you are, why did you go under the flag?
Justification: The phrase 'तू कोण' (who are you) in sarcastic tone evokes surprise.

Text: फक्त कृषिमंत्री सोडला तर, बाकी सर्वांना अतीवृष्टी दिसत आहे... सत्तार भाऊ
translated_text: Except for the Agriculture Minister, everyone else is seeing excessive rainfall... Sattar Bhau
Justification: Statement is observational sarcasm; neutral in emotion.

Text: रायगडावर पिंडदान केलं तेव्हा कुठं पडला होता डांग दाबून
translated_text: When the Pind Daan was performed at Raigad, where did the Dang fall?
Justification: Question is mocking but not strongly emotional; hence neutral.

Text: एकाला सातवा वेतन आणि एकाला रू महिना हा कोणता न्याय??
translated_text: What is the justice of one person getting a seventh salary and another person getting Rs. 100 per month?
Justification: The disparity and rhetorical question convey injustice and anger.

Text: पळकुट्यांची निशाणी ढाल आणि तलवार. हा सर्वस्वी पराक्रमी मावळ्यांचा घोर अपमान आहे?
translated_text: The shield and sword are the symbols of the runaways. Is this a gross insult to the all-powerful Mavlas?
Justification: Use of 'घोर अपमान' signals contempt and disgust.

Text: नोकरभरतीची केवळ पोकळ आश्वासने... सरकार म्हणजे फक्त घोषणांचा बाजार... लाखो मुलांच्या भवितव्याशी खेळ...
translated_text: Only empty promises of recruitment... The government is just a market for announcements... Playing with the future of millions of children...
Justification: Sarcastic and disappointed tone, yet not emotionally explicit; hence neutral.

Text: असे लोक निवडून येतात हीच शोकांतिका आहे...
translated_text: It's a tragedy that such people get elected...
Justification: The phrase "शोकांतिका" (tragedy) clearly conveys a deep sense of sadness and disillusionment.

Text: जून पर्यंत झालेल्या दडपशाहीच्या विरुद्ध मोर्चा आत्ता का काढता आहात?
translated_text: Why are you protesting now against the repression that took place until June?
Justification: The questioning tone about timing shows unexpectedness, reflecting surprise.

Text: काही नाही होत लिहून घ्या.... आम्ही येच करणार
translated_text: Write down nothing is happening....we will do it.
Justification: The sentence is declarative and confident, not emotionally expressive.

Text: बारामती चा म्हमद्या काही बोलला का?
translated_text: Did the old man from Baramati say anything?
Justification: The question is rhetorical but lacks strong emotion.

Text: अरे हरामखोर म्हातारं झालाय तरी अजुन रग काय कमी होेय नाय अनगातली..
translated_text: Oh bastard, even though he has become old, he still has less anger.
Justification: The abusive word "हरामखोर" and mocking tone convey disgust.

Text: राणे आणि लायकी....हा संबंध कधीच विसर्जित झालाय.
translated_text: Rane and Laiki....this relationship has never been dissolved.
Justification: The phrase sarcastically implies disappointment and disillusionment.

Text: गद्दार आले अजून खोके मिळतात का ते बघायला
translated_text: The traitors came to see if they could still get the boxes.
Justification: गद्दार is used critically but tone stays sarcastic and neutral.

Text: सर्रास बघतोय अशा चूका, खरंच पिऊन बातम्या देतात का?
translated_text: Do you really drink and report on news like this, which is a common mistake?
Justification: The phrase "खरंच पिऊन" (really drunk) implies irresponsible behavior and evokes disgust.

Text: तुमची फारच खोलून मारली राव पण
translated_text: You hit me very hard, Rao.
Justification: The phrase "खोलून मारली" (hit hard) implies emotional pain, suggesting sadness.

Text: बरोबर... भ्रष्टाचार नाही, दलाली खाल्ली ने
translated_text: Right... no corruption, just bribery.
Justification: Sarcastic tone with factual framing; neutral emotion.

Text: ही काय भानगड आहे……समजाऊन सांगेन का कोणी?
translated_text: What is this nonsense... Can someone explain it to me?
Justification: भानगड (nonsense/chaos) reflects confusion with a frustrated tone.

Text: अरे तुझ्या बरोबर असलेली चिंधी सेना बोल. खरी शिवसेना उद्धव बाळासाहेब ठाकरे आहे.
translated_text: Oh, the rag army that is with you, speak up. The real Shiv Sena is Uddhav Balasaheb Thackeray.
Justification: चिंधी सेना is derogatory, yet tone is sarcastically political; neutral.

Text: हे होणारच होते पर्यंत तारीख पे तारीख
translated_text: This was going to happen, date by date.
Justification: तारीख पे तारीख implies delay; expressed as inevitability, neutral.

Text: मुरजी पडणार हे निश्चित होते, घाबरून भाजपाने माघार घेतली.
translated_text: It was certain that Murji would fall, and the BJP backed down out of fear.
Justification: The phrase "घाबरून माघार घेतली" (backed down in fear) directly expresses fear.

Text: पाहून रिप्लाय न करणाऱ्याची संख्या दिवसेंदिवस वाढतच चालली आहे
translated_text: The number of people who don't reply after seeing it is increasing day by day.
Justification: Statement is observational; neutral.

Text: उमेदवारी अर्ज न भरणे ही संस्कृती आणि उमेदवारी अर्ज भरून मागे घेणे ही विकृती.
translated_text: Not filing nomination papers is a culture and filing and withdrawing nomination papers is a perversion.
Justification: विकृती (perversion) conveys contempt and disgust.

Text: नारायण राणे आणि त्यांच्या बेडकांना पण हे सांगा आधी
translated_text: Tell this to Narayan Rane and his frogs first.
Justification: बेडकांना is mocking but tone is politically critical; neutral.

Text: याच शरद पवारांनी शिवसैनिकांना कुत्रे असे संबोधले होते
translated_text: This same Sharad Pawar had called Shiv Sainiks dogs.
Justification: Recounting past incident; descriptive tone.

Text: चार आण्याचा माणूस तुझ्या मालकाने मंत्रिमंडळात का ठेवला होता?
translated_text: Why did your master put a four-figure man in the cabinet?
Justification: चार आण्याचा माणूस as insult reflects surprise or disbelief.

Text: अत्यंत मूर्खपणा दिसून आला आहे तुमचा
translated_text: You have shown great stupidity.
Justification: अत्यंत मूर्खपणा is direct criticism indicating disgust.

Text: तयार रहा लवकरचं मोठा भूकंप होणार
translated_text: Be prepared, a big earthquake will happen soon.
Justification: मोठा भूकंप (big earthquake) metaphorically or literally implies fear.

Text: अपयश पदरात पडल्यावर काही उरले नाही म्हणून जबाबदारी घ्यायला कोणी पुढे आले नाही.
translated_text: When failure struck, no one came forward to take responsibility because there was nothing left.
Justification: Summary of behavior post-failure; stated in reflective neutral tone.

Text: खोके सर्व ओके अशी आहे का?
translated_text: Is everything okay with the box?
Justification: खोके (boxes) implies bribery, but phrased as a question; tone remains neutral.

Text: एकाच घरात एक देशभक्त आणि एक देशद्रोही असू शकतात तर
translated_text: Can there be a patriot and a traitor in the same house?
Justification: The contrast of "देशभक्त" and "देशद्रोही" carries deep disapproval and disgust.

Text: हा हा हा मनसे वाले खा शिव्या लायकी बघा आपली
translated_text: Ha ha ha MNS people, look at your worth.
Justification: Mocking laughter "हा हा हा" and tone suggest joy through ridicule.

Text: भक्तांनो फकीर तोच आहे, पण बदलत नाहीये.
translated_text: Devotees, the fakir is the same, but he is not changing.
Justification: Statement is observational; neutral.

Text: महाराष्ट्राच्या खेळाडूवर दु:खाचा डोंगर, लढतीपूर्वीच प्रशिक्षकांचे निधन, पण तरीही तो लढला आणि…
translated_text: A mountain of grief for a Maharashtra player, the coach passed away before the match, but he still fought and...
Justification: दु:खाचा डोंगर (mountain of grief) indicates deep sadness.

Text: लग्नाच्या मांडवा मधून बिना लग्न होता करवली लोकांना घेऊन निघालेला नवरदेव
translated_text: The groom left the wedding tent without taking the people who were supposed to be married.
Justification: Unusual situation described with no explicit emotion; neutral.

Text: म्हणुन मुंबई गुजरात गुवाहाटी गेली का
translated_text: So why did Mumbai go to Guwahati, Gujarat?
Justification: Sarcastic but no strong emotional tone.

Text: तु ज्या निलेश राने चा समर्थक आहे तो आधी संघ विरोधी होता..
translated_text: Nilesh Rane, whom you support, was previously anti-Sangh.
Justification: Stated as a fact or political reminder; neutral.

Text: या छग्याचे आयबाप मंदिरासमोर फुलमाळा विकायचे. विसरला हा
translated_text: This guy's father used to sell garlands in front of the temple. Forgot this
Justification: Reminiscent and factual; no emotional weight—neutral.

Text: म्हणजे शिंदे सरकार वर भरोसा नाही आहे तर
translated_text: So, there is no trust in the Shinde government.
Justification: Factual and reflective in tone.

Text: मंद असलं का असं सुचत असत.
translated_text: They would suggest that it be slow.
Justification: Sarcastic and light; neutral.

Text: चांगलं काम केलं तरी हे मनसेवर टीका करणारच.. मंद केकप्रेमी
translated_text: Even if they do good work, they will criticize MNS.. Slow cake lovers
Justification: केकप्रेमी is a mocking label, but overall tone is sarcastic—neutral.

Text: ?? महाराष्ट्रासाठी याच काय योगदान आहे?????
translated_text: ?? What is this contribution to Maharashtra?????
Justification: Repetitive question marks and rhetorical tone reflect surprise or disbelief.

Text: मराठी भाषेत द्वेष करणारा पक्ष आहे हा
translated_text: This is a hateful party in Marathi language.
Justification: द्वेष करणारा (hateful) is emotionally charged and conveys disgust.

Text: केवळ प्रसिद्धी साठी हपापलेले समाज आहे हा...
translated_text: This is a society that is only hungry for fame...
Justification: हपापलेले implies criticism, but lacks emotional depth.

Text: लटके जेव्हा हायकोर्टात गेल्या तेव्हा तुम्हाला महाराष्ट्राची राजकीय संस्क्रृती ठाऊक नव्हती का?
translated_text: When Latke went to the High Court, were you not aware of the political culture of Maharashtra?
Justification: Questioning but emotionally flat; neutral.

Text: पत्रा चाळीतील गरीब मराठी लोकांना बेघर करताना लाज कशी वाटली नाही !!
translated_text: How could you not feel ashamed while evicting the poor Marathi people of Patra Chali!!
Justification: लाज कशी वाटली नाही (no shame?) evokes moral disgust.

Text: बरोबर देवा भौ..किती ती जळजळ..
translated_text: Oh my god..how hot she is..
Justification: जळजळ (burning with envy or heat) is metaphorical; shows surprise or mocking.

Text: एकदम बईकि आणि बालिश अर्गुमेंट आहे एकदम तुमच्या सहेबान सारखं
translated_text: It's a very silly and childish argument, just like your friend.
Justification: बालिश अर्गुमेंट (childish argument) expresses contempt and disgust.

Text: तसं तर होणार आहे पण विजय शिवसेना चा नाही.
translated_text: That is going to happen, but the victory will not be for Shiv Sena.
Justification: Predictive and factual; neutral.

Text: नुसत्या धमक्या आणि निकृष्ट दर्जाच ट्रोलींग एवढच काम दिलय राणे, पडळकर, राणा, वाघ यांना...
translated_text: Rane, Padalkar, Rana, Wagh are being given only threats and low-quality trolling...
Justification: Critical but measured; emotionally neutral.

Text: तुझी उद्धव साहेब ठाकरे बद्दल बोलण्याची लायकी नाही...
translated_text: You are not qualified to talk about Uddhav Saheb Thackeray...
Justification: लायकी नाही (not qualified) is dismissive but tone is controlled—neutral.

Text: तुझ्या नवरदेव ने घेतलेल्या लाचेचे पैशे देना.. जनते कडुन भिक का मगत बसली आहे ताई.
translated_text: Give me the bribe money that your husband took.. Why are you begging from the public, Aunty?
Justification: भिक मगत (begging) used sarcastically indicates surprise.

Text: आमच्याकडे लस्सी भक्तांची कमी नाही
translated_text: We have no shortage of lassi devotees.
Justification: The phrase "लस्सी भक्तांची कमी नाही" neutrally states abundance, not expressing emotion.

Text: तुझ्या वर भीक मागुन खायची वेळ आली का..?
translated_text: Is it time for you to beg and eat?
Justification: भीक मागुन खायची (beg and eat) is a rhetorical question, tone is neutral.

Text: ये डर जरूरी है पराभवाचा परिणाम पुढील निवडणुकांवर होऊ नये म्हणून सेफ गेम प्ले...
translated_text: This fear is necessary, so that the defeat does not affect the next elections, we have to play a safe game...
Justification: डर जरूरी है (fear is necessary) is analytical, not emotional, hence neutral.

Text: संघी कोण आहे नीट बघ फुकण्या
translated_text: Look carefully who is Sanghi, Fukanya.
Justification: नीट बघ (look carefully) is an instruction, not emotional.

Text: राघोबा नीचंच होता…पण तोडून मोडून इतिहास कशाला मांडायचा?
translated_text: Raghoba was a hero...but why break up history and present it in a broken way?
Justification: The phrase "तोडून मोडून इतिहास" (breaking up history) signals disappointment, hence sadness.

Text: म्हणजे परीक्षा देणारे गांडू आहेत का?
translated_text: So are the test takers worms?
Justification: परीक्षा देणारे गांडू (test takers are worms) is provocative but lacks emotional force.

Text: मुंबईत पाऊस किती पडावा हे महापालिका ठरवते, तेही भाजपाची सत्ता नसलेली महापालिका.... अकल शुन्य माणूस....
translated_text: The municipal corporation decides how much rain falls in Mumbai, that too without BJP in power.... A mindless person....
Justification: अकल शुन्य माणूस (mindless person) is direct insult, expressing disgust.

Text: भ्रष्टाचारी पतीला ईडी सी.बी.इ. पासून वाचवनारी सावीचीत्रा ताई.. धन्य हो.. पगार वेळेवर मिळतो का..??
translated_text: Savichitra Tai, who saved her corrupt husband from ED CBE.. Be blessed.. Do you get your salary on time..??
Justification: भ्रष्टाचारी पतीला (corrupt husband) and sarcasm show anger.

Text: स्वायत्त हा शब्दच आता हास्यास्पद वाटायला लागला आहे.
translated_text: The very word "autonomy" is now starting to sound ridiculous.
Justification: The phrase "हास्यास्पद वाटायला लागला" (has started to sound ridiculous) shows mockery and clear disdain, indicating disgust.

Text: चॅनेलसाठी टायर मध्ये मार खाल्ला राव त्यांनी...जरासुद्धा किंमत नाही चॅनेलला त्याची
translated_text: Rao beat the tires for the channel...he is not worth it at all for the channel.
Justification: किंमत नाही (not valued) is critical, but the tone remains neutral and descriptive.

Text: काँग्रेसला एक आक्रमक चेहरा असणारा अध्यक्ष हवा होता.
translated_text: Congress wanted a president with an aggressive face.
Justification: This is a factual political observation, without emotional content — neutral.

Text: आमच्याकडे बलात्कार्याना निर्दोष सोडून त्यांचा सत्कार करून मिळेल..- - भाजपा
translated_text: We will get rapists acquitted and felicitated..- - BJP
Justification: Sarcastic praise using "सत्कार" (felicitate) turns into bitter humor — interpreted as dark joy.

Text: हा काळा खेकडा हयाची जातच नांगी मारण्याची
translated_text: This black crab is a breed that is meant to sting.
Justification: नांगी मारण्याची (destructive by nature) reflects strong contempt — disgust.

Text: मविआ चे नेते आणि कार्यकर्ते पिसाल्ले
translated_text: MAVIA leaders and activists were beaten up.
Justification: पिसाल्ले (were beaten up) evokes sympathy — sadness.

Text: हा पाकीट माऱ्या ट्विट करुण पळाला
translated_text: This wallet ran away after I tweeted it.
Justification: पाकीट माऱ्या (pickpocket) is insulting but playful — neutral.

Text: तु कायम आभाळ हेपलत असतोस ना भातळ्या त्यामुळे तुला असं वाटतय वसाड्या
translated_text: You're always looking at the sky, aren't you, Bhatla? That's why you feel this way, Vasadya.
Justification: The mockery is clear, but lacking emotional weight — neutral.

Text: सांभाळुन बुडाला पण मशाल लावु शकतात विरोधकांच्या
translated_text: Even if you manage to drown, you can light the torch for the opposition.
Justification: Strategic commentary without emotional intensity — neutral.

Text: म्हणजे स्वताचे महत्त्व वाढवण्याचा किती हा केविलवाणा प्रयत्न....... शी......
translated_text: I mean, what a pathetic attempt to increase one's own importance....... Shi......
Justification: केविलवाणा प्रयत्न (pathetic attempt) and "शी" express scorn — disgust.

Text: भेंडी, हे लोक जगाचं वाटोळं करुनच सोडणार आहेत वाटतं...
translated_text: Okra, I think these people are going to leave the world behind...
Justification: जगाचं वाटोळं (ruin the world) conveys hopelessness — sadness.

Text: गद्दार सेना आता भाजपची ढाल बनून पाठीत तलवारीने वार करणार
translated_text: The traitor army will now become the shield of BJP and stab it in the back with a sword
Justification: Use of "गद्दार" (traitor) and "तलवारीने वार" (stab) is aggressive — disgust.

Text: अक्कल घान बाई तुझी मनमोहनसिंग यांच्या बद्दल बोलायची पण लायकी नाही आहे.
translated_text: You, wise lady, are not qualified to talk about Manmohan Singh.
Justification: लायकी नाही (not qualified) is insulting, but tone stays neutral.

Text: आपलं चालत का मोदी आणि शाहांपुढे काही
translated_text: Are we ahead of Modi and Shah?
Justification: Question, rhetorical — neutral tone.

Text: ईतके दिवस झोपले होते का? # गेम प्लॅन फसला म्हणुन सगळं नाटक आहे.
translated_text: Have you been sleeping for so many days? # The game plan failed, so it's all drama.
Justification: The accusatory tone and blame clearly express anger.

Text: थोडक्यात काँग्रेसला वाचवण्याचा अशा यात्रांचा काहीही लाभ होणार नाही, हेच खरे !
translated_text: In short, such yatras will not be of any use in saving the Congress, that is true!
Justification: The dismissal of value in a frustrated tone reflects anger.

Text: म्हणून तर आसाराम, नारायण साई, राम रहीम सिंह, हे जेलात आहे.....
translated_text: That's why Asaram, Narayan Sai, Ram Rahim Singh are in jail...
Justification: The fall from power to prison evokes sadness.

Text: लुक्खा झाला आहे तो,, पाय पूसने लिब्रांडु लोकांचे जीने
translated_text: He has become a fool, the people of Librandu are living with their feet pressed against his feet.
Justification: लुक्खा and metaphor suggest insult — disgust.

Text: आता हा सतरंज्या उचल्या लोकांना ज्ञान शिकवणार का..
translated_text: Now will this sataranjaya teach people knowledge..
Justification: Mocking, yet calm — neutral.

Text: त्यात पण तुमच्या पक्षाची पब्लिसिटी कशाला? एकट्या दिदिंचा फोटो नव्हता का?
translated_text: Why is there publicity for your party in it? Wasn't there a photo of Didi alone?
Justification: कशाला questioning tone indicates surprise.

Text: पण त्या ऑफिस मध्ये कोणी काम करत नाही
translated_text: But no one works in that office.
Justification: Casual observation, not emotionally expressive — neutral.

Text: पालघर चे साधूची गणना नागरीक म्हणून होत नाही .
translated_text: The Sadhu of Palghar is not counted as a citizen.
Justification: Claim stated plainly — neutral.

Text: आता उद्धव ठाकरे यांच्या शिवसैनिकांना म्हणतील की आपल्याला बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवायचे आहे...कठीण आहे
translated_text: Now Uddhav Thackeray's Shiv Sainiks will be told that they want to defeat Balasaheb's Shiv Sena...it is difficult.
Justification: Statement with critical tone, emotionally flat — neutral.

Text: स्वात निवडुन याव एतक धमक नाही का ?
translated_text: Isn't it enough to choose Swat?
Justification: धमक नाही का suggests admiration — joy.

Text: आताच्या गलिच्छ राजकरण पाहता, मनसे हा जनतेसाठी सक्षम पर्याय. आता लढायचं ते जिंकण्यासाठीचं.
translated_text: Given the current dirty politics, MNS is a viable option for the people. Now, the fight is to win.
Justification: Political opinion with determined tone — neutral.

Text: तुझी लायकी आहे का बोलायला शिक आगोदर
translated_text: Do you deserve it? Learn to speak first.
Justification: लायकी and imperative tone indicate anger.

Text: राजकीय तज्ञांची हि अवस्था?
translated_text: Is this the state of political experts?
Justification: Sarcastic, but neutral in delivery.

Text: ऋतुजा लटकेंचा राजीनामा स्वीकारत नव्हते तेव्हा कुठे गेला होता राज साहेब
translated_text: Where did Raj Saheb go when he was not accepting Rituja Latke's resignation?
Justification: Critical, but neutral.

Text: बाळासाहेब नावाचे जेवढे हसू कराल तेव्हढे उद्धव ठाकरेंचे नुकसान आहे...
translated_text: The more you laugh at the name Balasaheb, the more Uddhav Thackeray loses...
Justification: Causal argument, not emotional — neutral.

Text: पुढच्या निवडणुकीत तुम्हाला एकापेक्षा जास्त जागा मिळतील' - हाही एक भ्रम आहे
translated_text: You will get more than one seat in the next election' - this is also an illusion
Justification: Statement of disbelief — neutral.

Text: वाया गेलेली केस उत्तम उदाहरण म्हणजे आपण
translated_text: A good example of wasted hair is you.
Justification: वाया गेलेली केस is an insult — disgust.

Text: त्या उद्धव‌ ठाकरेने म्हटले आहे की मला कोणाचाच प्रस्ताव मिळाला नाही!
translated_text: That Uddhav Thackeray has said that I have not received any proposal from anyone!
Justification: Angry disbelief — anger.

Text: पंढरपुर, देगलुर आणि कोल्हापूर येथे भाजप ची संस्कृती चुलीत गेली होती का?
translated_text: Was the BJP culture destroyed in Pandharpur, Degalur and Kolhapur?
Justification: चुलीत गेली implies sarcasm but lacks emotional intensity, hence neutral.

Text: भाई स्वतःची नाचक्की स्वतःच करू नये वर्ष तुमचेच राज्य होते हे विसरता कसे
translated_text: Brother, don't do your own thing. How can you forget that it was your rule for years?
Justification: नाचक्की and "विसरता कसे" reflect frustration — anger.

Text: अति शहाणा त्याचा बैल रिकामा.
translated_text: The wise man's ox is empty.
Justification: The proverb "अति शहाणा..." is proverbial — neutral.

Text: लढ्याचे होते ना, माघार का घेतली? फाटली ना
translated_text: It was a fight, wasn't it? Why did you retreat? It was torn apart.
Justification: फाटली ना is rhetorical sarcasm, indicating surprise.

Text: मग जोकसत्ता वाले कुठे गायब,ते तर आधी हवे!का त्यांचे फिक्स झाले?
translated_text: So where did the people with power disappear to? They should have been fixed first!
Justification: फिक्स झाले? implies corruption and expresses anger.

Text: तांदूळ चोर मग काय चायेबाचा लावायचा का मिया खलीफाचा हे जेल मधीच छान राहते
translated_text: Rice thief, why should I wear a hat? Mia Khalifa's is still beautiful in jail.
Justification: Absurdity in "चायेबाचा लावायचा का मिया खलीफाचा" makes it sarcastic, but neutral overall.

Text: गद्दार ...ब्लॉक केला !
translated_text: Traitor...blocked!
Justification: Sudden declaration "ब्लॉक केला!" indicates surprise.

Text: त्यामुळे गुजरातच्या राजकारण्यांसाठी मुंबई हा 'अनफिनिश्ड बिझनेस' आहे.
translated_text: Therefore, Mumbai is 'unfinished business' for Gujarat politicians.
Justification: अनफिनिश्ड बिझनेस is observational, not emotional — neutral.

Text: साहेब, पुळचट निषेध नको ठोस कार्यवाही हवी नाहीतर हि सापाची पिलावळ महाराष्ट्र गिळून टाकेल.
translated_text: We don't want weak protests, we need action, else this snake gang will eat Maharashtra.
Justification: "सापाची पिलावळ" is metaphorical critique — stated neutrally.

Text: मालवणी लोकांची नावा खराब करणार हा यो..बुटका वांगा
translated_text: This guy will ruin the name of the people of Malvani..Butka Vanga
Justification: "बुटका वांगा" is mocking and derogatory — conveys disgust.

Text: देशाचे तुकडे कोणी केले भाजपा ने का.
translated_text: Who broke the country — BJP?
Justification: The rhetorical "कोणी केले" indicates surprise or disbelief.

Text: पेरे पाटील माहिती नाहीत म्हटल्यावर तुमचा अभ्यास कमी आहे
translated_text: Saying you don’t know Pere Patil shows lack of study.
Justification: "अभ्यास कमी आहे" is critical, but stated calmly — neutral.

Text: हा खरंच चांगला आहे के हे सर्व सोशल मीडिया वाले इन्फ्ल्यून्सरस चुतीया बनवताय
translated_text: Is this really good or are all these social media influencers making a fool of themselves?
Justification: Use of "चुतीया बनवताय" indicates disbelief and sarcasm, suggesting surprise.

Text: हिंदू प्रथा विचार करून केलेल्या आहेत, या विचारांचा अपमान सहन करणार नाही...
translated_text: Hindu customs are thoughtful, I won't tolerate insult to them...
Justification: "अपमान सहन करणार नाही" asserts a stance, but not emotionally intense.

Text: भुजबळ साहेब हे कसल बोलणं तुमचं
translated_text: Mr. Bhujbal, what kind of talk is that?
Justification: Tone is questioning, but not emotionally charged.

Text: हळुहळू डोक्यावर परिणाम होणार आहे हे नक्की.
translated_text: Gradually affecting the head — that's for sure.
Justification: "परिणाम होणार" is a prediction without strong emotion.

Text: नशीब हा खाली नाय उतरला नायतर याचा किरीट सोमय्या केला असता शिवसैनिकांनी
translated_text: Lucky he didn’t come down, else Shiv Sainiks would have attacked.
Justification: A threat hinted, but emotionally flat.

Text: तूझ्या बुडाला आग का लागली आहे पण अरे हो पाकिट आले असेल तिकडून
translated_text: Why is your butt on fire? Oh, wallet must've arrived!
Justification: "बुडाला आग" is used humorously — surprise.

Text: त्यांना सध्या हागवण लागली आहे...!
translated_text: They are literally crapping themselves now!
Justification: Crude phrasing "हागवण लागली" is an insult — anger.

Text: कमळी ने शेपूट घातली म्हणे यांचं तर आले घोड्यावर अन गेले गाढवावर असे झाले
translated_text: Said the lotus grew a tail — came on a horse, left on a donkey.
Justification: "घोड्यावर अन गेले गाढवावर" is satirical but emotionally flat.

Text: आता वाटतं उगाच एवढी क्रेझ होती.दुसरं मनोरंजन काही नव्हतं ना
translated_text: Now I think there was such a craze for no reason. There was no other entertainment, right?
Justification: "उगाच एवढी क्रेझ होती" is reflective and rational

Text: अरे हा मातोश्री च्या अंगणात निवडणूक हरलेला उमेदवार. ह्याची ईशान सिद्धिकी मारून आमदार होतो.
translated_text: Oh, this candidate who lost the election in the courtyard of Matoshree. He became an MLA by defeating Ishaan Siddhiki.
Justification: "निवडणूक हरलेला" is a fact-based recount

Text: काहीजण अफवा पसरवत आहेत...आपण शिंदे गटात जाताय म्हणुन....
translated_text: Some people are spreading rumors...saying that we are joining the Shinde faction...
Justification: "अफवा पसरवत" is an observation without emotional cue

Text: सामान्य माणसाच्या खिशातून या लोकांना पगार जातो तरी हे लोकं जबाबदारी पार पाडत नाहीत...
translated_text: Even though these people get their salaries from the pockets of ordinary people, they don't fulfill their responsibilities...
Justification: "जबाबदारी पार पाडत नाहीत" is criticism stated factually

Text: सर म्हणजे भाजप आता काय पारदर्शक निर्णय देईल का
translated_text: Sir, will BJP give any transparent decision now?
Justification: "पारदर्शक निर्णय" is a rhetorical question without emotion

Text: याच वर्षी वैद्यकीय महाविद्यालय सुरू करण्याचा आपला निर्धार होता. सत्तांतरानंतर आपण काय केले?( / )
translated_text: We were determined to start a medical college this year. What did we do after the change of power?( / )
Justification: "आपला निर्धार" highlights a broken intent

Text: ये तेलंगाना शासन व प्रशासन हिंदू व हिंदुत्व विरोधी मानसिकता है ।
translated_text: This Telangana government and administration is Hindu and anti-Hindu mentality.
Justification: "विरोधी मानसिकता" is an ideological assertion

Text: मोदी च्या राज्यात असे खर्च परवडत नाही
translated_text: Modi's state cannot afford such expenses.
Justification: "असे खर्च परवडत नाही" is a practical claim

Text: तू कोण सांगणार ? असे ज्ञान मामीच्या वेळेस गटार नाली मध्ये जाते का
translated_text: Who will tell you? Does such knowledge go down the drain in the time of the aunt?
Justification: "गटार नाली मध्ये जाते" is sarcastic but neutral

Text: गुरू आणि चेला एका वरचढ एक कलाकार आहेत.........!!!!!!
translated_text: Guru and disciple are one in the same.........!!!!!!
Justification: "वरचढ एक कलाकार" conveys scorn

Text: अरे हरामखोर तुला किती लोकांनी पैदा केले आहे
translated_text: Oh, you bastard, how many people have given birth to you?
Justification: "किती लोकांनी पैदा" is said in disbelief

Text: चिंताजनक! ने एकट्या मुंबई शहरातून मध्ये आत्तापर्यंत किलो ड्रग्ज जप्त केले आहेत!
translated_text: Alarming! The police have seized 100,000 kilos of drugs from Mumbai city alone so far!
Justification: "चिंताजनक" reveals shock at scale

Text: एकनाथ शिंदेंच्या आडून भाजपा अजून किती महाराष्ट्रद्रोही निर्णय घेणार आहेत ?
translated_text: How many more anti-Maharashtra decisions will the BJP take under the cover of Eknath Shinde?
Justification: "महाराष्ट्रद्रोही निर्णय" is accusatory but statement-like

Text: यांची लोकं अजून उदरनिर्वाहासाठी मुंबईला जातात,या कमिशनर पेक्षा हे साहेब फेल गेलेत.
translated_text: His people still go to Mumbai to earn a living, this gentleman has failed more than this commissioner.
Justification: "फेल गेलेत" expresses disappointment

Text: बाळासाहेब ठाकरेंचा ‘थापा’ एकनाथ शिंदेंना जाऊन का मिळाला? चंपासिंह स्पष्टच म्हणाले…
translated_text: Why did Eknath Shinde get Balasaheb Thackeray's 'Thapa'? Champasingh clearly said...
Justification: "स्पष्टच म्हणाले" is narrative

Text: लोकसत्तेने आपली लायकी पुन्हा एकदा जगाला दाखवली आहे. लोकांची फसवणूक हेच यांचे ध्येय.
translated_text: People's power has once again shown its worth to the world. Their goal is to deceive the people.
Justification: "फसवणूक हेच यांचे ध्येय" is a strong claim

Text: शिवसेना ठाकरेंचीच.. तुझी गद्दार सेना आहे भडव्या
translated_text: Shiv Sena belongs to Thackeray.. your army is traitorous, Bhadya.
Justification: "गद्दार सेना" is used in an accusatory, angry tone

Text: रोजगार म्हणजे फक्त नौकरी हा भ्रम आहे.
translated_text: Employment is just a job, an illusion.
Justification: "भ्रम आहे" is philosophical, not emotional

Text: तुझ्या पक्षाचा बाजार उठलाय त्यामुळे तू गप्प बस खाली !!
translated_text: Your party's market is up, so shut up!!
Justification: "गप्प बस" is a direct command reflecting anger

Text: पंढरपूर च्या वेळी एक जण नाक घासत गेला होता पाठिंबा मागायला.
translated_text: During Pandharpur, a man went to ask for support.
Justification: "नाक घासत" reflects submission or humiliation

Text: हा तर अपमान आहे मॅम...!! तुमच्या ट्विटचा....!! लगेच ब्लॉक करा.....!!
translated_text: This is an insult ma'am...!! Your tweet...!! Block it immediately...!!
Justification: "अपमान आहे" is a direct emotional response

Text: अति प्रसन्न दिसताय..... बस करा आता... आम्हाला सहन होत नाही ही प्रसन्नता बघून....
translated_text: Looking very happy..... sit down now... we can't bear to see this happiness....
Justification: "प्रसन्नता" conveys visible joy

Text: जिलेटीन खासदाला च्या अटकेपासुन वाचविण्याकरिता एकनाथ चिंदी ने गद्दारी केली……
translated_text: Eknath Chindi betrayed Gelatin Khasdala to save him from arrest...
Justification: "गद्दारी केली" is a serious claim, stated plainly

Text: तू एकटा गेला असता भीक मागायला, लहान मुलीला का नेले सोबत!
translated_text: You went to beg alone, why did you take a little girl with you?
Justification: "लहान मुलीला" implies surprise over involving a child in begging

Text: शिरसाठ फुटला तर फुटला .आता हा आला पुन्हा मदतीला
translated_text: If the head is broken, it is broken. Now he has come to help again.
Justification: "पुन्हा मदतीला" is noted plainly

Text: हे तिघ बाप बेटे बेवडे आहे कुठे यांचा नादी लागतात
translated_text: These three fathers and daughters are so stupid, where do their roots come from?
Justification: "बेवडे" implies contempt and derision

Text: भक्त आणि बद्दल बोलत आहे। काय बोलणार
translated_text: Talking about devotees and what to say.
Justification: "काय बोलणार" signals resignation without emotion

Text: ती कोकणी नाही मूळची नेपाळीच आहेत म्हणून दिसतात पण बघा नेपाळी असल्या सारखे.....
translated_text: She is not Konkani, she is originally Nepali, but she looks like she is Nepali.....
Justification: "नेपाळी" is used as a plain identifier

Text: लय हसलो महाराष्ट्र दौरा पुढच्या जन्मात होणार आहे काय? देव जाणे
translated_text: Will Lai Haslo's Maharashtra tour happen in his next life? God knows.
Justification: "पुढच्या जन्मात" implies hopelessness

Text: नाना म्हणजे काय अक्षय कुमार आहेत होय लिहून दिलेली प्रश्न विचारायला
translated_text: What does Nana mean? Akshay Kumar is yes, ask the written question.
Justification: "लिहून दिलेली प्रश्न" makes a sarcastic point neutrally

Text: गद्दारी केलीत तरी ठाकरेंच्या जीवावरच तुम्ही उड्या मारा त्याशिवाय तुमचं राजकीय अस्तित्व शून्य आहे.
translated_text: Even if you commit treason, you will risk Thackeray's life, otherwise your political existence is null and void.
Justification: "राजकीय अस्तित्व शून्य" expresses factual evaluation

Text: मग त्याच वेळेस का केली नाही
translated_text: Then why didn't you do it at the same time?
Justification: "का केली नाही" questions delayed action

Text: निवडणुकीत पळून जाताना लाज नाही वाटलि का?
translated_text: Didn't you feel ashamed when you ran away from the election?
Justification: "लाज नाही वाटलि" implies a factual taunt

Text: चाटून पण आला, तुम्ही एवढा शब्दांचा कंजूषपणा नका करु,राव!
translated_text: It came after licking, don't be so stingy with words, Rao!
Justification: "शब्दांचा कंजूषपणा" reflects frustration

Text: भाड्या निस्त भुंकायचं.... कुत्र्यांना जेवढी किंमत आहे तेवढी पण तुम्हांला नाहीये
translated_text: You bark at me for no reason.... Dogs are not worth as much as you are worth.
Justification: "भुंकायचं" expresses verbal aggression

Text: हा टक्कर देऊ शकतो... टोमणे बाईंना... एकदम जबरी लॉजिक आहे ...
translated_text: This can be a challenge... to tease women... it's absolutely logical...
Justification: "जबरी लॉजिक" is appreciation with mild sarcasm

Text: तुम्ही आता उडवायच्या सुपाऱ्या घेता का सुपारी क्वीन
translated_text: Are you buying flying betel nuts now, Betel Queen?
Justification: "सुपारी क्वीन" adds mild ridicule

Text: पहा, ज्यांच्याकडे कोणतेही तर्कशुद्ध किंवा प्रामाणिक तर्क नाही त्यांनी शिव्या देणे सुरू केले
translated_text: Look, those who have no rational or honest reasoning started swearing.
Justification: "शिव्या देणे" expresses low discourse

Text: रव्याचा लाडू फेकण्याची भाषा करणार्यांना रव्याच्या लाडवाची महतीच कळाली नाही......
translated_text: Those who talk about throwing semolina laddus have not understood the importance of semolina laddus......
Justification: "महतीच कळाली नाही" conveys criticism without emotion

Text: . वर्ष फक्त काय उद्धवची मारण्यात घालवली का?
translated_text: Did you spend the year just killing Uddhav?
Justification: "मारण्यात घालवली" conveys exaggerated surprise

Text: कोण,रंगा-बिल्ला का?ते दोन्ही बाराचे खूप आहेत
translated_text: Who, Ranga-Billa? They are both very twelve.
Justification: "बाराचे खूप" indicates a dramatic reaction

Text: गद्दारी तुमच्या रक्तातच आहे साहेब
translated_text: Betrayal is in your blood, sir.
Justification: "गद्दारी...रक्तातच" signals character judgment

Text: भ्रष्टाचार झालाय कमी आहे त्यात
translated_text: There is less corruption in it.
Justification: "कमी आहे" implies understatement

Text: घरच्यांना फुकट्या स्कीम राबवावी ते पण मिळणार्या मानधनात.
translated_text: They should implement free schemes for their families, even within the remuneration they receive.
Justification: "फुकट्या स्कीम" suggests sarcastic criticism of misuse of benefits.

Text: अतुल सर का बरं खुन्नस नी पाहत आहेत..
translated_text: Atul sir, why are you watching with such disgust?
Justification: "खुन्नस नी" implies a look of contempt.

Text: गद्दार पक्षाचे नेते या शब्दाने सुरवात हवी होती
translated_text: It should have started with the words "traitor party leader".
Justification: "गद्दार पक्षाचे नेते" shows political bias.

Text: या पुरस्कार प्राप्तीसाठी स्वतः नागडे होऊन फोटो काढून घेणे अनिवार्य आहे का?
translated_text: Is it mandatory to get naked and take photos to receive this award?
Justification: "नागडे होऊन फोटो" implies extreme sarcasm.

Text: तुझी पण संपलीय पाहा जरा काडी पण नाही पेटणार बाबा
translated_text: You're done too, even a stick won't light, Dad.
Justification: "काडी पण नाही पेटणार" symbolizes complete defeat.

Text: बाळासाहेब ठाकरे यांच्या सोबत गद्दारांचा कसलाही संबंध नाही.
translated_text: Traitors have no connection with Balasaheb Thackeray.
Justification: "गद्दारांचा कसलाही संबंध नाही" is factual denial.

Text: हा म्हणजे नीचोत्तम आहे
translated_text: This is the worst.
Justification: "नीचोत्तम" is an extreme expression of contempt.

Text: एक वास्तव.. शिक्षकांच्या हातातून छडी गायब झाली आणि जग बेशिस्त झाल...!
translated_text: A reality... cane gone, world is undisciplined...!
Justification: "जग बेशिस्त" reflects decline, hence sadness.

Text: अर्थतज्ञ साहेब मग तुम्ही विस्तृत पणे सांगा का घसरण चालू आहे?
translated_text: Economist sir, could you please explain in detail why the decline is ongoing?
Justification: "घसरण चालू आहे" shows inquiry, not emotion.

Text: हे फक्त नावाला प्रमुख राहिलेत सगळे आदेश तर बारामतीचे भावी पंतप्रधान देतात त्यांना
translated_text: These people remain leaders in name only, all orders come from Baramati’s future PM.
Justification: "फक्त नावाला प्रमुख" reflects token leadership.

Text: आपल्या खोक्यातून वाटणार का साहेब?
translated_text: Will you please share it from your box, sir?
Justification: "खोक्यातून वाटणार" implies sarcasm.

Text: आंधळा आहेस तू ........ आणि बेरोजगार पण
translated_text: You are blind........ and unemployed too.
Justification: "आंधळा" and "बेरोजगार" are personal jabs.

Text: आमदार तिकडचे आणि येणार मुंबईत.... औरंगाबादेत एवढे चांगले हॉस्पिटल नाही का...?
translated_text: The MLA is from there and will come to Mumbai.... Isn't there such a good hospital in Aurangabad...?
Justification: "औरंगाबादेत... हॉस्पिटल नाही" implies sarcasm.

Text: ताई हा मूर्ख आहे काय लिहितो त्याला त्याचाच समजत नाही
translated_text: This guy is a fool, doesn’t understand what he writes.
Justification: "मूर्ख" and "समजत नाही" signal intellectual contempt.

Text: हे असं सगळं झालं असं म्हणतोयस, तू काय झाडू मारायला होता का ठाकरेंकडे?
translated_text: You are saying that all this happened, why did you want to throw a broom at Thackeray?
Justification: "झाडू मारायला" is a sarcastic rhetorical jab expressing surprise

Text: हे पार लहान पोरा सारख करायला लागलं भो आता
translated_text: This is starting to look like a little boy now.
Justification: "लहान पोरा सारख" is a metaphor for immaturity

Text: लवकर कळले तुम्हाला.. इतक्या वर्ष काय होत मग?
translated_text: You soon realized... what was going on for so many years?
Justification: "इतक्या वर्ष काय होत" conveys retrospective surprise

Text: हे कृत्य अत्यंत दुर्दैवी आहे निषेध हे अस कृत्य करण्यारला शिक्षा झालीच पाहिजे
translated_text: This act is very unfortunate. Protest. The person who committed this act must be punished.
Justification: "अत्यंत दुर्दैवी" and "शिक्षा झालीच पाहिजे" shows intense societal disapproval

Text: चांगलीच चढली आहे..देशीच मारली काय
translated_text: It's a good climb..did you kill it yourself?
Justification: "चांगलीच चढली" reflects light-hearted or humorous surprise

Text: अस वकात्याव देशाच्या अर्थमंत्र्यांना शोभत का???
translated_text: Is this kind of speech befitting the country's Finance Minister???
Justification: "वकात्याव" implies disbelief or shock

Text: मला म्हणायचे होते की मध्ये पण खूप सगळी घराणेशाही आहे.
translated_text: I wanted to say that there is a lot of nepotism in the middle.
Justification: "घराणेशाही" reflects a commentary on social structure

Text: एक तुच्या तर विना आमंत्रण पाकिस्तान मध्ये जाऊन बिर्याणी खाऊन आला होता
translated_text: One of you even went to Pakistan without an invitation and ate biryani.
Justification: "विना आमंत्रण पाकिस्तान" reflects disgust at behavior viewed as betrayal

Text: सकाळ सकाळी कच्ची मारली का ..शीतल जी ..
translated_text: Did you beat me raw this morning? Sheetal ji..
Justification: "कच्ची मारली" is an informal expression without emotional charge

Text: मराठवाड्यात परतीच्या पावसाचं थैमान, 'या' जिल्ह्यांना फटका
translated_text: Heavy rains return to Marathwada, 'these' districts hit
Justification: "थैमान" is a factual descriptor of heavy rainfall

Text: टाटा समूहाची मोठी खेळी! सूचिबद्ध कंपन्यांची संख्या अर्धी होणार, लाखो शेअरधारकांवर होणार परिणाम
translated_text: Tata Group's big move! The number of listed companies will be halved, millions of shareholders will be affected
Justification: "लाखो शेअरधारकांवर होणार परिणाम" shows public dissatisfaction

Text: हिंदुत्वाचा घात केला, त्याच वेळी शिलक सेनेचा असाच अंत होणार, हे ठरले होते
translated_text: It was decided that the Shilak Sena would end up like this at the same time that Hindutva was assassinated.
Justification: "हिंदुत्वाचा घात केला" is presented as political commentary

Text: शिंदे गटाचा विरोध या लोकांनाच होता
translated_text: These people were the ones who opposed the Shinde group.
Justification: "विरोध या लोकांनाच होता" is a factual statement

Text: वर्षावरून सुद्धा असेच कोणीतरी निघून गेले होते कार्यकर्ते रूपी फॉलोअर्स मिळवण्यासाठी. काय योगायोग
translated_text: Someone had gone from year to year to gain followers as an activist. What a coincidence.
Justification: "काय योगायोग" highlights irony and surprise

Text: सर, असे "अप्पे"लपोटी बनू नका. इतरांचा पण विचार करा की...
translated_text: Sir, don't be such a "little" person. Think about others too...
Justification: "इतरांचा पण विचार करा" is a polite suggestion

Text: शेंबड पोरग सांगेल हे उद्योग कोणाचे आहेत
translated_text: Shembad Porag will tell you who owns these industries.
Justification: "शेंबड पोरग" is sarcastic but contextually neutral

Text: काही लोकांना गवरमेंट ने काहीही केले तरी समाधान होत नाही! त्याच्यावर आपला एक, असे धोरण!
translated_text: Some people are not satisfied no matter what the government does! We have one policy against them!
Justification: "समाधान होत नाही" indicates irritation

Text: तुम्ही निवडणुकीत पराभूत झाले तेव्हा दरारा कुठ गेला होता
translated_text: Where did the fear go when you lost the election?
Justification: "दरारा कुठ गेला होता" implies fear was lost, indicating fear of failure.

Text: आहे तोच देश संभाळता येत नाही आणि म्हणे नेपाळ भारतात विलीन होणार
translated_text: The country cannot be maintained as it is and Nepal will merge with India.
Justification: "संभाळता येत नाही" is critique but remains neutral in tone.

Text: आपल्या कडे महत्वाचे विषय सोडून बाकी सर्व दाखवले जाते...
translated_text: Everything else is shown to you except the important topics...
Justification: Focuses on media critique, neutral in tone.

Text: हा जातीवादी आहे
translated_text: This is racist.
Justification: "जातीवादी" reflects moral disgust.

Text: शेम्बड्या मुख्यमंत्र्याने राणेंवर गुन्हा दाखल केला रडत रडत तेव्हा चालले का?
translated_text: Did the Chief Minister of Shembadya file a case against Rane while crying?
Justification: "रडत रडत" adds sarcastic surprise.

Text: खूप इरिटेट झालं आता पावसामुळे
translated_text: I'm very irritated now because of the rain.
Justification: "इरिटेट झालं" clearly shows annoyance.

Text: चिन्हं नाही खोके भारदस्त आहे चिन्हं असुन उपयोग नाही ते त्यांना झेपलं पण पाहिजेल
translated_text: There are no signs, the box is overloaded, there are signs but they are of no use, they are just a jump away, but they need it.
Justification: Satirical political observation.

Text: अरे गोबर तुला धर्मांन्ध कळलं असत तर तू टक्का घेऊन मेरिट नसता आला
translated_text: Oh gobar, if you had known about religion, you wouldn't have come here with a percentage of merit.
Justification: Sarcasm without overt emotional tone.

Text: रजीनाम्या साठी त्रास देणारे तुमच्या सारखे कुळे तेव्हा संस्कृती आठवली नाही का बे
translated_text: Didn't you remember the culture when you were the ones who were bothering you for resignation?
Justification: Tone reflects disgust toward cultural hypocrisy.

Text: मेट्रो सिटी वगैरे नाही, साधारण वाद, गैरसमज किंवा भांडणं ही साडेतीन जिल्ह्यातच दिसून येतील.
translated_text: There are no metro cities, and ordinary disputes, misunderstandings, or fights will only be seen in three and a half districts.
Justification: Regional criticism in neutral phrasing.

Text: विजय दर्डा आहे किड
translated_text: Vijay Darda is a kid.
Justification: Dismissive but not emotionally loaded.

Text: बस का आता अजून किती छळ करणार बिचार्यचा
translated_text: Just wait, how much more will you torture the poor thing?
Justification: "छळ करणार" suggests intense frustration and anger.

Text: हे अयोग्य आहे कारण ह्याने अजून सहानुभूती मिळणार हे मात्र निश्चित आहे..!
translated_text: This is wrong because it will definitely garner more sympathy..!
Justification: "अयोग्य आहे", "सहानुभूती मिळणार" signals frustration and indignation.

Text: मेहनतीने तिने सुवर्णपदक कमविले. आणि तुम्ही गद्दारी करून सत्ता कमवली.
translated_text: She earned the gold medal through hard work. And you gained power through betrayal.
Justification: Neutral juxtaposition of two contrasting statements.

Text: हा नक्की परतीचा पाऊस आहे की, नदी नाल्यांना भरतीचा पाऊस आहे?
translated_text: Is this really a return rain or is it flooding the rivers and canals?
Justification: Curious inquiry — neutral.

Text: पण यांच्या कडून अपेक्षा का ठेवता
translated_text: But why expect anything from them?
Justification: Cynical tone — emotionally restrained.

Text: तू पत्रकार आहेस हा तुझा भ्रम आहे.
translated_text: It is your illusion that you are a journalist.
Justification: Dismissive critique — emotionally neutral.

Text: ते म्हणून तर चार परेनंत जागे असतात.
translated_text: That's why they are awake for four hours.
Justification: Descriptive statement without emotional charge.

Text: म्हणजेच फेकसत्ता लोकसत्ता ही देश विरोधी विचारांनी भरलेला आहे
translated_text: It means Fake Power, Lok Satta is full of anti-national thoughts.
Justification: Expressing opinion, emotionally neutral.

Text: हे कुणाच्या बाजूने बोलतील काही नेम नाही!
translated_text: No telling whose side they’ll take!
Justification: The uncertainty paired with "काही नेम नाही" reflects frustration.

Text: थोड्या वेळाने दुखायला लागले की रडशील पण
translated_text: You’ll cry once it starts hurting.
Justification: Sarcastic but flat delivery.

Text: चित्पावन भट्या आहे का तू ? संघोट्या चोळत बसलाय गोट्या
translated_text: Are you Chitpavan Bhatya? Sitting rubbing your knuckles.
Justification: Surprised tone through identity mockery.

Text: नाही तिथे तोंड खूपसले तर असेच होणार.. पुन्हा एकदा तोंडावर आपटले...!!
translated_text: If you interfere, this will happen... slapped again!
Justification: "तोंडावर आपटले" reflects irritation.

Text: तुम्ही असा बैलांचा अपमान नाही करू शकत
translated_text: You can't insult bulls like that.
Justification: "अपमान" conveys disdain.

Text: शिक्षणाचा व्यापार मांडुन सरकारने जनतेच्या मुलभुत हक्कावरच गदा आणलेली आहे.
translated_text: Education commercialization harms citizens' rights.
Justification: "गदा आणलेली" shows strong disapproval.

Text: धनु मुंडे ला सख्ख्या काकापेक्षा पवार जवळचे झाले तेव्हा तोंड बंद होते का
translated_text: Did he keep quiet when he chose Pawar over his uncle?
Justification: Posed as a question — neutral tone.

Text: ते जेवढा त्रास देणार लोक आता त्यांचा तेवढाच द्वेष करणार
translated_text: The more trouble they cause, the more people will hate them.
Justification: "द्वेष करणार" clearly signals a feeling of disgust.

Text: लायकी कळली वाटतं...आता असे प्रेम पत्र यापुढच्या सगळ्या निवडणुकांसाठी पाहायला भेटतील....
translated_text: I think I've realized my worth... now we'll see love letters like this for all upcoming elections.
Justification: The phrase "प्रेम पत्र" and realization tone suggests joy.

Text: ही वर्दीची मस्ती उतरवली गेली पाहिजे.
translated_text: This uniform arrogance must be brought down.
Justification: "मस्ती उतरवली" strongly reflects anger.

Text: "भारत हरला नाही, इंग्लंड जिंकला"
translated_text: India did not lose, England won.
Justification: Celebratory reframing suggests joy.

Text: दम आहे का आता ह्याला बोलायला ,तुझ्या बुडा खालून धूर निघेल
translated_text: Got energy to talk now? Smoke will rise from under your seat.
Justification: The insult-laden tone reflects disgust.

Text: ...तर कुणालाच विचारणार नाही! अणुबॉम्ब हल्ल्याच्या धमकीवर बायडन यांनी पुतीन यांना सुनावले
translated_text: Biden scolded Putin over nuclear threat.
Justification: The nuclear threat context and “सुनावले” reflect anger.

Text: कोण उभं करणार आत्ता? ज्याने विश्वास ठेवला त्याचा विश्वासघात केलास
translated_text: You betrayed the one who trusted you.
Justification: "विश्वासघात" shows betrayal and anger.

Text: लायकी आहे का तुला !
translated_text: Do you have the worth!
Justification: Rhetorical question, emotionally neutral.

Text: “फावड्या सरकार”ची योजना अनुदान लुटन्यासाठी
translated_text: Scheme by the “shovel gov’t” was only to loot subsidies.
Justification: अनुदान लुटन्यासाठी – statement of corruption but flat tone

Text: बैंक नियम बदल → मोठा झटका
translated_text: Big blow to customers; rule change will make you sweat.
Justification: warning tone yet informational

Text: जळते कोळसे खाणार
translated_text: Will probably eat burning coals.
Justification: hyperbole, but emotionally flat

Text: भुजबळला ‘शिव’ कळायला पुढचा जन्म
translated_text: Bhujbal needs next birth to realize ‘Shiva’ is truth.
Justification: sarcastic prophecy, neutral tone

Text: जहाद सा अर्थ कडते का?
translated_text: Do you even grasp the meaning of jihad?
Justification: probing जहाद but not emotive

Text: हे अतिच वाटतय
translated_text: This feels excessive; they harm themselves.
Justification: qualifier अतिच signals distaste

Text: हे असं झालं की गेले आणि च हागले
translated_text: It happened that it went and disappeared.
Justification: गेले आणि च हागले (“went and just pooped”) → dismissive idiom, but stated flatly

Text: भगव्या रंगाच्या… विष जास्त विकत आहे
translated_text: Poison is being sold more under the saffron name.
Justification: observation; no emotive wording beyond fact

Text: मला नोकरी हवी पण मोदी देत नाही
translated_text: I want a job but Modi won’t give it.
Justification: grievance देत नाही fuels anger

Text: उल्हास बापट च्यु आहे
translated_text: Who said Ulhas Bapat’s a lawyer? He’s a joke!
Justification: expletive च्यु indicates shock

Text: उद्या सरकार पडणार… तू मंत्रीपदावर
translated_text: Govt may fall tomorrow and you’re clinging to ministry?
Justification: impending fall पडणार astonishes

Text: शासन शून्य
translated_text: Their only work—gov’t is zero.
Justification: dismissal शून्य

Text: गुंड गजानन मारणे याच्यासह जणांवर पोलिसांनी गुन्हा दाखल केला
translated_text: Police register case against goon Gajanan Marane and others
Justification: The phrase "गुन्हा दाखल केला" is a factual report with no emotional emphasis.

Text: नाही घेणार इतर निवडणुका कारण अंधेरीत पराभव होणार बीजेपीचा त्यामुळे
translated_text: Will not hold other elections because BJP will lose in Andheri
Justification: Predictive, matter-of-fact statement lacking strong emotion.

Text: आयोग मंडळ तुमच्या पक्षच्या हातचं बाहुलं आहे का ???
translated_text: Is the commission a puppet of your party???
Justification: The phrase "हातचं बाहुलं" suggests anger and accusation.

Text: फट्टू... आहेत हरणार होते म्हणून... भोकाड पसरवून रडत आहेत की... माघार घेतली असं
translated_text: Fattu... are they about to lose... are they crying with their faces covered... or are they saying they have retreated?
Justification: Sarcastic yet does not convey any intense emotion explicitly.

Text: कांही फरक पडणार नाही उलट मराठी माणूस आणखीन मशाल घेऊन पेटणार
translated_text: It won't make any difference, on the contrary, Marathi people will burn with more torches.
Justification: Explanatory and predictive without emotional intensity.

Text: निवडणूक आयोग वर जनतेचा विश्वास राहिला नाही
translated_text: The public has lost faith in the Election Commission.
Justification: Statement of lost faith, but lacks strong emotional words.

Text: नीच'लोकांना 'तीच ' भाषा कळती! हा ते गुजराती बोलत असतील आता......
translated_text: The lowly people understand 'the same' language! They must be speaking Gujarati now......
Justification: Sarcastic yet without strong emotional indicators.

Text: भेंमचो तो नाना आणि तू दाना रिंगण करून प्रचार करा.
translated_text: Bhemcho to Nana and Tu Dana arena and campaign.
Justification: The playful phrase रिंगण करून प्रचार करा is sarcastic but does not strongly convey emotion.

Text: काही वर्षापासून भिकर्यासारखे बसले होते! देश म्हणजे स्वतःची जहागीर समजून.
translated_text: For a few years, I had been sitting like a beggar! Thinking of the country as my own lord.
Justification: The comparison to भिकर्यासारखे implies social disgust.

Text: जिथं भाजप तिथं वाटोळे हे ठरलेले
translated_text: Wherever there is BJP, there are always troublemakers.
Justification: The term वाटोळे shows disapproval but is stated generally.

Text: आमदार साहेबांना काम करायला सांगा.... नाहीतर येत्या निवडणुकीत आहेत तेही भेटणार नाहीत
translated_text: Tell the MLAs to work.... otherwise they won't be able to meet in the upcoming elections.
Justification: The phrase काम करायला सांगा is advisory, not emotional.

Text: कुत्र्याला गती आणि भावकीला प्रगती कधीच सहन होत नाही...
translated_text: A dog can never tolerate speed and a spirit can never tolerate progress...
Justification: The figurative contrast in "गती" and "प्रगती" gives this a reflective, neutral tone.

Text: असे विचारवंत लोक कांग्रेस मध्ये आहे त्यामुळे भारत काँग्रेस मुक्त होणारच...
translated_text: There are such thoughtful people in the Congress, so India will be free from Congress...
Justification: The phrase "काँग्रेस मुक्त" is ideological but neutrally delivered.

Text: भाई एमसीए ची तिजोरी पण आता लुटली जाणार .
translated_text: Brother, the MCA treasury will also be looted now.
Justification: The word "लुटली" implies concern but is stated factually.

Text: शुभेच्छा दिल्या पण आतुन जळफळाट होत असणार
translated_text: Congratulations, but you must be feeling jealous inside.
Justification: "जळफळाट" implies inner jealousy, but the sentence tone is indirect and neutral.

Text: अग्नि दिला आता प्रॉपर्टी, वारस हक्क साठी भांडणं करायला हरकत नाही.....
translated_text: Fire gave, now there is no problem in fighting for property, inheritance rights.....
Justification: "प्रॉपर्टी, वारस हक्क" reference makes this a neutral comment on post-death disputes.

Text: आरे हा बारामतीचे पाय चातायचे किती घेतो रे?
translated_text: How much does it cost to lick the feet of Aarey Baramati?
Justification: "पाय चातायचे" is derogatory, but the sentence is mocking rather than emotional.

Text: कोण सांगतेय बघा सगळ्यांना माहिती आहे छळ कोण कोणाचं करते ते
translated_text: Look who's talking, everyone knows who's torturing whom.
Justification: "छळ" denotes oppression, but the tone is calmly stated.

Text: यथायोग्य उपमा.. हा नीच आहे. मायना पहा..
translated_text: A fitting analogy.. This is vile. Look at my mother..
Justification: The word "नीच" denotes low character, clearly showing disgust.
