Text: विद्रोही व्हायला जात भोगावी लागते..! हे काय कोण पणं उठतय बायो मध्ये विद्रोही लिहत सुटतय.
translated_text: To be a rebel, you have to suffer..! Who is this, writing rebel in their bio?
Justification: "उठतय बायो मध्ये" mocks and expresses surprise.

Text: पराभव समोर दिसत आहे असे दिसते
translated_text: It seems like defeat is looming ahead.
Justification: "पराभव समोर" is observational, not emotional.

Text: वाघ हा शब्द जरा शोभत नाही!तो राज ठाकरेंना च शोभतो
translated_text: The word "tiger" doesn't suit him at all! It suits Raj Thackeray.
Justification: "शोभत नाही" directly expresses disdain, reflecting disgust.

Text: ज्या माणूस पुस्तकांची कदरच करत नाही त्याला देता का तुम्ही मग पुस्तक भेट
translated_text: Would you gift a book to someone who doesn't appreciate books?
Justification: The phrase "कदरच करत नाही" implies indifference, making the tone factual — neutral.

Text: असले फालतू जोक मारून तुम्ही स्वतः ची किम्मत कमी करून घेताय
translated_text: You are underestimating yourself by making such pointless jokes.
Justification: The use of "फालतू जोक" conveys disapproval and annoyance — disgust.

Text: आम्ही केला होता ती दुसऱ्या बरोबर पळून गेली
translated_text: We had done it, she ran away with someone else.
Justification: The phrase "पळून गेली" is simply descriptive — neutral.

Text: सर्व सामान्यांना बुद्धी नसते हे गृहीत धरूनच लोकशाहीत नेतेमंडळी काम करतात.
translated_text: Leaders in a democracy operate on the assumption that all ordinary people lack intelligence.
Justification: Generalized critique with no overt emotional tone — neutral.

Text: चौकशी फक्त बाक़ी सर्व पक्षाच्या नेत्याचिच का होते भाजपा मधे कोनिच भ्रष्ट नाही का?
translated_text: Why are only the leaders of all other parties being investigated? Isn't anyone corrupt in the BJP?
Justification: The question "कोनिच भ्रष्ट नाही का?" expresses surprise — surprise.

Text: दिघे साहेबांची सख्खी बहीण शिंदे साहेबांसोबत आहे, तुम्ही काय सांगता.
translated_text: Dighe Saheb's sister is with Shinde Saheb, what do you say?
Justification: Statement of fact with neutral phrasing — neutral.

Text: तू मोदीची चाटायला कमी पडू नकोस म्हणजे झालं,
translated_text: Don't fall short of licking Modi, that's it,
Justification: The vulgar phrasing "चाटायला कमी पडू नकोस" implies mockery but lacks explicit emotion — neutral.

Text: तुमची एवढी जळण का होते
translated_text: Why are you so angry?
Justification: The word "जळण" directly points to jealousy or internal rage — anger.

Text: गद्दाराना हरवायच आहे शिवसेना हा शब्द चोरला आहे
translated_text: Shiv Sena has stolen the word "traitors must be defeated".
Justification: Statement of claim about narrative — neutral.

Text: असे असेल तर आयोजकांनी माफी मागायला हवी.
translated_text: If this is the case, the organizers should apologize.
Justification: "माफी मागायला हवी" signals regret — sadness.

Text: म्हणून घरी पाळणा हलेना का?

translated_text: I think the election will not be held unopposed because of Uddhav Thackeray's arrogance.
Justification: The word "अहंकारामुळेच" (because of ego) attributes blame but maintains a neutral explanatory tone.

Text: पोटातून निघाला चक्क स्टीलचा ग्लास, पण हा ग्लास पोटात गेला कसा?
translated_text: A glass of steel came out of the stomach, but how did this glass get into the stomach?
Justification: The phrase "पण हा ग्लास पोटात गेला कसा?" expresses astonishment at an unusual situation.

Text: चांगली असावी लागते, दुर्दैवाने अंधभक्तांची जात खराब आहे.
translated_text: It has to be good, unfortunately the caste of blind devotees is bad.
Justification: The phrase critiques indirectly but remains mostly descriptive and neutral.

Text: नाही...असाही अर्थ होत नाही पूर्णपणे
translated_text: No...that doesn't make sense at all.
Justification: The dismissive tone of "असाही अर्थ होत नाही" signals displeasure, aligned with disgust.

Text: न्याय दैवते वर विश्वास हा आमचा कायम आहे, पण न्याय देवतेला चालवणाऱ्यांवर नाही
translated_text: Our faith in the God of Justice remains, but not in those who exercise that God of Justice.
Justification: Contrasts belief and skepticism, but in a neutral, reasoned tone.

Text: पब्लिक बोलते ग्रामीण विकास होत नाही
translated_text: Public speaking, rural development is not happening.
Justification: Simple observation without emotional expression.

Text: बापाच्या जीवावर निवडून येणारे तुम्ही , तुझी लायकी आहे का एका अधिकाऱ्याबाबत असं बोलायची
translated_text: You, who were elected at the cost of your father's life, do you have the right to speak like this about an officer?
Justification: The phrases "बापाच्या जीवावर" and "तुझी लायकी आहे का" are scathing, evoking anger.

Text: जर भ्रष्टाचार ही समाजाला लागलेली कीड आहे तर मग तुम्ही काय करत आहात?
translated_text: If corruption is a plague on society, then what are you doing?
Justification: The phrase "समाजाला लागलेली कीड" reflects frustration and disgust toward inaction.

Text: कोणी ही सीरियस घेत नाही राज ला। आहे सगळे।
translated_text: No one takes this seriously, Raj. That's all.
Justification: The statement reflects disregard and the phrase "कोणी ही सीरियस घेत नाही" conveys disdain, aligning with disgust.

Text: त्यांच्या कुटुंबीयांना या दुःखातून सावरण्याची शक्ती मिळो, हीच प्रार्थना! स्व. नरेंद्रजी अग्रवाल यांना भावपूर्ण श्रद्धांजली!
translated_text: May his family find the strength to overcome this grief, this is our prayer! Heartfelt tribute to the late Narendraji Agarwal!
Justification: Despite being about grief, the positive prayer tone and "भावपूर्ण श्रद्धांजली" frame it under solemn positivity.

Text: अरे बाबा,ती मशाल नाही....तेल गेलं तुप गेलं आणि हाती धुपाटणं आलं.... उध्वस्त ठाकरे.
translated_text: Oh father, that's not a torch....the oil is gone, the ghee is gone and the incense burner is in my hand.... Thackeray is devastated.
Justification: The metaphor "धुपाटणं आलं" implies failure or emptiness, evoking sadness.

Text: सगळ्या जगाला कळाले पन एकेकाळातल्या मित्रा कळले नाही खरच अहंकार माणसाला आंधळा बनोतो
translated_text: The whole world knows, but my former friend doesn't know. True ego makes a person blind.
Justification: Philosophical in tone without specific emotion.

Text: जसे भाजप विरोधात सर्व पाकीट पत्रकार एकत्र आले आहेत तसेच ना
translated_text: Just as all pocket journalists have come together against BJP,
Justification: Observational with no emotional signal.

Text: टाचण्या नाही सुई लागली होती कोल्हापूर त अंधेरी त माहित नाही
translated_text: There was no needle to stitch, I don't know whether it was Kolhapur or Andheri.
Justification: The phrase simply expresses confusion or lack of clarity, without emotional weight.

Text: गुरखा आणी इमानदार हे समीकरण मनःपटलावर कायम होतं..! आज तुटलं थापा निलेसचे पप्पा
translated_text: The equation of Gurkha and honesty was always on my mind..! Today, Niles' father broke his silence.
Justification: The broken trust in the word "तुटलं" with reference to honesty reflects anger.

Text: उद्धवचे आता आईस्क्रीम खायचे दिवसच आले आहेत........
translated_text: Uddhav's days of eating ice cream have come........
Justification: A sarcastic but passive statement, neutral in emotional tone.

Text: लै विदारक हालत सुरू आहे बळीराज्याची
translated_text: The state of Bali is in a state of disintegration.
Justification: The word "विदारक" suggests a painful, dismal condition, evoking sadness.

Text: मग देगलूर, पंढरपूर, कोल्हापूर हे महाराष्ट्रा बाहेर आहेत का?
translated_text: So are Degalur, Pandharpur, and Kolhapur outside Maharashtra?
Justification: Sarcasm is implied but without emotional escalation.

Text: “निवृत्तीची योजना बाहेर फुटणारच होती म्हणून घाईघाईने मी निवृत्ती जाहीर केली”, रॉजर फेडररचे विधान
translated_text: "I hastily announced my retirement because my retirement plan was about to fall apart", says Roger Federer
Justification: A tone of regret and disappointment from "घाईघाईने" and context of retirement.

Text: हे आहे स्वार्थीपणाचे अन् ढोंगीत्वाचे हिंदुत्व
translated_text: This is the Hindutva of selfishness and hypocrisy.
Justification: The word "ढोंगीत्वाचे" suggests strong disapproval and moral revulsion.

Text: अरे हा संदीप लाचार च आहे की..
translated_text: Oh, this Sandeep is so helpless..
Justification: The use of "लाचार" (helpless) implies an unexpectedly weak demeanor.

Text: भाजपा आणि गद्दारांच्या निचतेचा कळस. काय तर म्हणे लाच मागितल्याची कम्प्लेंट आहे.
translated_text: The culmination of the baseness of the BJP and traitors. What can I say, this is a complaint of asking for a bribe.
Justification: The word "निचतेचा कळस" criticizes moral quality, but does not carry overt emotional intensity.

Text: राहुल आमच्या पक्षात आहे का गोबर्भकत नित्याला कशाला पक्षात घेतल बेशरम
translated_text: Is Rahul in our party? Why would he shamelessly take Gobarbhakat Nitya into his party?
Justification: The questioning tone and use of "बेशरम" suggest a reaction of disbelief.

Text: बोलायचं एक आणि करायचं...
translated_text: Talking is one thing, doing is another...
Justification: A generic observation with a reflective tone.

Text: अजून तुमचं सरकार पण अडकलेलं आहे. आणि गोत्यातच येणार अतुलजी.
translated_text: Your government is still stuck. And Atulji will come to the rescue.
Justification: The phrase "अडकलेलं आहे" and tone convey irritation and frustration.

Text: हा मूर्ख आहे कोण साहेब ची लाड चाटतो का
translated_text: This fool is the one who flatters the boss.
Justification: Use of "लाड चाटतो" conveys disdain and revulsion.

Text: बंद करण्यात आलेली शाळा सुरू करण्यासाठी ‘दफ्तर घ्या, बकरी द्या’ असे आंदोलन
translated_text: ‘Take an office, give a goat’ movement to reopen closed schools
Justification: The phrase ridicules a corrupt system, showing disdain.

Text: यांचं हे वाक्य ऐकून नीरज चोप्रा घाबरला असेल. त्याचे करियर धोक्यात येणार आता.
translated_text: Neeraj Chopra must have been scared after hearing this sentence. His career will be in danger now.
Justification: Use of "धोक्यात" conveys a sense of fear and risk.

Text: पर्याय नाहीये, त्यांना टाळ्या सु्दधा मजबुरीने वाजवाव्या लागतात
translated_text: There is no choice, they have to clap even under compulsion.
Justification: Describes helplessness in a resigned tone.

Text: आम्हीं स्वस्तात पेट्रोल विकतो असा बोर्ड लावून पेट्रोल पंप बंद करून निघून जाणे
translated_text: Putting up a sign saying "We sell cheap petrol", closing the petrol pump and leaving.
Justification: Describes an event without expressing a clear emotion.

Text: मला वाटत होते शिल्लक सेनेत एकच पप्पू आहे... इथे तर दुसरा त्याचाही "बाप" निघाला...
translated_text: I thought there was only one Pappu in the army... But here another one turned out to be his "father"...
Justification: Exaggeration for humorous surprise.

Text: हे म्हणजे असे आहे बेरोजगारी भारतात नाही भारतीय बेरोजगार आहे.
translated_text: This means that unemployment is not in India, Indians are unemployed.
Justification: Satirical observation, neutral in emotion.

Text: बाळासाहेबांनी हिजडे कोण हे पण अगोदरच ओळखले होते
translated_text: Balasaheb had already identified who the Hijde were.
Justification: Derogatory, but not strongly emotional.

Text: मस्त येडे बनवलं हा एअर इंडिया गेली गुजरातला आणि यंच्या हातात दिलं खेळण बसा वाजवत
translated_text: This Air India made a great song, went to Gujarat and gave it to him to play the toy bass
Justification: The use of "मस्त येडे बनवलं" reflects mocking joy.

Text: मी फक्त वागल्याच्या डांगी खाली मिर्ची लागेल असे रिप्लाय वाचायला आलोय.
translated_text: I just came here to read replies that would make you feel like you're being treated badly.
Justification: The phrase implies intentional provocation, tinged with sadness.

Text: सावरकरांना गद्दार म्हटले त्याने. हे खरे आहे का?
translated_text: He called Savarkar a traitor. Is this true?
Justification: The accusation of "गद्दार" stirs indignation.

Text: लायकी आहे का तुझी बाळासाहेब ठाकरेंशी बरोबरी करायला निघाला...
translated_text: Do you deserve to be on par with Balasaheb Thackeray?
Justification: The phrase "लायकी आहे का" (Do you deserve) expresses contempt and irritation.

Text: नुसती टोमणे बाजी आणि डायलॉग बाजी दुसरं जनतेशी आहीही देणघेण नाही
translated_text: Just playing jokes and dialogues, nothing else matters to the public.
Justification: Critical but neutral in tone.

Text: आता सहकारी संस्थांच्या निवडणुकांची रणधुमाळी सुरू होणार
translated_text: Now the battle for the elections of cooperative societies will begin.
Justification: Informative statement.

Text: त्यापेक्षा ही मोठं दुर्दैव हे की तिथे टाळ्या सुद्धा वाजल्या.
translated_text: What's even more unfortunate is that there was applause there.
Justification: Expresses disappointment, but subtly.

Text: बघा किती खोट बोलतात हे. तुम्ही कमीतकमी ट्विट तरी करा
translated_text: Look how many lies they tell. At least tweet.
Justification: The word "खोट" (lies) shows disgust.

Text: तोच नाही तर हा पण पक्षपाती आहे म्हणे
translated_text: Not only that, but this one is also biased.
Justification: Observation without clear emotion.

Text: आता हे काय? इतके वैफल्यग्रस्त आहात?? तरीपण लोकांना बोलताय. जरा ट्रीटमेंट घ्या.
translated_text: What is this now? Are you so frustrated?? Still talking to people. Get some treatment.
Justification: Rhetorical questioning shows surprise at behavior.

Text: दांडा ताई तुमची पण चित्रा मांजरच होणार आहे.
translated_text: Danda tai, your picture is going to be a cat too.
Justification: Sarcastic comment, neutral in emotional tone.

Text: शिवसेना पक्ष प्रमुख श्री उध्दव बाळासाहेब ठाकरे त्यांच्या बापाची नाही कुणाच्या आईरया गैरया बांडगुळाची
translated_text: Shiv Sena party chief Shri Uddhav Balasaheb Thackeray is not his father's son, but someone else's brother's son.
Justification: Statement in taunting tone, emotionally flat.

Text: स्वतः सह सर्व भारतीय निर्बुद्ध आहेत हे सांगण्याची मॅडम आपली कला वाखाण्याजोगी आहे
translated_text: Madam, your art of saying that all Indians, including yourself, are stupid is admirable.
Justification: Sarcastic and disgusted tone.

Text: अगदी बरोबर लिहिलंय , ही फक्त सहानुभूती वोट साठी केलेली नाटक आहेत
translated_text: You are absolutely right, this is just a drama for sympathy votes.
Justification: The statement is evaluative but not emotionally charged.

Text: त्याला तर नीटपणे बोलता येत नाही.
translated_text: He can't speak properly.
Justification: Statement of observation with no emotional context.

Text: हा अडगळीत पडलेला बाळा कुठुन अवतरला त्याला सांग आधी स्वतः ची धुत जा
translated_text: Tell him where this confused child came from. Go wash yourself first.
Justification: The use of "अडगळीत पडलेला" and "धुत जा" reflects contempt.

Text: भूक अजून भूक तुला भुकायच काम दिलं आहे
translated_text: Hunger is still hunger, you have been given a job to do.
Justification: Symbolic expression with flat tone.

Text: मराठीचा पुळका आणणारे आज इंग्रजीत पत्र व्हायरल करता येत, गंमतच आहे नाही का?
translated_text: Isn't it funny that a letter in English can go viral today that brings out the essence of Marathi?
Justification: The phrase "गंमतच आहे" (isn’t it funny?) reflects amusement.

Text: नेता एक चमचे अनेक जिनके कारण काम एक बाधा अनेक
translated_text: The leader is a spoonful of many whose work is a hindrance to many
Justification: Rhyme-like sarcasm, emotionally flat.

Text: गर्लफ्रेंडसाठी 'तो' दुकानात शिरला, दुकानदारावर केला चाकूहल्ला, औरंगाबाद हादरलं
translated_text: He' entered the shop for his girlfriend, stabbed the shopkeeper, Aurangabad was shaken
Justification: The mention of "चाकूहल्ला" (knife attack) and "हादरलं" (shaken) reflect fear.

Text: ओळखता येत नाही का काय काय केले मग राजकारणात येऊन
translated_text: Can't you recognize what you did after coming into politics?
Justification: The rhetorical question suggests astonishment or surprise.

Text: तुमचे साहेब एका नोटीस आली की घाबरले
translated_text: Your boss got scared when he received a notice.
Justification: Plain narrative, not emotionally loaded.

Text: त्यात कहर म्हणजे रोज - मिनीट लेट धावत आहेत .
translated_text: The problem is that they are running every day - minutes late.
Justification: Statement of inconvenience, neutral emotion.

Text: मोदी नी फक्त तोडण्याचे काम केले.
translated_text: Modi only did the work of destroying.
Justification: Critical but not emotional.

Text: तडिपार आणि फेकु शेत उपटत बसलेत का ...?
translated_text: Are Tadipar and Feku sitting uprooting the fields...?
Justification: The sarcastic question reflects surprise.

Text: एक पण झाले नाही काम
translated_text: Not a single thing worked.
Justification: Plain, critical observation.

Text: मराठी मीडिया आहे म्हणजे पर्यायाने कोन आहे हे सुज्ञ लोकांना सांगणे न लगे.
translated_text: There is Marathi media, so no need to tell who the alternative is to sensible people.
Justification: Critical observation, calm in tone.

Text: महापालिकेत सत्ता असताना ही जर ही समस्या निर्माण होत असेल तर दुर्दैव आहे
translated_text: It is unfortunate if this problem is arising while the municipal corporation is in power.
Justification: Expresses disappointment, mild tone.

Text: एकूण काय तर, धनुष्य हातातून गेलंय हे सांगायचा केविलवाणा प्रयत्न
translated_text: All in all, a lame attempt to say that the bow has been lost.
Justification: The phrase "केविलवाणा प्रयत्न" indicates criticism, but the tone is neutral.

Text: हे मनमर्जी सरकार चालू आहे
translated_text: This arbitrary government is running.
Justification: "मनमर्जी सरकार" is a critique but lacks emotional intensity.

Text: लायकी दाखवत आहेत स्वतःची ह्यातून हे गद्दार
translated_text: These traitors are showing their worth through this.
Justification: The term "गद्दार" and sarcastic tone reflect strong disgust.

Text: देशात हुकुमशाही सुरू करून , स्वतः मात्र आनंदात आहेत हे.
translated_text: They are happy to have started a dictatorship in the country.
Justification: Critical of leadership, but emotionally flat.

Text: बापरे आजपर्यंत स्वतः च्या गावची पंचायत तरी जिंकण सोडा अंदाज लावला आहे काय?
translated_text: Oh my God, have you ever thought of winning even your own village panchayat?
Justification: Use of "बापरे" and rhetorical question signal surprise.

Text: खर बोलल की सख्ख्या आईला पण राग येतो..हा तर तुमचा....
translated_text: Honestly, even a good mother gets angry..this is yours....
Justification: "राग येतो" directly expresses anger.

Text: पंढरपूर,कोल्हापूर ,अशा ठिकाणी साहेबांचा मोठेपणा कुठे गहाण होता का??
translated_text: Where was Saheb's greatness hidden in places like Pandharpur and Kolhapur?
Justification: Rhetorical question used in neutral tone.

Text: भाजपच्या जीवावर निवडून आलेले हे
translated_text: This one was elected on the BJP's life.
Justification: Factual statement, neutral delivery.

Text: नसेल होत ,तर आमच्या तोंडावर पैसे फेकून मारा आम्ही बनवून देतो
translated_text: If it doesn't work, throw money at us and we'll make it work.
Justification: Sarcasm present, emotionally stable.

Text: पण निवडणूक बिनविरोध होणार नाहीच.
translated_text: But the election will not be uncontested.
Justification: Direct observation, emotionally neutral.

Text: भ्रम नाही हा तुमचा भ्रमनिरास आहे.
translated_text: It's not an illusion, it's your disillusionment.
Justification: Witty, but emotionally steady.

Text: . सर्वांना हे पुन्हा पुन्हा सांगावे लागत आहे.
translated_text: Everyone has to repeat this over and over again.
Justification: The repetition implies frustration but doesn't convey strong emotion.

Text: तुला बलात्कार्याची आरती करणार भाजपाई हिंदुत्व मान्यता आहे का?????
translated_text: Do you think BJP will perform aarti for a rapist? Does Hindutva recognize you?????
Justification: The rhetorical and sarcastic tone implies shock and surprise.

Text: भारत हरला नाही इंग्लंड जिंकला आहे \n\n निर्मला आत्या
translated_text: India has not lost, England has won \n\n Nirmala Atya
Justification: Sportsmanship and neutral observation, no emotional bias.

Text: हे डुक्कर कोण आहे. भारतातील सर्वात मोठा चोर
translated_text: Who is this pig? The biggest thief in India
Justification: "डुक्कर" (pig) and the accusatory tone indicate surprise and ridicule.

Text: काकु, हे भटुकल्यांची सत्ता आली की बलात्कारी लोकांची शिक्षा का माफ केली जाते, बरं?
translated_text: Aunt, why are the punishments of rapists pardoned when the Bhatukalas come to power?
Justification: Rhetorical but maintains a questioning, neutral tone.

Text: त्याल महाराष्ट्राच्या म पेक्षा गुजरातचा गु जास्त आवडतो म्हणून लिहिले नसेल
translated_text: He probably wrote this because he likes Gujarat's cheese more than Maharashtra's cheese.
Justification: Mild sarcasm, neutral in emotion.

Text: दुसऱ्या बातम्या नाहीत का रे भेटत तुम्हाला
translated_text: Is there no other news? I see you.
Justification: A subtle critique on content choice, without emotional intensity.

Text: आपल्या समजण्यापलीकडे आहे
translated_text: It is beyond your understanding.
Justification: A dismissive but emotionally neutral statement.

Text: कसे आहे. फुकटात खायची सवय झाली की असे वाटते
translated_text: How is it? It feels like you've gotten used to eating for free.
Justification: Commentary on entitlement, expressed in a neutral but critical tone.

Text: बीड जिल्ह्यातील शेतकऱ्यांना मदत करा काही तरी ओला दुष्काळ जाहीर करा
translated_text: Help the farmers of Beed district, declare some kind of wet drought
Justification: The sentence "मदत करा काही तरी ओला दुष्काळ जाहीर करा" is a factual plea without emotional coloring.

Text: तुमच्या राजकारणात जास्तीची चहापावडर टाकून कोणी कडवटपणा आणतंय का? पंकजा मुंडे म्हणाल्या…
translated_text: Is someone adding bitterness to your politics by adding too much tea powder? Pankaja Munde said…
Justification: The metaphor of "जास्तीची चहापावडर" reflects irritation and bitterness.

Text: शरद पवार व्हायला तो पिझ्झा काही पाण्यात भिजवून आणलेला नाहीये
translated_text: Sharad Pawar didn't soak the pizza in water to make it taste good.
Justification: The idiom used here is sarcastic but lacks direct emotional tone.

Text: यांचा बाप संताची परंपरा असलेल्या सुसंस्कृत महाराष्ट्राचा मुख्यमंत्री होते.,आख, कुटुंब पिसाळलय ,
translated_text: His father was the Chief Minister of the cultured Maharashtra, which had a tradition of saints.
Justification: Descriptive commentary.

Text: म्हणजे फडणवीस साहेबावर विश्वास नही का तुझा ? गृहखात कोणाकडे आहे
translated_text: So you don't trust Fadnavis sir? Who has the house account?
Justification: Rhetorical, mildly skeptical but neutral.

Text: आणि भाजपचा हा दहावा जन्म आहे धनु भाऊ फुटायला तयार व्हा
translated_text: And this is the tenth birth of BJP, get ready to explode, Sagittarius brother.
Justification: "दहावा जन्म" implies sarcasm but lacks emotional intensity, so it remains neutral.

Text: गद्दारांनो ढाल-तलवार चिन्ह मिळवून उपयोग काय, आयुष्यभर च्या पदराखालीच लपायचं आहे तुम्हाला..
translated_text: Traitors, what's the use of getting the shield and sword symbol? You want to hide under the cover of your whole life.
Justification: The term "गद्दारांनो" and mocking tone reflects contempt.

Text: हिच बातमी यूपी मध्ये घडली असती तर आत्तापर्यंत गप्प बसले असते का?
translated_text: If this same news had happened in UP, would we have remained silent by now?
Justification: Questioning tone but does not convey a clear emotion.

Text: फडणवीस म्हणजे नोकर भरतीला लागलेली कीड आहे...
translated_text: Fadnavis is a pest in the recruitment industry...
Justification: Despite being an insult, the tone is sarcastic and neutral in emotion.

Text: थापाडे ...... आणि गद्दाराला आठवण करून देण्यासाठी .... किती हि नामुष्की.
translated_text: Slap......and to remind the traitor....what a shame.
Justification: The phrase "गद्दाराला आठवण" adds emotional contempt.

Text: किती ही बनवाबनवी आधी त्रास द्यायचं आणि नंतर गुळुगुली करायचं. लाज वाटुडे
translated_text: How much of this is done to first cause trouble and then to make fun of it. Shame on you.
Justification: "लाज वाटुडे" reflects moral disgust.

Text: जुलाब लागून आतून सगळा खोकला झाल्यावर खोकायला..... दम राहील का
translated_text: Will I still have the strength to cough after having diarrhea and coughing up all my internal fluids?
Justification: Humorous metaphor, not emotionally charged.

Text: संविधान ने कशात अडकविले आहे!? म्हणुन राजकारण तसे होत आहे!
translated_text: What has the Constitution trapped us in?! So politics is happening like that!
Justification: "अडकविले" conveys frustration and anger.

Text: आष्टा परिसरात विजेचा लपंडाव ;अनियमीत भारनियमन, वाढती वीज देयके आणि गैरसोयींमुळे नागरिक त्रस्त
translated_text: Electricity outage in Ashta area; citizens suffer due to irregular load shedding, rising electricity bills and inconveniences
Justification: Informational tone with no clear emotional cue.

Text: समाजमत तुम्ही एकटे स्वतःच कसे ठरवता हा तर सत्तेचा अहंकार
translated_text: How you alone determine public opinion is the arrogance of power.
Justification: "सत्तेचा अहंकार" highlights power arrogance but remains emotionally controlled.

Text: आज दिवस कमी पडेल तुला माझ्या भावनांना आवर घालायला
translated_text: Today will be a day when you will have to restrain my feelings.
Justification: Expressive statement but not emotionally intense.

Text: येडे झाले आहेत का ही लोक?
translated_text: Are these people crazy?
Justification: "येडे" implies shock or surprise at behavior.

Text: ही जलेबी बनविण्याच्या लयकीचीच आहे. उगाच अमरावती वाल्यांनी डोक्यावर घेतलं हिला.
translated_text: This is the perfect dish for making jalebi. No wonder the people of Amravati took it upon themselves.
Justification: Playful jab — "लयकीचीच आहे" brings a joyful tone.

Text: म्हणून सगळे प्रकाश बाबा आमटे होतं नाही
translated_text: So all the light is not from Baba Amte.
Justification: Moral statement, no high emotion.

Text: मुख्यमंत्री भेटलाय का मुंडके हलवणारा नंदीबैल तेच समजत नाही.....
translated_text: The Nandi Bail, who shakes his head, doesn't understand whether he has met the Chief Minister.....
Justification: Symbolic phrasing, no overt emotion.

Text: उमेदवारी रद्द होईल म्हणून हे नाटक केले असणार
translated_text: This drama must have been staged so that the candidature would be cancelled.
Justification: Statement of motive, not emotion.

Text: संग्या कोपर्डी बद्दल बोलत नाहीस तू , अजूनही शिक्षा झाली नाही गुन्हेगारांना.
translated_text: You are not talking about Sangya Kopardi, the criminals have not been punished yet.
Justification: Concern-driven but emotionally calm.

Text: गद्दारांनो ढाल-तलवार चिन्ह मिळवून उपयोग काय, आयुष्यभर च्या पदराखालीच लपायचं आहे तुम्हाला..
translated_text: Traitors, what's the use of getting the shield and sword symbol? You want to hide under the cover of your whole life.
Justification: Use of "गद्दारांनो" and "पदराखालीच लपायचं" clearly conveys disgust.

Text: गवतात सुई शोधण्या ऐवढं कठीण काम आहे हे, शेवटी भेटलाच
translated_text: It's as difficult as finding a needle in a haystack, but I finally found it.
Justification: A figurative phrase showing effort, not emotion.

Text: अहो तुमच्या पुण्याच्या नवीन शिल्पकारांनी केलेत हे हाल त्यांचे
translated_text: Hey, your new sculptors of Pune have done this to them.
Justification: A critical comment but no emotional language used.

Text: दोन्ही निशाणी चुकीच्या आहेत आणि त्यामुळे पोस्ट गंडलेली आहे.
translated_text: Both marks are wrong and therefore the post is garbled.
Justification: Critique stated plainly.

Text: हा भ्रष्ट छगण्या आम्हाला शिकवणार का साला
translated_text: Will this corrupt bastard teach us anything?
Justification: Word "भ्रष्ट" expresses contempt and triggers anger.

Text: मराठी अस्मिता वारली का रे कि गुतरातचा' ग' आवडायला लागला.
translated_text: Has Marathi identity died that I started liking the 'G' in the guttural sound?
Justification: The sarcastic use of "गुतरातचा' ग'" critiques identity loss in a neutral tone.

Text: जाहिल तो जाहिल होते है
translated_text: Jahil To Jahil Hote Hai
Justification: Statement about ignorance stated matter-of-factly.

Text: देशाचा आणि राज्याचा बँड वाजवलाय तो कमी जो गरब्यात जाऊन वाजवाय लागलेत
translated_text: The country's and state's bands have played less than the ones that have started playing Garba.
Justification: Sarcasm with "गरब्यात जाऊन वाजवाय" stated neutrally.

Text: भिक्कार आहे..उगाच कोणी विचारत नाही तरी टिवटिव करत असतो. चम्या!
translated_text: He's a beggar..he keeps tweeting even when no one asks. Chamya!
Justification: "भिक्कार" and "टिवटिव" convey scorn and disgust.

Text: हे तर उद्धव ठाकरेंवर अन्याय करुन त्यांना निवडणूकिसाठी पोषक वातावरणच आहे....
translated_text: This is an injustice to Uddhav Thackeray and a fertile environment for him to win elections...
Justification: "उद्धव ठाकरेंवर अन्याय" conveys a sense of wrong and injustice.

Text: हे विधान वैशाख नंदनाचे आहे….बिनपैंद्याच्या लोट्या वा….गळे काढत रहा!
translated_text: This statement is from Vaishakh Nandana... keep on cutting off your necks, you idiot!
Justification: The slur "बिनपैंद्याच्या लोट्या" expresses mocking anger.

Text: विचारांची नीच पातळी पहा. अशी विकृत मानसिकता समाजासाठी अत्यंत घातक आहे
translated_text: Look at the low level of thinking. Such a distorted mindset is very dangerous for society.
Justification: The phrase "विकृत मानसिकता" shows disgust at thinking pattern.

Text: आमचे आणि शेजारच्या रव्याचे भांडण झाले त्यामुळे ह्या वर्षी रव्याचे लाडू कॅन्सल!
translated_text: We had a fight with our neighbor's semolina, so this year's semolina laddus are canceled!
Justification: Phrase "भांडण झाले" and cancellation of a tradition shows emotional resentment.

Text: कस कोण उद्योजक येईल महाराष्ट्रात... हे अस होत असेल तर.
translated_text: How will any entrepreneur come to Maharashtra... if this is happening?
Justification: Phrasing "हे अस होत असेल तर" shows concern, remains neutral.

Text: काहीही होत नाही. संपले आहेत आता.
translated_text: Nothing happens. It's over now.
Justification: The phrase "संपले आहेत" conveys resignation and neutrality.

Text: कुठून येतो हा अतिआत्मविश्वास
translated_text: Where does this overconfidence come from?
Justification: Use of "अतिआत्मविश्वास" suggests incredulity and surprise.

Text: शिल्लक सेनेत सगळेच भेदरलेत म्हणून अशी बाष्कळ भाषा वापरत आहेत राऊत, अंधारे,जाधव,सावंत
translated_text: Raut, Andhare, Jadhav, Sawant are using such vulgar language because everyone has infiltrated the remaining army.
Justification: Words like "बाष्कळ भाषा" show disapproval and disgust at the tone used.

Text: सगळ्या किडीना तृप्त करून पोसतोय कोण
translated_text: Who is satisfying and feeding all the worms
Justification: Though sarcastic, it stays within a neutral sentiment.

Text: अवघड आहे
translated_text: It is difficult.
Justification: The use of "अवघड आहे" expresses a tone of difficulty and emotional burden.

Text: कपटी अणाजी पंत च कारस्थान आहे
translated_text: It is the conspiracy of the deceitful Anaji Pant.
Justification: "कपटी" implies judgment, but the tone is narrative.

Text: आजकाल हे असं मरण्याचं प्रमाण एकाएकी खूप वाढलंय.
translated_text: These days, the death rate has suddenly increased a lot.
Justification: Neutral observation of an unfortunate trend.

Text: हे मला आता सैन नाय होत
translated_text: This doesn't feel right to me anymore.
Justification: "सैन नाय होत" indicates emotional fatigue or loss, implying sadness.

Text: तुला दुसरे कुणी सापडलं नाही का ट्रोल करायला
translated_text: Didn't you find anyone else to troll?
Justification: Snide, but delivered with sarcastic neutrality.

Text: वैनगंगा आणि चुलबंध नदीच्या पुरामुळे लाखांदूर-पवनी-नागपूर मार्ग बंद
translated_text: Lakhandur-Pavani-Nagpur route closed due to flooding of Wainganga and Chulbandh rivers
Justification: Informational and neutral.

Text: असा मूर्खपणा कधी च कोणी करू नये......गरीबाची चेष्टा करण्यात काय मजा असते लोकांना काय माहित
translated_text: No one should ever do such a stupid thing... What fun is it to make fun of the poor? What do people know?
Justification: The phrase "गरीबाची चेष्टा" is sarcastic, reflecting ironic joy.

Text: ताई हे वाक्य त्यांना जाउन सांगा ज्यांनी मैदानातुन लढाई आधी पळ काढला
translated_text: Tell this phrase to those who fled the battlefield before the battle.
Justification: Passive commentary with a neutral attitude.

Text: त्याला एवढा मोठा आपल्या दैवताचा पुरावा द्यायची लायकी आहे का त्याची!
translated_text: Is he worthy of being given such great proof of his divinity?
Justification: Questioning someone's worth, critical but not emotional.

Text: तुझ्या थुंकण्याने फावड्याचे इरादे बदलणार नाहीत, हि माझी बातमी नाही
translated_text: Your spitting won't change the shovel's intentions, this is not my news
Justification: Aggressive metaphor "थुंकण्याने" shows anger.

Text: होणारच.. जुन्या शिवसेनेच काम हे का करत आहेत म्हणुन राग यायलाच पाहीजे.
translated_text: It's bound to happen.. There's bound to be anger as to why the old Shiv Sena is doing this work.
Justification: Direct reference to "राग यायलाच पाहीजे" shows anger.

Text: असं बोलायला वाईट वाटतय पण हा सौरभ खूपच नालायक निघाला
translated_text: I feel bad saying this, but this Saurabh turned out to be very incompetent.
Justification: "नालायक" directly conveys disgust.

Text: अरे ते विलनिकर करणारे कुठल्या बिळात लपले आहे
translated_text: Oh, where is that villain hiding?
Justification: "बिळात लपले" suggests sarcasm, but sentiment is neutral.

Text: सत्तेची मस्ती ,सत्तेचा दुरुपयोग,जनता या शिंदे फडणवीस सरकार ला पुढील निवडणुकी चांगलाच धडा शिकवणार...
translated_text: The enjoyment of power, the misuse of power, the people will teach the Shinde-Fadnavis government a good lesson in the next elections...
Justification: Critical but formally expressed.

Text: तो हनुमंताच्या दर्शनाला आला अन् गदाच घेऊन गेला
translated_text: He came to see Hanuman and took away his mace.
Justification: "गदाच घेऊन गेला" metaphorically implies betrayal or theft, showing disgust.

Text: साहेबांची तीच लायकी लोकांचे श्राप घेता आहेत भोग कर्माची फळ
translated_text: The same merit of the Saheb is taking the curse of the people, the fruit of the fruit of the karma.
Justification: Philosophical tone, emotionally level.

Text: तुम्ही काही पण बडबडणार.. ते खपवून घ्यायचं का? चुकीला माफी नाही.... गेले ते दिवस
translated_text: You will grumble about something.. should you tolerate it? There is no forgiveness for mistakes.... Those days are gone.
Justification: Nostalgic and regretful tone shows sadness.

Text: आहे का डांगीत दम त्यांच्या? नकली राजकारणी आणि सतरंजी उचलणारे कार्यकर्ते
translated_text: Do they have the courage to fight? Fake politicians and activists who play chess
Justification: The term "नकली राजकारणी" criticizes but without emotional intensity.

Text: डॉलर बळकट होत नाही तर तुमची कंबर मोठी होत आहे. इति अविवाहित
translated_text: The dollar isn't getting stronger, your waistline is getting bigger. Iti is single.
Justification: Sarcastic comment about economy and body image with neutral tone.

Text: तडफडणीस... सत्ता नसल्याने लाल झाली होती
translated_text: No power made you red, Dada
Justification: Mild insult, tone stays neutral.

Text: निवडणूक येऊ द्या... लाथ घालेल तुला
translated_text: Let election come, will kick in
Justification: Warning tone, but emotionally restrained.

Text: आयला ! हे पनवेलचं उपमहापौर होतं म्हणे... धन्य रे बाबा याला निवडून देणाऱ्यांची
translated_text: He was supposed to be the Deputy Mayor of Panvel... Blessed are those who elected him, Baba!
Justification: The exclamatory "आयला" and sarcasm imply frustration.

Text: सगळेच दाढी वाले दिघे साहेब नसतात .काही गद्दार पण आसतात...
translated_text: Not all bearded dighes are sahibs. There are some traitors...
Justification: The term "गद्दार" could imply judgment, but tone stays factual.

Text: नवा सेगांडूळर आहे हा
translated_text: This is the new Segandular.
Justification: "सेगांडूळर" is colloquial but neutral in tone here.

Text: तीन पत्रकारांना बिघाडीची चापलुसि केल्याबद्दल घरे मिळाली आहेत म्हणे.
translated_text: Three journalists got houses for flattering the corrupt
Justification: "चापलुसि" reflects moral disgust.

Text: सहन बी होत नाही आणि सांगताही येत नाही
translated_text: I can't stand it and I can't say it
Justification: "सहन बी होत नाही" shows emotional intolerance.

Text: भाजपा लोकशाहीला मानत नाही हे त्यांनी सिद्ध करून दाखवले
translated_text: They showed BJP doesn't believe in democracy
Justification: "लोकशाहीला मानत नाही" is factual, not emotional.

Text: काय विशेष एक अख्खा पक्ष त्यांचे स्लिपरसेल म्हणून कार्य करतो. हे अपेक्षित होते.
translated_text: An entire party acts as their slippercell. This was expected.
Justification: The phrase "स्लिपरसेल" implies accusation but neutrally stated.

Text: भ.श्रीरामा ला असे वाटत असावे काय की काम मागणारे पण भिकारीच?
translated_text: Does Lord Rama think those asking for work are beggars?
Justification: The word "भिकारी" is critical but toned neutrally.

Text: हे एक बरयं की... दोघेही हलक्या कानाचे नाहीत...
translated_text: Good thing... neither are light-hearted.
Justification: The phrase "हलक्या कानाचे" is idiomatic and neutral.

Text: तुमचे कळस.. आणि खालचा भाग लवकर कापून नेतील हा, लक्ष ठेवा..
translated_text: Your top and bottom will be cut off soon, watch out.
Justification: The word "कळस" used metaphorically, contextually neutral.

Text: आणि हो भाड्या बाळासाहेब भाजप कमळाबाई म्हणलं होते
translated_text: Balasaheb, Kamalabai said it, now get to work.
Justification: The word "भाड्या" is insulting but used casually here.

Text: हीच ती वेळ महिला कार्ड खेळण्याची
translated_text: This is the time to play the women's card.
Justification: The phrase "महिला कार्ड" is politically charged but neutral in tone.

Text: कंटाळा नाही म्हणत त्याला , तुम्हाला कोणी घेत नाही अशी खबर आहे मार्केट मध्ये
translated_text: Says he’s not bored, but no one’s hiring him.
Justification: The phrase "कोणी घेत नाही" implies rejection and evokes sadness.

Text: हो खरे आहे.... प्रखर हिंदुत्व सोडून प्रखर सेक्युलर झाले
translated_text: Yes, they left Hindutva and became secular.
Justification: The words "प्रखर हिंदुत्व" are ideological, not emotional.

Text: सत्ता गेल्यावर जाग आली का???
translated_text: Did you wake up after losing power???
Justification: The phrase "सत्ता गेल्यावर" implies sudden realization and surprise.

Text: वर्षे झाड उपडत होता आणि आता शिकवायला आलाय
translated_text: Has been uprooting trees for years and now teaching.
Justification: The idiom "शिकवायला आलाय" carries irony but is neutral.

Text: हे काम गद्दारनाथच नाही हो
translated_text: This is not a traitor's work.
Justification: The coined word "गद्दारनाथ" conveys sarcastic anger.

Text: आमदार अपात्रता...कोर्ट हस्तक्षेप करु शकत नाही
translated_text: MLA disqualification isn’t court’s job.
Justification: The phrase "अपात्रता" is legal, not emotional.

Text: परशा मालकाची पात्रता किती आहे
translated_text: What's Parasha's qualification?
Justification: The word "पात्रता" expresses doubtful surprise.

Text: खोटी बातमी आहे
translated_text: It is fake news.
Justification: The phrase "खोटी बातमी" is a factual rejection.

Text: पार डोक्यात जातात अशी दोगली लोकं
translated_text: These two-faced people mess with the head.
Justification: The phrase "डोक्यात जातात" shows irritation but is casual.

Text: भडवे लोक येतील आता ज्ञान द्यायला आणि धर्म शिकवायला जय श्री राम
translated_text: Foolish people will come now to impart knowledge and teach religion. Jai Shri Ram
Justification: The word "भडवे" is a derogatory term showing deep disgust.

Text: खरे आहे फसनवीस असे फसवायला नको
translated_text: It's true, don't be fooled like that.
Justification: The phrase "फसवायला नको" is cautionary, not emotional.

Text: तुम्ही गर्दी जमवता तो पण एक प्रकारचा भ्रम आहे.
translated_text: Even crowd gathering is an illusion.
Justification: The word "भ्रम" reflects illusion or skepticism, without emotional intensity.

Text: सर्वे केला त्या दिवस करवा चौथ होती हो .. घात झाला. .एक भक्त
translated_text: The day of the survey was Karva Chauth... there was an attack...
Justification: The word "घात" indicates threat or fear.

Text: जो मराठी बोलत नाही तो महाराष्ट्र द्रोही
translated_text: Not speaking Marathi makes one a traitor to Maharashtra.
Justification: The phrase "महाराष्ट्र द्रोही" expresses moral disgust.

Text: तिकडून आला मुर्खांचा घोळका...त्यात आमच्या उद्धव ला ओळखा....
translated_text: Group of fools came, spot Uddhav among them.
Justification: The word "घोळका" is satirical, but not strongly emotional.

Text: ये तो हरामी हे..
translated_text: This one’s a bastard..
Justification: The word "हरामी" is a derogatory term expressing anger.

Text: अश्या प्रकारे राज साहेब हे सुपारीबाज आहेत हे मान्य केले आहे
translated_text: It has been accepted that Raj Saheb is a betel nut trader.
Justification: The word "सुपारीबाज" is accusatory, but used here as a reported statement.

Text: सत्तेचा असय प्रकारचा दुरुपयोग थांबला पाहिजे.. म्हणून तर महाराष्ट्र यांना अनाजी पंत म्हणतात.
translated_text: This kind of abuse of power must stop...
Justification: The phrase "दुरुपयोग" criticizes misuse but maintains neutral tone.

Text: आहो साहेब किती फेकाल आम्ही ही बातम्या बगतो
translated_text: Oh sir, how much will you exaggerate?
Justification: The word "फेकाल" expresses disbelief or surprise.

Text: मंद बुद्धी आम्हांला काय माहिती तू थेट निवडणूक आयोगाला विचार
translated_text: You dumb person, ask EC directly!
Justification: The phrase "मंद बुद्धी" shows insult and anger.

Text: मतदासंघ हातून जातोय म्हंटल्यावर रस्त्यावर काय दारोदारी फिरतील हे पवारियन!
translated_text: Pawarians going door to door?
Justification: The phrase "दारोदारी फिरतील" implies disbelief and surprise.

Text: अन् स्वतःचा गांदी खाली अंधार आहे जल्युक्त शिवर घोटाळा
translated_text: There is darkness beneath Gandhi — Jalyukt Shivar scam
Justification: The word "घोटाळा" (scam) points to corruption, neutrally discussed.

Text: उन्मत्त अभिप्राय आहे हा
translated_text: This is an arrogant opinion
Justification: The word "उन्मत्त" (arrogant) implies shock at the arrogance.

Text: हे हुकूमशाह, जगताना राजासारखे जगतात आणि मरताना कुत्र्यासारखे मरतात...
translated_text: These dictators live like kings but die like dogs
Justification: The phrase "कुत्र्यासारखे मरतात" reflects intense disgust.

Text: ?? हा एकप्रकारे अपमान आहे.. पुण्यात सगळंच आहे मॅडम
translated_text: This is a kind of insult.. Pune has everything madam
Justification: The word "अपमान" (insult) is direct, expressing anger.

Text: याची जीभ नाही का घसरली . का जीभ घातली मध्ये
translated_text: Why didn’t his tongue slip?
Justification: The word "जीभ" (tongue) used idiomatically to express surprise.

Text: पहाटेच्या शपथविधीचा बनु गुंडे च सुत्रधार होता ना भौ.
translated_text: Wasn't Banu Gunde the mastermind behind the oath-taking?
Justification: The phrase "सुत्रधार" is used informatively.

Text: यापेक्षा जास्त ताकदवान आहेत...! आमचे दिवाळीचे फटाके...
translated_text: Our Diwali crackers are more powerful... the earth will be in danger.
Justification: "धोक्यात येईल" implies fear of destruction.

Text: आता तुला बघून त्यांना दिवसभर खायला नसेल भेटलं...
translated_text: Seeing you, I feel sad they had nothing to eat.
Justification: "दुःख" expresses sorrow empathetically.

Text: याला वेस्ट इंडिज वाले शोधत आहे आणि हा इकडे झिम्मा खेळतोय
translated_text: West Indies is looking for him, and he's playing games.
Justification: "झिम्मा खेळतोय" is sarcastic but neutral.

Text: मनसे राजकीय पक्ष आहे हाच बहुधा भ्रम आहे .
translated_text: MNS being a political party is a misconception.
Justification: "भ्रम" reflects neutral skepticism.

Text: अनेक स्त्रियांशी संबंध... हसाव की रडाव हा प्रश्न आहे
translated_text: Many relationships... don't know whether to laugh or cry.
Justification: "हसाव की रडाव" shows conflicting neutrality.

Text: कुठून काढलाय हा थुकरत सर्व्ह
translated_text: Where did this nonsense server come from?
Justification: "थुकरत" conveys surprise with mild disdain.

Text: आपण तर घरात राहतो... शेतकर्यांचि दशा बघवली जात नाही
translated_text: We live indoors, but farmers suffer
Justification: "दशा" highlights concern, stated neutrally.

Text: बेरोजगारीमुळे देशातील तरुण त्रस्त झाले आहे,पण मोदी सरकार मौन
translated_text: Youth are suffering due to unemployment; the government is silent.
Justification: "बेरोजगारीमुळे" conveys disappointment and disgust.

Text: अगदीच पचका उध्दवची लीगल बाजू कमकुवत आहे
translated_text: Uddhav's legal side is weak.
Justification: "कमकुवत" indicates neutral critique.

Text: ढाल तलवार चिन्ह अपयेशी आहे
translated_text: Shield and sword symbol is failing
Justification: "अपयेशी" reflects neutral failure.

Text: विकृती ला पण लाज वाटेल..
translated_text: Even perversion would feel ashamed
Justification: "विकृती" implies moral disgust.

Text: अच्छा म्हणजे पप्पू तुझा बाप आहे हे कबूल आहे तर
translated_text: Okay, so it's true that Pappu is your father.
Justification: "पप्पू" used as a sarcastic reference in neutral context.

Text: तिकडे गेला.. तुमच्याकडे पण आला नाही
translated_text: He went there but not to you.
Justification: "मायेचा कमीपणा" conveys emotional neglect and sadness.

Text: भक्त आणि ह्याचा काही संबंध नाही
translated_text: No connection to devotees.
Justification: "बडबड" implies dismissiveness, neutrally.

Text: तुम्हाला देशाशी काही घेणं देणं आहे का
translated_text: Do you care about the country?
Justification: "भक्ती करा" reflects civic detachment.

Text: हवामान खातं पण पत्रकारांसारखंच
translated_text: Meteorology like media.
Justification: "अंदाज सूत्रांवर" implies cynicism, neutrally.

Text: भाजप ला मत म्हणजे देश रसातळाला घेऊन जाणाऱ्याना मत
translated_text: A vote for BJP means a vote for those leading the country to the abyss.
Justification: "रसातळाला" is metaphorically used, expressing deep concern neutrally.

Text: लोकशाही संपुष्टात आणि देश बुडण्याच्या मार्गावर आहे
translated_text: Democracy is ending, country is sinking.
Justification: "बुडण्याच्या मार्गावर" evokes a sense of national sadness.

Text: बेरोजगारीची भीती आहे
translated_text: Fear of unemployment.
Justification: "भीती" refers to subtle underlying concern.

Text: पळून गेलात फाटली म्हणून
translated_text: So you ran away because it was torn.
Justification: "पळून गेलात" refers to escape, with no strong emotional tone.

Text: खुप मोठे विषय आहेत
translated_text: These are big topics.
Justification: Informative with no emotion.

Text: मशाल पेटली आहे, गद्दार जळून खाक होणार
translated_text: Torch is lit, traitors will burn.
Justification: "जळून खाक" is fiery language of anger.

Text: माझी लायकी किती ही असू दे पण विकण्यासारखी नाही
translated_text: Not for sale.
Justification: "विकण्यासारखी नाही" conveys integrity neutrally.

Text: पोलिसवाल्यांना काही काम उरलेली नाहीत
translated_text: Police have no work left.
Justification: "काम उरलेली नाहीत" expresses frustration.

Text: केंद्रीय गृहमंत्रीपद तसेच राज्य गृहमंत्रीपद भाजपकडे आहेत मग वर बंदी का घालत नाहीत.
translated_text: The BJP holds the posts of Union and State Home Ministers, so why isn't it banning him?
Justification: The phrase "वर बंदी का घालत नाहीत" raises a neutral political question.

Text: म्हात्रे तर सगळेच असतात पण मात्र तुम्हीच
translated_text: Everyone is old, but only you are...
Justification: "म्हात्रे" refers to age but is not emotionally charged.

Text: तिघांनी तर यांची फाडून ठेवली
translated_text: These three tore them apart.
Justification: "फाडून ठेवली" is aggressive but contextually neutral.

Text: कसले फोटो अरे
translated_text: What kind of photos are these?
Justification: "कसले फोटो" indicates surprise.

Text: खऱ्या प्रेमाच्या शोधात असतात
translated_text: Looking for true love.
Justification: "खऱ्या प्रेमाच्या शोधात" evokes romantic surprise.

Text: बाळासाहेब वंदनीय नाहीत
translated_text: Balasaheb not worthy of respect?
Justification: "वंदनीय नाहीत" expresses disbelief.

Text: भयंकर आहे हे
translated_text: This is terrible.
Justification: The word "भयंकर" shows strong negative emotion.

Text: हे पण बोगसच
translated_text: This is also fake.
Justification: The word "बोगसच" indicates falseness without emotion.

Text: पण लोकांना हे कळत नाही की सत्तेत कोण बसावं हे जनता ठरवते...
translated_text: People don’t realize that it’s the people who decide power.
Justification: The phrase "सत्तेत कोण बसावं" frames a neutral democratic fact.

Text: ज्या व्यक्तींचा वैयक्तिक दृष्टिकोन नाही
translated_text: Those who lack a personal perspective...
Justification: The phrase "वैयक्तिक दृष्टिकोन नाही" shows sadness about ignorance.

Text: अतुल्या चाट्या आहे तू
translated_text: You are incredibly cute.
Justification: The word "चाट्या" is used humorously to express joyful teasing.

Text: भ्रष्टाचार आहे गद्दारांचा
translated_text: Corruption is for traitors.
Justification: The phrase "गद्दारांचा" associates betrayal with disgust.

Text: खुप बधिर ह्या देशाचा युवा म्हणुन मिरवतात
translated_text: Many deaf people act as youth of this country.
Justification: The word "बधिर" suggests ignorance in a neutral tone.

Text: अबे म्हणजे तू पण लोकांच्या पंक्तीत बुंधी वाढायली का
translated_text: Hey, does that mean you also serve stupidity to people?
Justification: The sarcastic tone of "बुंधी वाढायली" (serving stupidity) is present, but the statement lacks strong emotions.

Text: रुपया घसरण हे भारतच्या हिताचं आहे का ? कमेंट करा
translated_text: Is the rupee's decline good for India? Comment below.
Justification: A simple economic question with no emotional charge.

Text: तारक मेहता'तील 'बबीताजी' कितवी शिकल्या माहितेय का?
translated_text: Do you know how much 'Babitaji' from Taarak Mehta learned?
Justification: The phrase "'बबीताजी' कितवी शिकल्या" presents a question with no emotional charge.

Text: आजचा दिवस आपल्या नेत्यासाठी म्हणजेच पवारसाहेबांसाठी
translated_text: Today is a day for our leader, Pawar Saheb.
Justification: The phrase "आपल्या नेत्यासाठी" reflects respect, but stays neutral.

Text: पृथ्वीवरच्या कोणत्याच स्त्रीचा चेहरा हा चंद्रासारखा दिसत नाही
translated_text: No woman has a moonlike face.
Justification: The phrase "चंद्रासारखा दिसत नाही" is poetic but neutral.

Text: वसुबारस पूजनाने दीपोत्सव... सोन्याच्या विक्रीत वाढ होणार?
translated_text: Will Deepotsav be celebrated and gold sales increase?
Justification: The phrase "वाढ होणार" shows joy about festive gains.

Text: हे पण तसच काहीसं
translated_text: This is also like that.
Justification: The phrase "तसच काहीसं" is vague, emotionally neutral.

Text: यांनी अजून ब्लॉक नाही केलं तुम्हाला
translated_text: They haven't blocked you yet.
Justification: "ब्लॉक नाही" is factual and emotionally neutral.

Text: निलेश, तुला सर्व नावं तोंड पाठ आहेत वाटतं...!
translated_text: Nilesh, you know all names by heart...?
Justification: "सर्व नावं तोंड पाठ" is surprising memory.

Text: दसरा मेळावा हा शिवतीर्थावर होणार.
translated_text: Dussehra rally at Shivtirtha.
Justification: "दसरा मेळावा" is an event, described neutrally.

Text: पाणी म्हणजे जीवन
translated_text: Water is life.
Justification: The sentence "पाणी म्हणजे जीवन" (Water is life) expresses a basic truth and lacks any specific emotional or opinionated language. There are no sentiment-bearing words. Hence, the sentiment is neutral.

Text: ताई आणि दादा म्हणणे हे आदर करण्याशी संबद्दित असू शकता....संस्कार पाहिजे तसे...
translated_text: Calling people "Tai" and "Dada" can be related to respect...as per the culture...
Justification: The sentence discusses the cultural association of "ताई आणि दादा" (Tai and Dada) with respect and upbringing ("संस्कार पाहिजे तसे"), expressing a neutral observation.

Text: सध्या हेच सुरू आहे ने तब्येत बरी आहे का ते पण नाही विचारलं
translated_text: This is what is happening right now. I didn't even ask if he was okay.
Justification: The phrase "नाही विचारलं" (nahi vicharle) indicating that no one even bothered to ask about their well-being, contributes to a neutral sentiment as it simply states a lack of action without expressing strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: ते म्हणलेले होते की मिडियाचं लक्ष विचलित करण्यासाठी ते बोलले…
translated_text: They said they spoke to distract the media...
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual reporting of someone's statement ("ते म्हणलेले होते की"). There is no inherent positive or negative sentiment expressed. The phrase "ते म्हणलेले होते" indicates a simple statement of fact, leading to the neutral sentiment.

Text: विकासाच्या बाबतीत भारत मागे राहिलेला नाही तर जग पुढे गेलं आहे! व्यर्थमंञी.
translated_text: In terms of development, India has not lagged behind, but the world has moved forward! Useless minister.
Justification: The phrase "व्यर्थमंञी" (useless minister) expresses disgust and negativity, directly contributing to the overall negative sentiment.

Text: ते उपमुख्यमंत्री म्हणूनच जन्माला आलेले आहेत!
translated_text: He was born to be the Deputy Chief Minister!
Justification: The phrase "ते उपमुख्यमंत्री म्हणूनच जन्माला आलेले आहेत!" implies a sense of predetermination and destiny related to holding a high position, which, in this context, is not expressing any strong positive or negative feeling. Therefore, sentiment is neutral. The exclamation mark and the hyperbole of being "born" for the role, although humorous, lean toward slight joy or amusement.

Text: पार्ट टाईम हिंदुत्व आहे यांचं. चवीनुसार वापरायचं
translated_text: Part time Hindutva is theirs. Use it according to your taste.
Justification: The sentence uses the phrase "चवीनुसार वापरायचं" (use it according to your taste) which implies a calculated and opportunistic approach, devoid of genuine belief, hence neutral sentiment.

Text: मनपामध्ये दूरध्वनीवर संवादासाठी आता हॅलो ऐवजी ‘वंदे मातरम्’ मनपाचे परिपत्रक जारी @
translated_text: Municipal Corporation circular issued to use 'Vande Mataram' instead of 'Hello' for telephone communication in the municipality @
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply reports a factual announcement ("मनपाचे परिपत्रक जारी") regarding a policy change, without expressing any positive or negative feelings. The phrase "मनपाचे परिपत्रक जारी" indicates a neutral announcement.

Text: तुझा आजोबा वाटतो बर का??
translated_text: Does your grandfather feel good??
Justification: The sentence is interpreted as a rhetorical question implying disbelief, rather than a genuine query about someone's well-being. The phrase "वाटतो बर का??" ("vatato bar ka??") indicates a sarcastic or dismissive tone, neutralizing any positive sentiment that "does your grandfather feel good" might otherwise suggest.

Text: आता फक्त दिवाळीला पाऊस नाही आला म्हणजे जिंकला.
translated_text: Now, just because it didn't rain on Diwali doesn't mean we won.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "आता फक्त दिवाळीला पाऊस नाही आला म्हणजे जिंकला" (Now, just because it didn't rain on Diwali doesn't mean we won) implies a lack of strong positive or negative feeling; it's a statement of fact/condition rather than an expression of joy or sadness.

Text: विश्लेषण : उद्धव ठाकरे आणि एकनाथ शिंदेंना ‘त्रिशूळ’ हे पक्षचिन्ह का मिळालं नाही?
translated_text: Analysis: Why didn't Uddhav Thackeray and Eknath Shinde get the party symbol 'Trishul'?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it poses a question ("का मिळालं नाही?") about a factual event (not receiving the 'Trishul' symbol). There's no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed. The question "का मिळालं नाही?" implies inquiry rather than any specific emotion.

Text: काही जण स्वतः मला म्हणतात .येऊ का संडेला , बोलावं कधीतरी.
translated_text: Some people themselves say to me, "Come on Sunday, let's talk sometime."
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply describes a casual invitation. There are no inherently positive or negative words or phrases. The Marathi phrases "येऊ का संडेला" (Come on Sunday) and "बोलावं कधीतरी" (let's talk sometime) are polite and non-committal, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: सदरच्या मेळाव्यासाठीच्या जेवणाची व्यवस्था माझ्याकडे होती.
translated_text: I was responsible for arranging the food for the gathering.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact ("माझ्याकडे होती" - was with me/I was responsible), indicating responsibility without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: आणि कोणीतरी काही दिवसापूर्वी मुंबई मेट्रो मध्ये गाणी गातात म्हणून करत होते.
translated_text: And a few days ago, someone was singing songs in the Mumbai Metro.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes an event (someone singing in the Mumbai Metro). There is no sentiment-bearing word or phrase. The entire sentence, "आणि कोणीतरी काही दिवसापूर्वी मुंबई मेट्रो मध्ये गाणी गातात म्हणून करत होते," is descriptive and lacks any emotional or evaluative content.

Text: तेवढं सोपं भाजपा वाटतं का?काही वेगळंच नसेल तर नवल नको
translated_text: Does BJP seem that simple? Don't be surprised if there is nothing different.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a rhetorical question and expresses a lack of surprise regarding potential outcomes. There isn't a strongly positive or negative word or phrase that indicates sentiment. The phrases "तेवढं सोपं" (that simple) and "नवल नको" (don't be surprised) contribute to the neutral tone by questioning assumptions without expressing strong emotion.

Text: आणि बँकांना त्यांची कर्जे माफ करण्यास सांगा
translated_text: And ask the banks to forgive their loans
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "कर्जे माफ करण्यास सांगा" (karje maaf karanyas sanga - ask to forgive loans) simply describes an action without expressing positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हॉररपट   सत्य घटनेवर आधारित आहे का?
translated_text: Is the horror film based on a true story?
Justification: The emotion "fear" is triggered by the word "हॉररपट" (horror film), which evokes a sense of dread and fear.

Text: युवा नेता म्हणून राज साहेबांचा पोरगा आहे. हे विसरू नका
translated_text: As a young leader, he is Raj Saheb's son. Don't forget this.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because while referring to someone as "राज साहेबांचा पोरगा आहे" (Raj Saheb's son) is descriptive, it doesn't inherently express positive or negative sentiment. It's simply stating a fact of his lineage.

Text: बाळासाहेबांची शिवसेना या पक्षाचा नवा व्हिडिओ ...
translated_text: New video of Balasaheb's Shiv Sena party...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a factual statement about a new video of Balasaheb's Shiv Sena party. There is no sentiment-bearing word or phrase present. The entire sentence "बाळासाहेबांची शिवसेना या पक्षाचा नवा व्हिडिओ ..." is simply descriptive.

Text: वागळ्या हे बघ चोख उत्तर
translated_text: Look at this, Wagla. This is a perfect answer.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is likely due to the phrase "चोख उत्तर" (chokh uttar) which translates to "perfect answer". While it indicates a positive outcome or satisfaction, it lacks strong positive connotations that would trigger a positive sentiment. The word "बघ" (bagh - look) and the name "वागळ्या" (Wagla) are neutral.

Text: या गोष्टीवर मुस्लिमांमध्ये पुरोगामी, सुधारणावादी लोकांपेक्षा प्रतिगामी लोकच जास्त बोलतात.
translated_text: Among Muslims, reactionary people speak out more on this issue than progressive and reformist people.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily describes a disproportionate amount of speech ("जास्त बोलतात") from one group compared to another ("प्रतिगामी लोकच जास्त बोलतात"), without expressing a positive or negative opinion about either group or the topic itself.

Text: ये केसा पत्रकार हे ,
translated_text: What kind of journalist are you?
Justification: The phrase "ये केसा" (ye kesa), meaning "what kind," expresses disbelief and sarcasm, leading to a neutral sentiment and a feeling of surprise rather than a positive or negative one.

Text: काय करता येईल हे ही सांगा?
translated_text: Tell me what can be done?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a simple question asking for suggestions ("काय करता येईल हे ही सांगा?"). There are no words or phrases expressing any positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "काय करता येईल" (what can be done) is an inquiry, not an expression of opinion or feeling.

Text: कावळ्याच्या शापाने गाय मरत नाही,
translated_text: A cow does not die from the curse of a crow,
Justification: The proverb "कावळ्याच्या शापाने गाय मरत नाही" (kavalyachya shapanE gay marat nahi) implies that the curse of a crow (considered insignificant) cannot harm a cow (considered significant), expressing a sense of futility and dismissal, leading to a neutral sentiment and the negative emotion of disgust due to the negativity associated with curses and the insignificance.

Text: हा निधी वापरला जावा... आणि कामे व्हावीत... एवढीच सदिच्छा... धन्यवाद
translated_text: This fund should be used... and the work should be done... that's all the goodwill... thank you
Justification: The sentiment is neutral (0.0) and emotion is joy because "सदिच्छा" (sadiccha), meaning goodwill, expresses a positive intention, contributing a feeling of joy but not strong enough for a clearly positive sentiment.

Text: मलाही लिहायचा होता लिहीन लिहीन म्हणून राहून गेला
translated_text: I also wanted to write, but I kept writing.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral/slightly negative and evokes sadness because of the phrase "राहून गेला" (rahun gela), which implies something was left undone or remained unfulfilled, creating a feeling of regret and sadness.

Text: तुम्हाला कोणी काय करावं ते सांगितलं तर मला ही कळवा
translated_text: If anyone tells you what to do, let me know.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's simply a request for information ("मला ही कळवा" - let me know) based on a hypothetical scenario, lacking any overt positive or negative connotations.

Text: हा निर्णय झाला त्यावेळचे सर्व आताही सत्ताधारी आहेत.
translated_text: Everyone who was in power when this decision was made is still in power.
Justification: The sentence is a factual statement with no explicit sentiment. There isn't a specific word or phrase implying positive or negative emotion. The sentence simply states that those who were in power during a certain decision are still in power ("आताही सत्ताधारी आहेत").

Text: इडली खाल्याने वजन वाढत नाही हुशशश ...
translated_text: Eating idli does not increase weight, hushhhh...
Justification: The sentence expresses relief about not gaining weight by eating idli. However, the sentiment is neutral because the core statement "इडली खाल्याने वजन वाढत नाही" (idli khalyane vajan vadhat nahi - eating idli does not increase weight) is a factual statement, and the "हुशशश..." (hushhhh...) expresses a feeling, not a directly positive or negative evaluation of the idli itself. Therefore, the factual statement dominates leading to neutral sentiment.

Text: अत्यंत धाडसी निर्णय! दादांची मते   % वाढणार.
translated_text: Very bold decision! Dada's votes will increase by 10%.
Justification: While the sentence expresses a positive outcome (increased votes), the phrase "अत्यंत धाडसी निर्णय!" (atyant dhadsi nirnay! - very bold decision!) is neutral in sentiment on its own. It describes the nature of the decision but doesn't explicitly express positive or negative feeling *about the decision itself*. Thus, the 0.0 sentiment.

Text: उजिळ कधी होता?
translated_text: When was it bright?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the interrogative and factual nature of "उजिळ कधी होता?" (ujil kadhi hota?), which simply asks "When was it bright?" without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: विश्लेषण : भारतीय गोलंदाज धावसंख्येचा बचाव करण्यात का ठरत आहेत अपयशी?
translated_text: Analysis: Why are Indian bowlers failing to defend the score?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to its interrogative and analytical nature. The phrase "अपयशी ठरत आहेत?" (apayashi tharat aahet?) meaning "failing?" poses a question rather than expressing a positive or negative sentiment directly.

Text: नक्कीच, ही दिवाळी हलाल मुक्त होणार च जयतू जयतू हिंदुराष्ट्र
translated_text: Surely, this Diwali will be halal free, Jaitu Jaitu Hindu Rashtra
Justification: The sentence expresses a political sentiment ("जयतू जयतू हिंदुराष्ट्र") advocating for a Hindu Rashtra, but without overtly positive or negative emotional cues related to the Diwali celebration itself. The phrase "हलाल मुक्त होणार" (halal free) signals a political stance rather than direct emotional expression.

Text: खरंच??? चौकातला का??
translated_text: Really??? Why in the square??
Justification: The word "खरंच???" (Kharch??? - Really???) expresses surprise.

Text: छोटा पॅकेट गोटी दाढी, महाशक्ती आम्ही नाही म्हणत, तुझा मालकच म्हणतोय,त्याला जाऊन विचार...
translated_text: Small packet of goatee beard, we are not saying superpower, your master is saying it, go and ask him...
Justification: The sentence uses the phrase "छोटा पॅकेट गोटी दाढी" ("small packet of goatee beard") which, in context, is meant to be derogatory and dismissive, but without strong emotional coloring. The rest of the sentence is a statement of fact/suggestion, leading to an overall neutral sentiment.

Text: अरे विषय आहे का
translated_text: Oh, is there a topic?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple question inquiring about the existence of a topic. The phrase "अरे विषय आहे का" expresses a general inquiry and doesn't convey any strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: आणि जेलचा अम्रूत महोत्सव
translated_text: And the nectar festival of the prison
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes an event ("अम्रूत महोत्सव" - nectar festival) happening at a location ("जेलचा" - of the prison) without expressing any positive or negative emotion.

Text: ..... उमेदवार देत नाहीत ही आमची संस्कृती आहे.
translated_text: ..... Our culture is that candidates don't give.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about their culture ("आमची संस्कृती आहे") without expressing any positive or negative emotion or opinion.

Text: नावेच अशी आहेत की कोणी कुठेही टच करणार नाही.
translated_text: The names themselves are such that no one will touch them anywhere.
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of fact about the nature of the names ("नावेच अशी आहेत"), indicating a neutral sentiment. There isn't a specific word evoking strong emotion.

Text: आरोग्य टीप्स : रिफाइंड तेलाचा वापर करताय? आधी हे वाचा….
translated_text: Health Tips: Are you using refined oil? Read this first….
Justification: The sentence presents information neutrally, posing a question ("रिफाइंड तेलाचा वापर करताय?") to encourage the reader to learn more ("आधी हे वाचा…"). There's no inherent positive or negative connotation in this prompting, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: त्याचसाठी तर हा राष्ट्रवादीतुन तिकडे गेला
translated_text: That's why he left the NCP.
Justification: The sentence describes a political event (leaving a party). There's no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed. The phrase "राष्ट्रवादीतुन तिकडे गेला" (left the NCP) simply states a fact, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: ते लढायला तयार होते तुमचे मालकाने तुम्हाला पूढ करून खेळी खेळले पण माज बघा
translated_text: They were ready to fight, your master played a trick on you, but look at me.
Justification: The phrase "माज बघा" (maj bagha), meaning "look at my pride/ego/arrogance," indicates anger due to its boastful and aggressive tone.

Text: ही यांची लायकी
translated_text: This is their merit.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because "लायकी" (lāyakī), meaning merit or worth, is used descriptively without any indication of positive or negative connotation in this context.

Text: हडपसर जागे साठी कोण तिकीट मागायला फडणवीस साहेबांना कडे गेले होते.
translated_text: Who had approached Fadnavis Saheb to ask for a ticket for the Hadapsar seat?
Justification: The sentence is a neutral inquiry, lacking any strong positive or negative connotations. It simply asks a question about who approached Fadnavis regarding a ticket. No specific Marathi word or phrase expresses a particular sentiment; the entire sentence "हडपसर जागे साठी कोण तिकीट मागायला फडणवीस साहेबांना कडे गेले होते" is a factual question.

Text: काय संस्कृती आहे. राणे कुटुंबांतील सदस्यांची
translated_text: What is the culture of the members of the Rane family?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a general observation about the Rane family's culture, lacking overtly positive or negative Marathi words. The phrase "काय संस्कृती आहे" (kay sanskruti aahe) simply asks about the culture, without expressing any specific sentiment.

Text: दिल्ली मध्ये मास्क अनिवार्य आहे का ??
translated_text: Is mask mandatory in Delhi??
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question ("अनिवार्य आहे का??") about a regulation ("मास्क") without expressing any opinion or feeling.

Text: सर्व खासदारांची चौकशी केली पाहिजे तुंमची एवढी संपत्ती कशी वाढली हे उतर द्यावे
translated_text: All MPs should be investigated and asked to explain how their wealth increased.
Justification: The sentence expresses a demand for investigation and explanation ("चौकशी केली पाहिजे" and "उतर द्यावे"). While it implies potential wrongdoing, it's presented as a statement of necessary action, rather than expressing strong positive or negative emotion. Thus, the neutral sentiment.

Text: जिल्ह्याचे नाव जगात पोचायनाऱ्या अविनाश साबळेंच्या गावाचा होणार कायापालट
translated_text: The village of Avinash Sable, who made the district famous worldwide, will be transformed.
Justification: The sentence describes a planned transformation, but lacks overt positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "होणार कायापालट" (honar kayapalat - will be transformed) simply indicates a future change, without expressing any inherent positivity or negativity.

Text: आरे येथील कारखेड साठी विरोध म्हणून गाणे म्हटले तरी कारवाई झाली होती...
translated_text: Even though a song was sung in protest against the Karkhed in Aarey, action was taken...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment with anger likely stemming from the phrase "कारवाई झाली होती" (karavai jhali hoti), meaning "action was taken". This indicates a negative consequence despite the protest, suggesting resentment and thus contributing to the emotion of anger.

Text: जीवनात जगतांना असे जगा कि आपण कोणाची आठवण काढण्यापेक्षा आपली कोणीतरी आठवण काढली पाहीजे…
translated_text: While living life, live it in such a way that someone should remember you more than you should remember someone else...
Justification: The sentence expresses a general philosophical thought about living a memorable life without strong positive or negative indicators. Therefore, it is considered neutral. The phrase "जीवनात जगतांना असे जगा" (While living life, live it in such a way) sets a reflective tone without expressing specific emotion or sentiment.

Text: आणि ढाल तरवार संग्रहालयातून बाहेर पडणार नाही.
translated_text: And the shield sword will not leave the museum.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about the location of the shield and sword. The phrase "पडणार नाही" (padnar nahi - will not leave) simply indicates a state of being and does not evoke any positive or negative emotion, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: ही वस्तुस्थिती आहे
translated_text: This is a fact.
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of fact ("ही वस्तुस्थिती आहे"). The Marathi phrase "वस्तुस्थिती आहे" directly translates to "is a fact" and conveys a neutral sentiment, lacking any positive or negative emotional charge.

Text: तो बारामतीचा होता...
translated_text: He was from Baramati...
Justification: The sentence "तो बारामतीचा होता..." expresses a simple statement of origin. There is no emotionally charged word or phrase; it's a factual declaration, thus the sentiment is neutral (0.0). The phrase "बारामतीचा होता" simply indicates origin and does not carry any inherent emotion.

Text: मिडियाला हा मुद्दा तापत ठेवायचा होता, अंकिता प्रकरणावरून लक्ष हटवण्यासाठी. बाकी गेहलोत समर्थ आहेत.
translated_text: The media wanted to keep this issue hot, to divert attention from the Ankita case. Gehlot is the one who is capable.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it presents factual information and observations about the media's motives ("मिडियाला हा मुद्दा तापत ठेवायचा होता, अंकिता प्रकरणावरून लक्ष हटवण्यासाठी") and Gehlot's capabilities ("गेहलोत समर्थ आहेत"). There are no explicit positive or negative indicators.

Text: हा उंबरठ्याच्या आत आणि हे उंबरठ्याच्या बाहेर
translated_text: This is inside the threshold and this is outside the threshold.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes a spatial relationship using factual language like "आत" (inside) and "बाहेर" (outside), lacking any emotional or subjective expression.

Text: याचं आणि यांच्या वडिलांचं हे विशेष आहे की हे कधीच मराठी वापरात नाहीत.
translated_text: What's special about him and his father is that they never use Marathi.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it states a fact ("they never use Marathi") without any explicit positive or negative words. The phrase "मराठी वापरात नाहीत" (Marathi vaprata nahit - do not use Marathi) is a factual observation, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: हिंदुत्व हा शब्द पाठ्यपुस्तकात गेला कसा???? ज्या शब्दाचा इतिहासच नाही तो शब्द इतिहासात????
translated_text: How did the word Hindutva get into the textbook???? A word that has no history is included in history????
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the rhetorical questions and disbelief conveyed by the phrase "कसा???? ज्या शब्दाचा इतिहासच नाही तो शब्द इतिहासात????", questioning how a word with no history could be included in history textbooks. The repetition of the question mark amplifies this surprise.

Text: नजर नका लावू सर...एकुलती एक आहे.. . . . . तिच्या बापाला...
translated_text: Don't look at me, sir... there is only one... her father...
Justification: The phrase "एकुलती एक आहे" (ekulati ek aahe), meaning "only one," suggests a sense of vulnerability and potential loss, contributing to the sadness emotion and neutral sentiment.

Text: गेलाय तो तिकडे बघू आता
translated_text: He is gone, let's look there now
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a fact ("गेलाय तो" - he is gone) and suggests a direction ("तिकडे बघू आता" - let's look there now) without conveying any positive or negative emotion. There are no words expressing joy, sadness, anger, or fear.

Text: वेळेचं नियोजन हे यशाचा पाया आहे हे नक्कीच
translated_text: Time management is definitely the foundation of success.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the affirmation "नक्कीच" (nakkich), which translates to "definitely" or "certainly," indicating a factual statement rather than expressing strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: अशी आहे जडेजाची लव्हस्टोरी..
translated_text: This is Jadeja's love story..
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the descriptive nature of "अशी आहे जडेजाची लव्हस्टोरी" (ashi aahe jadejachi lavhastori), which simply states a fact without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: निवडणूक कधी आहे
translated_text: When is the election?
Justification: The sentence "निवडणूक कधी आहे" is neutral because it is a factual question about the election date. There is no sentiment-bearing word or phrase present. The words "निवडणूक" (election), "कधी" (when), and "आहे" (is) are all neutral in this context.

Text: . मराठी मनाला हे कस पटेल?
translated_text: How will this make sense to the Marathi mind?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question about acceptance and doesn't contain inherently positive or negative words. The phrase "कसं पटेल?" (kasa patel?) implying doubt or questioning rather than a strong emotional stance contributes to the neutral sentiment.

Text: बदला मग हे सरकार
translated_text: Change this government.
Justification: The sentence "बदला मग हे सरकार" expresses a call for political change but lacks strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "बदला मग" (change then/so change) is a relatively neutral request in this context, not expressing inherent anger, joy, or sadness, thus leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: हे काय असते
translated_text: What is this?
Justification: The phrase "हे काय असते" (he kay aste) expressing a basic inquiry about something unknown, indicates a neutral sentiment and surprise, rather than a positive or negative emotion. "काय" (kay) suggests a question seeking information and implies a lack of prior knowledge, thus the surprise.

Text: उद्धव ठाकरेंनी पुण्यातील ‘पाकिस्तान जिंदाबाद’च्या नाऱ्यांचा निषेध का केला नाही; भाजपचा सवाल –
translated_text: Why didn't Uddhav Thackeray protest against 'Pakistan Zindabad' chants in Pune; BJP questions -
Justification: The sentence reports a question posed by BJP regarding Uddhav Thackeray's lack of protest against alleged pro-Pakistan slogans. The neutral sentiment stems from the fact that it is reporting a question or statement and does not express a positive or negative opinion. It's just conveying information. The phrase "भाजपचा सवाल" (BJP's question) indicates the source of the statement rather than an emotional stance.

Text: भेट व्हावी असं काही नाही मनात आपुलकी आहे हे हि काही कमी नाही...
translated_text: There is no need to meet, but the fact that I have affection in my heart is no less...
Justification: The phrase "मनात आपुलकी आहे" (manat aapulki aahe), meaning "there is affection in my heart," indicates a positive feeling and a sense of contentment, justifying the joy emotion. The presence of "आपुलकी" (aapulki - affection) is key to this positive sentiment.

Text: याला जास्त प्रसिद्धी देऊ नका. हा सगळं त्याचसाठी करतोय. असाच नाही उताणा पाडला निवडणुकीत.
translated_text: Don't give this too much publicity. I'm doing all this for the same reason. It's not like he messed up the election.
Justification: The phrase "उताणा पाडला" (utaana paadla), meaning "messed up/defeated badly", suggests anger towards the subject for losing the election. The overall context reinforces this negative sentiment due to the speaker expressing that the subject doesn't deserve publicity.

Text: च्यु .. धनुष्यबाण तर किती वर्षांपासून माहिती होता तरीही चार नंबर आला
translated_text: Chew.. I've known about bows and arrows for years, but I still got number four.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily driven by the interjection "च्यु" (Chew), which expresses mild disappointment or annoyance but doesn't strongly indicate a positive or negative sentiment. The rest of the sentence describes a factual situation without strong emotional cues.

Text: इथून पुढे सर्व न्यायालयीन बाबींचा निकाल ट्विटर पोल द्वारेच लागेल का? आपल्याला काय वाटते?
translated_text: Will all court cases be decided through Twitter polls from now on? What do you think?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question about the future of court decisions ("निकाल ट्विटर पोल द्वारेच लागेल का?") and asks for the reader's opinion ("आपल्याला काय वाटते?"), indicating a neutral stance rather than any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: एमपीएससी मध्ये प्रश्न विचारतील म्हणून अंडरलाईन केलीय का...
translated_text: Is it underlined because they will ask questions in MPSC...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the speculative and somewhat sarcastic tone implied by "म्हणून" (mhanun - because), suggesting a questioning rather than positive or negative affirmation. The sentence simply asks about the reason for underlining something in relation to the MPSC exam, without expressing any explicit emotional charge.

Text: वेट आणि वॉच बिहार.
translated_text: Wait and watch Bihar.
Justification: The sentence "वेट आणि वॉच बिहार" (Wait and watch Bihar) is neutral as it simply describes an action of observation and does not contain any words expressing positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "वेट आणि वॉच" (wait and watch) is the primary contributor to this neutral sentiment.

Text: व्यापारात शांत संयमी आणि दूरदृष्टी असलेला माणूस टिकतो.
translated_text: A person who is calm, patient, and farsighted survives in business.
Justification: The sentence describes qualities needed to survive in business. There are no overtly positive or negative words; words like "शांत" (calm), "संयमी" (patient), and "दूरदृष्टी" (farsighted) are neutral descriptors, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: ओढत तुला च नेत आहे पण हे नक्की
translated_text: I'm dragging you along, but this is for sure.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "ओढत तुला च नेत आहे पण हे नक्की" simply states an action and its certainty without conveying any explicit positive or negative emotion.

Text: जाणीव ठेवणारे माणसें खुप कमी प्रमाणात आहेत, पण उपकाराची परतफेड केली असे सांगणारे बरेच भेटतील.
translated_text: There are very few people who are aware, but there are many who say they have repaid the favor.
