The phrase "काय हरकत आहे" (kay harkat aahe), meaning "what's wrong with," suggests a neutral stance of questioning and contemplation rather than expressing a strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: अंधेरी पोटनिवडणूक : महाराष्ट्रातील महान राजकीय संस्कृतीकरिता बरं का...
translated_text: Andheri by-election: Good for the great political culture of Maharashtra...
Justification: The phrase "बरं का..." ("barं kaa...") expressing a rhetorical or subtly sarcastic tone, negates any positive sentiment that the words "महान" (mahaan - great) and "बरं" (barं - good) might otherwise imply, resulting in a neutral sentiment. While "बरं" might suggest joy on its own, the entire phrase signals a more nuanced and possibly ironic meaning.

Text: आपण म्हणजे बाळासाहेब नव्हे. आपण म्हणजे शिवसेना नव्हे. आपण म्हणजे फक्त उद्धट ठाकरे.
translated_text: We are not Balasaheb. We are not Shiv Sena. We are just Uddhat Thackeray.
Justification: The neutral sentiment stems from the statement being factual and descriptive rather than expressing any strong positive or negative emotion. The phrase "उद्धट ठाकरे" (Uddhat Thackeray) describes a characteristic but without explicit judgment; it's presented as a matter of fact within the context of the broader negation ("We are not Balasaheb, not Shiv Sena"). While "उद्धट" can have negative connotations, in this declarative context, it doesn't strongly skew the overall sentiment.

Text: माझं पक्ष ? काई कंपनी आहे का ?
translated_text: My party? What company is it?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "काई कंपनी आहे का ?" (kai company aahe ka?) implying "what company is it?", is a rhetorical question exhibiting a neutral stance rather than any particular positive or negative emotion.

Text: कार्यकर्ते कोणाचे का असेना पण त्या गर्दीचे रुपांतर मतांमध्ये होते.
translated_text: Regardless of whose activists they belonged to, that crowd was transformed into votes.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation about the conversion of a crowd into votes, without any indication of positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "गर्दीचे रुपांतर मतांमध्ये होते" (crowd was transformed into votes) is a neutral statement about a political process.

Text: ऑक्टोबरला दसऱ्याच्या मुहूर्तावर हा चित्रपट प्रदर्शित होणार आहे.
translated_text: The film is set to release in October, on the occasion of Dussehra.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact about a film's release date. The phrase "ऑक्टोबरला दसऱ्याच्या मुहूर्तावर हा चित्रपट प्रदर्शित होणार आहे" (Octoberla Dasryachya Muhurtavar ha chitrapat pradashit honar aahe) is descriptive and doesn't express any positive or negative sentiment or specific emotion.

Text: स्टुडिओ ही निट चालवु शकले असते ?
translated_text: Could the studio have run smoothly?
Justification: The sentence expresses doubt and a lack of strong feeling, indicated by the question format and the auxiliary verb "शकले असते" (shakale asate) implying potential rather than certainty, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: पत्रकारितेतही हाच नियम लागू होतो नाही का!
translated_text: Doesn't the same rule apply to journalism too?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "नाही का!" (nahi ka!), a tag question meaning "isn't it?" or "doesn't it?", seeks confirmation rather than expressing a positive or negative feeling. It makes the sentence inquisitive but doesn't inherently convey sentiment.

Text: कपिल सिब्बल पत्रकारांच्या घरी आला होता की काय
translated_text: Did Kapil Sibal come to the journalists' house?
Justification: The sentence is a question asking about an event ("कपिल सिब्बल पत्रकारांच्या घरी आला होता की काय"), and contains no inherently positive or negative wording. It simply inquires about Kapil Sibal's presence at journalists' homes. Therefore, it is neutral.

Text: माझ्या मुळे अख्खं जग चालतंय असा दावा मी करणार आहे
translated_text: I'm going to claim that the whole world runs because of me.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence is simply a statement of intent. The word "दावा" (claim) doesn't necessarily convey a positive or negative sentiment on its own. While "अख्खं जग चालतंय माझ्या मुळे" (the whole world runs because of me) can be perceived as arrogant, the use of "मी करणार आहे" (I am going to) creates distance and removes strong conviction from the statement, leading to the neutral sentiment. The emotion of joy might be inferred due to the grandiose nature of the statement implying confidence and self-satisfaction, though not explicitly stated.

Text: माहीत आहे मॅडम.....  उद्देश फक्त इच्छा दर्शवण्याचा होता
translated_text: I know, madam... the purpose was just to show my desire.
Justification: The sentence expresses acknowledgment and intention without strong positive or negative connotation, leading to a neutral sentiment. The phrase "उद्देश फक्त इच्छा दर्शवण्याचा होता" (the purpose was just to show my desire) is descriptive and lacks emotional charge, solidifying the neutral sentiment.

Text: विदर्भातील काही भागांतून मान्सूनची माघार, वेधशाळेची माहिती.
translated_text: Monsoon retreat from some parts of Vidarbha, information from the observatory.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact: "मान्सूनची माघार" (monsoon retreat), which is a common meteorological phenomenon and doesn't inherently express any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: प्यार का खत लिखने - ही गझल मी    वेळा ऐकलीय..
translated_text: To write a letter of love - I have heard this ghazal many times..
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment with a slight sense of disgust due to the phrase "प्यार का खत लिखने", which suggests a cliché or overused theme associated with love letters, triggering a feeling of distaste.

Text: सिंगल असे असतात तर...!
translated_text: If they are single...!
Justification: The phrase "असे असतात तर...!" (ase asatat tar...!) expresses disbelief and annoyance, implying a negative judgment about single people, thus contributing to anger.

Text: छातीतली कळ कमी झाली ना
translated_text: Has the pressure in your chest decreased?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it inquires about the lessening of chest pain. The phrase "कमी झाली ना" (kami jhali na), meaning "decreased, right?", is a simple question about a state of being and does not express any positive or negative emotion.

Text: मधे ह्यो आला
translated_text: This came in between.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "मधे ह्यो आला" (madhe hyo aala) simply describes an event of someone or something interrupting, without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: त्यांचा सहभागच तेवढा होता
translated_text: Their participation was that much.
Justification: The sentence "त्यांचा सहभागच तेवढा होता" expresses a neutral sentiment because "तेवढा होता" (tevdha hota - that much) indicates a limited or measured amount, but doesn't carry any positive or negative connotation in this context. It's a factual statement.

Text: | ‘या’ बॉलिवूड अभिनेत्रीने लोकांना केली ही विनंती, वाचा संपूर्ण प्रकरण…
translated_text: | 'This' Bollywood actress made this request to the people, read the full story...
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to its factual and informative tone. There isn't a specific word expressing sentiment; the phrase "या बॉलिवूड अभिनेत्रीने लोकांना केली ही विनंती" ('This' Bollywood actress made this request to the people) simply states an action without conveying positive or negative feelings.

Text: हा म्हणजे तुझ्या अनुभवातून बाकी सगळे शिकतील ना
translated_text: This means that everyone else will learn from your experience, right?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the questioning and somewhat observational tone conveyed by the phrase "हा म्हणजे... बाकी सगळे शिकतील ना" (ha mhanje... baki sagale shikhtil na), which simply poses a question about learning from someone's experience without expressing any particular positive or negative emotion.

Text: आता डॉलर मध्ये खेळतात
translated_text: Now they play in dollars
Justification: The sentence "आता डॉलर मध्ये खेळतात" is neutral because it simply states a fact about the currency used in a game or transaction; there is no inherent positive or negative connotation associated with the phrase "डॉलर मध्ये खेळतात" (play in dollars).

Text: मिसळ खाऊन नावे ठेवायला पाहिजे होती सर. जास्त मजा आली असती
translated_text: Sir, you should have eaten misal and named it. It would have been more fun.
Justification: The sentence expresses a playful suggestion to criticize the misal after eating it for added enjoyment. The overall tone is neutral as it doesn't convey strong positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "जास्त मजा आली असती" (jasta maja ali asti) implies the potential for increased enjoyment, but the subjunctive mood keeps the statement neutral.

Text: रुपया कमजोर होत नसून तर डॉलर मजबूत होतोय, यादृष्टीने पाहावे : केंद्रीय वित्तमंत्री निर्मला सीतारमण
translated_text: The rupee is not weakening, but the dollar is strengthening, we should look at it from this perspective: Union Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman
Justification: The sentence expresses an objective economic observation. The phrase "रुपया कमजोर होत नसून तर डॉलर मजबूत होतोय" (the rupee is not weakening, but the dollar is strengthening) presents a neutral economic perspective, lacking explicit emotional content or sentiment.

translated_text: Whose photo was in it?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple question ("मध्ये कोणाचा फोटो होता") asking about the content of something, without expressing any positive or negative feeling. The word "कोणाचा" (konacha - whose) simply inquires about ownership and doesn't inherently carry sentiment.

Text: पुण्यात असे कधीच होत नव्हते पूर्वी!
translated_text: This has never happened before in Pune!
Justification: The phrase "कधीच होत नव्हते" (kadhich hot navhate) meaning "never happened before" indicates surprise, as it suggests an unexpected deviation from the norm. The overall sentiment leans neutral (0.0) because, while expressing surprise, it doesn't necessarily convey a positive or negative feeling about the situation itself.

Text: तुम्ही अशी सुवर्णसंधी गमावू नका, त्यामुळे आताच ती मिळवा.
translated_text: You shouldn't miss such a golden opportunity, so grab it now.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it primarily offers advice. While "सुवर्णसंधी" (suvarnasandhi, golden opportunity) sounds positive, the overall message focuses on urging action rather than expressing a strong positive or negative feeling. The call to action "मिळवा" (milva, grab it) maintains a neutral tone.

Text: *अतिवृष्टीमुळे झालेल्या नुकसानीचे पंचनामे करा विजय शिवतारे यांची माघणी* *महाराष्ट्र एक्स्प्रेस ला सबस्काईब करा*
translated_text: *Make a Panchnama of the damage caused by heavy rains, Vijay Shivtare's Maghani* *Subscribe to Maharashtra Express*
Justification: The sentence primarily reports news and a call to action ("सबस्काईब करा" - Subscribe) without expressing explicit positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "नुकसानीचे पंचनामे करा" (Make a Panchnama of the damage) is related to damage but presented neutrally as a request for assessment.

Text: आणि पत्र दोन तीन महिने अगोदर लिहिले होते पण ते निवडणूक काळात पोहोचले
translated_text: And the letter was written two or three months ago but it arrived during the election period.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual sequence of events ("आणि पत्र दोन तीन महिने अगोदर लिहिले होते पण ते निवडणूक काळात पोहोचले"), lacking strong positive or negative indicators. There's no explicitly emotional language used. The phrase "निवडणूक काळात पोहोचले" (arrived during the election period) simply states a timing detail without implying any particular feeling or opinion.

Text: खुळखुळा ही नाही मिळाला का?
translated_text: Didn't you get the Khulkhulkhu?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it's a simple question. The phrase "खुळखुळा ही नाही मिळाला का?" (Khulkhulkhu hi nahi milala ka?) which translates to "Didn't you even get the Khulkhulkhu?" is a factual inquiry and doesn't express any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हे साहेब नाशिक क्या गुलगुलित रस्त्या वरूनच् गेले असतील
translated_text: Hey sir, have you gone through the winding roads of Nashik?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it primarily describes a route in Nashik. The Marathi phrase "गुलगुलित रस्त्या" (gulgulit rasta) meaning winding roads is descriptive and doesn't express any strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: आज पासून लोकांना सांगणार लक्षात ठेवा आपल्याला बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवायचे आहे.
translated_text: From today onwards, I will tell people to remember that we have to defeat Balasaheb's Shiv Sena.
Justification: The sentence expresses a political objective ("आपल्याला बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवायचे आहे" - we have to defeat Balasaheb's Shiv Sena), focusing on strategic action rather than expressing strong positive or negative feelings. The focus on defeating a political opponent is more of a neutral statement of intent in this context.

Text: टेलिग्राफ वृत्तपत्राने ही बातमी दिली आहे
translated_text: The Telegraph newspaper reported this news.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a factual statement. The phrase "टेलीग्राफ वृत्तपत्राने ही बातमी दिली आहे" (The Telegraph newspaper reported this news) simply reports an event without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text:
हिमालयातील भूकंपप्रवण क्षेत्रांचे मॅपिंग निसार उपग्रहाद्वारे होणार:

 
 
 .//    / / …
translated_text:
Mapping of seismically active areas in the Himalayas to be done by Nisar satellite:

.// / / …
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about the mapping of seismically active areas using a satellite. There's no sentiment or emotion expressed. The phrase "हिमालयातील भूकंपप्रवण क्षेत्रांचे मॅपिंग निसार उपग्रहाद्वारे होणार" is a straightforward statement of a planned action.

Text: खोके यांच्याही घरी जायचे, बंद झाल्यामुळे अशी अवस्था झालेली दिसते
translated_text: Khoke's house was also closed, it seems this situation has arisen due to the lockdown.
Justification: The sentence describes a factual situation ("बंद झाल्यामुळे अशी अवस्था झालेली दिसते" - this situation has arisen due to the lockdown) with no inherently positive or negative wording. The phrase "बंद झाल्यामुळे" (due to being closed) simply explains the state and doesn't carry any strong emotional weight.

Text: अहंकार तर प्रकांड पंडित रावणाचा ही नव्हता राहिला……………
translated_text: The arrogance of the great Pandit Ravana was gone……………
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a historical fact about Ravana's arrogance being gone ("अहंकार तर प्रकांड पंडित रावणाचा ही नव्हता राहिला"). This phrasing presents the information objectively without any indication of positive or negative sentiment.

Text: | महाराष्ट्रातील सत्तासंघर्ष! आज घटनापिठापुढे होणार ‘सुप्रिम’ सुनावणी
translated_text: | Power struggle in Maharashtra! 'Supreme' hearing to be held before the Constitution Bench today
Justification: The word "सत्तासंघर्ष" (sattasangharsh), meaning "power struggle," suggests conflict and instability, contributing to the negative sentiment and the emotion of anger.

Text: परतीचा पाऊस असतोय हा या पावसावर शेतकरी दुसर्या पिकाची पेरणी करतो
translated_text: The farmers sow another crop during the rainy season.
Justification: The sentence describes a common agricultural practice ("शेतकरी दुसर्या पिकाची पेरणी करतो" - farmers sow another crop) and simply states a fact without expressing any positive or negative emotion, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: देशमुख तुम्ही पण का जोशी सोबत
translated_text: Deshmukh, why are you also with Joshi?
Justification: The word "पण" (pan, meaning "also") indicates surprise that Deshmukh is associated with Joshi.

Text: तीर्थयात्रेला गेले का हो !
translated_text: Have you gone on a pilgrimage?
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple inquiry about a pilgrimage, lacking any inherent positive or negative connotations. The phrase "तीर्थयात्रेला गेले का हो !" is a neutral question and doesn't express any specific emotion.

Text: शिवसेना राष्ट्रवादीत केव्हाच विलिन झाली आहे.हे पचवायला आवघड वाटत आसले तरी खरे आहे.
translated_text: Shiv Sena has long since merged with the Nationalist Congress Party. This may seem hard to digest, but it is true.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it states a supposed fact ("शिवसेना राष्ट्रवादीत केव्हाच विलिन झाली आहे" - Shiv Sena has long since merged with NCP). While the phrase "पचवायला आवघड वाटत आसले तरी" (even though it seems hard to digest) acknowledges potential disbelief, it doesn't explicitly express positive or negative sentiment towards the event itself, focusing on the acceptance of the statement as "खरे आहे" (true).

Text: संस्थापकांचे आजोबा यां देशाचे निर्माते आहेत हे लक्षात ठेवा
translated_text: Remember that the founding fathers are the builders of this country.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a statement of fact and a reminder; there isn't any positive or negative sentiment expressed. The phrase "लक्षात ठेवा" (lakshat theva - remember) contributes to a neutral tone of emphasizing importance rather than expressing emotion.

Text: हे राजकीय अथवा सामाजिक नाही . हा विषय आर्थिक आहे.
translated_text: This is not political or social. This issue is economic.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence primarily states facts without expressing any positive or negative opinions. The Marathi words "नाही" (nahi - not) and "आहे" (aahe - is) are used to objectively describe the nature of the subject, indicating a neutral stance.

Text: मागील काही काळापुरवी शिवसेनेचे होते. ते जाणून बुजून मिळते गटाला दिले.आयोगाचा निषेध करतो.
translated_text: Some time ago, it belonged to Shiv Sena. It was knowingly given to the group. I condemn the commission.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust are driven by the phrase "जाणून बुजून मिळते गटाला दिले" (jaanun bujun milte gatala dile), meaning "knowingly given to the group," indicating a deliberate and unfair action which evokes strong disapproval. Also "आयोगाचा निषेध करतो" (Aayogacha nishedh karto) meaning "I condemn the commission" indicates negative sentiment.

Text: आज रविवार आहे आणि उद्या सोमवार ..
translated_text: Today is Sunday and tomorrow is Monday..
Justification: The sentence is factually stating the days of the week ("आज रविवार आहे आणि उद्या सोमवार"). There's no emotional coloring or opinion expressed. Therefore, the absence of any sentiment-bearing words or phrases like adjectives, adverbs, or exclamations contributes to the neutral sentiment (0).

Text: शिवरायांचा आणि शंभूराजांचा इतिहास वाचा आधी...
translated_text: Read the history of Shivaji and Shambhuraj first...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a straightforward request to read history ("इतिहास वाचा"). There is no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed.

Text: का साजरा केला जातो बैलपोळा...वाचा सविस्तर
translated_text: Why is Bailpola celebrated...read in detail
Justification: The word "का" (ka) which translates to "why" in English, indicates a question and therefore expresses surprise or curiosity, hence the surprise emotion and neutral sentiment.

Text: संघ कार्यालयात कधीही वापरण्यायोग्य शास्त्रांस्त्रे हा काय प्रकार भाऊ ?
translated_text: What kind of scriptures can be used at any time in the Sangh office, brother?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the interrogative and inquisitive tone expressed by "हा काय प्रकार भाऊ ?" (ha kay prakar bhau?), which translates to "What kind of thing is this, brother?". It is a question seeking information without expressing a strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: डब्या मध्ये काय आहे, तुम्ही काही दिले का रोहित ला?
translated_text: What's in the box, did you give anything to Rohit?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it consists of simple questioning ("काय आहे", "दिले का") without any emotionally charged words or phrases.

Text: पालघर साधू हत्याकांड तपास सीबीआयकडे जाणार; नारायण राणेंनी दिली प्रतिक्रिया, म्हणाले…
translated_text: Palghar sadhu murder case investigation will go to CBI; Narayan Rane reacted, said…
Justification: The sentence reports a factual update about a case being transferred and a politician's reaction. There's no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed; it's a neutral news statement. The Marathi phrase "पालघर साधू हत्याकांड तपास सीबीआयकडे जाणार" (Palghar sadhu murder case investigation will go to CBI) simply states a fact.

Text: अजून मारामारी करताना बघितलं नाही का कोणत्या कपल ला?
translated_text: Have you ever seen a couple fighting?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral question about observing couples fighting. The word "मारामारी" (maramari - fighting) itself doesn't inherently carry strong positive or negative sentiment in this context; it simply describes an action and the interrogative tone keeps it neutral.

Text: कमी असेल पण असणार हे नक्की , शेवटी गरज दोघांची उभ यंत ची आहे
translated_text: It may be less, but it will definitely be there. In the end, the need is mutual.
Justification: The sentence expresses a balanced perspective and mutual need, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "गरज दोघांची उभ यंत ची आहे" (the need is mutual) contributes to the neutral sentiment by highlighting a shared requirement rather than a positive or negative feeling.

Text: तुझ्या आडनावातच तुझ्या कमेंटचं उत्तर आहे...
translated_text: The answer to your comment is in your last name...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's an indirect response relying on the listener's last name to understand the intended meaning. The phrase "तुझ्या आडनावातच" (in your last name itself) simply directs attention to the surname without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: एक जळजळीत कटाक्ष पुरे आहे
translated_text: One burning glance is enough.
Justification: The phrase "एक जळजळीत कटाक्ष" (ek jaljalit kataksh) meaning "one burning glance" doesn't inherently convey positive or negative sentiment in isolation. The context is missing to determine the exact sentiment.

Text: पंतप्रधानांनी लोकार्पण केलेले डिजिटल बँकिंग आहे तरी काय? तुम्हाला त्याचा काय फायदा होणार?
translated_text: What is the digital banking that the Prime Minister has launched? What will be the benefit for you?
Justification: The sentence exhibits a neutral sentiment due to its informational and inquisitive nature. The phrase "काय फायदा होणार?" (kay fayda honar? - what benefit will there be?) simply inquires about the potential advantages, without expressing any positive or negative emotion or opinion.

Text: सर्व मंत्रिमंडळ मॅनेज करून ठेवणार का? तिथे सामान्यांना न्याय मिळेल का?
translated_text: Will all the ministries be managed? Will the common people get justice there?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the questioning tone regarding whether common people will receive justice ("सामान्यांना न्याय मिळेल का?") under the given circumstances. The uncertainty implied by the question prevents it from being positive or negative.

Text: कंब्बूज्या का तंबूज्या
translated_text: Kambujya why Tambujya
Justification: The sentence "कंब्बूज्या का तंबूज्या" is neutral due to the use of interrogative words "का" (why) implying a question without expressing any sentiment or emotion. The question seems rhetorical and lacks any inherent emotional tone.

Text: परवा अडाणी ठाकरेंच्या भेटीला गेले होते.. ते चालत असेल 'मटा'ला..
translated_text: The day before yesterday, Adani had gone to meet Thackeray.. He must have been walking to 'Mata'..
Justification: The sentence describes a meeting and a possible location with neutral language; there's no sentiment-bearing Marathi word or phrase.

Text: म्हणजे मनसे भूमिका बदलते हे मान्य आहे का
translated_text: So is it acceptable that MNS is changing its position?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral inquiry about whether a political party's change in stance is acknowledged. The Marathi phrase "म्हणजे मान्य आहे का" (mhanje maanya aahe ka) simply questions the acceptance of a fact without expressing any positive or negative emotion.

Text: पंतप्रधानांच्या हस्ते गुजरातमध्ये प्रधानमंत्री जन आरोग्य योजनेच्या आयुष्मान कार्डांच्या वितरणाला होणार प्रारंभ
translated_text: Distribution of Ayushman Cards under Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana will be launched in Gujarat by the Prime Minister
Justification: The sentence describes a routine event; the launch of a distribution program. No specific Marathi word indicates a positive or negative sentiment. The sentence is purely informative.

Text: निदान तुम्हीं महाराष्ट्रातील, एखाद्या गावाचे तरी करा काम.
translated_text: At least you should work for a village in Maharashtra.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it expresses a suggestion or expectation ("निदान तुम्हीं...करा काम" - at least you...do the work) without strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: मला उभ राहायचं म्हणून अटच शिथिल करा हा राजीनामा होता?
translated_text: Was this resignation just to relax the conditions so I could stay?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question about the motive behind a resignation. The questioning tone, particularly conveyed by "म्हणून अटच शिथिल करा हा राजीनामा होता?" (was this resignation just to relax the conditions?), does not express any strong positive or negative sentiment, making it neutral.

Text: आता हा स्वत:ला श्रीकृष्ण समजायला लागलाय.
translated_text: Now he has started considering himself as Lord Krishna.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "आता हा स्वत:ला श्रीकृष्ण समजायला लागलाय" (Now he has started considering himself as Lord Krishna) expresses an observation or a statement of fact, without inherently conveying positive or negative sentiment. There is no specific word within this phrase that indicates a strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: हा फसवणूकचा मॅसेज आला आहे. सर्वांनी सावध असावे.
translated_text: This is a fraudulent message. Everyone should be careful.
Justification: The sentence expresses a warning about a fraudulent message. While caution is advised, the statement is primarily informational and objective. The phrase "फसवणूकचा मॅसेज" (fraudulent message) indicates a negative element, but the overall tone remains neutral as it's simply a statement of fact and a call for awareness.

Text: या बाईंची पावडरची फॅक्टरी आहे का?
translated_text: Does this woman have a powder factory?
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the phrase "या बाईंची पावडरची फॅक्टरी आहे का?", which implies disbelief or astonishment regarding the woman's potential involvement in a powder factory, thus indicating surprise.

Text: किलोमीटर चा ढग होता काय .
translated_text: Was it a kilometer-long cloud?
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple question without any emotionally charged words or phrases. The Marathi phrase "किलोमीटर चा ढग होता काय" is a factual inquiry about the size of a cloud, indicating a neutral sentiment.

Text: शेवटी निर्णय हा - सुप्रीम कोर्टाचे अस्तिव आणी भारतातील लोकशाहीचे भविष्य ठरवणारा आहे....
translated_text: Ultimately, this decision will determine the existence of the Supreme Court and the future of democracy in India.
Justification: The sentence is largely descriptive and factual. While important, phrases like "सुप्रीम कोर्टाचे अस्तिव" (existence of the Supreme Court) and "भारतातील लोकशाहीचे भविष्य" (future of democracy in India) lack explicit emotional or opinionated language, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: लग्न झालेल्या साठी नाहीय स्कीम ही
translated_text: This scheme is not for married people.
Justification: The phrase "नाहीय" (nahiy) indicating negation and the factual statement about the scheme not being for married people results in a neutral sentiment.

Text: तिचा आत्तापर्यंतचा हिशेब आहे का दादा
translated_text: Do you have her account till now, Grandpa?
Justification: The sentence uses the phrase "तिचा आत्तापर्यंतचा हिशेब आहे का दादा" which is a straightforward question about an account. There's no inherently positive or negative language, and "दादा" (Grandpa) is a respectful term, not indicative of strong emotion. Thus, the sentence maintains a neutral sentiment.

Text: कधी पण ड्रील्लर नेच कानाला भोक पाडायचे असतात.।।।
translated_text: Sometimes you have to pierce your ears with a drill.
Justification: The phrase "ड्रील्लर नेच कानाला भोक पाडायचे" (pierce your ears with a drill) evokes disgust because drilling is associated with pain and unpleasant sensations, making the imagery highly repulsive.

Text: ही पण आहे का
translated_text: Is this also true?
Justification: The word "पण" (pan), meaning "also" or "even," indicates a sense of surprise or questioning if something unexpected is true, leading to a neutral sentiment but heightened emotion of surprise.

Text: चा अर्थ हे घ्या , ये लीजिये असा आहे
translated_text: The meaning of this is "Take this, come and take it."
Justification: The sentence uses the phrase "चा अर्थ हे घ्या , ये लीजिये असा आहे" which simply explains the meaning of something. There's no emotional coloring or opinion expressed, therefore it's neutral.

Text: गौरी भिडे  मातोश्रीवर इतके पैसे येतात कुठून हे जनतेला समजलेच पाहिजे.
translated_text: The public must understand where Gauri Bhide Matoshree gets so much money from.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a demand for information. There's no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed. It's a factual statement.

Text: गद्दारांना ही थाळी गुजरातला घेउन जायची आहे बहुतेक.
translated_text: The traitors probably want to take this plate to Gujarat.
Justification: The word "गद्दारांना" (gaddaranna), meaning "traitors," strongly contributes to the disgust emotion and negative sentiment.

Text: ते राणे आणि प्रताप सरनाईक निर्दोष आहेत काय सोमयजी अस समजावं काय
translated_text: Are Rane and Pratap Sarnaik innocent? Somayji, should we assume that?
Justification: The sentence presents a question about the innocence of two individuals, using phrases like "निर्दोष आहेत काय" (are they innocent?) and "अस समजावं काय" (should we assume that?), lacking strong positive or negative indicators, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: तुझ्या हाताच्या रेषा पुसल्या गेल्या का??
translated_text: Have the lines on your hand been erased??
Justification: The sentence expresses a question about the erasure of hand lines ("रेषा पुसल्या गेल्या का?"), which is inherently neutral and doesn't express any positive or negative sentiment. The question is about a factual state, thus evoking a neutral sentiment.

Text: घरटं नावाची एक कविता होती शाळेत.. कोणाला आठवते का?
translated_text: There was a poem called "Ghartan" in school.. Does anyone remember it?
Justification: The sentence expresses a nostalgic inquiry. The Marathi phrase "आठवते का?" (Aathavate ka?) which translates to "Does anyone remember it?" indicates a neutral sentiment as it is simply a question seeking information, not expressing a positive or negative feeling.

Text: ते निवडणूकी आधी क्लीन चिट घेणार त्यांचाच तो प्लॅन आहे
translated_text: That is their plan to get a clean chit before the elections.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a plan ("प्लॅन आहे") without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "क्लीन चिट घेणार" (getting a clean chit) is a factual statement in this context, devoid of emotional charge.

Text: माघार घेण्याआधी किती कट कारस्थान केले ते ही तितकेच महत्त्वाचे.
translated_text: How many conspiracies were made before retreating is equally important.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes actions ("कट कारस्थान केले") without expressing positive or negative sentiment. The phrase focuses on the factual aspect of conspiracies being made.

Text: आता ह्यांच काय करायचं
translated_text: What to do with this now?
Justification: The phrase "आता ह्यांच काय करायचं" (ata hyanch kay karaych) expresses surprise as it questions what to do with something, indicating unexpectedness and a need for a plan or solution.

Text: उपराष्ट्रपती धनखडांचा दिनक्रम तुमच्या-आमच्या सारखाच, ब्रेकफास्टला घेतात शिळी चपाती आणि दही
translated_text: Vice President Dhankhar's daily routine is similar to yours and ours, he has stale chapati and curd for breakfast
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it factually describes the Vice President's simple breakfast routine, focusing on "शिळी चपाती आणि दही" (stale chapati and curd), which implies simplicity rather than expressing any particular emotion.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या शुभेच्छा किती दिवस नंतरपर्यंत दिलेल्या चालतात, याचा जाणकारांनी खुलासा करावा.
translated_text: Experts should clarify how long after birthday wishes are sent, they should be sent.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a factual inquiry. The phrase "खुलासा करावा" (khulasa karava) - "should clarify" indicates a request for information, not expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: करदोडा म्हणुन तु वापरु शकते...
translated_text: You can use it as a tax...
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence "करदोडा म्हणुन तु वापरु शकते..." (You can use it as a tax...) simply states a possibility without expressing any positive or negative emotion. The phrase "वापरु शकते" (can use) is purely factual and lacks any inherent emotional valence.

Text: आज पासून उद्धव ठाकरे लोकांना सांगणार:- "सर्वांनी लक्षात ठेवा आपल्याला बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवायचे आहे.."
translated_text: From today, Uddhav Thackeray will tell the people: "Everyone, remember that we have to defeat Balasaheb's Shiv Sena."
Justification: The sentence expresses a political statement about defeating a rival faction. While containing the word "हरवायचे" (haravayache - to defeat), it functions neutrally as a declaration of intent within a political context, lacking inherent positive or negative emotional charge.

Text: हा पण काही धुतल्या तांदळाचा नाही....
translated_text: This is not washed rice...
Justification: The phrase "धुतल्या तांदळाचा नाही" (dhutlya tandlacha nahi - not of washed rice) is used idiomatically to imply someone is not innocent or virtuous. However, without further context, the sentence simply states this fact without expressing strong positive or negative feelings, making it neutral.

Text: महापालिकेत आहेत बहुतेक
translated_text: Most are in the municipality.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence "महापालिकेत आहेत बहुतेक" (mahapaliket aahet bahutek) simply states a fact about the location of people; the phrase "महापालिकेत आहेत बहुतेक" (mahapaliket aahet bahutek) does not express any positive or negative opinion or feeling.

Text: बायकोचं नाही..त्यामुळे ह्यापैकी एकही नाही
translated_text: Not the wife's..so none of these.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the statement "ह्यापैकी एकही नाही" (hyapaki ekahi nahi), which translates to "none of these," indicating a lack of preference or strong feeling.

Text: रक्तातील साखर नियंत्रित ठेवण्यासाठी या   पिठाच्या चपात्यांचे सेवन करा, जाणून घ्या
translated_text: Eat these flour chapatis to control blood sugar, know this
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it provides information about controlling blood sugar and suggests eating a specific type of chapati. There is no explicit sentiment or emotional tone. The phrase "रक्तातील साखर नियंत्रित ठेवण्यासाठी" (raktaatil sakhar niyantrit thevnyasathi - to control blood sugar) is informational and objective.

Text: सरकारचे दिवाळे नाही दिवाळी होणार
translated_text: There will be no government bankruptcy, Diwali will be celebrated.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy due to the phrase "दिवाळी होणार" (Diwali honar) meaning "Diwali will be celebrated," which suggests a festive and prosperous outcome, contrasting with the negative idea of "दिवाळे" (Diwale) or bankruptcy.

Text: राज्यघटनेच    व परिशिष्ट एकदम स्पष्ट आहे, "विलीनीकरण" हा एकमेव डिफेन्स. - मा. न्यायमूर्ती चंद्रचूड.
translated_text: The Constitution itself and the Schedule are very clear, "merger" is the only defense. - Hon. Justice Chandrachud.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a factual statement about the clarity of the constitution and schedule, stating "स्पष्ट आहे" (spasht aahe - is clear) and presenting "विलीनीकरण" (vilinikaran - merger) as a potential defense, without expressing positive or negative sentiment.

Text: नक्की कुठे आहे ते बघावे लागेल, हा फोटो वरील एका पोस्ट मधून घेतलाय
translated_text: You have to see exactly where it is, this photo was taken from a post above.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it describes a need to verify information without conveying any positive or negative feeling. The phrase "बघावे लागेल" (baghave lagel - have to see) simply indicates a necessary action and doesn't express any particular emotion or sentiment.

Text: अर्थात.. हे त्यांना कळलं असतं तर काय पाहिजे होतं..
translated_text: Of course.. if they had known this, what would they have wanted..
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the rhetorical question "काय पाहिजे होतं" (kay pahije hot), which implies a sense of inevitability or obviousness, negating any strong positive or negative emotion. The "अर्थात" (arthat - of course) further reinforces this neutral stance.

Text: उषःकाल म्हणजे पहाट.. मग पहाट झाल्यावर मशाल का पेटवायची.
translated_text: Ushakal means dawn.. so why light a torch after dawn.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a rhetorical question using the phrase "मशाल का पेटवायची" (mashal ka petvaychi), expressing a questioning rather than emotional stance.

Text: हा प्रश्न मला आहे कि प्रवीण दादा ला?
translated_text: Is this a question for me or Praveen Dada?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question ("प्रश्न मला आहे कि प्रवीण दादा ला?") without any explicit positive or negative sentiment, indicating a neutral stance. It is simply asking for clarification.

Text: हे कशाचे तारे तोडतात ?
translated_text: What are these stars breaking?
Justification: The surprise emotion is driven by the phrase "तारे तोडतात (tare todtat)," which literally translates to "breaking stars." This is an unusual and unexpected action, hence the surprise.

Text: मराठी मीडिया काय कमी नाहीये
translated_text: What is lacking in Marathi media?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a rhetorical question. The Marathi phrase "काय कमी नाहीये" (kay kami nahiye) literally means "what is lacking?" and implies that Marathi media is sufficient, but the tone is inquisitive and doesn't convey strong positive or negative sentiment. It's an observation posed as a question, hence neutral.

Text: मी आज घेतलेल्या मीटिंगमध्ये    महिला आणि    पुरुष होते.
translated_text: There were women and men in the meeting I held today.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply describes the composition of the meeting attendees using words like "महिला" (women) and "पुरुष" (men), which don't carry any inherent positive or negative connotations in this context.

Text: बाळासाहेब पण भरपूर आहे दांडा बाई पण ठाकरे एकच आहे
translated_text: There are many Balasahebs, but there is only one Thackeray.
Justification: The sentence presents a factual statement without expressing strong positive or negative connotations. The neutral sentiment is indicated by the lack of emotionally charged words or phrases. Specifically, phrases like "भरपूर आहे" (there are many) and "एकच आहे" (only one) present a comparative statement rather than an emotional expression.

Text: विजयाचा संकल्प अंधेरीकरांनीच केला आहे, ही भावना जन-जनात पाहताना मन भरून येतं.
translated_text: It is heartwarming to see the people of Andheri determined to win.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and reflects joy because the phrase "मन भरून येतं" (man bharun yetan) expresses a feeling of being touched and filled with emotion, indicating happiness and satisfaction.

Text: महाराष्ट्राच्या विकासाचे काम करत असल्यामुळे हा पाठिंबा मिळणं स्वाभाविक आहे....
translated_text: It is natural to receive this support as we are working for the development of Maharashtra....
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a factual observation ("महाराष्ट्राच्या विकासाचे काम करत असल्यामुळे हा पाठिंबा मिळणं स्वाभाविक आहे") about receiving support due to working for development. There is no explicit positive or negative language, and the word "स्वाभाविक" (swabhavik - natural/expected) further reinforces the neutrality.

Text: तीच सहनुभूती      पासून होती आम्हाला पण, जेव्हा सेना सोडली होती
translated_text: We had the same feeling from the time we left the army.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply describes a feeling ("सहनुभूती") experienced after leaving the army, without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment. "सहनुभूती" (feeling) itself doesn't convey a strong emotion in this context.

Text: हो का साहेब जनतेला कळत नाही
translated_text: Yes sir, why don't the people understand?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a question posed, seemingly rhetorically, without inherently positive or negative connotations. The phrase "कळत नाही" (kalat nahi - don't understand) expresses a lack of understanding, but within the context of a question directed at a superior ("साहेब" - saheb), it's presented as an observation rather than an expression of negativity.

Text: म्हणजे शेळ्यांची जबाबदारी लांडगा करतोय म्हणे.
translated_text: That means the wolf is taking care of the goats.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it presents a factual, albeit ironic, statement about a wolf taking care of goats. There isn't any sentiment expressed within the statement itself; it's simply relaying information. The Marathi words "म्हणजे" (means), "शेळ्यांची जबाबदारी लांडगा करतोय म्हणे" (the wolf is taking care of the goats) are neutral in themselves. The irony is implied, but not explicitly expressed sentimentally in the sentence.

Text: तुझा मालक भेटायला गेला होता एकदा...
translated_text: Your boss went to visit you once...
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual and non-emotive nature of the statement. The phrase "भेटायला गेला होता एकदा" (bhetayla gela hota ekda - went to visit once) simply describes an event without any positive or negative connotation.

Text: तु तर  होता...आज गांधी कुटीत...आताही आहे का सेवाग्रामात..
translated_text: You were...in Gandhi Kuti today...are you still in Sevagram?
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple query about the person's location and does not contain any emotionally charged words or phrases. The absence of any positive or negative indicators, combined with the question "आताही आहे का" (aatahi aahe ka - are you still there?), contributes to the neutral sentiment.

Text: दांडे नाही दांडा
translated_text: No sticks, no sticks
Justification: The repetition of "दांडा" (danda/sticks) without any additional context or emotive language results in a neutral sentiment.

Text: खऱ्या प्रेमाची किंमत ही ज्याने केले त्यालाच कळते.
translated_text: The value of true love is known only to the one who has experienced it.
Justification: The sentence describes a universally relatable experience. "खऱ्या प्रेमाची किंमत" (kharya premachi kimmat), meaning "the value of true love," is presented as a factual statement rather than an expression of strong emotion, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: आजच्या कॅबिनेटमध्ये करून आमची दिवाळी गोड करणार का?
translated_text: Will today's cabinet make our Diwali sweeter?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it poses a question about a future action ("गोड करणार का?") without expressing explicit positive or negative sentiment.

Text: ही मोठी खेळी आहे कारण ठाकरे चा विजय कुठल्याही विरोधी पक्षाला परवडणार नाही.
translated_text: This is a big move because no opposition party will be able to afford Thackeray's victory.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a factual consequence ("परवडणार नाही" - will not be affordable) of Thackeray's victory without expressing positive or negative feelings.

Text: सरकार जनतेचे निर्णय लोकहिताचे
translated_text: The government and the people's decisions are in the public interest.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about government and public decisions being in the public interest without any strong positive or negative indicators. The Marathi phrase "लोकहिताचे" (lokahitache) meaning "in the public interest" indicates a general objective of governance rather than a sentiment.

Text: त्यातला एक खाली पडला।    पेकी    लिहायचे होते
translated_text: One of them fell down. I wanted to write Peki.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply describes an event ("खाली पडला" - fell down) and a desired action ("लिहायचे होते" - wanted to write) without expressing any positive or negative emotion.

Text: बरोबर आहे हे सगळे भाजप समर्थक आहेत.
translated_text: That's right, they are all BJP supporters.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about a group of people being BJP supporters. The phrase "बरोबर आहे" (barobar aahe - that's right/correct) adds a sense of affirmation but does not inherently carry any strong positive or negative sentiment or emotion. The rest of the sentence is simply stating a fact.

Text: मैत्री म्हणजे, माणसाने कुटुंबापलिकडं बनविलेलं पहिलं आणि एकमेव नातं ...
translated_text: Friendship is the first and only relationship a person has beyond family...
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to its descriptive and factual tone. The phrase "मैत्री म्हणजे, माणसाने कुटुंबापलिकडं बनविलेलं पहिलं आणि एकमेव नातं" (Friendship is the first and only relationship a person has beyond family) simply defines friendship without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: मग काय तुला विचारायचे का?
translated_text: So what do you want to ask?
Justification: The sentence "मग काय तुला विचारायचे का?" expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a simple question inquiring about something without expressing any strong positive or negative feelings. The phrase "विचारायचे का?" (vicharayche ka?) simply asks "do you want to ask?" and doesn't carry any inherent sentiment.

Text: मराठा आरक्षण मंत्रिमंडळ उपसमितीच्या दुसऱ्या बैठकीत झाले हे महत्त्वाचे निर्णय
translated_text: This important decision was taken in the second meeting of the Maratha Reservation Cabinet Sub-Committee.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the descriptive and factual tone; it simply states that an important decision was made. The Marathi phrase "महत्वाचे निर्णय" (mahatvache nirnay - important decision) doesn't express any particular sentiment or emotion.

Text: राहूल देशपांडे कमलीचे पैसे घेऊन गाणार होता ना?
translated_text: Was Rahul Deshpande going to sing with Kamali's money?
Justification: The sentence is a factual statement presented as a question. There are no explicit sentiment indicators. The Marathi phrase "राहूल देशपांडे कमलीचे पैसे घेऊन गाणार होता ना?" is a neutral question, lacking emotionally charged words.

Text: नाही...वादळ आपल्या पसंद ने सगळं घेत असत... आम्ही त्यात पडत नाही...
translated_text: No...the storms would take everything at their own will...we don't fall into that...
Justification: The word "वादळ" (vaadal - storm) implies a destructive force acting independently, and the phrase "आम्ही त्यात पडत नाही" (aamhi tyat padat nahi - we don't fall into that) suggests a sense of frustration and resistance, contributing to the anger emotion and the overall neutral sentiment with a negative undertone.

Text: कोरोना काळात सामना नफ्यात होता जेव्हा बाकीचे न्यूज पेपर ठप्प होते..ते कसं काय...
translated_text: During the Corona period, the match was profitable when other newspapers were at a standstill..how is that...
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the phrase "ते कसं काय...", which directly translates to "how is that..." and questions the unexpected profitability of the 'Saamana' newspaper during the pandemic when other newspapers were struggling.

Text: मला माहिती आहे
translated_text: I know.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple statement of knowledge. The phrase "मला माहिती आहे" (mala mahiti aahe) indicates a neutral acknowledgment of information, thus aligning with a neutral sentiment.

Text: त्याले थोडस घासून बघता का  सोन्याचा असन भौतेक  जून ते सोन
translated_text: Rub it a little and see if it is gold. Physically, it is gold.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's simply a suggestion to test the object ("त्याले थोडस घासून बघता का") and a statement of potential fact ("सोन्याचा असन भौतेक"). There's no explicitly positive or negative sentiment expressed.

Text: अश्या सर्व बातम्या त्वरित साहेब यांच्यापर्यंत पोहोचवत चला, लगेच निर्णय होत राहतील.
translated_text: Let's immediately convey all such news to the sir, so that decisions can be made immediately.
Justification: The sentence conveys information and instruction without expressing any clear positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "अश्या सर्व बातम्या त्वरित साहेब यांच्यापर्यंत पोहोचवत चला" (Let's immediately convey all such news to the sir) is a neutral statement of action.

Text: सर्व भाविक भक्तांनी याचा लाभ घ्यावा ही नम्र विनंती !
translated_text: It is a humble request to all devotees to take advantage of this!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "नम्र विनंती" (namra vinanti), meaning "humble request," which expresses politeness and goodwill, contributing to a positive and joyful feeling. While technically sentiment 0 can be considered neutral, the context implies positivity due to the overall respectful and inviting tone towards devotees.

Text: तो आता असंच बोलणार... चुकीच्या ने घेतली की होत असं
translated_text: He'll say it like this now... it happens when you take it by mistake.
Justification: The sentence expresses a resigned acceptance of a situation caused by a mistake. The phrase "होत असं" (hot asa) indicates a common, almost philosophical acceptance of errors, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: कोल्हासुरी विचारांचा पराभव समजावा का..आई प्रत्येकाची...ना पैसेवाल्यांची...
translated_text: Should we understand the defeat of Kolhasuri's ideas...everyone's mother...not the rich ones...
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger are driven by the implicit frustration and disapproval conveyed in "कोल्हासुरी विचारांचा पराभव समजावा का," suggesting the speaker strongly opposes the ideas associated with "कोल्हासुरी" and questions whether their defeat is truly understood.

Text: तुम्ही आपल्या अर्थमंत्रांच्या मताशी सहमत आहेत का?
translated_text: Do you agree with the opinion of your Finance Minister?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it's a question asking for agreement or disagreement; the phrasing "तुम्ही आपल्या अर्थमंत्रांच्या मताशी सहमत आहेत का?" (Do you agree with the opinion of your Finance Minister?) is simply inquiring about someone's opinion and doesn't express any positive or negative sentiment itself.

Text: ह्याने तिकिटासाठी पैसे दिले होते वाटत पटेल ला की निवडून आलो की पैसा डबल
translated_text: He had paid for the ticket. Patel thought that if he got elected, his money would double.
Justification: The sentence presents a neutral sentiment as it primarily describes an action (paying for a ticket) and a thought process ("निवडून आलो की पैसा डबल" - if elected, money will double), without expressing any inherent positivity, negativity, or strong emotion.

Text: पोलीस भरती कधी घेणार पहिले ते सांगा आधी      ला घेणार आहे भरती
translated_text: When will the police recruitment be held? Please tell me first. I will be taking the recruitment first.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it primarily inquires about the timing of the police recruitment and states the speaker's intention to participate. There is no indication of positive or negative emotion in the Marathi words used.

Text: तुझी आई ट्विटरवर आहे का?
translated_text: Is your mother on Twitter?
Justification: The sentence "तुझी आई ट्विटरवर आहे का?" is neutral because it is a simple question about someone's mother's presence on Twitter. There is no inherently positive, negative, or emotional language present. The phrase "आहे का?" (ahe ka?) simply indicates a question.

Text: आपल्या कुटुंबप्रमुखा सोबत यांचे नॆत्रृत्वा खाली संपूर्ण मुंबईकर उभे राहणार मंजे राहणरच.
translated_text: The entire Mumbaikars will stand under the leadership of their head of the family, Manje Rahman.
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of fact and support, using the phrase "उभे राहणार" (ubhe rahanaar - will stand), which indicates a neutral stance rather than a positive or negative one.

Text: हा तुझ्या बापा च्या जागी माझ नाव नक्की लावल
translated_text: He definitely put my name in place of your father's.
Justification: The sentence is considered neutral as it describes an action ("नाव लावल" - name put) without expressing explicit positive or negative emotion or sentiment. The phrase indicates a substitution, which by itself doesn't convey any sentiment.

Text: भारत तोडो यात्रा महाराष्ट्रात   दिवस आहे
translated_text: Bharat Todo Yatra is a day in Maharashtra.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a factual statement about the Bharat Todo Yatra ("भारत तोडो यात्रा") being a day in Maharashtra without any expression of positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तुमका स्पेशल आसात, आमचा हा
translated_text: Yours is special, ours is
Justification: The sentence is incomplete and lacks strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "तुमका स्पेशल आसात, आमचा हा" (Yours is special, ours is) simply states a fact without conveying any particular sentiment. The words "स्पेशल" (special) and "आमचा" (ours) are neutral in this context.

Text: त्या जनतेत आम्ही नाही
translated_text: We are not among those people.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "त्या जनतेत आम्ही नाही" (tya janatet aamhi nahi) simply states a fact of not being part of a particular group, lacking any inherent positive or negative connotations.

Text: सत्य वचन, परखड आणि स्पष्ट
translated_text: True word, clear and precise
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the descriptive nature of "सत्य वचन, परखड आणि स्पष्ट" (satya vachan, parkhad aani spasht) which simply states the qualities of the word without expressing positive or negative feelings. These words are informative and objective rather than emotional.

Text: ज्या लोकांना घेतले जाईल त्यांची यादी पण प्रकाशीत व्हावी ही विनंती
translated_text: Request that the list of people who will be taken be published as well.
Justification: The sentence expresses a request ("विनंती") for information, lacking any strong positive or negative indicators, and therefore is neutral. The Marathi word "विनंती" directly signals a polite request, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: आणि बाकीच्या देशांनी सुद्धा इन्फलेशन महागाई कन्ट्रोल करण्यासाठी त्यांचा रेपो रेट वाढवलाय का
translated_text: And have other countries also increased their repo rates to control inflation?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it asks a factual question about other countries' actions regarding inflation. The Marathi phrase "इन्फलेशन महागाई कन्ट्रोल करण्यासाठी त्यांचा रेपो रेट वाढवलाय का" (have they increased their repo rate to control inflation?) simply inquires about a policy decision, devoid of any explicit positive or negative sentiment.

Text: माझी आयडी आहे
translated_text: I have an ID.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple statement of possession with the phrase "माझी आयडी आहे" (majhi ID ahe), indicating a neutral sentiment as there is no emotional charge or subjective opinion being expressed.

Text: वजन पाहुन पालकमंत्री पदाची वाटपाचा हा कुठला नवीन फाँर्मुला जनतेला कळावे..? ..
translated_text: What new formula for allocating the posts of Guardian Minister based on weight should the public know?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it poses a question ("कळावे..?") seeking information about a new formula. There is no explicit positive or negative wording or loaded language. The sentence is primarily inquisitive.

Text: - प्रेमाने आणि आपुलकीने स्नान करा. हे सर्व वाचतो आहे!
translated_text: - Bathe in love and affection. It's all worth it!
Justification: "प्रेमाने आणि आपुलकीने" (premane aani aapulkine - with love and affection) expresses positive feelings, contributing to the overall joy.

Text: पानिपतच्या राणांगणातून सदाशिवराव पेशवा पळून गेला होता हे खरं आहे का??
translated_text: Is it true that Sadashivrao Peshwa fled from the Ranangan of Panipat?
Justification: The phrase "पळून गेला होता हे खरं आहे का??" (palun gela hota he khara aahe ka?? - is it true that he fled?) suggests doubt and disbelief regarding a significant historical event, driving a surprise emotion.

Text: पाऊस छान पडतोय पण अवकाळी भासतोय...
translated_text: The rain is falling nicely but it seems untimely...
Justification: The phrase "अवकाळी भासतोय" (avkaali bhaastoay), meaning "it seems untimely", indicates a negative sentiment due to the unexpected and potentially disruptive nature of the rain, which contributes to sadness.

Text: | विक्रम साराभाई अंतराळ केंद्र यांच्यामार्फत नोकरीची संधी! जाणून घ्या सविस्तर
translated_text: | Job opportunity through Vikram Sarabhai Space Center! Learn in detail
Justification: The sentence primarily announces a job opportunity. The phrase "नोकरीची संधी" (nokarichi sandhi), meaning "job opportunity," is factual and doesn't express strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text:
बुधवार आणि चैत्र पौर्णिमा, जाणून घ्या आजचं पंचांग
 
..//…
translated_text:
Wednesday and Chaitra Purnima, know today's Panchang

..//…
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states facts and instructions without expressing any positive or negative emotion. The phrase "जाणून घ्या" (jaanun ghya - know/learn) is a neutral call to action.

Text: या महान आणि आश्चर्यकारक बातम्या जाणून घेण्यास चुकवू नका
translated_text: Don't miss out on this great and amazing news.
Justification: "महान आणि आश्चर्यकारक" (mahan aani aashcharyakarak) translates to "great and amazing," which expresses strong positive feelings and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: तात्काळ कारवाई करा लहान मुलांचे जीव धोक्यात घालू नका शाळेसमोर असा प्रकार आहे
translated_text: Take immediate action, don't put the lives of children at risk, there is something like this in front of the school
Justification: The phrase "लहान मुलांचे जीव धोक्यात घालू नका" (lahan mulanche jeev dhakyat ghalu naka) translates to "don't put the lives of children at risk," which expresses fear and concern for their safety.

Text: आता सर्वे गुन्हे बाहेर येणार देवेंद्रफडणवीस सरकारचा मोठा निर्णय!
translated_text: Now the survey crimes will come out, a big decision of the Devendra Fadnavis government!
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the descriptive and factual nature of the statement "आता सर्वे गुन्हे बाहेर येणार देवेंद्रफडणवीस सरकारचा मोठा निर्णय!" (Now the survey crimes will come out, a big decision of the Devendra Fadnavis government!), which lacks strong positive or negative connotations.

Text: असा ना तसा पटेल अर्ज बाद होणारच होता
translated_text: Patel's application was bound to be rejected one way or another.
Justification: The sentence expresses a matter-of-fact observation about the application's fate. The phrase "बाद होणारच होता" (baad honarach hota) indicating it was bound to be rejected, without any strong positive or negative feeling, is the primary reason for the neutral sentiment.

Text: तीन वन डे सामन्यांच्या मालिकेतील निर्णायक लढतीत हिंदुस्थाच्या यंग ब्रिगेडने आफ्रिकेची दाणादाण उडवली.
translated_text: India's young brigade crushed Africa in the deciding match of the three-match ODI series.
Justification: The sentence describes a sporting event where India defeated Africa. While "दाणादाण उडवली" (crushed) suggests a strong victory, the overall context is neutral reporting, lacking explicit positive or negative emotional expression from the author.

Text: आजची सुनावणी होण्याआधीच सुनावणीत काय होणार? याबाबत उज्ज्वल निकम यांनी केले वक्तव्य- -
translated_text: Ujjwal Nikam made a statement about what will happen in the hearing even before today's hearing- -
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply reports a statement made by Ujjwal Nikam. There is no sentiment or emotion expressed. The phrase "केले वक्तव्य" (kele vaktyavya - made a statement) is a factual reporting and doesn't carry any inherent sentiment.

Text: देशाच्या अर्थमंत्र्यांनी "वांग्याचं" ऑडिट केलं तर?....अशी शंका आली असावी.
translated_text: What if the country's Finance Minister audited "brinjal"?....that must have raised doubts.
Justification: The sentence expresses a hypothetical and somewhat absurd scenario about the Finance Minister auditing "वांग्याचं" (brinjal), presented as a "शंका" (doubt), suggesting a neutral sentiment without strong positive or negative connotations.

Text: सोलापूर महानगरपालिका मध्ये या रिक्त पदांसाठी होणार थेट मुलाखती  ===================
translated_text: Direct interviews will be held for these vacant posts in Solapur Municipal Corporation =====================
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact about interviews being conducted for vacant posts. No specific word or phrase expresses any positive or negative sentiment; it's a factual announcement. Thus, the entire sentence is neutral.

Text: आता तरी कुठ स्थिर आहेत हे इकडून तिकड लवंडतच आहेत.
translated_text: Even now, they are wandering from place to place, no matter where they are.
Justification: The phrase "इकडून तिकड लवंडतच आहेत" (ikdun tikad lavandatch aahat) suggests a state of constant movement and lack of stability, but without any explicit positive or negative connotations, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: फोटो एकत्र असेल तर जावई शोध लावन गरजेच आहे का..?
translated_text: If the photo is together, is it really necessary to search for the son-in-law?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment. The phrase "गरजेच आहे का..?" (garajecha aahe ka..?), meaning "is it necessary?", poses a question without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: त्याला नाही समजणार हे सर्व..
translated_text: He won't understand all this..
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment with a hint of surprise due to the phrase "नाही समजणार" (nahi samajnar), which implies a lack of understanding and a possible unexpected outcome.

Text: बाई तुमच्या काळात बघा काय चाललं आहे ते
translated_text: Woman, look at what's happening in your time.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it is simply an observation or statement of fact, directing the woman to observe the events happening during her time. There is no inherent positive or negative connotation in the phrase "तुमच्या काळात बघा काय चाललं आहे ते" (tumchya kalat bagha kay challe aahe te - look at what's happening in your time).

Text: कृपया यांच्या मानधनात वाढ करावी ही नम्र विनंती
translated_text: Please, this is a humble request to increase his salary.
Justification: The sentence expresses a polite request using "नम्र विनंती" (namra vinanti), meaning "humble request," indicating a neutral sentiment.

Text: दादांना टॅग का नाही केले आण्णा?
translated_text: Why didn't you tag Grandpa, Anna?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral and the emotion is surprise, indicated by the questioning tone conveyed through "का नाही केले" (ka nahi kele) - "Why not done?" suggesting an unexpected omission.

Text: निरज चोप्रा
translated_text: Neeraj Chopra
Justification: The sentiment is neutral as the sentence "निरज चोप्रा" simply names a person (Neeraj Chopra) and doesn't express any positive or negative feeling.

Text: घेतलं होतं....पण कार्ट लयच   चं निघालं साहेब
translated_text: I had taken it....but the cart was broken, sir.
Justification: The phrase "कार्ट लयच   चं निघालं" (cart was broken) indicates a neutral sentiment as it's a statement of fact about the cart's condition.

Text: अमेरिकाचे पंतप्रधान होणार आहे
translated_text: Who will become the Prime Minister of America?
Justification: The sentence is a neutral question asking "Who will become the Prime Minister of America?". The phrase "अमेरिकाचे पंतप्रधान होणार आहे" expresses a question, lacking any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: ही वेळ तशी नाही, एकत्र येणं जास्तीत जास्त आवश्यक आहे...
translated_text: This is not the time, coming together is more important than ever...
Justification: The sentence expresses the necessity of unity without overtly positive or negative connotations. The phrase "जास्तीत जास्त आवश्यक आहे" (jaastit jaast aavashyak aahe - more important than ever) indicates importance but lacks strong emotional coloring, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: हा काय प्रकार आहे.
translated_text: What kind of thing is this?
Justification: The sentence "हा काय प्रकार आहे" expresses surprise because of the use of "काय प्रकार", which translates to "what kind of thing" and indicates disbelief or astonishment at a situation.

Text: आम्हाला तर फक्त वसंत मोरे दिसलें. बाकीचे पदाधिकारी कुठे होते?
translated_text: We saw only Vasant More. Where were the other officials?
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation and a question, lacking any strong positive or negative indicators. There is no sentiment carrying word in the sentence like अती उत्तम (very good) or वाईट (bad).

Text: देवेन्द्रजींच्या शासनात देशविरोधी शक्तींना माफी नाही!
translated_text: There is no forgiveness for anti-national forces under Devendraji's rule!
Justification: "माफी नाही!" (maafi nahi! - no forgiveness!) expresses a strong rejection and intolerance, indicating anger towards anti-national forces, driving the negative sentiment.

Text: जेव्हा ते अंथरुणावर असतात संघटित, चला तिचे कपडे फोल्ड करूया, हा. ,
translated_text: When they're in bed, organized, let's fold her clothes, ha. ,
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the Marathi phrase "चला तिचे कपडे फोल्ड करूया, हा." (let's fold her clothes, ha) is presented without any explicitly positive or negative emotional cues. While unusual, the action itself isn't inherently positive or negative in this context.

Text: शिक्षण हेच विज्ञान, प्रगती अन परिवर्तनाचे एकमेव साधन आहे. - महाराजा सयाजीराव गायकवाड
translated_text: Education is the only means of science, progress and transformation. - Maharaja Sayajirao Gaekwad
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about the importance of education, using words like "शिक्षण" (education), "विज्ञान" (science), "प्रगती" (progress), and "परिवर्तनाचे साधन" (means of transformation) which are generally neutral in sentiment.

Text: ह्यांच्या दवाखान्याचा पत्ता मिळेल का दादा..एक मित्राला गरज आहे
translated_text: Can I get the address of this hospital, Dada.. I need a friend.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the polite and informational nature of the request. The phrase "मिळेल का दादा" (milEl kA dAdA - can I get it, Dada) indicates a simple request for information without expressing any strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: काही वेळेस आपल्या स्वतःचा अहंकारही आपल्या सर्वनाशाला कारणीभूत असतो असे थोरामोठ्यांनी सांगितलेले आहे.
translated_text: Great people have said that sometimes our own ego is the cause of our own destruction.
Justification: The sentence conveys a general truth about ego leading to destruction, stated as a common saying, and lacks strong positive or negative cues. The phrase "अहंकारही आपल्या सर्वनाशाला कारणीभूत असतो" (ego is the cause of destruction) is a statement of fact rather than an expression of strong sentiment in this context, hence neutral.

Text: महात्मा गांधी यांनी असेच नेहरुला पंत प्रधान केले होते
translated_text: Mahatma Gandhi had made Nehru the Pant Pradhan in this way.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a historical fact without any emotional coloring. The Marathi phrase "असेच नेहरुला पंत प्रधान केले होते" (asech Nehrula Pant Pradhan kele hote) which translates to "had made Nehru the Pant Pradhan in this way" is a factual statement.

Text: कंगना रनावत आणि विक्रम गोखले च चांगले सांगू शकतील.
translated_text: Kangana Ranaut and Vikram Gokhale can tell you better.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states that Kangana Ranaut and Vikram Gokhale could provide better information. The Marathi phrase "चांगले सांगू शकतील" (changle sangu shaktil) meaning "can tell you better" is a statement of capability, lacking any overt positive or negative connotation.

Text: बाळासाहेब ठाकरे यांचा फोटो वापरून भाजप महाराष्ट्र मध्ये मोठी झाली हे सर्व जनतेला माहिती
translated_text: All the people know that BJP grew in Maharashtra by using Balasaheb Thackeray's photo.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a known fact ("हे सर्व जनतेला माहिती") about BJP's growth strategy in Maharashtra, focusing on the use of Balasaheb Thackeray's photo, without expressing any positive or negative opinion.

Text: हे    % बोलणार तो.
translated_text: He will speak this %.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because "हे % बोलणार तो" lacks any sentiment-bearing words. It's a statement of future action with an unclear reference ("he % will speak").

Text: मला शाळेत जायच्या अगोदरच येत होती
translated_text: I was coming before going to school.
Justification: The sentence "मला शाळेत जायच्या अगोदरच येत होती" is neutral because it describes a simple action ("येत होती" - was coming) without any explicit positive or negative connotations. The statement "अगोदरच" (before) simply indicates timing and does not influence sentiment.

Text: आता तीच मशाल घेऊन बाहेर पडा लवकर नाहीतर सगळच जायचं??
translated_text: Now take that torch and get out quickly, or everything will be lost??
Justification: The phrase "सगळच जायचं??" (saglach jaycha?? - everything will be lost??) indicates anger due to the implied threat and potential for significant negative consequences.

Text: चिवा काकूंसाठी पेडणेकर काकूनी काहितरी वेगळे नियोजन केले होते ना?
translated_text: Did Pednekar Aunt make some special plans for Chiva Aunt?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it is a simple question inquiring about plans. The phrase "काहितरी वेगळे नियोजन केले होते ना?" (kahitari vegale niyojan kele hote na?) - "made some special plans, right?" - is a neutral inquiry, lacking any positive or negative connotations.

Text: दाभोळकर सरांची आठवण येतच असेल....????
translated_text: You must be remembering Dabholkar sir....????
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the trailing question marks ("????") in Marathi, which suggest the speaker is questioning whether the listener remembers Dabholkar Sir rather than simply stating a fact or expressing a feeling of missing him.

Text: कधी कधी तुम्हाला झोपेतून उठल्यावर झोम्बीसारखे वाटते. वीकेंडला माझ्यासोबत दोनदा घडले.
translated_text: Sometimes you wake up feeling like a zombie. It happened to me twice over the weekend.
Justification: The sentence describes a common experience ("झोम्बीसारखे वाटते" - feels like a zombie) without expressing strong positive or negative sentiment, thus resulting in neutral sentiment. The phrase "झोम्बीसारखे वाटते" contributes to the neutral sentiment as it's a descriptive comparison rather than an expression of strong emotion.

Text: नवीन फोन घ्यायचा होता,       लोकांना वर ₹  ची पाठवली
translated_text: Wanted to buy a new phone, sent people Rs.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a desire and an action, without any explicit positive or negative words. There are no words suggesting an emotion being expressed. The Marathi phrases "नवीन फोन घ्यायचा होता" (wanted to buy a new phone) and "लोकांना वर ₹ ची पाठवली" (sent people Rs.) are factual statements devoid of sentiment.

Text: उगाची भितोसी भय हे पळु दे. जवळी उभी स्वामी शक्ती कळु दे
translated_text: Let this fear of the ghosts of Uga flee. Let the power of the Lord who stands near be known.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it expresses a general sentiment of dispelling fear and invoking strength. There is no explicit positive or negative connotation associated with the words used. The phrase "उगाची भितोसी" (ugachi bhitosi), meaning "fear of ghosts," while referencing a negative emotion, is presented in a context of overcoming it.

Text: मागच्या अडीच वर्षांत 'चूक'ची व्याख्या वेगळी होती का?
translated_text: Has the definition of 'mistake' been different in the past two and a half years?
Justification: The sentence questions a past definition, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The neutral sentiment stems from the interrogative nature and use of the word "चूक" (mistake) in a questioning context, without expressing explicit opinion.

Text: आणि घरातली साफ सफाई हे पुरुषच करत आहेत तुम्ही पण केलं असाल ?
translated_text: And men are the ones who clean the house. Have you done it too?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it is a question about cleaning responsibilities, lacking overtly positive or negative connotations. The phrase "आणि घरातली साफ सफाई हे पुरुषच करत आहेत तुम्ही पण केलं असाल ?" (And men are the ones who clean the house. Have you done it too?) simply inquires about a domestic chore and doesn't inherently convey any specific emotional charge.

Text: तुझ्यासारख्या लोकांनी फॉलो बॅक द्यावा म्हणून मुलीचा फोटो ठेवला,
translated_text: I put up a girl's photo so that people like you can follow me back.
Justification: The sentence expresses a matter-of-fact observation about the motivations behind using a girl's photo on social media. The phrase "follow बॅक द्यावा म्हणून मुलीचा फोटो ठेवला" simply describes the action of using the photo to get follow backs, without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment.

Text: प्रश्न हा आहे की त्यांना इज्जत आहे का???
translated_text: The question is, do they have respect???
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question ("प्रश्न हा आहे की त्यांना इज्जत आहे का???") regarding respect ("इज्जत"). There is no inherent positive or negative sentiment expressed in the question itself.

Text: आता तुझी उदबत्ती कुठ लावतोय !!?
translated_text: Where are you lighting your incense now?!
Justification: The surprise emotion is driven by the phrase "आता तुझी उदबत्ती कुठ लावतोय !!?", specifically the word "कुठ" (kuth) which translates to "where." The abrupt and unexpected question about the location of lighting incense implies surprise.

Text: तुमच्या राशीची व्यक्ती कसे फ्लर्ट करतात माहिती आहे का?
translated_text: Do you know how people of your zodiac sign flirt?
Justification: The sentence is a neutral question asking about flirting styles based on zodiac signs. There is no indication of positive or negative sentiment. The core phrase "माहिती आहे का?" (mahiti aahe kaa?) - "Do you know?" - is purely informational and doesn't convey any inherent emotion.

Text: आता पालकांना वाटु लागले ते... त्यांनी राज्यकर्ते पर्यंत पोहचवली आहे... संघर्ष पेटु शकतो..
translated_text: Now the parents are starting to feel... they have conveyed it to the rulers... a conflict may break out..
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it describes a situation escalating towards a potential conflict, without expressing positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "संघर्ष पेटु शकतो" (sangharsh petu shakto - a conflict may break out) indicates a possibility of conflict, but doesn't express any inherent positive or negative feeling towards it, maintaining a neutral tone.

Text: लोक काय म्हणतील ह्या गोष्टीत अडकू नका, आपले घर आपल्याला चालवायचे आहे.
translated_text: Don't get caught up in what people say, you have to run your own house.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it offers practical advice ("आपले घर आपल्याला चालवायचे आहे") and a cautionary statement ("लोक काय म्हणतील ह्या गोष्टीत अडकू नका"). Neither phrase carries inherently positive or negative sentiment.

Text: माझं पण होईना.. बहुतेक दिवसातून   चान्स असतील
translated_text: Not mine either.. Most days there will be chances.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "माझं पण होईना.. बहुतेक दिवसातून चान्स असतील" which expresses a lack of definitive positive or negative outcome, conveying a sense of uncertainty and potential opportunity rather than a strong emotional leaning. The phrase doesn't express any strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: हे जे आज भाजपने माघार घेऊन केलंय ते पटलं का तुम्हाला.
translated_text: Do you understand what BJP has done today by withdrawing?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question about understanding BJP's actions, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "पटलं का तुम्हाला" (patla ka tumhala - Do you understand?) indicates a neutral inquiry rather than expressing a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तू आईलाच नाही तर बहिणीला ही विचार
translated_text: You don't think of your mother, but of your sister.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement without strong positive or negative connotations, thus resulting in a neutral sentiment. The absence of emotionally charged words and the direct comparison between considering the mother versus the sister leads to neutrality. No specific word dictates the sentiment, rather the overall lack of emotional expression results in neutrality.

Text: संकटकाळात पाठीवर ठेवलेला हात आनंदाच्या क्षणी वाजवल्या गेलेल्या टाळ्यांपेक्षा अधिक मौल्यवान असतो.
translated_text: A hand on the back in times of trouble is more valuable than applause in moments of joy.
Justification: The sentence expresses a balanced perspective on support during difficult times versus recognition during joyful moments, without leaning towards positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "अधिक मौल्यवान असतो" (adhik maulyawan asto - more valuable is) indicates a comparison of value, not an inherently positive or negative feeling, therefore justifying a neutral sentiment.

Text: हा महाराष्ट्र प्रेमी पत्रकार आहे.महाराष्ट्र द्रोही आरदबाटगा नाही.
translated_text: This is a journalist who loves Maharashtra. He is not a Maharashtra traitor.
Justification: The sentence expresses both love for Maharashtra ("महाराष्ट्र प्रेमी") and denial of being a traitor ("महाराष्ट्र द्रोही नाही"). These opposing sentiments balance each other, resulting in a neutral overall sentiment.

Text: हनुमान पौर्णिमा
translated_text: Hanuman Purnima
Justification: "हनुमान पौर्णिमा" (Hanuman Purnima) is a religious festival name; festival names themselves are neutral.

Text: ठाणे जिल्हा आक्रोश मेळाव्यासाठी सज्ज आरक्षणासाठी रस्त्यावर उतरावे डॉ.विकास महात्मे
translated_text: Thane district ready for Akrosh Mela, Dr. Vikas Mahatme should take to the streets for reservation
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily reports factual information about a gathering ("आक्रोश मेळाव्यासाठी सज्ज") and a call to action, without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. "आक्रोश मेळाव्यासाठी सज्ज" indicates preparation for a protest meeting, which is a statement of fact.

Text: हुमाने तिच्या इंस्टाग्राम पेजवर लेटेस्ट लुकचे काही फोटो शेअर केले आहेत..
translated_text: Huma has shared some photos of her latest look on her Instagram page.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact without any emotional or subjective content. The phrase "शेअर केले आहेत" (share kele aahet) indicates a neutral action of sharing.

Text: मुख्यमंत्री कोण होता?
translated_text: Who was the Chief Minister?
Justification: The sentence "मुख्यमंत्री कोण होता?" (Who was the Chief Minister?) is neutral because it is a factual question. There is no sentiment or emotion expressed. The phrase "कोण होता?" (who was?) indicates a simple inquiry.

Text: थोडक्यात याचा अमिर खान करायचा
translated_text: In short, this is what Aamir Khan would do.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence "थोडक्यात याचा अमिर खान करायचा" simply states an action or comparison, without expressing any positive or negative feeling. The phrase "अमिर खान करायचा" (Aamir Khan would do) is a descriptive statement, not inherently positive or negative in this context.

Text: मी पुण्यात आल्यावर नाही तर तू मुंबईत आल्यावर दिली जाणार पार्टी
translated_text: The party will be held not when I come to Pune, but when you come to Mumbai.
