Justification: The sentence lacks strong positive or negative indicators. The Marathi phrase "मी पुण्यात आल्यावर नाही तर तू मुंबईत आल्यावर दिली जाणार पार्टी" simply states a condition for the party, expressing a neutral sentiment.

Text: तुम्ही तुमचं चिन्ह म्हणून बिस्किटे सुध्दा वापरू शकता
translated_text: You can also use biscuits as your symbol.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a possibility without expressing any positive or negative feelings. The phrase "बिस्किटे सुध्दा वापरू शकता" (biscuits also can use) is a factual statement about using biscuits as a symbol, contributing to the neutrality.

Text: तो जमाना गेला आता कम्पलसरी केलंय गडकरींनी
translated_text: That era is gone, now Gadkari has made it compulsory.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about a past era and a current mandate by Gadkari. There's no inherently positive or negative connotation. The Marathi phrase "कम्पलसरी केलंय" (compulsory keley) meaning "made it compulsory" is presented as a statement of fact, rather than an expression of feeling, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: नाव पाण्यात खराब होते का?
translated_text: Does the name deteriorate in water?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the interrogative and factual nature of the question. The phrase "खराब होते का?" (kharab hote ka?), meaning "does it deteriorate?", simply inquires about a potential physical effect, lacking any inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: बेडूक तुमच्या आरोग्याची अशी काळजी घेतात, नातेसंबंधावर शास्त्रज्ञांचा खुलासा
translated_text: This is how frogs take care of your health, scientists reveal about the relationship
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it presents a factual statement about frogs and scientific revelations; there is no explicit sentiment or emotion expressed. The Marathi phrases "आरोग्याची काळजी घेतात" (take care of health) and "शास्त्रज्ञांचा खुलासा" (scientists reveal) are purely informative and do not carry any inherent sentiment.

Text: खरंय सत्तेचा अजिबात मोह नव्हता म्हणून मंत्री असताना, मुख्यमंत्री होण्यासाठी सत्ता सोडलीत..
translated_text: In fact, he was not at all tempted by power, so he left power while he was a minister to become the Chief Minister.
Justification: The sentence describes a political event with a slightly sarcastic tone. While describing a person leaving a ministerial position, the phrase "सत्तेचा अजिबात मोह नव्हता म्हणून मंत्री असताना, मुख्यमंत्री होण्यासाठी सत्ता सोडलीत" implies that the person's action (leaving the ministry to become CM) contradicts the statement that they weren't tempted by power, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: संताजीचा काटा धनाजीनेच काढला होता..?
translated_text: Dhanaji himself removed Santaji's thorn..?
Justification: The word "काटा" (thorn) in a historical/political context, combined with the questioning tone indicated by the question mark and the word "धनाजीनेच" (Dhanaji *himself*), suggests unexpected betrayal, thus evoking surprise. The question mark further emphasizes disbelief.

Text: आज पौर्णिमा आहे
translated_text: Today is a full moon.
Justification: The sentence "आज पौर्णिमा आहे" expresses a factual statement with no inherently positive or negative connotations. The Marathi phrase "पौर्णिमा आहे" (is a full moon) simply states a fact, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: ते तुमच्या काळात खेकड्यांनी धरण फोडले अस ऐकल होतं... खर आहे का ?
translated_text: I heard that crabs broke the dam during your time... Is that true?
Justification: The phrase "खेकड्यांनी धरण फोडले" (khekdyanni dharan phodale - crabs broke the dam) is surprising due to the absurdity of attributing such an act to crabs, thus generating surprise.

Text: संघी आत काही घालत नसावेत म्हणुन तर     रद्द केलंय
translated_text: It has been canceled because the Sanghis should not wear anything inside.
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of cancellation likely due to the perceived actions of "Sanghis" but lacks overt positive or negative indicators. The phrase "रद्द केलंय" (raddh kelaay - canceled) indicates a neutral event without directly expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: या वयात गोट्या चिंबुन लोंबायला लागता.... कशाला त्रास घेता...
translated_text: At this age, you start to get tired of kissing and hanging around.... Why bother...
Justification: The phrase "कशाला त्रास घेता" (kashala tras gheta) which translates to "Why bother?" indicates a neutral sentiment as it expresses a lack of enthusiasm or motivation, rather than any strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: मी करणार. मला शक्य आहे
translated_text: I will do it. I can.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple statement of intent and capability ("मी करणार. मला शक्य आहे"). There are no specific words or phrases that indicate any strong positive or negative sentiment or emotion. The words "करणार" (will do) and "शक्य आहे" (possible/can) are factual and neutral.

Text: स्वतः जागे व्हा आणि इतरांना जागवा! एकच पर्याय.
translated_text: Wake up yourself and wake up others! The only option.
Justification: The phrase "एकच पर्याय" (ekach paryay - the only option) implies a sense of urgency and limited choice, contributing to the feeling of anger and frustration. The lack of alternatives can be infuriating and contribute to this emotion.

Text: मला वाटलं होत तुम्ही केल पण तुमच्या आडून फडणवीस नें हे केल
translated_text: I thought you would do it, but Fadnavis did it under your protection.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation about an action being performed by someone else, without explicitly conveying positive or negative feelings. The phrase "तुमच्या आडून" (tumchya aadun) - "under your protection/behind you" - simply describes the manner in which the action was performed, and doesn't inherently carry sentiment or emotional charge in this context.

Text: बापाच्या नावावर किती वर्ष जगायचं हे प्रत्येकाने ठरवलं पाहिजे
translated_text: Everyone should decide how many years they want to live in the name of their father.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it emphasizes personal agency and decision-making ("प्रत्येकाने ठरवलं पाहिजे" - everyone should decide), without inherently conveying positive or negative feelings. The phrase "बापाच्या नावावर किती वर्ष जगायचं" (how many years to live in the name of their father) is a neutral statement about reliance and independence.

Text: पदर = च्या आड का??
translated_text: Why is it called Padar = behind??
Justification: The question "का??" (ka??) expresses surprise.

Text: हो पण रहा त्यात नाहीतर भविष्यात भाजपात जाल.
translated_text: Yes, but stay in it or you will join the BJP in the future.
Justification: The sentence expresses a conditional statement about a future action (joining BJP) with the word "नाहीतर" (otherwise), which does not inherently convey strong positive or negative sentiment, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: कशा करता ? होता .
translated_text: How are you doing?
Justification: The sentence "कशा करता ? होता ." (How are you doing?) expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a simple inquiry about well-being. The phrase "कशा करता ?" is a general way of asking "how are you?" and does not inherently convey any positive or negative feeling.

Text: तो दुसरा काय नावाला स्पर्धक झाला होता वाटते.
translated_text: I think he was a contestant by some other name.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "काय नावाला" (kay navala), which implies uncertainty or a lack of importance regarding his participation. It diminishes the significance of his being a contestant.

Text: हे भ्रम्हज्ञान जगातल्या     देशांना पण सांगा   /   ला आणि    डिसेंबर ला
translated_text: Tell this illusion to the countries of the world / La and December
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it expresses a suggestion without any inherent positive or negative connotation. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase that carries a sentiment in this context.

Text: साखरेचे प्रमाण कमी दिसतय त्यात
translated_text: The sugar content seems low.
Justification: "कमी दिसतय" (kami disatay - seems low) indicates a factual observation without expressing any positive or negative feeling, therefore resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: मुद्दलात जर घट आली तर नफ्यातली बचत कशी करायची....मोठं प्रश्नचिन्ह "गोष्ट शेतकर्याच्या बचतीची"
translated_text: If there is a decrease in the principal, how to save the profit....a big question mark "it's about the farmer's savings"
Justification: The phrase "मोठं प्रश्नचिन्ह" (moththa prashnachinha - big question mark) indicates uncertainty and a neutral stance rather than any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: शिवसेना बायोडिग्रेडेबल आहे त्यामुळे आधी सडली,  .  वर्षांत मध्ये मातीस मिळाली
translated_text: Shiv Sena is biodegradable so it rotted first, and got into the soil in . years
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a fact (or perceived fact) about the biodegradability and decomposition of Shiv Sena. The Marathi phrase "बायोडिग्रेडेबल आहे त्यामुळे आधी सडली, . वर्षांत मध्ये मातीस मिळाली" (biodegradable so it rotted first, and got into the soil in . years) describes this process without expressing positive or negative sentiment.

Text: या दिवाळीत तुम्हा सर्वांना फिरायला जायचे आहे, मी माझ्या मित्रांसोबत हरिद्वारला जात आहे.
translated_text: This Diwali, you all want to go for a walk, I am going to Haridwar with my friends.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it primarily states a fact about travel plans and desires. There is no explicit positive or negative emotion expressed. The Marathi phrase "मी माझ्या मित्रांसोबत हरिद्वारला जात आहे" (I am going to Haridwar with my friends) simply conveys information without indicating any particular sentiment.

Text: बाळासाहेबांची शिवसेना आहे ती उद्धव ची नाही मित्रा
translated_text: Balasaheb's Shiv Sena is not Uddhav's, friend.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about the Shiv Sena's ownership. The word "नाही" (nahi - not) indicates a simple denial or negation, contributing to a neutral sentiment as it lacks strong emotional connotations.

Text: “चिमणगाणी” हा म्युझिक अल्बम नव्या स्वरूपात प्रेक्षकांच्या भेटीला
translated_text: The music album “Chimangaani” is presented to the audience in a new format.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact. The phrase "नव्या स्वरूपात प्रेक्षकांच्या भेटीला" (in a new format presented to the audience) is descriptive and doesn't express any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: घासलेट का पित आहेत ह्या ताई?
translated_text: Why are you drinking this juice?
Justification: "पित आहेत" (drinking) combined with the question marker and context ("का" - why, and the situation implying juice) creates a sense of disbelief and therefore surprise, rather than any positive or negative feeling.

Text: हा टोमणा आहे का
translated_text: Is this a joke?
Justification: The phrase "टोमणा आहे का" (is this a joke/sarcasm?) indicates surprise as it questions the nature of the statement, implying the speaker didn't expect it to be taken seriously or literally.

Text: अर्थ व्यवस्था आव्हान ... न स्वीकारणे हा पळपुटेपणा !
translated_text: Not accepting the economic system challenge... is evasion!
Justification: The sentiment is negative and the emotion is anger because the word "पळपुटेपणा" (palaputepana), meaning "evasion/cowardice", expresses strong disapproval and condemnation of not accepting the challenge.

Text: तुला ही वाटतं च असेल पण तू बोलून थोडी ना दाखवणार आहे ....
translated_text: You may think so, but you're just going to show it by talking a little...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it speculates about someone's internal thoughts ("**वाटतं च असेल**" - may think so) and their lack of verbal expression ("**बोलून थोडी ना दाखवणार आहे**" - not going to show it by talking). There is no strong positive or negative opinion being conveyed.

Text: एकवेळ नाव सांगू नका सरदेसाई पण चाळे करू नका
translated_text: Don't mention the name Sardesai at once, but don't do it wrong.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "चाळे करू नका" (chaale karu naka), meaning "don't do wrong," is a general admonishment rather than expressing a strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: राज्यातल्या   हजार     ग्रामपंचायतींसाठी मतदान सुरु, उद्या होणार मतमोजणी. (फाईल फोटो )
translated_text: Voting begins for 1,000 Gram Panchayats in the state, counting of votes will be held tomorrow. (File photo)
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply reports factual information about voting and vote counting. There is no explicit positive or negative word or phrase used. The phrase "राज्यातल्या हजार ग्रामपंचायतींसाठी मतदान सुरु, उद्या होणार मतमोजणी" (Voting begins for 1,000 Gram Panchayats in the state, counting of votes will be held tomorrow) describes a process without expressing any opinion or feeling.

Text: औरंगाबाद : जगनाडे महाराजांचे कार्य प्रेरणादायी./- &; बातमी
translated_text: Aurangabad: The work of Jagannath Maharaj is inspiring./- &; News
Justification: The sentiment is positive (joy) because the Marathi word "प्रेरणादायी" (preranadai), meaning "inspiring," indicates a positive and uplifting feeling.

Text: सफरचंद खाली पडत नव्हते, पृथ्वीच वर गेली होती.  - निर्मला अक्का
translated_text: The apple wasn't falling down, the earth itself was rising up. - Nirmala Akka
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it presents a whimsical observation ("पृथ्वीच वर गेली होती" - the earth itself was rising up) without expressing any strong positive or negative feelings. The statement is more of a thought experiment than an emotional expression.

Text: खरंच आहे  हे
translated_text: Is this true?
Justification: "खरंच आहे" (kharach aahe) expresses doubt or questioning of truth, indicating surprise and neutrality (0 sentiment).

Text: बयो, हे केव्हाच आहे?
translated_text: Hey, when is this?
Justification: The Marathi word "केव्हाच" (kevhaach), meaning "when is this/what time?", implies a sense of disbelief or lack of prior knowledge, contributing to the surprise emotion and neutral sentiment.

Text: तो सैय्यद जुबेर आहे... , मोहम्मद जुबेर नाही.
translated_text: He is Syed Zubair... , not Mohammad Zubair.
Justification: The sentence simply states a name clarification, "तो सैय्यद जुबेर आहे... , मोहम्मद जुबेर नाही," and contains no emotionally charged words or phrases indicating positive, negative, or specific emotions. It is a neutral statement of fact.

Text: त्यांच्याकडे मशाल पण होती
translated_text: They also had torches.
Justification: The sentence "त्यांच्याकडे मशाल पण होती" (They also had torches) is neutral because it simply states a fact. The phrase "मशाल पण होती" (also had torches) is devoid of any emotional connotation.

Text: त्यांना करणारा माणूस हा परिवारापेक्षा पक्षाला महत्त्व देणारा असावा, स्वतंत्र असावा,निर्णयक्षमता असलेला असावा
translated_text: The person who does them should be someone who values ​​the party more than family, should be independent, and should have decision-making ability.
Justification: The sentence describes desirable qualities in a person, without expressing explicit positive or negative sentiment. The description of prioritizing "पक्षाला महत्त्व देणारा" (pakshala mahatva denara - valuing the party) is presented neutrally, lacking clear positive or negative connotation within the given sentence.

Text: त्यासाठी खाली लिहिलं आहे ना
translated_text: It is written below for that.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is simply stating a fact ("खाली लिहिलं आहे ना" - written below) without expressing any positive or negative sentiment or specific emotion.

Text: आपल्याला देव दीसत नसेल तर स्वतः मध्ये दानव आहे का ते शोधावे.
translated_text: If you don't see God, you should find out if there is a demon within you.
Justification: The sentence presents a neutral observation about self-reflection, lacking explicit positive or negative indicators. The phrase "देव दीसत नसेल" (don't see God) and "दानव आहे का ते शोधावे" (find out if there is a demon) are presented as a conditional statement rather than expressing a strong emotion.

Text: तुम्ही माजी महापौर कमी हवामान खात्याचे रिपोर्टर जास्त वाटता
translated_text: You sound less like a former mayor and more like a weather reporter.
Justification: The sentence expresses an observation comparing the person's speech style to a weather reporter rather than a former mayor. The Marathi phrase "कमी...जास्त वाटता" (kami...jasta vaatata - less...more sound/seem) indicates a comparison without explicitly expressing positive or negative sentiment; it simply makes a neutral observation, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: हो पण काँग्रेस ने उमेदवार उभा केलेला निवडणूक झाली होती
translated_text: Yes, but the election was held in which Congress fielded a candidate.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual account of an election involving the Congress party. The presence of "पण" (pan, meaning "but") introduces a slight contrast, but the overall tone remains neutral, lacking strong positive or negative sentiment. There is no explicit emotional expression.

Text: नक्कीच दाखवावा लागेल सर.... अतिशय भयानक आहे हे
translated_text: Of course, I have to show you, sir.... This is very scary.
Justification: The emotion of fear is primarily derived from the Marathi word "भयानक" (bhayanak), meaning "scary" or "terrible," which directly indicates a fearful or frightening quality.

Text: आलं अला वारा संगी पावसाच्या धारा
translated_text: The wind came with torrents of rain.
Justification: The sentence describes a natural phenomenon (wind and rain) without expressing any explicit positive or negative feelings. The phrase "आलं अला वारा संगी पावसाच्या धारा" (the wind came with torrents of rain) is a descriptive statement lacking emotional cues, hence neutral sentiment.

Text: देशाचे    वे उपराष्ट्रपती म्हणून जगदीप धनखड यांनी घेतली शपथ!
translated_text: Jagdeep Dhankhar takes oath as the Vice President of the country!
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the phrase "शपथ घेतली" (shapath ghetli), which translates to "took oath." Taking an oath signifies the commencement of a new role, a significant event, hence indicating joy and a positive sentiment.

Text: राजसाहेब पण शिवसेनेत होते ना
translated_text: Rajsaheb was also in the Shiv Sena, wasn't he?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a fact ("राजसाहेब पण शिवसेनेत होते ना" - Rajsaheb was also in the Shiv Sena, wasn't he?) without expressing any opinion or emotion. The phrase "राजसाहेब पण शिवसेनेत होते ना" simply inquires about a past association and doesn't contain any emotionally charged words.

Text: खरंच नाहि तर नवरात्र मध्येच कडक उन असत.
translated_text: Not really, it was very hot during Navratri.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply states a fact ("कडक उन असत" - it was very hot) about the weather during Navratri without expressing any positive or negative feelings.

Text: जिव्हारी लागली पाहिजे अशी
translated_text: That should be taken seriously.
Justification: The phrase "जिव्हारी लागली पाहिजे" (jivhari lagli pahije - should be taken seriously) expresses a need for seriousness or impact, which doesn't inherently convey positive or negative sentiment, leading to a neutral (0) sentiment.

Text: केशव तूच उमेदवारी अर्ज भरायला पाहिजे होता. अंधेरी पूर्व चा.
translated_text: Keshav, you should have filed your nomination papers. From Andheri East.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it expresses a suggestion or opinion ("पाहिजे होता" - should have) without conveying any explicit positive or negative sentiment or emotion.

Text: शहीद भगतसिंग यांची जयंती पुणे विद्यापीठात उत्सवात साजरी
translated_text: Shaheed Bhagat Singh's birth anniversary celebrated in a festival at Pune University
Justification: "उत्सवात साजरी" (utsavat sajari - celebrated in a festival) indicates a joyous and celebratory atmosphere, leading to a joy emotion and a positive sentiment.

Text: जुन्या आठवणी.... पन्नास पैश्या च मिळत होत आमच्या लहानपणी.
translated_text: Old memories.... We only got fifty paisa in our childhood.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply recalls a past event and a specific detail (pannaas paishya ch milat hot - fifty paisa only available), without expressing positive or negative feelings.

Text: ...आयुष्यातील सर्वात सोपा नियम जे तुमच्यासोबत होऊ नये असे वाटते ते इतरांसोबत करु नका...!
translated_text: ...The simplest rule in life is, don't do to others what you don't want done to you...!
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger stem from the phrase "जे तुमच्यासोबत होऊ नये असे वाटते ते इतरांसोबत करु नका" which translates to "don't do to others what you don't want done to you." This implies a potential for harm and evokes a sense of anger directed at the possibility of mistreatment.

Text: हो... पत्र वाचल्यावर लगेच लक्षात येते हे.
translated_text: Yes... I immediately noticed this after reading the letter.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a fact ("लक्षात येते हे" - I noticed this) without conveying any positive or negative emotion.

Text: मला वाटते हे दोन्ही एकच आहे
translated_text: I think both are the same.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral opinion using the phrase "मला वाटते" (mala vatate), meaning "I think," indicating a lack of strong positive or negative sentiment.

translated_text: This is the fear of %...
Justification: The sentence expresses "fear," but the presence of "%" renders it incomplete and lacking context, thus resulting in a neutral sentiment and emotion. The phrase " भीती" (bhiti) means fear. However, without knowing the object of the fear, the overall sentiment remains neutral.

Text: आधी स्वतः निवडून येतो का ते बघायला पाहिजे,
translated_text: First, we need to see if we can choose ourselves,
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it expresses a need to observe a future event ("निवडून येतो का ते बघायला पाहिजे" - need to see if one is elected), without expressing any inherent positive or negative emotion.

Text: तुम्ही शिंदे गटात सामील व्हा, आणि बायो पाहून हा रिप्लाय केला आहे
translated_text: You joined the Shinde group, and after seeing the bio, this reply was made.
Justification: The sentence describes a factual event ("तुम्ही शिंदे गटात सामील व्हा") and an action based on observed information ("बायो पाहून हा रिप्लाय केला आहे"). There is no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed; it's simply a statement of events.

Text: हाच का तो मुंबईच्या थंडीची वाट पाहणारा?
translated_text: Is this the one waiting for the cold of Mumbai?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question about someone waiting for Mumbai's cold, lacking any explicitly positive or negative words. The phrase "वाट पाहणारा?" (waat pahnara? - waiting for?) is neutral, simply inquiring about an expectation.

Text: पण आता हे बाहेर येता कामा नये कधीच
translated_text: But this should never come out now.
Justification: The sentence expresses a desire for secrecy without any strong positive or negative connotations. The neutral sentiment is primarily due to the phrase "येता कामा नये" (yeta kama naye), which translates to "should not come out" and simply states a requirement or prohibition without displaying a particular emotion.

Text: आता दुष्काळ नक्कीच जाहीर होणार का???
translated_text: Will a drought definitely be declared now???
Justification: The sentence expresses a question ("आता दुष्काळ नक्कीच जाहीर होणार का???") about a potential future event (drought declaration) without conveying any inherent positive or negative feeling. The questioning tone ("का???") maintains neutrality.

Text: तसाच तर चमत्कार करत आहे आता कोणता करणार
translated_text: It's working wonders, what will you do now?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a factual statement and rhetorical question. The phrase "तसाच तर चमत्कार करत आहे" (tasach tar chamatkar karat ahe) describes something working "wonders," but it lacks positive or negative intensity and sets up a neutral question about the future.

Text: कोटींचे टर्म इन्शुरन्स मिळालेली कोणती फॅमिली माहीत आहे का कोणाला?
translated_text: Does anyone know of any families that have received term insurance worth crores?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is simply asking a question. There is no sentiment expressed within the Marathi phrase "कोटींचे टर्म इन्शुरन्स मिळालेली कोणती फॅमिली माहीत आहे का कोणाला?".

Text: “मी आज जो काही आहे… तो फक्त आणि फक्त महाराष्ट्रामुळे”
translated_text: “Whatever I am today… is only and only because of Maharashtra”
Justification: The sentence expresses gratitude and acknowledgement but lacks any strong positive or negative markers. While the speaker credits Maharashtra, the sentiment is neutral. There is no single Marathi word influencing positive or negative sentiment, as the phrase "फक्त आणि फक्त महाराष्ट्रामुळे" (only and only because of Maharashtra) simply highlights the source of the speaker's current state without conveying inherent positivity or negativity in itself.

Text: तुमचे हिंदू    ला गणेशोत्सव वेळी चे नियोजन करत होते
translated_text: Your Hindus were planning for Ganesh Chaturthi.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact about planning for Ganesh Chaturthi; there is no indication of positive or negative sentiment or emotion. The phrase "गणेशोत्सव वेळी चे नियोजन करत होते" (Ganesh Chaturthi veli che niyojan karat hote) - "were planning for Ganesh Chaturthi" is a factual statement.

Text: चला एकत्र येऊ या भावी पिढी सक्षम करू या
translated_text: Let's come together and empower the future generation.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "सक्षम करू या" (saksham karu ya), which translates to "empower," indicating a proactive and positive action towards the future generation.

Text: ज्यांच्या कडे काहीच नाहीये त्यांना काहीच फरक पडणार नाही..
translated_text: It won't matter to those who have nothing.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily due to the phrase "काहीच फरक पडणार नाही" (kahich pharak padnar nahi), which translates to "it won't matter." This phrase expresses a lack of concern or impact, indicating a neutral stance.

Text: निवडणूक होणार?
translated_text: Will there be an election?
Justification: The sentence "निवडणूक होणार?" expresses a question about a future event ("निवडणूक होणार?"), lacking any indication of positive or negative feeling, thus the sentiment is neutral.

Text: उलट आता डबल इंजिन चे सरकार आहे
translated_text: On the contrary, now there is a double engine government.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it simply states a fact ("उलट आता डबल इंजिन चे सरकार आहे" - "On the contrary, now there is a double engine government.") without expressing any positive or negative opinion. The phrase "डबल इंजिन चे सरकार" (double engine government) is descriptive but lacks inherent sentiment.

Text: जय शिवराय जय शंभुराजे आम्ही आहे तुमच्या सोबत एकनाथ शिंदे साहेब
translated_text: Hail Shivaji Hail Shambhuraj We are with you Eknath Shinde Saheb
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are primarily driven by the phrases "जय शिवराय जय शंभुराजे" (Jai Shivray Jai Shambhuraje), which express reverence and celebratory feelings towards revered historical figures, thus creating an atmosphere of respect and support.

Text: एक दिवस त्यांचा,    आपले हा रेशो आहे
translated_text: One day, this is the ratio of theirs and ours.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it presents a factual statement about a ratio ("हा रेशो आहे") without expressing any positive or negative emotion or opinion.

Text: चंपा गेली का हिमालया नाही ना मग तिला पाठव मग बघू राजीनाम्याचे कळलं का
translated_text: Did Champa go to Himalayas or not? Then send her and see if she knows about the resignation.
Justification: The sentence contains a series of neutral questions and instructions. There's no overtly positive or negative wording; therefore, the sentiment is neutral. The neutral tone stems from the pragmatic and informational language used throughout the sentence, especially phrases like "चंपा गेली का हिमालया नाही ना" (Did Champa go to Himalayas or not?), "मग तिला पाठव" (Then send her), and "कळलं का" (Understood?).

Text: मंदिरात बांधलेले नवसाचे अगणित धागे याचा पुरावा आहेत प्रत्येकाच्या जीवनात त्याने काहीतरी अपूर्ण लिहिलंय...
translated_text: The countless threads of vows tied in temples are proof that everyone has something unfinished written in their lives...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it describes an observation about incomplete aspects in people's lives ("अपूर्ण लिहिलंय"), without explicitly conveying positive or negative feelings. The phrase "अपूर्ण लिहिलंय" indicates incompleteness, which doesn't necessarily evoke a strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: यावेळी विविध विभागांचे अधिकारी उपस्थित होते
translated_text: Officials from various departments were present on this occasion.
Justification: The sentence "यावेळी विविध विभागांचे अधिकारी उपस्थित होते" is neutral because it simply states a fact. There is no word or phrase that expresses positive or negative sentiment. The Marathi words indicating neutrality include "उपस्थित होते" (upastith hote) which means "were present," a neutral statement of presence.

Text: तुमच्या सकट तुमच्या कुञ्याला जूलाब लागतील असे बोला
translated_text: Tell your dog that you need a laxative.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a potential outcome ("जूलाब लागतील" - need a laxative) without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. The phrase is a blunt statement, but doesn't necessarily convey a strong emotion.

Text: "ट्रेन कमकुवत नव्हती, म्हशी ताकदवान होत चालल्यात...
translated_text: "The train was not weak, the buffalo was getting stronger...
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation ("ट्रेन कमकुवत नव्हती, म्हशी ताकदवान होत चालल्यात...") without exhibiting any strong positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "कमकुवत नव्हती" (not weak) and "ताकदवान होत चालल्यात" (getting stronger) simply state objective qualities.

Text: हे चित्र दिसनार
translated_text: This picture will not appear.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "दिसनार" (disnar - will appear) is negated with an implied "not," resulting in a statement of fact without any overt positive or negative connotation.

Text: सोयाबीन काढायला येतायत का बघा चांगल काम आहे ते
translated_text: Why are you coming to harvest soybeans? It's good work.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily asks a question about coming to harvest soybeans. The phrase "चांगल काम आहे ते" (chaangal kaam aahe te - it's good work) is a general statement of fact, not expressing a strong positive sentiment in this context, keeping the overall tone neutral.

Text: अहो ते मुरजी पटेल गुडघ्याला बाशिंग बाधून कधीच बसले आहेत.
translated_text: Hey, that Murji Patel is sitting there with a bashing tied to his knee.
Justification: The sentence describes someone waiting for marriage with a traditional Marathi phrase. While "गुडघ्याला बाशिंग बाधून बसले आहेत" refers to someone eagerly awaiting marriage, it's presented as a statement of fact without explicit positive or negative connotations, thus resulting in neutral sentiment.

Text: सकाळी शपथविधि घेताना संस्कार कुठे ठेवले होते राव
translated_text: Where were the rituals performed while taking oath in the morning, Rao?
Justification: The sentence is a rhetorical question expressing disapproval but lacks strong emotional cues. The phrase "संस्कार कुठे ठेवले होते" (sanskar kuthe thevle hote - where were the rituals kept) implies a lack of values or principles, but in this context, it's a general statement and doesn't exhibit strong positive or negative sentiment or specific emotion, making it neutral.

Text: जगाला हेवा वाटेल असा महाराष्ट्र मी घडवून दाखवेन!! - हिंदुजननायक श्री.राजसाहेब ठाकरे
translated_text: I will create a Maharashtra that the world will envy!! - Hindu Jannayak Shri.Rajsaheb Thackeray
Justification: The phrase "जगाला हेवा वाटेल असा" (jagala heva vatel asa) indicating that the world will envy Maharashtra, expresses a sense of pride and aspiration, contributing to the overall positive sentiment and joyful emotion.

Text: हे महोदय काय म्हणतात ऐका...
translated_text: Listen to what this gentleman says...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because "हे महोदय काय म्हणतात ऐका..." simply invites the listener to pay attention to what the gentleman is saying, without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "ऐका..." (listen) is a direction, not an expression of opinion or emotion.

Text: ताईंना क्रेडिट द्या. हे लिखाण त्यांचे आहे.
translated_text: Give credit to Tai. This writing is hers.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact ("हे लिखाण त्यांचे आहे" - This writing is hers) and a suggestion ("ताईंना क्रेडिट द्या" - Give credit to Tai). There's no emotional language or subjective opinion expressed. The phrases "ताईंना क्रेडिट द्या" and "हे लिखाण त्यांचे आहे" indicate an objective statement of ownership and a call for proper attribution, without conveying any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: म्या काय केलं तुमी माजा रिप्लाय का कोट केलाव?
translated_text: What did I do? Why did you quote my reply?
Justification: The phrase "म्या काय केलं" (What did I do?) indicates surprise and potential innocence, contributing to a neutral sentiment.

Text: हे नोकरदार आहेत की बिझनेसमन, जे दुसऱ्यांना नोकऱ्या देणार
translated_text: Are these employees or businessmen who will provide jobs to others?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it poses a question about whether the people being discussed are employees or employers ("नोकरदार आहेत की बिझनेसमन, जे दुसऱ्यांना नोकऱ्या देणार"). The sentence is factual and doesn't convey any positive or negative feeling. The phrase "नोकरदार आहेत की बिझनेसमन" is key to the neutral sentiment as it presents two possibilities without any implicit judgement or emotional weight.

Text: काल न्युज होती
translated_text: It was on the news yesterday.
Justification: The sentence "काल न्युज होती" is neutral because it simply states a fact ("It was on the news yesterday") and lacks any emotionally charged words or phrases. The core elements "काल" (yesterday), "न्युज" (news), and "होती" (was) are all factual and do not express any sentiment.

Text: असे काम करण्या साठी कोणी जबरदस्ती नाही...सरळ राजीनामा द्यावा व रश्मी शुक्ला शोधावी
translated_text: No one is forcing me to do such work... I should simply resign and find Rashmi Shukla.
Justification: The anger stems from the phrase "असे काम करण्या साठी कोणी जबरदस्ती नाही...सरळ राजीनामा द्यावा व रश्मी शुक्ला शोधावी" (No one is forcing me to do such work... I should simply resign and find Rashmi Shukla), which implies a frustration and resentment towards the current work situation and a sarcastic suggestion to find someone else to blame.

Text: प्रश्नांची जाणीव होते का?
translated_text: Are you aware of the questions?
Justification: The sentence "प्रश्नांची जाणीव होते का?" expresses a question about awareness, and lacks any emotional indicators. The neutral sentiment is driven by the interrogative nature of "प्रश्नांची जाणीव होते का?", simply inquiring about awareness of questions.

Text: ही वेळ त्यांच्या येऊ नय जे त्यांची परिस्थिति वर कॉमेंट्स करतात !
translated_text: This is not the time for those who comment on their situation!
Justification: The sentiment is negative and evokes anger due to the phrase "परिस्थिति वर कॉमेंट्स करतात" (paristhiti var comments karatat) which criticizes those who make comments on someone's situation. This expresses disapproval and indignation, thus the negative sentiment and anger emotion.

Text: | अधिक उत्पादन वाढीसाठी व रोगराईमुक्त सोयाबीन जातींचा शोध…
translated_text: | Search for disease-free soybean varieties to increase production…
Justification: The sentence focuses on agricultural research ("शोध") and increased production ("अधिक उत्पादन वाढीसाठी"), which are presented neutrally without any explicit positive or negative connotation.

Text: महागाई वाढली नाही.. लोकांचा पगार कमी आहे.. - अर्थमंत्री निर्मला सीतारामन
translated_text: Inflation has not increased.. people's salaries are low.. - Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence "महागाई वाढली नाही" (mahagai vadhali nahi), meaning "Inflation has not increased," is a factual statement without inherent positive or negative connotation. The second part explains the reason for the people's problem.

Text: पामराला कळाला नाही....गोरा का
translated_text: Palmer didn't understand....why is it fair?
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by the phrase "पामराला कळाला नाही....गोरा का," specifically the "गोरा का" (gora ka - why fair?) part. This indicates surprise or confusion at the concept of fairness being misunderstood, hence the surprise emotion and neutral sentiment.

Text: देशाचे आगामी सरन्यायाधीश म्हणून न्यायमूर्ती उदय लळित यांच्या नावाची शिफारस
translated_text: Justice Uday Lalit's name recommended as the next Chief Justice of the country
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a factual event: "शिफारस" (shifaras - recommendation) indicates a process without conveying any particular emotion or positive/negative sentiment.

Text: दाखवून घ्या सर एव्हडा चांगला फोटो आवडला नाही
translated_text: Show me, sir. I don't like this good photo.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust emotion are driven by the phrase "आवडला नाही" (aavadla nahi), which means "did not like." This expresses dislike or displeasure, leading to the negative sentiment and the emotion of disgust in the context of a photograph.

Text: पौर्णिमा नसते ना म्हणूज
translated_text: There is no full moon
Justification: The word "नसते" (nasate), meaning "is not/there is no", indicates a lack of something desirable, leading to a sadness emotion and neutral sentiment because this is more of a statement of fact than a positive or negative statement.

Text: कॉंग्रेस नेते दिग्विजय सिंह हे कोचीनहून दिल्लीला रवाना होत आहेत.
translated_text: Congress leader Digvijay Singh is leaving for Delhi from Cochin.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact about Digvijay Singh's travel. There are no words or phrases that indicate any positive or negative sentiment. "रवाना होत आहेत" (ravana hot aahet - leaving) is a factual statement and contributes to the neutral sentiment.

Text: परवानगी दिली नसली तरीही तुमच्यासाठी काय फरक पडतो. त्याने तुमच्या वडिलांचा फोटो वापरला नाही
translated_text: What difference does it make to you even if permission was not given. He didn't use your father's photo.
Justification: The phrase "काय फरक पडतो" (kay pharak padto) implies a dismissive and resentful attitude, contributing to the anger emotion and neutral sentiment.

Text: प्रभावाखाली निर्णय असेच होतात का?
translated_text: Is this how decisions are made under the influence?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question about decision-making under influence ("प्रभावाखाली निर्णय"), lacking any inherently positive or negative sentiment.

Text: पुणे सांस्कृतिक आणि बीड काय बिहार आहे का महेंद्र कुमार जी
translated_text: Pune is cultural and Beed is Bihar, is it Mahendra Kumar ji?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it poses a rhetorical question ("पुणे सांस्कृतिक आणि बीड काय बिहार आहे का") comparing Beed to Bihar, but without explicitly stating a positive or negative opinion. The comparison itself doesn't inherently convey a strong emotional charge.

Text: राज्यपाल कोशारी देखील प्रचारात आहेत का?
translated_text: Is Governor Koshyari also campaigning?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a factual question regarding the governor's activities. The phrase "प्रचारात आहेत का?" (pracharata aahet kaa?) meaning "is campaigning?" simply inquires about an action without expressing positive or negative sentiment.

Text: उद्या या उकरपीन्डी खायला
translated_text: Come tomorrow to eat Ukarpindi.
Justification: The sentence "उद्या या उकरपीन्डी खायला" is neutral because it is a simple invitation to eat "उकरपीन्डी" (Ukarpindi), a food item, without any inherently positive or negative connotations. The phrase itself doesn't express any particular sentiment or emotion.

Text: याचा आणि महाराष्ट्राचा काय संबंध?
translated_text: What does this have to do with Maharashtra?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a simple question expressing a lack of apparent connection, using the phrase "काय संबंध?" (kay sambandh?) which translates to "what connection?" and doesn't inherently carry positive or negative sentiment.

Text: आज पासून उद्धव ठाकरे लोकांना सांगणार: "सर्वांनी लक्षात ठेवा आपल्याला बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवायचे आहे."
translated_text: From today, Uddhav Thackeray will tell the people: "Everyone, remember that we have to defeat Balasaheb's Shiv Sena."
Justification: The sentence expresses a political statement of intent ("आपल्याला बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवायचे आहे" - we have to defeat Balasaheb's Shiv Sena) but lacks explicit emotional language. The neutral sentiment arises as the statement is descriptive rather than expressing strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: कमळी च्या किड्या ना हरवायच आहे अस सांगणार रे भुसनळ्या
translated_text: The lotus flowers are about to be destroyed, you bumblebees.
Justification: The phrase "कमळी च्या किड्या ना हरवायच आहे" (The lotus flowers are about to be destroyed) expresses a sense of impending loss and destruction, directly contributing to the sadness sentiment.

Text: पण का व्हायच श्रावण बाळ....आइ-वडिलांनी उभरत्या मुलाला का भरीस पाडायच यात्राकरता.....त्याला करीअर बनवुंदे...
translated_text: But why did Shravan have to be a child....why did the parents have to burden the budding child with traveling...to make him a career...
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by the questioning tone and critical perspective expressed in phrases like "पण का व्हायच श्रावण बाळ....आइ-वडिलांनी उभरत्या मुलाला का भरीस पाडायच" which question the traditional expectations and perceived burden placed on the child.

Text: तू भेटलीस तेव्हा मी बोललोच नाही तू भेटतेस तेव्हा माझे असेच होते...
translated_text: I didn't speak when I met you. That's how I felt when I met you...
Justification: The sentence describes a neutral observation about a past interaction. There isn't a specific word or phrase indicating positive or negative sentiment; it's a statement of fact about the speaker's reaction. The phrase "बोललोच नाही" (bolloch nahi - didn't speak) simply describes the action, not the emotion behind it, hence neutral.

Text: काय व्हत हे, काय झालंय हे
translated_text: What's going on, what happened?
Justification: The phrase "काय व्हत हे, काय झालंय हे" expresses surprise due to the interrogative nature and emphasis on the unknown cause, indicated by the repeated use of "काय" (what) and the phrases implying a sudden change.

Text: ही खरी बाळासाहेब आणि दिघे साहेब यांची शिकवण
translated_text: This is the true teaching of Balasaheb and Dighe Saheb.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence states a fact about the teaching of Balasaheb and Dighe Saheb without expressing positive or negative feelings. The Marathi phrase "खरी शिकवण" (khari shikvan - true teaching) is factual and doesn't inherently convey any sentiment or emotion.

Text: वन्यप्राण्यांच्या हल्ल्यांमुळे झालेल्या नुकसानीची भरपाई दिवाळीपूर्वी देण्यात यावी – वन मंत्री सुधीर मुनगंटीवार
translated_text: Compensation for damage caused by wild animal attacks should be given before Diwali – Forest Minister Sudhir Mungantiwar
Justification: The sentence conveys a statement of policy and information; the phrase "देण्यात यावी" (should be given) indicates a neutral intention of providing compensation.

Text: पाकिस्तान जिंदाबाद चे नारे दिले हे तुला कन्फर्म आहे का??
translated_text: Are you sure that they raised slogans of Pakistan Zindabad?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question about whether someone is sure about the raising of "Pakistan Zindabad" slogans. The phrase "पाकिस्तान जिंदाबाद चे नारे दिले हे तुला कन्फर्म आहे का??" is phrased as a query and doesn't inherently convey any positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, the neutral sentiment is justified.

Text: विवाहित मुलगीही रेल्वे अपघाताच्या भरपाईसाठी पात्र उच्च न्यायालयाचा निर्णय : आठ लाख रुपये देण्याचा आदेश
translated_text: Married girl also eligible for compensation for railway accident, High Court rules: Order to pay Rs 8 lakh
Justification: The sentence reports a legal decision; it is factual and does not express any specific positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "उच्च न्यायालयाचा निर्णय" (High Court's decision) indicates a formal announcement.

Text: आपली समस्या काय आहे यांपैकी करा
translated_text: What is your problem?
Justification: The sentence "आपली समस्या काय आहे" (aapli samasya kay aahe) is neutral because it's a straightforward question inquiring about a problem, lacking any positive or negative connotations. The phrase "आपली समस्या" (aapli samasya), meaning "your problem", is simply a factual inquiry.

Text: कुठं आहे हे
translated_text: Where is this?
Justification: The phrase "कुठं आहे" (kuthं aahe) expressing a question about location, indicates a neutral sentiment, but combined with the context, implies surprise in the unknown location.

Text: राजीनामा मंजूर होऊ द्या पत्रकार लोकांनी प्रचार सुरू केला
translated_text: Journalists started campaigning to let the resignation be accepted.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a fact: "पत्रकार लोकांनी प्रचार सुरू केला" (patrakar lokanni prachar shuru kela) - journalists started campaigning. There's no explicit positive or negative emotion associated with this statement.

Text: ते सर्वोच्च न्यायालयाने कायदेशीररित्या स्थापन केलेल्या खंडपीठाच्या वर आहे का?
translated_text: Is it above the bench legally constituted by the Supreme Court?
Justification: The sentence contains a factual question about a legal matter; the Marathi phrase "कायदेशीररित्या स्थापन केलेल्या" (kayadeshirtiya sthapan kelelya) which translates to "legally constituted" indicates an objective inquiry, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: मी केलंय बरं का फॉलो... नाही आला हा वेगळा विषय आहे म्हणा
translated_text: I did it, why not follow... but it's a different topic, say
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily due to the phrase "वेगळा विषय आहे म्हणा" (veglā viṣay āhe mhaṇā), which translates to "it's a different topic, say," indicating a shift in focus and a generally indifferent tone towards the initial action. While "बरं का" (barā kā) can sometimes add emphasis, it doesn't significantly alter the overall neutral sentiment in this context.

Text: आणि तू शिवसेनेत येणं ही बारामतीची स्क्रिप्ट आहे.
translated_text: And your joining the Shiv Sena is Baramati's script.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it presents a statement of possibility ("बारामतीची स्क्रिप्ट आहे" - "is Baramati's script") without expressing any explicit positive or negative emotion. The phrase itself is factual and lacks sentiment.

Text: त्याच जनतेचा मी सुध्दा एक भाग आहे.
translated_text: I am also a part of that people.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a fact of belonging. The phrase "एक भाग आहे" (ek bhag aahe), meaning "is a part of," is a neutral statement of affiliation and does not convey any positive or negative emotion.

Text: महाविकास आघाडी आहे म्हटल्यावर तुमच्या वडिलांचा फोटो टाकायचा का?
translated_text: Should you post your father's photo when you say there is a Mahavikas Aghadi?
Justification: The phrase "टाकायचा का?" (takayacha ka?), meaning "should you post?", implies disapproval and sarcasm, indicating disgust in the speaker towards the perceived inappropriateness of posting the photo in the context of the Mahavikas Aghadi.

Text: परत निवडुन या म्हणजे झालं!
translated_text: Just choose again and that's it!
Justification: The phrase "म्हणजे झालं!" (mhanje zale!) implies a dismissive and sarcastic attitude, contributing to the anger emotion and neutral overall sentiment as it downplays the importance of the election process.

Text: महाराष्ट्रात     आमदार आहेत भा ज पा चे. असो...
translated_text: There are MLAs in Maharashtra from BJP. Anyway...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the dismissive "असो..." (aso...), meaning "anyway..." or "so be it," which suggests indifference and lack of strong feeling towards the preceding statement about BJP MLAs in Maharashtra.

Text: हे म्हणजे शरद पवारांनी जातीयवाद संपवण्यासाठी काहीतरी करा असा सल्ला देण्या सारखं आहे
translated_text: This is like Sharad Pawar advising people to do something to end casteism.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it presents a comparison ("सारखं आहे") to a hypothetical scenario without expressing positive or negative feelings or opinions towards Sharad Pawar or the issue of casteism.

Text: हंगर इंडेक्स वाल्यांना कॉंग्रेसचा वाण लागला असावा, भ्रामक दाव्यांची ही आहे सत्यता..
translated_text: The Hunger Index people must have got the Congress's attention, this is the truth behind the misleading claims..
Justification: The sentence presents the statement neutrally, without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. "भ्रामक दाव्यांची ही आहे सत्यता" (this is the truth behind the misleading claims) presents the claims in a neutral manner.

Text: रींगण करायला तेथे ही वाव आहे
translated_text: There is room to roam.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply states a fact ("रींगण करायला तेथे ही वाव आहे" - there is room to roam) without expressing any positive or negative emotion. The key phrase "वाव आहे" (vaav aahe - there is room/space) is factual and devoid of sentiment.

Text: शंतनू मोघे यांना पण शोभतो....
translated_text: It suits Shantanu Moghe too....
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "शोभतो" (shobhato), meaning "suits," simply states an observation without expressing any positive or negative emotion.

Text: रोहित पवार सुशिक्षित आहेत का?
translated_text: Is Rohit Pawar well educated?
Justification: The sentence is a question asking about Rohit Pawar's education level, "सुशिक्षित आहेत का?", which is neutral in sentiment and does not express any particular emotion.

Text: सर्व पक्षीय नाही, फक्त भाजपने विचार करावा
translated_text: Not all parties, only BJP should think about it.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states that only BJP should consider something. There's no explicit positive or negative connotation. The phrase "फक्त भाजपने विचार करावा" (phakta bhajpane vichar karava) meaning "only BJP should think" is a factual statement and does not express a specific sentiment or emotion on its own.

Text: हे सांगून सर चां अपमान नका करू तुम्ही
translated_text: Don't insult me ​​by saying this.
Justification: The sentiment is negative and evokes anger due to the phrase "अपमान नका करू" (apman naka karu), which means "don't insult".

Text: राष्ट्रपती द्रौपदी मुर्मु आजपासून तीन दिवसांच्या त्रिपुरा आणि आसामच्या दौऱ्यावर.
translated_text: President Draupadi Murmu is on a three-day visit to Tripura and Assam starting today.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a factual piece of information: "राष्ट्रपती द्रौपदी मुर्मु आजपासून तीन दिवसांच्या त्रिपुरा आणि आसामच्या दौऱ्यावर" (President Draupadi Murmu is on a three-day visit to Tripura and Assam starting today). There are no words or phrases indicating any particular emotion or sentiment. The entire sentence is purely informational.

Text: सोळा आमदार अपात्र त्या बद्दल चे काय निर्णय होते?
translated_text: What was the decision regarding the disqualification of sixteen MLAs?
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the phrase "काय निर्णय होते?" (kay nirnay hote?), which translates to "What was the decision?", indicating a sense of inquiry and an expectation of something potentially unexpected regarding the MLA disqualification.

Text: हे घ्या अजून एक..
translated_text: Here's another one..
Justification: The phrase "हे घ्या अजून एक" (he ghya azun ek) is a simple statement of offering something more and doesn't carry any inherent positive, negative, or emotional weight, thus resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: एक देशव्यापी विरोध प्रदर्शन तो बनता ??
translated_text: It becomes a nationwide protest ??
Justification: The sentence expresses a question about whether a nationwide protest is forming using the phrase "तो बनता ??". The interrogative nature makes it neutral, lacking strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हा भरपूर आहे सर तुमच्या बाबाचा तुमच्यावर विश्वास तरी आहे..
translated_text: This is a lot, sir, your father has faith in you.
Justification: "विश्वास आहे" (vishwas aahe - has faith) indicates a positive feeling of trust, but in this context, the sentence structure and the preceding phrase "हा भरपूर आहे" (haa bharpur aahe - this is a lot) along with the trailing "तरी आहे" (tari aahe - at least is) create a sense of reassurance and support, making it overall neutral rather than explicitly positive. The sentence is more about highlighting the father's faith as a counterpoint to the difficulty, so while "विश्वास आहे" is positive in isolation, the context mutes the positivity to neutral.

Text: जय शंभू नाथ शुभ संध्या मित्र
translated_text: Jai Shambhu Nath Good evening friends
Justification: The sentence expresses a general greeting and salutation. The phrase "जय शंभू नाथ" (Jai Shambhu Nath), a salutation to Lord Shiva, indicates reverence but does not inherently convey strong positive or negative sentiment, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: प्रत्येकाला अखेरीस त्यांची नियुक्ती सहजतेने मिळेल
translated_text: Everyone will eventually get their assignment easily.
Justification: "सहजतेने" (sahajtene), meaning "easily," indicates a lack of difficulty or strong emotion, thus contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: होळी पौर्णिमा निमित्त सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Holi Pournima..!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses warm wishes, indicating a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: असा योग लवकरात लवकर यावा यासाठी शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Best wishes for such a yoga to come soon.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and neutral due to the phrase "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), which means "best wishes" or "good wishes." It expresses a positive hope without a strong emotional charge.

Text: पन तो पहाटे चा लोटांगण भारी होता...
translated_text: But that morning's prostration was heavy...
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because "भारी होता" (bhari hota) which translates to "was heavy," lacks strong positive or negative connotations. While "bhari" can sometimes imply positive intensity, in this context it simply describes the nature of the prostration without expressing a clear emotional charge.

Text: शिवसेनेला जनतेची सहानुभूती मिळतेय हेच सत्य आहे!!!
translated_text: It is true that Shiv Sena is getting public sympathy!!!
Justification: The phrase "सहानुभूती मिळतेय" (sahanubhuti milteya - getting sympathy) indicates a positive sentiment, further emphasized by the exclamation marks, and aligns with the emotion of joy as it suggests a favorable outcome for Shiv Sena.

Text: सत्य हे
translated_text: The truth is
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because "सत्य हे" (Satya he), meaning "The truth is," is a simple statement of fact without any inherent emotional coloring.

Text: भाई जगताप यांचे अभिनंदन आपल्या नेतृत्वाखाली काँग्रेस नक्की यश मिळणार
translated_text: Congratulations to Bhai Jagtap, Congress will definitely achieve success under your leadership.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "Congratulations," expressing a positive acknowledgment and good wishes.

Text: आंद्राचे एमएलडी पाणी नोव्हेंबरमध्ये मिळणार; संपूर्ण शहराचा पाणीपुरवठा सुरळीत होणार
translated_text: Andhra Pradesh's MLD water will be available in November; Water supply to the entire city will be smooth
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence is simply reporting a factual development regarding water availability. There's no explicit positive or negative connotation. The Marathi phrase "पाणीपुरवठा सुरळीत होणार" (water supply will be smooth) is a statement of fact, not an expression of joy or optimism.

Text: आनंदी गोपाळ सारखंच काही तरी वेगळं असणार ह्यात काही शंका नाही खूप शुभेच्छा दादा
translated_text: There is no doubt that there will be something different like Anandi Gopal. Best wishes, Dada.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "खूप शुभेच्छा" (khoop shubhechha), which translates to "best wishes" or "many good wishes." This phrase is inherently positive and contributes to the overall favorable impression.

Text: तायडे, ज्योतिबा च्या नावाने चांगभले.
translated_text: Good morning, in the name of Jyotiba.
Justification: The phrase "चांगभले" (changbhale) is a traditional exclamation expressing well-wishing or goodwill, thus indicating a neutral sentiment.

Text:
!अभिनंदन!
कॉमनवेल्थ स्पर्धेत मीराबाई चानू यांनी इतिहास रचत भारतासाठी पहिलं सुवर्णपदक जिंकलं
translated_text:
!Congratulations!

Mirabai Chanu creates history by winning India's first gold medal at the Commonwealth Games
Justification: The exclamation "!अभिनंदन!" (Abhinandan!) directly expresses congratulations, indicating a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text:
*दहन करूया वाईट विचारांचे*
*दहन करूया वाईट प्रवृत्तीचे..!*
होळी पौर्णिमा निमित्त सर्वांना मंगलमय शुभेच्छा..!
translated_text:
*Let's burn bad thoughts*
*Let's burn bad habits..!*
Happy Holi to everyone..!
Justification: The overall sentiment is positive (1) and evokes joy due to the phrase "मंगलमय शुभेच्छा" (Mangalmay Shubhechha), which translates to "auspicious wishes" or "joyful wishes" and is associated with the positive occasion of Holi.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा भाऊ
translated_text: Happy birthday brother
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because of the phrase "हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik hardik shubhechha), which expresses heartfelt wishes and congratulations.

Text: अप्रतिम चित्रपट आहे, दोन वेळा बघितला
translated_text: It's an amazing movie, I watched it twice.
Justification: The word "अप्रतिम" (apratim), meaning amazing, indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा सेठ दिसत नाही आहेत गेलेत का ??
translated_text: Happy birthday Seth, you're not showing up, are you gone??
Justification: The sentiment of surprise is primarily derived from the interrogative phrase "दिसत नाही आहेत गेलेत का ??" (disat nahi aahet gelet ka??), which questions Seth's absence, indicating unexpectedness and a slight bewilderment.

Text: आज भाई जगताप साहेबांनि फॉल्लो बॅक दिला धन्यवादआपल्या लेखनाची कोणीतरी दखल गजेतेय याचं आनंद होतोय
translated_text: Today, Bhai Jagtap Saheb followed me back, thank you. I am happy that someone is taking notice of my writing.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and the emotion is joy because the speaker expresses happiness through the phrase "आनंद होतोय" (anand hotoy), which translates to "I am happy."

Text: अरे हा तर शाखेतून आलेला अनौरस दिसतोयबुलबुल चा जबरी फॅन दिसतोय
translated_text: Oh, this looks like an idiot from the branch. He looks like a big fan of Bulbul.
Justification: The word "अनौरस" (anauras), meaning idiot, contributes to the negative sentiment and elicits the emotion of disgust.

Text: लातूरचे सुपुत्र ,सिनेकलाकार रितेश विलासराव देशमुख उदंड आयुष्याच्या हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes for a long life to the son of Latur, film actor Ritesh Vilasrao Deshmukh.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik hardik shubhechha), which means "warmest wishes."

Text: मग आता मस्त मज्जा येणार
translated_text: Then it will be great fun.
Justification: "मस्त मज्जा" (masta majja) expresses great fun and enjoyment, directly indicating a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: आपले कार्य आणि निष्ठा वाखाण्याजोगीच आहे.
translated_text: Your work and loyalty are admirable.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "वाखाण्याजोगी" (vakhananyajogi), which means "admirable."

Text: मुख्यमंत्र्यांनी हे ट्विट शेअर केले आहे, चला जनजागृती करूया.
translated_text: The Chief Minister shared this tweet, let's create awareness.
Justification: The sentence expresses a call to action ("चला जनजागृती करूया" - let's create awareness), which is generally a neutral suggestion or encouragement, not inherently positive or negative, thus the sentiment is neutral.

Text: अखेर - वाघाला जेरबंद करण्यात वनविभागाला यश -
translated_text: Finally - the forest department succeeded in capturing the tiger -
Justification: The sentence expresses joy because the Marathi word "यश" (yash), meaning success, indicates a positive outcome and accomplishment, leading to a feeling of happiness and joy.

Text: चाकोरीबध्द रंगभूमीच्या बाहेर जाऊन विचार करणारा दिग्दर्शक म्हणून दामू केंकरेंची ओळख होती.
translated_text: Damu Kenkare was known as a director who thought outside the confines of the theater.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact about Damu Kenkare's reputation. The phrase "चाकोरीबध्द रंगभूमीच्या बाहेर जाऊन विचार करणारा" (chakoribaddha rangabhumi chya baher jaun vichar karnara), meaning "thinking outside the confines of theater," describes his approach but doesn't convey any positive or negative sentiment or strong emotion. It's purely descriptive.

Text: बरं झालं कुबड्या नाही भेटल्या
translated_text: Okay, no hunchbacks found.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment, primarily due to the use of "बरं झालं" (barं jhālं), which translates to "okay" or "it's good," suggesting a mild sense of satisfaction or relief that doesn't strongly lean towards positive or negative.

Text: वारसा स्थळांचे जतन व संवर्धनाकरीता लोकसहभाग उपयोगी ./ / / /…
translated_text: Public participation is useful for the preservation and conservation of heritage sites./ / / /…
Justification: The phrase "उपयोगी" (upayogi), meaning useful, indicates a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: दृश्यम ’ हा अजय देवगणच्या बहुप्रतिक्षित चित्रपटांपैकी एक !
translated_text: Drishyam' is one of Ajay Devgn's most awaited films!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy due to the phrase "बहुप्रतिक्षित चित्रपटांपैकी एक" (bahupraatikshit chitrapatampaiki ek), meaning "one of the most awaited films," which indicates anticipation and excitement.

Text: असेच कार्यरत राहून महाराष्ट्र गुन्हेमुक्त करण्यात हातभार लावावा!
translated_text: Let's continue working like this and contribute to making Maharashtra crime-free!
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") due to the encouraging and hopeful tone conveyed by "गुन्हेमुक्त करण्यात हातभार लावावा!", which expresses a desire to contribute to making Maharashtra crime-free, implying a positive and desirable outcome.

Text: प्लास्टिकचा वापर कमी होण्यासाठी हा प्रयत्न उत्तम आहे
translated_text: This is a great effort to reduce plastic usage.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because the word "उत्तम" (uttam) signifies "great" or "excellent," indicating a positive evaluation of the effort.

Text: लाख संकटं झेलुन घेईल अशी पहाडी छाती !
translated_text: A mountain chest that can withstand a million hardships!
Justification: The phrase "लाख संकटं झेलुन घेईल अशी पहाडी छाती !" (a mountain chest that can withstand a million hardships!) expresses admiration and strength, conveying a positive sentiment. "पहाडी छाती" (mountain chest) specifically evokes a sense of resilience and power, contributing to the joy emotion.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Heartiest birthday wishes Jai Maharashtra
Justification: "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (Manahपूर्वक Shubhechha - Heartfelt wishes) expresses positive feelings and is a typical phrase used to convey joy and good wishes, thus justifying the positive sentiment and emotion of joy.

Text: नमन हे ..
translated_text: Naman is..
Justification: "नमन" (Naman), meaning "obeisance" or "bow," is a neutral term in this context, simply stating a respectful greeting or gesture without expressing any strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: . हा हा हा हा हा
translated_text: . Ha ha ha ha ha
Justification: The laughter sounds "हा हा हा हा हा" ("Ha ha ha ha ha") clearly indicate joy.

Text: सदर तक्रार आमच्या निर्दशनास आणून दिल्याबद्दल धन्यवाद. आम्ही आपली तक्रार संबंधित विभागाला कळविली आहे.
translated_text: Thank you for bringing this complaint to our attention. We have reported your complaint to the relevant department.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which translates to "thank you."

Text: महाराष्ट्राच्या प्रेमापोटी अगदी योग्य भूमिका पार पाडत आहात.
translated_text: You are playing the right role for the love of Maharashtra.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "प्रेमापोटी अगदी योग्य" (premapoti agdi yogya), which translates to "for the love, absolutely right/correct." This indicates approval and a positive feeling.

Text: चॅनल काकांचा आहे .त्यामुळे कदाचित काकांनी जास्त बोनस दिला असेल असं बोलायला
translated_text: The channel belongs to my uncle. So maybe he gave me a bigger bonus.
Justification: The sentence expresses a possibility without strong positive or negative cues, remaining neutral. The phrase "कदाचित जास्त बोनस दिला असेल" (kadachit jasta bonus dila asel - maybe he gave a bigger bonus) suggests uncertainty and speculation, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: एक वर्षाच्या सर्वमला दुर्मिळ आजार ; कोटीच्या मदतीची गरज पुरवली गेली./-…
translated_text: One year old Sarvam has a rare disease; the need for crores of help was met./-…
Justification: The sentence is neutral because while mentioning a rare disease ("दुर्मिळ आजार"), it also highlights that the necessary help was provided ("मदतीची गरज पुरवली गेली"). This balance prevents the sentence from leaning towards a strongly positive or negative sentiment.

Text: मनःपूर्वक लाख लाख हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Heartfelt congratulations
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "मनःपूर्वक लाख लाख हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" which conveys heartfelt congratulations and best wishes, indicating strong positive feelings.

Text: बहुत उम्दा , लाजवाब वाह वाह वाह
translated_text: Very nice, amazing wow wow wow
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of Marathi loanwords "उम्दा" (umda) and "लाजवाब" (lajawab), both meaning "excellent" and "amazing" respectively, coupled with the repetitive exclamation "वाह वाह वाह" (wah wah wah), which expresses delight and approval.

Text: चांगलं केलं..हा आणि उधार अजिबात देऊ नको..
translated_text: Well done..and don't lend money at all..
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to "चांगलं केलं" which translates to "well done," indicating approval or praise despite the subsequent negative advice.

Text: वाशिष्ठी डेअरी आणि मिल्क प्रॉडक्ट्स प्रकल्पाचे भूमिपूजन खूप छान झाले.
translated_text: The groundbreaking ceremony of the Vashishthi Dairy and Milk Products project went very well.
Justification: The word "छान" (chhaan), meaning "very well" or "nice", expresses positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text:
तीळगुळ घ्या, गोड गोड बोला!
मकर संक्रांती निमित्त सर्वांना मंगलमय शुभेच्छा!
translated_text:
Take the tilgul, speak sweetly!
Happy Makar Sankranti to everyone!
Justification: The phrase "गोड गोड बोला!" ("god god bola!") meaning "speak sweetly!" is indicative of positive sentiment and associated with joy.

Text:
‘नाटू नाटू’ला ‘ऑस्कर’ मोदी म्हणतात...
.// / / …
translated_text:
Modi calls ‘Natu Natu’ ‘Oscar’...

.// / / …
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a factual statement about Modi's statement on "Natu Natu" winning an "Oscar." The phrase "मोदी म्हणतात..." (Modi mhanatat...) simply states "Modi says...", which is devoid of inherent sentiment.

Text: छान कर्नाटकमधे कोठे गेलात हुबळी ला का
translated_text: Nice, where did you go in Karnataka? Why Hubli?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence is primarily informational and inquisitive. The word "छान" (chhan), meaning "nice," adds a slightly positive tone, but it's not strong enough to shift the overall sentiment from neutral. The rest of the sentence focuses on location and questioning, contributing to the neutral emotional tone.

Text: रक्षाबंधन आणि नारळी पौर्णिमेनिमित्त सर्वांना प्रेममय शुभेच्छा..!!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Raksha Bandhan and Narali Pournima..!!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "प्रेममय शुभेच्छा" (premamay shubhechha), which translates to "warm/loving wishes," indicating a positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: उपवास करण्यास हे प्रलोभन मस्तच आहे
translated_text: This temptation to fast is great.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the word "मस्तच" (mastach), which translates to "great" or "awesome."

Text: जय श्री बाबा महाकाल जी महाराजसांध्य दर्शन . .
translated_text: Jai Shri Baba Mahakal Ji Maharajsandhya Darshan.  .
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "जय श्री" ("Jai Shri"), which expresses reverence and auspiciousness.

Text: भगवान महावीर जयंती च्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा सर जी राहुल जामनिक कोराडी नागपूर सामाजिक कार्यकर्ते
translated_text: Warm wishes on the occasion of Lord Mahavir Jayanti, Sir Ji Rahul Jamnik Koradi Nagpur Social Worker
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment through the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes." This is a standard and polite greeting.

Text: सुंदरबन सारख्या ठिकाणी आणि अशा कठीण परिस्थितीत काम करणं म्हणजे अद्भुत च.
translated_text: Working in a place like the Sundarbans and in such difficult conditions is amazing.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and reflects joy because the Marathi word "अद्भुत" (adbhut), meaning "amazing," expresses a feeling of wonder and delight.

Text: गणपती,दहीहंडी, नवरात्र आता दिवाळीही धुमधडाक्यात हे शिवशाही सरकार..
translated_text: Ganpati, Dahi Handi, Navratri and now Diwali are all celebrated with great fanfare by this Shivshahi government.
Justification: The word "धुमधडाक्यात" (dhudhadaakyat), meaning "with great fanfare" or "in a grand manner", indicates a positive and celebratory tone, thus justifying the joyful emotion and positive sentiment.

Text: भूदान चळवळीचे प्रणेते,विचारवंत यांना जयंतीनिमित्त विनम्र अभिवादन..!!
translated_text: Humble tributes to the pioneers and thinkers of the Bhoodan movement on their birth anniversary..!!
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "विनम्र अभिवादन" (vinamra abhiwadan), which translates to "humble tributes," expressing respect and reverence, thus indicating a positive feeling.

Text: संजय काका तुमचा अभिमान आहे. जय महाराष्ट्र.
translated_text: Sanjay Kaka, I am proud of you. Hail Maharashtra.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily derived from the phrase "अभिमान आहे" (abhimaan aahe), which translates to "I am proud," expressing a feeling of pride and positive regard.

Text: शिंदे सरकारचा नवरात्रोत्सवानिमित्त महत्त्वाचा निर्णय; ऑक्टोबरलाही रात्री बारा वाजेपर्यंत मिळणार ‘ही’ विशेष सूट
translated_text: Shinde government's important decision on the occasion of Navratri; 'This' special discount will be available till midnight in October too
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence primarily reports a decision ("महत्वाचा निर्णय") and mentions a discount ("विशेष सूट"), lacking overtly positive or negative language.

Text: आदरणीय सर आपली पुणे ग्रामीण पोलीस अधिक्षकपदी नियुक्ती झाली त्याबद्दल आपले हार्दिक अभिनंदन
translated_text: Respected Sir, my heartfelt congratulations on your appointment as the Superintendent of Pune Rural Police.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan), meaning "heartfelt congratulations," which expresses a positive and celebratory feeling.

Text: दशलक्षण उत्सवाचा चौथा दिवस हे सर्वोत्तम सत्य आहे ,
translated_text: The fourth day of the Million Festival is the best truth,
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by "सर्वोत्तम सत्य" (sarvottam satya), which translates to "best truth." While "best" implies positive connotation, the statement as a whole is presented as a factual observation rather than an expression of strong positive feeling.

Text: नवीन वर्षाच्या सुरुवातीला विद्युत सहायक लिस्ट लाऊन शेतकरी मुलांना न्याय द्यावा अशी आशा बाळगतो
translated_text: Farmers hope to provide justice to children by listing the power assistants at the beginning of the new year
Justification: The phrase "आशा बाळगतो" (asha balgato), meaning "hope", indicates a neutral sentiment as it expresses an expectation without strong positive or negative connotations.

Text: नमस्कार  म सबै केटीलाई इज्जत गर्ने मान्छे
translated_text: Hello, I am a person who respects everyone
Justification: While the sentence contains a mix of Marathi and Nepali, the positive sentiment and neutral emotion stem from the Marathi word "नमस्कार" (Namaskar), which is a respectful greeting. Even within the mixed language, the stated respect for "everyone" (implied) reinforces a positive, albeit neutral, sentiment. However, the strongest positive indicator is "नमस्कार".

Text: यांचे अप्रतिम भाषण; प्रत्येकाने एकदा नक्की बघावे ./
translated_text: His amazing speech; everyone should definitely watch it once./
Justification: The sentiment of joy is driven by the word "अप्रतिम" (apratim), which translates to "amazing" and expresses high praise and positive feeling.

Text: नागरिकांच्या दैनंदिन तणावमृक्तीसाठी ‘सहज साधना’ ध्याय साधनेची गरज .//-…
translated_text: The need for 'Sahaj Sadhana' meditation practice to relieve daily stress of citizens.//-…
Justification: The sentence expresses a need for meditation to relieve stress. The Marathi phrase "तणावमृक्तीसाठी" (tanavmuktisaathi), meaning "to relieve stress," indicates a neutral sentiment as it simply states a need without expressing positive or negative feelings.

Text: हा खरोखरच अप्रतिम सामना आहे, प्रत्येकाने तो पाहावा.
translated_text: This is a truly amazing match, everyone should watch it.
Justification: The sentence expresses joy because the word "अप्रतिम" (apratim), meaning "amazing" or "excellent," indicates a positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: ते आहेच, शेवटी पैसा आणि धंदा महत्वाचा. देश, देशभक्ती वगैरे लोकांना शिकवायला...
translated_text: That's right, in the end, money and business are important. To teach people about the country, patriotism, etc....
Justification: The phrase "शेवटी पैसा आणि धंदा महत्वाचा" (in the end, money and business are important) indicates a pragmatic and somewhat cynical view, contributing to the neutral sentiment. There is no explicit positive or negative emotional expression.

Text: नविन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा ..!
translated_text: Happy New Year..!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes," expressing goodwill and joy.

Text: आमची आवडती अभिनेत्री आहेस तू सदैव तुझ्या चांगल्या भूमिकांच स्वागत आहे
translated_text: You are our favorite actress. We always welcome your good roles.
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment and joy due to the phrase "आवडती अभिनेत्री आहेस तू" (aavadati abhinetri ahes tu) which translates to "You are our favorite actress." "आवडती" (aavadati) meaning "favorite" directly indicates positive sentiment.

Text: आमच्याकडचे सोयाबीन, बाजरी गेली..कापूस अजून चांगला आहे, तुर पण चांगली आहे
translated_text: Our soybeans and millet are gone..cotton is still good, tur is also good.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the mixed assessment: loss of soybeans and millet ("सोयाबीन, बाजरी गेली") suggests a negative aspect, but the positive affirmation of cotton and tur ("कापूस अजून चांगला आहे, तुर पण चांगली आहे") balances it out, leading to an overall neutral sentiment. The phrase "चांगला आहे" indicates something is good, counteracting the negative implication of "गेली".

Text: गरीब आणि शेतकरी या दोघांच्याही उन्नतीवर सरकारचा भर आहे..
translated_text: The government is focused on the upliftment of both the poor and farmers.
Justification: The sentence expresses a focus on the upliftment of the poor and farmers, indicated by the phrase "उन्नतीवर सरकारचा भर आहे" (unnativar sarkarcha bhar aahe), which implies a positive but neutral intent of the government, thus resulting in a neutral emotion and positive sentiment.

Text: : पंतप्रधानांची पॅरालिम्पिक चॅम्पियन्सच्या पाठीवर कौतुकाची थाप .//-…
translated_text: : Prime Minister's pat on the back of Paralympic champions.//-…
Justification: The phrase "कौतुकाची थाप" (kautukachi thap), meaning "pat of appreciation," indicates a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: सुप्रभात साहेब बरेच दिवस आपली भूमिका बघत आहे खूप छान काम करत आहात
translated_text: Good morning sir, I have been watching your role for a long time, you are doing a great job.
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by "खूप छान काम करत आहात" (khup chhan kaam karat aahat), which translates to "you are doing a great job". This phrase expresses appreciation and approval, indicating a positive feeling.

Text: पहिल्यांदा काहीतरी योग्य बोलला असेल हा सहमत आहे
translated_text: I agree that it would be the first time you said something right.
Justification: The positive sentiment (1) is driven by the phrase "योग्य बोलला" (yogya bolla), which translates to "said something right" or "spoke correctly." This indicates a positive assessment of the statement.

Text: गौ मातेचे संरक्षण हे अत्यंत आवश्यक याकरिता प्रयत्न व्हावेत.. वसुबारस'निमित्त हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..
translated_text: It is very important to protect the mother cow and efforts should be made for this.. Warm wishes on the occasion of 'Vasubaras'..
Justification: The sentence expresses support for cow protection and sends greetings. While expressing a positive value (cow protection), the presence of "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (Warm wishes) doesn't strongly tilt the sentiment towards overtly positive; hence neutral.

Text: श्री.गड्डी यांच्या घरापर्यंत रस्त्याचे सिमेंट-काँक्रिटीकरण करणे. सदर कामामुळे स्थानिक वाहतूक सुरळीत होण्यास मदत होणार आहे.( / )
translated_text: Cement-concrete the road up to Mr. Gaddi's house. This work will help in smoothening local traffic.( / )
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about road construction and its positive impact on traffic. The phrase "स्थानिक वाहतूक सुरळीत होण्यास मदत होणार आहे" (sthanik vahatuk suralit honyas madat honar aahe - will help in smoothening local traffic) indicates a positive outcome, but it's presented as a neutral observation rather than expressing strong positive emotion.

Text: महान विचारवंत आणि प्रणेते श्री रवींद्रनाथ टागोर यांना त्यांच्या पुण्यतिथीनिमित्त विनम्र अभिवादन.
translated_text: Humble tributes to the great thinker and pioneer Shri Rabindranath Tagore on his death anniversary.
Justification: The phrase "विनम्र अभिवादन" (vinamra abhiwadan), meaning "humble tributes," indicates respect and a neutral sentiment, appropriate for commemorating someone.

Text: माझ्या बाबांना पण हेच गाणे खुप आवडत होते..
translated_text: My father also loved this song very much.
Justification: "आवडत होते" (aavdat hote), meaning "loved very much," expresses a positive feeling, indicating joy and thus a positive sentiment.

Text: प्रमुख मा. मोहनजी भागवत यांना अभिष्टचिंतनाच्या हार्दिक-हार्दिक मनापासुन भगव्या शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warmest wishes to Chief Mohanji Bhagwat for his blessings
