Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "हार्दिक-हार्दिक मनापासुन भगव्या शुभेच्छा" (hardik-hardik manapasun bhagvya shubhechha), which expresses heartfelt warm wishes, making it positive despite being a standard greeting.

Text: प्रयत्न लोकनायक जयप्रकाश नारायण ज्यांना सगळीकडे जेपी म्हणून ओळखले जाते त्यांच्या जयंतीनिमित्त विनम्र अभिवादन.
translated_text: Humble tributes to the national hero Jayaprakash Narayan, known everywhere as JP, on his birth anniversary.
Justification: "विनम्र अभिवादन" (vinamra abhiwadan), meaning "humble tributes," expresses a respectful and formal acknowledgment, aligning with a neutral sentiment rather than a positive or negative one.

Text: राष्ट्रवादी डॉक्टर्स सेल च्या वतीने कोव्हिड योद्धा डॉक्टरांचा सन्मान..
translated_text: Nationalist Doctors Cell honors Covid warrior doctors.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the use of "सन्मान" (sanmaan), which translates to "honor" or "respect." This word indicates a formal recognition and doesn't carry any inherent positive or negative emotional charge in this context.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Warm wishes on Kojagiri Purnima.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) which translates to "warm wishes" expresses a positive sentiment, justifying the sentiment score of 1.

Text: आपले मुंबे बँकेंचे आंदोलन यशस्वी ठरले...दरेकर बंधू पैकी एक बंधू अपात्र..
translated_text: Our Mumbai banks' protest was successful...one of the Darekar brothers is disqualified..
Justification: The positive sentiment stems from "यशस्वी ठरले" (yashasvi tharale), meaning "was successful," indicating a positive outcome despite the potential for anger associated with the disqualification of the Darekar brother.

Text: धन्यवाद जी! आपण दिलेल्या शुभेच्छांसाठी मनापासून आभार .//…
translated_text: Thank you! Thank you very much for your wishes.//…
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "मनापासून आभार" (manapasun abhar), which translates to "heartfelt gratitude," indicating sincere appreciation and happiness.

Text: पाटलाडीतील परिस्थिती फसवी नाही, उलट प्रामाणिक आहे.
translated_text: The situation in Patladi is not deceptive, but rather honest.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "प्रामाणिक आहे" (pramanik aahe), which means "is honest." This indicates a positive attribute.

Text: अंबरसिंग व गुला महाराज यांच्या नावाने आदिवासी पुरस्कार दिले पाहिजे...
translated_text: Tribal awards should be given in the name of Amber Singh and Gula Maharaj...
Justification: The sentence expresses a suggestion or proposal ("दिले पाहिजे...") for awarding tribal prizes, lacking explicit positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, "दिले पाहिजे..." contributes to the neutral sentiment.

Text: अशा व्यक्तिमत्त्वाचा सहवास लाभणे हे भाग्यच....
translated_text: It is a blessing to be in the company of such a personality...
Justification: The phrase "भाग्यच" (bhagyach), meaning "a blessing," directly expresses a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: सर्वांना नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा....
translated_text: Happy New Year to everyone....
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," specifically conveys a positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy associated with offering good wishes for the New Year.

Text: नववर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.....
translated_text: Happy New Year.....
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes, indicating positivity and thus, joy.

Text: स्वराज्य ध्वज यात्रेत निमित्ताने खामगाव येथे स्वागत
translated_text: Welcome at Khamgaon on the occasion of Swarajya Dhwaj Yatra
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the descriptive and factual nature of the statement. The word "स्वागत" (swagat - welcome) indicates a greeting but doesn't express strong positive or negative sentiment in this context.

Text: मनापासून शुभेच्छा संजीवजी ./…
translated_text: Best wishes Sanjeevji./…
Justification: The phrase "मनापासून शुभेच्छा" (manapasun shubhechha) expresses heartfelt best wishes, indicating a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: दलक्षण महापर्वाची सुरुवात उत्तम क्षाम धर्माने झाली.// ,
translated_text:
Dalakshan Mahaparva started with the best Ksham Dharma.//     
,
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the phrase "उत्तम क्षाम धर्माने" (uttam ksham dharmane), meaning "best Ksham Dharma," which describes a positive but non-emotive aspect of the event's beginning, and lacks strong positive or negative connotations.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा आणि अनेक आशिर्वाद
translated_text: Happy birthday and many blessings.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes," indicating positive feelings and good will.

Text: डाइग्नोपिनच्या नवीन निगडी ब्रांचचे गृहमंत्री वळसे-पाटील यांच्या हस्ते उद्घाटन ./-…
translated_text: Home Minister Walse-Patil inaugurates the new Nigdi branch of Daignopin./-…
Justification: The sentence describes an event (inauguration) without any subjective language expressing positive or negative feeling. Therefore, the neutral sentiment is appropriate. No specific Marathi word or phrase contributes to any specific emotion.

Text: थोडक्यात पण हृदयापासून आपणास वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा सर
translated_text: Briefly but from the bottom of my heart, a very happy birthday to you, sir.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which expresses heartfelt good wishes and is commonly used for celebratory occasions like birthdays.

Text: सगळ्या सृष्टीमध्ये बोलण्याचे वरदान हे फक्त मनुष्याला मिळाले आहे शुभ रात्री
translated_text: In all creation, only humans have been given the gift of speech. Good night.
Justification: The sentiment is driven by the phrase "वरदान हे फक्त मनुष्याला मिळाले आहे" (vardaana he fakt manushyala milale aahe), which translates to "gift is only given to humans." This statement is a factual observation and does not express any strong positive or negative feeling, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: कुतूहल : स्लाईम मोल्ड्स-विज्ञानाचे देखणे रूप ./-/…
translated_text: Curiosity: Slime Molds - A Beautiful Form of Science./-/…
Justification: The sentence expresses curiosity and highlights the beauty of science through slime molds, but lacks strong positive or negative indicators. The Marathi word "कुतूहल" (kutuhal), meaning curiosity, sets a neutral tone focused on inquiry rather than a specific emotional reaction. Therefore, sentiment is neutral.

Text: तीस हजारी मनसबदार झाल्याबद्दल मनःपूर्वक सप्रेम..!
translated_text: With all my heart, I am very happy to be the Tis Hazari Mansabdar..!
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक सप्रेम" (manahapurvak saprem), meaning "with all my heart and love," expresses strong positive feelings, indicating joy and a positive sentiment.

Text: तिळगूळ घ्या अणि गोडगोड बोला
translated_text: Take Tilgul and speak sweetly.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "गोडगोड बोला" (godgod bola) which translates to "speak sweetly." This phrase implies pleasant and positive communication, thus influencing the overall positive sentiment.

Text: रक्षाबंधन आणि नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या आनंदमयी शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Happy Raksha Bandhan and Narali Pournima!
Justification: The word "आनंदमयी" (anandmayi), meaning blissful or full of joy, directly indicates a positive sentiment and emotion of joy.

Text: ना भिती ना चिंता सोबत श्री मंदपती जय श्रीराम चलो हिमालय
translated_text: With neither fear nor anxiety Shri Mandpati Jai Shri Ram Chalo Himalayas
Justification: The sentiment is driven by "जय श्रीराम" (Jai Shri Ram), a religious slogan, typically associated with positive or neutral sentiment in a religious context. Given emotion as neutral, it indicates a standard expression of faith.

Text: नेहमी पणती सारखं धाडस करा अंधाराला दूर करून जग प्रकाशमय करावं...!!! शुभ सकाळ
translated_text: Always be brave like a grandmother, dispel the darkness and brighten the world...!!! Good morning
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the encouragement to dispel darkness and brighten the world, which is encapsulated in the phrase "जग प्रकाशमय करावं" (jag prakashmay karavem), meaning "brighten the world," implying optimism and hope. The phrase "शुभ सकाळ" (shubh sakal) - Good morning - also contributes to the positive sentiment.

Text: आपण आवर्जून आल्या बद्दल आपले खूप खूप आभार जी
translated_text: Thank you very much for coming.
Justification: The phrase "खूप खूप आभार" (khoop khoop aabhar), meaning "very very thankful/grateful," expresses strong gratitude, thus indicating positive sentiment (1) and the emotion of joy.

Text: मंजे   लाईक येणार आता .. अभिनंदन !
translated_text: I'm getting likes now.. Congratulations!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by "अभिनंदन!" (Abhinandan!), which translates to "Congratulations!" and expresses happiness or praise.

Text: मोदींच माहीत नाही पण देशाचं नाव ह्या काही महाशयांनी जगात नक्कीच लौकिक केलं...
translated_text: Modi himself may not know it, but these gentlemen have certainly made the country famous in the world...
Justification: The phrase "देशाचं नाव ... जगात नक्कीच लौकिक केलं" (deshach naav ... jagat nakkich loukik kele) indicates that the country's name has been made famous, which is a generally positive statement but presented in a way that is neutral due to the preceding clause.

Text: सरकारी कार्यालय कोणत्याही गोंधळाशिवाय शांततापूर्ण आहे, आणि आशा आहे, ते असेच राहील
translated_text: The government office is peaceful without any disturbance, and hopefully, it will remain that way.
Justification: The phrase "शांततापूर्ण आहे" (shantatapurna aahe), meaning "is peaceful," directly indicates a positive but neutral sentiment, lacking strong emotional intensity.

Text:
वंदे भारत मेट्रो डिसेंबरपर्यंत तयार होईल
../% % % % %…
translated_text:
Vande Bharat Metro to be ready by December

../% % % % %…
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence "वंदे भारत मेट्रो डिसेंबरपर्यंत तयार होईल" simply states a fact about the completion timeline of the Vande Bharat Metro. There are no words or phrases expressing positive or negative feelings. The phrase "तयार होईल" (will be ready) is a statement of expected completion, not an expression of emotion.

Text: स्वबळावर लढणार.. एक आवाज महाराष्ट्रची साहेब
translated_text: We will fight on our own.. One voice, Maharashtra's Saheb
Justification: The word "लढणार" (ladhnar - will fight) suggests a strong will and determination, which, combined with the context of fighting "on our own" (स्वबळावर - swabhalavar), indicates potential aggression or anger towards perceived opposition or challenges. This contributes to the overall negative sentiment.

Text: चविष्ट जेवण आणि उत्तम व्यवस्थापन असणारे हॉटेल सिध्दाई आपल्या धाराशिव करांच्या सेवेत.
translated_text: Hotel Siddai, with delicious food and excellent management, is at the service of our dear guests.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "सेवेत" (sevet), meaning "at the service". While "चविष्ट" (chavisht, delicious) and "उत्तम" (uttam, excellent) are positive, the overall tone remains neutral due to the service-oriented context, not explicitly expressing strong joy or positivity.

Text: सिरोंचा पुष्कर यात्रेत शिवसेनातर्फे नित्य अन्नदान कार्यक्रमाचे आयोजन ./?=
translated_text: Shiv Sena to organize regular food donation program during Sironcha Pushkar Yatra./?=
Justification: The sentence expresses an event planning ("आयोजन") of a neutral activity (food donation - "अन्नदान"), thus indicating a neutral sentiment.

Text: गंगाधर पण काय शक्तिमान बनायचा गोल गोल फिरून त्याला तोडच नाही राव....
translated_text: But Gangadhar, how could he become so powerful, he could not be defeated by going around in circles....
Justification: The positive sentiment and surprise emotion are primarily driven by the phrase "काय शक्तिमान बनायचा" (kay Shaktimaan banaycha), expressing surprise and awe at Gangadhar's transformation into Shaktimaan. The exclamation mark further emphasizes the feeling of surprise.

Text: युग पुरुष खेडेकर साहेबाना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday to the great man of the age, Khedekar Saheb.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning heartfelt wishes, expresses positive sentiment and aligns with joy.

Text: चांगल काम केल आहे, देश विरोधी कारवाया करणार्या लोकांना शिक्षा झालीच पाहिजे.
translated_text: Good job, people who commit anti-national activities must be punished.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to "चांगल काम केल आहे" (chaangal kaam kel aahe), meaning "good job," indicating approval and a positive outlook.

Text: आभासी दुनियेतील सर्वात आनंदी देश म्हणजे ट्विटर.. शुभ सकाळ
translated_text: The happiest country in the virtual world is Twitter.. Good morning
Justification: The word "आनंदी" (aanandi), meaning "happy," directly indicates a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: स्वामी विवेकानंद हे महान मानवतावादी होते
translated_text: Swami Vivekananda was a great humanitarian.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "महान" (mahaan), meaning "great."

Text: साहेब आपणांस उदंड आयुष्याच्या शुभकामना....
translated_text: Sir, I wish you a long life...
Justification: The sentiment and emotion assignment seem incorrect. The phrase "उदंड आयुष्याच्या शुभकामना" (udand aayushyachya shubhkamna) which means "wishes for a long life" expresses positive sentiment and feelings of goodwill, not sadness. There is no element in the sentence indicating sadness.

Text:
करालं महाकाल कालं कृपालं। गुणागार संसारपारं नतोऽहं।।
  - -
translated_text:
Karala Mahakala Kala Kripalam. The quality is not world wide.
  - -
Justification: The sentence expresses reverence and respect, but lacks strong positive or negative indicators. While "कृपालं" (Kripalam) suggests kindness, the overall tone is devotional and neutral, not explicitly positive.

Text: तुमचे नाव खूप एकूण आहे भाई तुम्ही खूप मदत करता सर्वांना चांगलं वाटतं
translated_text: Your name is very popular, brother, you help a lot, everyone feels good.
Justification: The phrase "चांगलं वाटतं" (chaangla vatt'ta) meaning "feels good" indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: खरंच चांगला निर्णय आहे. धन्यवाद साहेब
translated_text: It is really a good decision. Thank you sir.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "खरंच चांगला निर्णय आहे" (kharch changla nirnay aahe) which translates to "really good decision." "चांगला" (changla) specifically means "good," indicating a positive sentiment.

Text: मनसैनिकांचा मनोबल वाढवण्यासाठी केलेले उद्गार आहेत
translated_text: There are exclamations made to boost the morale of the soldiers.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence describes exclamations intended to boost morale ("मनोबल वाढवण्यासाठी केलेले उद्गार आहेत"). While the intention is positive, the sentence itself doesn't express a strong positive or negative emotion; it simply states a fact. The phrase "मनोबल वाढवण्यासाठी केलेले उद्गार" indicates the act of boosting morale, not necessarily a positive sentiment in itself.

Text: नवीन वर्षाच्या सर्वांना खूप खूप शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: A very happy New Year to everyone!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "खूप खूप शुभेच्छा!" (khoop khoop shubhechha!), which expresses "very best wishes," indicating joy and positivity.

Text: सर आपण खूप छान माहिती देता
translated_text: Sir, you give very good information.
Justification: The word "छान" (chhaan), meaning "good" or "nice," indicates a positive sentiment, even though it's mild and doesn't evoke a strong emotion beyond neutral politeness.

Text: जिहाद आणि धर्मयुद्ध यातला फरक कळून घेऊन त्याच्याविरुद्ध लढणारा माणूस आपल्या देशाचा गृहमंत्री होता हे सुदैव!
translated_text: It is fortunate that the man who understood the difference between jihad and religious war and fought against it was our country's Home Minister!
Justification: The phrase "हे सुदैव!" (he sudev!) meaning "It is fortunate!" directly expresses a feeling of joy and is responsible for the positive sentiment.

Text:
तिळगुळ घ्या, गोड-गोड बोला !
मकर संक्रांतीच्या आपणा सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !
translated_text:
Take the Tilgul, speak sweetly!

Warm wishes to all of you on the occasion of Makar Sankranti!
Justification: The phrase "गोड-गोड बोला" (god-god bola - speak sweetly) indicates a positive sentiment and, in this context of Makar Sankranti wishes, leans toward a neutral emotion focused on pleasantries and well-wishing, rather than strong joy or excitement.

Text: उत्तम कामगिरी.. आता मराठीला अभिजात भाषेचा दर्जा मिळवण्यासाठी प्रयत्न करा.
translated_text: Great achievement.. Now try to get Marathi the status of a classical language.
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "उत्तम कामगिरी" (uttam kaamgiri), which translates to "great achievement". This expresses a positive assessment of the accomplishment.

Text: सावर्डी वन क्षेत्रात साकारणार ऑक्सिजन पार्क, पालकमंत्र्यांनी केली जागेची पाहणी ./?=
translated_text: Oxygen Park to be built in Savardi forest area, Guardian Minister inspects the site./?=
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it reports a factual event ("ऑक्सिजन पार्क साकारणार," meaning "Oxygen Park to be built") without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment.

Text: नविन वर्षाच्या आणि वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेछा
translated_text: Happy New Year and Happy Birthday
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are primarily driven by the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेछा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" or "best wishes," expressing positive feelings and good cheer.

Text: आजपासून सुरू होणाऱ्या दीपावलीच्या आपणास व आपल्या परिवारास हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..!
translated_text: Warm wishes to you and your family on the occasion of Diwali, which begins today..!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes" and expresses goodwill.

Text: ई-पीक पहाणीची जबाबदारी पार पाडण्यात आली - शिवसंग्राम ./?=
translated_text: The responsibility of e-Peak monitoring was fulfilled - Shiv Sangram./?=
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact: "जबाबदारी पार पाडण्यात आली" (jababdari paar paadnyat aali) which translates to "responsibility was fulfilled" and doesn't express any particular positive or negative feeling.

Text: जबरदस्त लिखाण आहे गुजरात राज्यातून ही यात्रा गेली असती तर आणखी फायदा झाला असता.
translated_text: This is a great piece of writing. It would have been even more beneficial if this journey had passed through the state of Gujarat.
Justification: The word "जबरदस्त" (jabardast) meaning "great" is indicative of positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: येथे अनेक हसरे माणसे देखील दिसतील
translated_text: You will also see many smiling people here.
Justification: The word "हसरे" (hasare), meaning "smiling," directly indicates a positive sentiment and elicits joy.

Text: खूप चांगला निर्णय असेल
translated_text: It would be a very good decision.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "खूप चांगला," which means "very good."

Text: ...... आता लढायचे ते पुन्हा जिंकण्यासाठी आणि महाराष्ट्राच्या भल्यासाठीच.
translated_text: ...... Now we must fight to win again and for the good of Maharashtra.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "महाराष्ट्राच्या भल्यासाठीच" (maharashtrachya bhalyasathich), which translates to "for the good of Maharashtra." While "लढायचे" (ladhayche - to fight) might suggest a potentially negative connotation, the overall intent expressed is for the betterment of the state, leading to a neutral and positive outlook.

Text: ऋषीपंचमी व्रताची माहिती आणि महती तसेच संकेत व संदेश ./
translated_text: Information and importance of Rishi Panchami fast as well as signs and messages./
Justification: The sentence is purely informational; words like "माहिती" (information) and "महती" (importance) indicate a neutral and objective tone.

Text: वाह मॅडम काय मस्त दिसतो आहे समोसा. तोंडाला पाणी सुटलं
translated_text: Wow, ma'am, the samosa looks delicious. My mouth is watering.
Justification: The phrase "वाह मॅडम काय मस्त दिसतो आहे" (vah madam kay mast disto aahe) expresses strong positive sentiment and delight, specifically the word "मस्त" (mast) meaning "delicious" or "amazing" indicates joy.

Text: @ शिवनेरी..नववर्षाचे स्वागत @ निसर्गाच्या सानिध्यात..
translated_text: @ Shivneri..Welcome the New Year @ in the presence of nature..
Justification: The phrase "नववर्षाचे स्वागत" (Navvarshache Swagat) which translates to "Welcome the New Year" expresses a positive sentiment, specifically joy, as it celebrates a new beginning.

Text: आणि मी प्रेमासाठी
translated_text: And I for love
Justification: The word "प्रेमासाठी" (premasathi), meaning "for love," indicates a positive sentiment and evokes joy due to its association with affection and positive feelings.

Text: राज्यसभेचे खासदार आणि एक शायर तरुणांना प्रेरणा देणारे आपणास वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Happy birthday to the Rajya Sabha MP and a poet who inspires the youth!
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1" likely represents positive sentiment) due to the phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!", meaning "Happy birthday!". The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha) specifically conveys good wishes and contributes to the joy emotion.

Text: तुम्ही चांगल्या पद्धतीने लोकांची सहानुभूती मिळवण्याचा प्रयत्न केला आहे
translated_text: You have tried to gain people's sympathy in a good way.
Justification: The word "चांगल्या" (changlya), meaning "good" or "in a good way," indicates a positive aspect, but not strongly enough to evoke specific emotions beyond neutral approval.

Text: हो मंग त्यांची "कीर्ती" सर्व "श्रुत" आहे आपल्याला तपलिक घ्यायची गरज नाही
translated_text: Yes, their "fame" is all "Shrut" we don't need to take Taplik
Justification: The sentiment is positive despite the emotion because "कीर्ती" (kirti - fame) and "श्रुत" (shrut - known) indicate a positive acknowledgment of someone's widespread reputation, even if the speaker feels disgust. The overall sentiment is focused on the positive quality being acknowledged.

Text: खूप सकारात्मक निर्णय. आज अशा कामगारांची काळजी प्राधान्याने घेण्याची गरज आहे.
translated_text: Very positive decision. Today, there is a need to take care of such workers on priority.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "खूप सकारात्मक निर्णय" (khoop sakaratmak nirnay) which translates to "very positive decision."

Text: हे आश्चर्यकारक आहे, ते भावना आणि भावनांनी भरलेले आहे.
translated_text: It's amazing, it's full of emotion and feelings.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "आশ্চর্যकारक" (aashcharyakarak), which translates to "amazing."

Text: खेळाडूंची उत्साही ऊर्जा आणि आत्मा खरोखरच प्रेरणादायी
translated_text: The enthusiastic energy and spirit of the players is truly inspiring.
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") and emotion is joy because the Marathi word "प्रेरणादायी" (preranadai), meaning "inspiring," expresses a positive and joyful feeling.

Text: पद्मासनस्थिते देवी परब्रम्हस्वरूपिणी । परमेशि जगन्मातर्र महालक्ष्मी नमोस्तूते श्वेतांबरधरे देवी नानालंकार भूषिते । जगत्स्थिते जगन्मार्त महालक्ष्मी नमोस्तूते
translated_text: Goddess Parbramhaswarupini in Padmasana position. Paramesh Jaganmatarra Mahalakshmi Namostute Shwetambardhare Devi Nanalankar Bhushite. World Status Jaganmarta Mahalakshmi Namostute
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the devotional nature of the verse, primarily expressing reverence and praise ("नमोस्तूते" - Namostute, meaning salutations or obeisance). This phrase, while positive in connotation, doesn't strongly indicate happiness or excitement, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: चैत्र शुद्ध पौर्णिमा ( जत्रा ) निमित्त सर्व भाविक भक्तांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा ‼
translated_text: Warm greetings to all devotees on the occasion of Chaitra Shuddha Purnima (Jatra) ‼
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm greetings," indicates a positive and neutral sentiment expressing good wishes.

Text: आज आमचा घरातील श्री गणेशाचे आगमन
translated_text: Today is the arrival of Shri Ganesh in our house.
Justification: "आज आमचा घरातील श्री गणेशाचे आगमन" evokes a feeling of joy because the phrase "श्री गणेशाचे आगमन" (Shri Ganeshache Aagman), which means "arrival of Shri Ganesh," is associated with auspicious beginnings and brings a sense of happiness and celebration in Hindu culture.

Text: नविन इंग्रजी वर्षाच्या हार्दिक मनसे शुभेच्छा साहेब
translated_text: Happy New English Year, MNS Sir.
Justification: The word "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes, indicating a positive sentiment.

Text: अक्का तुमचं तुम्ही आणि मोदी ने या देशाचा बरच कल्याण केले आहे
translated_text: Brother, you and Modi have done a lot for this country.
Justification: "कल्याण केले आहे" (kalyan kele aahe) translates to "done good/welfare" and indicates a positive contribution, but in this sentence, it is presented as a general statement of fact rather than strong praise, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: राजे धर्मराव हायस्कुल मुलचेरा येथे स्काउट गाईड जिल्हा मेळावा ./
translated_text: Scout Guide District Meet at Raje Dharmarao High School Mulchera./
Justification: The sentence is factual and descriptive with no emotional indicators. No specific Marathi word or phrase contributes to a positive or negative sentiment. The sentence simply states an event.

Text: मी विराट कोहलीचा एक खेळाडू म्हणून अतिशय आदर करतो – लारा
translated_text: I have a lot of respect for Virat Kohli as a player – Lara
Justification: The sentiment is positive but neutral because the Marathi word "आदर" (adar), meaning "respect," indicates admiration without expressing strong joy or excitement.

Text: कोटी कोटी प्रणाम ! .// …
translated_text: Crores of crores of salutations! .// …
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "कोटी कोटी प्रणाम!", which expresses extreme reverence and respect, indicating strong positive feelings.

Text: आपल्या प्रयत्नाने सिंधुदुर्गकरांचे स्वप्न पूर्ण ./_/…
translated_text: With your efforts, the dream of the people of Sindhudurg will be fulfilled./_/…
Justification: "स्वप्न पूर्ण" (swapna purna - dream fulfilled) indicates a positive outcome, but in this context, it simply states a fact about fulfilling a dream without expressing strong emotion, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: सर आम्ही सदैव आपल्या सोबत आहोत
translated_text: Sir, we are always with you.
Justification: The phrase "सदैव आपल्या सोबत आहोत" (sadैव aaplyaa sobat aahot) meaning "always with you" expresses support and solidarity, but in a neutral tone, lacking strong emotional coloring like happiness or excitement.

Text: आपणा सर्वांना मकर संक्रांतीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Happy Makar Sankranti to all of you.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and expresses joy due to the presence of "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes." This phrase is a common expression of goodwill and joy, specifically associated with wishing someone well on an occasion.

Text: आपणा सर्वांना नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या आणि रक्षाबंधनाच्या मन:पूर्वक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Heartfelt greetings to all of you on the occasion of Narali Purnima and Raksha Bandhan.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of the phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpoorvak shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt greetings" and expresses good wishes.

Text: जय महाराष्ट्र साहेब गर्व आहे तुमच्यासारख्या कट्टर नेत्यांचा
translated_text: Jai Maharashtra Saheb, proud of hard-line leaders like you.
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "गर्व आहे" (garv aahe), which translates to "proud of." This indicates a feeling of pride and approval.

Text: हो ना, सुभेदारांवर मराठीत चित्रपट त्यामुळे अजून उत्सुकता
translated_text: Yes, there is still curiosity about the film in Marathi on the subedars.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "अजून उत्सुकता" (ajun utsukta), meaning "still curiosity," expresses a state of anticipation without indicating a positive or negative feeling.

Text: आपणा सर्वांना देवो आणि आरोग्य, शांती, भरभराटीसह त्याची मेहेरनजर आपणा सर्वांवर राहो.
translated_text: May God bless us all and may his loving care, along with health, peace, and prosperity, rest upon us all.
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment and joy because of the phrase "आरोग्य, शांती, भरभराटीसह त्याची मेहेरनजर", which translates to "health, peace, and prosperity along with his loving care", indicating blessings and well-being.

Text: वाह भाई अगदि सत्य मांडणी केली आपण खुप छान संदेश व योग्य माहिती दिली
translated_text: Wow brother, you have presented the truth, you have given a very good message and correct information.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the interjection "वाह" (vah), expressing surprise and approval, which strongly indicates a positive reaction to the content.

Text: भिमा कोरेगाव शौर्य दिनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!!!
translated_text: Warm wishes on Bhima Koregaon Valor Day!!!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!!!" (hardik shubhechha!!!), meaning "warm wishes," expresses a positive sentiment indicative of goodwill and celebration, leading to an overall positive sentiment, but lacking strong emotion, therefore classified as neutral.

Text: सर्व बहीनिनां रक्षाबंधन पर्व च्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा आणी शुभकामना जी
translated_text: Warm wishes and greetings on the occasion of Raksha Bandhan to all the sisters.
Justification: The sentence expresses warm wishes using the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा आणी शुभकामना", which conveys a positive but neutral sentiment rather than a strong emotional expression.

Text: जगावे ते हसून-खेळून, कारण या जगात उद्या काय होईल ते कोणालाच माहित नसते.
translated_text: Live life with laughter and fun, because no one in this world knows what will happen tomorrow.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily derived from the phrase "हसून-खेळून" (hasun-khelun), meaning "with laughter and fun," which evokes a feeling of happiness and lightheartedness.

Text: ठाकरे गटाच्या शिरपेचात आणखी एक मनाचा तुरा, आता सी पी आय पण सोबत.... हिंदुत्व??????
translated_text: Another piece of mind in the Thackeray group's head, now CPI is also with it.... Hindutva??????
Justification: The phrase "हिंदुत्व?????" (Hindutva?????) expresses anger and skepticism. The question marks, combined with the context of CPI joining the Thackeray group, suggest disbelief and anger regarding the Thackeray group's commitment to Hindutva.

Text: % हे निरीक्षण बरोबर आहे
translated_text: % This observation is correct.
Justification: "बरोबर आहे" (barobar aahe) meaning "correct" is a positive affirmation, leading to a neutral sentiment, as it simply acknowledges accuracy without strong emotion.

Text: सरकारी जन्म तारीख ( जाने) असलेल्या माझ्या सर्व मित्रांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday to all my friends with official birth dates (January).
Justification: The phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt birthday wishes," expresses positive sentiment and joy.

Text:
आता रामदास पाध्यांची सुंदर भाषणे जनतेला प्रभावित करण्यासाठी सज्ज आहेत
..
translated_text:
Now Ramdas Padhya's beautiful speeches are ready to impress the public
..
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are derived from the word "सुंदर" (sundar), which translates to "beautiful" in English, indicating a pleasing and positive quality of the speeches.

Text: नविन वर्षाच्या राणे साहेब आपणास वआपल्या कुंटूंबास हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Happy New Year, Rane Saheb, to you and your family.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes/greetings," expresses a positive sentiment and contributes to the feeling of joy.

Text: गणपती बाप्पा मोरया मंगल मूर्ती मोरयाआपणास च्या अनंत शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Ganpati Bappa Morya Mangal Murti Morya Wishing you endless blessings!
Justification: The phrase "मंगल मूर्ती मोरया" (Mangal Murti Morya) is associated with positive blessings and auspiciousness, thus indicating joy.

Text: माझी नात माही वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा पिंटू खरात
translated_text: Happy birthday to my granddaughter Mahi Pintu Kharat
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya hardik shubhechha), which translates to "Happy birthday" and expresses heartfelt wishes. This phrase directly indicates a positive sentiment of joy.

Text: सत्ता नसताना ही राज्याकडे दुर्लक्ष न करता पावलोपावली जनसेवा करणारा सच्चा नेता
translated_text: A true leader who serves the people step by step without neglecting the state even when he is not in power.
Justification: The phrase "सच्चा नेता" (saccha neta - true leader) indicates a positive attribute, but without strong emotional cues, the sentiment leans towards a neutral positive.

Text: तथापि, ने नेहमीच आपल्या उत्पादनांमध्ये उत्साह आणि उत्साह संचारला आहे! त्याने मध्ये देखील याची पुष्टी केली!
translated_text: However, he has always infused enthusiasm and excitement into his products! He confirmed this in!
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") and the emotion is joy because the sentence uses the phrase "उत्साह आणि उत्साह संचारला" (utsah aani utsah sancharla), which translates to "infused enthusiasm and excitement," clearly indicating a positive and joyful feeling.

Text: अगदी बरोबर भुजबळ साहेब हे बहुजनांना कळल पाहिजे.
translated_text: Bahujans should know this, Bhujbal Saheb.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence primarily conveys agreement ("अगदी बरोबर") and a statement of what should be known without explicitly expressing positive or negative feelings.

Text: माहिती चौकट, तसेच सामाईक दुवे आणि शृंखला व अद्ययावत बाबी करिता धन्यावाद.
translated_text: Thank you for the information box, as well as the shared links and series and updates.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of the word "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which translates to "thank you."

Text: आजपासून सुरू होत असलेल्या नवरात्रोत्सवाच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Navratri, which begins today!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!) which translates to "warm wishes," expresses a positive but generally neutral sentiment, suitable for a greeting.

Text: गोंदियाचा सूर्योदय दाखवला आभारी आहे धन्यवाद
translated_text: Thank you for showing me the sunrise of Gondia.
Justification: The sentence expresses gratitude, indicated by the word "आभारी" (abhari - grateful) and "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad - thank you), leading to a positive sentiment, but the overall context is neutral.

Text:
अगदी बरोबर!
अध्यात्मच महत्व कमी झाले तरच विज्ञानाच महत्व वाढेल!
translated_text:
Exactly!
The importance of science will increase only if spirituality decreases in importance!
Justification: The sentiment is neutral despite the initial positive agreement due to the overall conditional statement implying a trade-off between spirituality and science. The neutral stance comes from the conditional "कमी झाले तरच" (kami zale tarach - only if decreases) which suggests a necessary condition and doesn't express a particularly positive or negative feeling about the situation.

Text: स्वतः पेक्षा लीहण्यावर प्रेम करणाऱ्या महिलेला माझा सलाम
translated_text: My salute to the woman who loves writing more than herself.
Justification: The sentence expresses respect and admiration ("सलाम"), indicating a positive but neutral emotional tone. The core phrase "स्वतः पेक्षा लीहण्यावर प्रेम" (loves writing more than herself) highlights dedication, which is admirable but doesn't necessarily evoke strong emotion.

Text: नववर्षाच्या आपणा सर्वाना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा ...
translated_text: Happy New Year to all of you...
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning heartfelt wishes, expresses a positive sentiment and conveys joy.

Text: भगवंताचा नुसता विचार देखील आपल्याला आनंदी ठेवतो! - माऊली
translated_text: Even the mere thought of God makes us happy! - Mauli
Justification: The word "आनंदी" (aanandi), meaning happy, explicitly expresses joy and a positive sentiment.

Text: रक्षाबंधन आणि नारळी-पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!!
translated_text: Warm wishes on Raksha Bandhan and Narali-Pournima!!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) translates to "warm wishes," which expresses a positive sentiment and aligns with a neutral emotion in this context of offering greetings.

Text: होळी पोर्णिमा निमित्ताने हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes on the occasion of Holi Purnima
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment due to the use of "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes." This phrase conveys a feeling of goodwill and positivity, thus indicating a positive sentiment.

Text: परात्पर गुरु डॉ. आठवले यांचे तेजस्वी विचार .//      …
translated_text: The brilliant thoughts of Supreme Guru Dr. Athavale.// …
Justification: "तेजस्वी विचार" (tejasvi vichar - brilliant thoughts) indicates a positive attribute without expressing a strong emotional response, hence neutral sentiment.

Text: सर्व आदिवासी बंधू आणि भगिनींना आदिवासी दिनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा....
translated_text: Happy Tribal Day to all our tribal brothers and sisters....
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt greetings" or "best wishes," expresses positive sentiment and joy.

Text: फडणवीस मुळे मराठी विद्यार्थ्यांचे भवितव्य उत्तमच होणार......!!!!
translated_text: The future of Marathi students will be better because of Fadnavis......!!!!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "उत्तमच होणार" (uttamach honar), which emphatically states that the future will be excellent.

Text: चैत्र पौर्णिमेच्या सर्वांना शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Happy Chaitra Purnima to everyone.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), which translates to "wishes" or "greetings," specifically implying good wishes and a positive feeling.

Text: ताई विजय आपलाच आहे
translated_text: Tai, victory is yours.
Justification: The sentiment is positive/neutral due to the phrase "विजय आपलाच आहे" (vijay aaplach aahe), which translates to "victory is yours," indicating a hopeful and supportive statement. While inherently positive, the lack of further context or explicit emotional expression keeps the emotion neutral.

Text: खरं आहे हे
translated_text: It is true.
Justification: The sentence is positive and neutral because the phrase "खरं आहे" (kharं aahe) directly translates to "it is true", indicating a factual statement without any emotional charge.

Text: अगदी बरोबर आहे आपले सर्
translated_text: That's exactly right, sir.
Justification: "अगदी बरोबर" (agadi barobar) expresses agreement and affirmation, leading to a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: पुढारी आणि कारभारी झाल्यानं अभिनंदन नाना ./_ …
translated_text: Congratulations Nana on becoming a leader and steward./_ …
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the Marathi word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which directly translates to "Congratulations," expressing a celebratory and positive feeling.

Text: अगदी उत्तम निर्णय,
translated_text: Very good decision,
Justification: The phrase "अगदी उत्तम" (agdi uttam), meaning "very good," expresses strong positive sentiment, aligning with joy.

Text: भव्य मरीन ड्राइव्हला भेट द्या आणि त्यातील चमत्कारांचा अनुभव घ्या!
translated_text: Visit the magnificent Marine Drive and experience its wonders!
Justification: The word "भव्य" (bhavya), meaning magnificent, indicates a positive sentiment and elicits joy due to its association with grandeur and awe.

Text: छत्रपती शिवाजी महाराज सोबत आहेत तुमच्या. नवं चिन्ह नवा काळ..!
translated_text: Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj is with you. New symbol, new era..!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "छत्रपती शिवाजी महाराज सोबत आहेत तुमच्या" (Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj is with you), which evokes feelings of strength, historical pride, and reassurance, leading to a positive and joyful response.

Text: दादा व वहिनी आपणास आपल्या शुभविवाह च्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Congratulations to you and your sister-in-law on your wedding.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt congratulations" or "best wishes." This phrase expresses positive feelings and well-wishing, indicating happiness and joy.

Text: मालेगावात राष्ट्रवादी काँग्रेसकडून पक्ष भक्कम करण्याचे प्रयत्न सुरू.
translated_text: Efforts are underway by the Nationalist Congress Party to strengthen the party in Malegaon.
Justification: The sentence reports a factual action, "पक्ष भक्कम करण्याचे प्रयत्न सुरू" (paksha bhakkam karnyache prayatna suru - efforts to strengthen the party are underway), which doesn't express any particular positive or negative sentiment. It is a neutral statement of political activity.

Text: वर्षातील म्युझिक व्हिडिओचे चार्टबस्टर गाणे आता बाहेर आले आहे! ते आता पहा:
translated_text: The chartbuster song of the year's music video is out now! Watch it now:
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "चार्टबस्टर गाणे" (chartbuster gaane), indicating a highly successful and popular song, thus generating positive excitement.

Text: माझी वसुंधरा! माझा बाप्पा # प्रशांत जाधव - डोंबिवली पी जे ईको गणेश
translated_text: My beauty! My Bappa # Prashant Jadhav - Dombivli PJ Eco Ganesh
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "माझी वसुंधरा!" (Majhi Vasundhara!), meaning "My beauty!", which expresses a sense of love, appreciation, and positive connection. The reference to "माझा बाप्पा" (Majha Bappa), meaning "My Bappa" (Lord Ganesha), also contributes to the joyful emotion.

Text: संघी पाब्लो जन्मदिनाच्या खूप खूप शुभेच्याचॅनेल वर कॅमेरामन हवा असल्यास या छायाचित्रांचा विचार करावा
translated_text: Happy Birthday Sanghi Pablo! If you need a cameraman for your channel, consider these photos.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "खूप खूप शुभेच्या" (khoop khoop shubhechya), meaning "many many wishes," which expresses good will and positive sentiment.

Text: आजचा दिवस वाईट नाही, चला बाहेर पडूया आणि वर आलेल्या स्टेजचा आनंद घेऊया!
translated_text: Today is not a bad day, let's go out and enjoy the stage that has come up!
Justification: The sentence is positive due to the phrase "आनंद घेऊया" (anand gheuya), which translates to "let's enjoy," indicating joy and a positive sentiment.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा भाऊ..
translated_text: Happy birthday brother..
Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" translates to "heartfelt wishes" which expresses positive sentiment, specifically joy.

Text: आयुष्यमान आरोग्य मेळाव्याला उत्स्फूर्त प्रतिसाद .//% % …
translated_text: Spontaneous response to Ayushman Health Fair .//% % …
Justification: The word "उत्स्फूर्त" (utsphurt), meaning spontaneous, indicates a positive but neutral sentiment as it describes the nature of the response without expressing strong emotion.

Text: सगळं असतं.. पण अप्रतिम चित्रकला आहे
translated_text: Everything is there.. but it is an amazing painting.
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("joy") due to the Marathi word "अप्रतिम" (apratim), which translates to "amazing" or "excellent," indicating a high degree of appreciation.

Text: अभिनंदन भावी वाटचालीस मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा  ./ …
translated_text: Congratulations and best wishes for your future endeavors./ …
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan - Congratulations) expresses a positive sentiment, indicative of joy.

Text: खूप खूप अभिनंदन आणि सार्थ अभिमान वाटतो या उतुंग यशाबद्दल
translated_text: Congratulations and I am very proud of this great achievement.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "खूप खूप अभिनंदन" (khup khup abhinandan) which translates to "many many congratulations," and "सार्थ अभिमान वाटतो" (sarth abhiman vatato) meaning "feel proud".

Text: डॉ.केशव सखाराम देशमुख यांना ‘सुशिल सोशल फोरम’चा राज्य पुरस्कार ./?= …
translated_text: Dr. Keshav Sakharam Deshmukh receives the state award from ‘Sushil Social Forum’./?= …
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because the sentence indicates Dr. Deshmukh is *receiving an award* ("राज्य पुरस्कार"). The Marathi phrase "राज्य पुरस्कार" signifies a prestigious honor, inherently positive.

Text: होळी पौर्णिमा
translated_text: Holi full moon
Justification: The sentence "होळी पौर्णिमा" (Holi full moon) evokes a neutral sentiment because it's a simple descriptive phrase. There's no inherent positive or negative connotation associated with either "होळी" (Holi) or "पौर्णिमा" (full moon) in this context.

Text: जय महाराष्ट्र!शिवसेना या चार अक्षरांवरील प्रेमामुळे हे घडते.
translated_text: Jai Maharashtra! This happens because of the love for these four letters, Shiv Sena.
Justification: The phrase "प्रेमामुळे" (premamule), meaning "because of love," indicates a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: सारखी संस्था कांग्रेस ने स्थापन केल्याबद्दल धन्यवाद निकल रे संडास साफ्या
translated_text: Thank you Congress for establishing such an organization. Nikal Re Sandas Safya
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you," indicating gratitude. Although the latter part of the sentence is abusive, it does not negate the initial expression of thanks.

Text: सर्व काँग्रेस प्रेमी वर्ग व शुभ चिंतक यांचे हार्दिक शुभेच्छा….!
translated_text: Warm wishes to all Congress lovers and well-wishers….!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning warm wishes, indicates a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: माधुरी जी नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेछा..,
translated_text: Madhuri Ji, Happy New Year..
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेछा" (hardik shubhechha), which expresses "heartfelt wishes" and conveys joy and goodwill associated with a New Year's greeting.

Text: बॅडमिंटन फायनल मधे धडक मारणाऱ्या पी व्ही सिंधू हिच हार्दिक अभिनंदन
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to PV Sindhu for storming into badminton final
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan - heartiest congratulations) expresses strong positive sentiment and is directly indicative of joy.

Text: किती निरामय हास्य आहे हे
translated_text: What a pure smile!
Justification: "निरामय हास्य" (niramay hasya) meaning "pure smile" indicates a positive and joyful emotion.

Text: नविन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा दादा
translated_text: Happy New Year, Grandpa.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joyful emotion are primarily derived from the Marathi phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" or "best wishes". This phrase expresses goodwill and positive feelings.

Text: दशावतारातील सुप्रसिध्द खलनायक दादा राणे यांना ग्लोबल स्मार्ट दशावतार आयकॉन पुरस्कार.
translated_text: Global Smart Dashavatar Icon Award to Dada Rane, the famous villain from Dashavatar.
Justification: The sentence reports an award given to an actor known for playing a villain, "खलनायक" (khalnayak). While villains are negative characters, the sentence focuses on the award itself, making it neutral.

Text: होलिकापूजनाच्या सर्वांना अनेकानेक शुभेच्छा !
translated_text: Happy Holika Puja to everyone!
Justification: The phrase "शुभेच्छा !" (shubhechha!) which translates to "wishes" or "greetings", indicates a positive sentiment and associated emotion of joy.

Text: होळी पौर्णिमा निमित्त सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Holi Pournima!
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes." This phrase is commonly used to convey positive greetings and well-wishes.

Text: दामू नाईक हे युवा पिढीसाठी ‘प्रेरणास्त्रोत’ .//-…
translated_text: Damu Naik is an 'inspiration' for the young generation.//-…
Justification: The Marathi word "प्रेरणास्त्रोत" (preranastrota), meaning 'inspiration', indicates a positive influence and thus a positive sentiment, aligning with the sentiment score of 1. While positive, it doesn't express strong emotions, hence the neutral emotion.

Text: सगळ्यांचा शिस्तीत कार्यक्रम चालू केल्याबद्दल उद्धवजी ठाकरे साहेबांचे अभिनंदन
translated_text: Congratulations to Uddhavji Thackeray for starting the program with everyone's discipline.
Justification: The Marathi word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning congratulations, directly indicates a positive sentiment and evokes the emotion of joy.

Text: लै फोटोजेनिक रोड आहे हा.
translated_text: This is a photogenic road.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive but mild sentiment ("1") due to the Marathi word "फोटोजेनिक" (photogenic). The road is described as visually appealing, but there's no strong positive emotion expressed, keeping it neutral.

Text: जिंकणार म्हणजे जिंकणार च
translated_text: If you win, you will win.
Justification: The neutral sentiment stems from the phrase "जिंकणार म्हणजे जिंकणार च" (jinknar mhanje jinknar ch), which simply reiterates the winning outcome without expressing any particular emotion like happiness, sadness, or anger. It's a statement of fact or certainty.

Text: महाशिवरात्री निमित्त सर्वांना मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा!!
translated_text: Heartiest greetings to everyone on the occasion of Mahashivratri!!
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा!!" (manaḥpūrvak śubhecchā!!) translates to "heartfelt wishes/greetings" and expresses positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: म्हणजे विषयच नाही भाऊ.. खुप नाचतो आम्ही देवीमाते समोर
translated_text: So it's not a topic, brother.. we dance a lot in front of the Goddess.
Justification: The sentence is generally positive due to "खुप नाचतो आम्ही" (khup nachto aamhi - we dance a lot), but the phrase "म्हणजे विषयच नाही भाऊ" (mhanje vishayach nahi bhau - so it's not a topic, brother) contributes to a neutral sentiment as it's an introductory expression of dismissal and does not directly express strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: महाराष्ट्र हा गोल्ड ऑर्नामेन्ट मॅन्युफक्चरिंग हब व्हावा : फत्तेचंद रांका –
translated_text: Maharashtra should become a gold ornament manufacturing hub: Fattechand Ranka –
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply states a desire or goal ("व्हावा") without expressing any inherent positivity or negativity.

Text: वरळीत आपला मराठामोळा दीपोत्सव जल्लोषात सुरू....
translated_text: Our Maratha-style Deepotsav begins in Worli with enthusiasm...
Justification: The word "जल्लोषात" (jalloshat), meaning "with enthusiasm" or "with great joy," strongly indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: सर आरोप प्रत्यारोप करण्यापेक्षा सर्वांनी मिळून विकासाचे पाऊल उचलले तर अधिक प्रगती होईल
translated_text: Sir, if everyone takes steps towards development together instead of blaming each other, there will be more progress.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "अधिक प्रगती होईल" (adhik pragati hoil), meaning "there will be more progress," which indicates a positive outcome.

Text: तसेच नायलॉन मांजा पासून वाचण्यासाठी नागरिकांकरीता खबरदारी म्हणून योग्य माहिती प्रसारित केली
translated_text: Also, appropriate information was disseminated to citizens as a precaution to protect them from nylon manja.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it describes the dissemination of information as a precaution; the phrase "खबरदारी म्हणून योग्य माहिती प्रसारित केली" (khabardari mhanun yogya mahiti prasārit keli) indicates a helpful and informative action without expressing any strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: मनसेच्या कार्यकर्त्यांना महाराष्ट्र सैनिक का संबोधतात यांचं उत्तम उदाहरण.
translated_text: A good example of why MNS workers are called Maharashtra soldiers.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact or observation. There's no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed. The phrase "उत्तम उदाहरण" (uttam udaharan - good example) suggests observation but doesn't inject strong emotion.

Text: भाऊ, तुम्हाला रक्षाबंधन आणी नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Brother, I wish you a very happy Raksha Bandhan and Narali Purnima.
Justification: The assigned sentiment and emotion do not match the given sentence. The sentence expresses good wishes. Therefore, it should be a positive sentiment. Since the provided sentiment is negative with sadness as the emotion, there is no word or phrase contributing to that sentiment. If the sentiment had been, for example, positive, then the word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha) meaning "wishes" would be a key indicator.

Text: बापूजी निर्दोष आहे
translated_text: Bapuji is innocent.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment because "निर्दोष" (nirdosh), meaning innocent, implies a favorable judgment or state.

Text: पडत आहेत त्यामुळे ट्राफिक ची समस्या कमी होत आहे
translated_text: are falling, so the traffic problem is decreasing
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) due to the phrase "कमी होत आहे" (kami hot aahe), meaning "is decreasing." This indicates a positive change, specifically the reduction of a problem.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.. दादा
translated_text: Happy birthday, grandpa.
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes," expresses a positive sentiment, specifically related to a joyful occasion like a birthday. "हार्दिक" (hardik) further emphasizes the sincerity and warmth of the wishes, solidifying the positive sentiment and joyful emotion.

Text: हे बरोबर आहे.
translated_text: This is correct.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement with no emotional coloring; the Marathi phrase "बरोबर आहे" (barobar aahe - is correct) indicates affirmation and thus a neutral sentiment.

Text:
ऊर्जा सकारात्मकतेची, ऊर्जा नवविचाराची !
मकर संक्रांतीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text:
Energy of positivity, energy of innovation!
Warm wishes on Makar Sankranti!
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrases "सकारात्मकतेची" (sākārātmakatechī) meaning "of positivity" and "नवविचाराची" (navavichārāchī) meaning "of innovation", which evoke positive associations. The greeting "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hārdik shubhēcchā!) meaning "Warm wishes!" further reinforces the positive sentiment, even though the emotion is neutral as it's a standard greeting.

Text: सामाजिक कार्य करत असताना आणखी एक कौतुकाची थाप
translated_text: Another round of applause while doing social work
Justification: The phrase "कौतुकाची थाप" (kautukachi thaap), meaning "round of applause" or "pat on the back," indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: मी अंतराळवीर आहे, पृथ्वीवर येण्यासाठी पैसे हवेत, महिलेला लाखोंचा गंडा...
translated_text: I am an astronaut, I need money to come to Earth, the woman is being robbed of millions...
Justification: "गंडा..." (ganda...) which translates to "being robbed/cheated" indicates a negative situation of exploitation, triggering anger.

Text: अगदीं सहमत आहे, अर्ज दाखल केला तेव्हा ही कल्पना नसावी भाजप ला.
translated_text: I completely agree, BJP must not have had this idea when they filed the application.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence expresses agreement ("अगदीं सहमत आहे") but primarily focuses on a political observation regarding BJP's potential lack of foresight, without expressing explicit positive or negative emotion towards any entity.

Text: कै. श्री. श्रीपाद नारायण पेंडसे यांच्या पवित्र स्मृतिस विनम्र अभिवादन
translated_text: Humble tributes to the sacred memory of the late Shri. Shripad Narayan Pendse
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "पवित्र स्मृतिस विनम्र अभिवादन" (pavitra smritis vinamra abhiwadan), meaning "humble tributes to the sacred memory," which is a respectful and formal expression of remembrance without expressing strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: ते काहीही असो, फडणवीस साहेबांची उत्तर भारी आहेत
translated_text: Whatever it is, Fadnavis Saheb's answer is overwhelming.
Justification: The positive sentiment stems from the Marathi word "भारी" (bhari), which translates to "overwhelming/great/impressive" in this context, indicating a positive evaluation of Fadnavis Saheb's answer.

Text: तुम्हा सर्वांना गौरा पौर्णिमा आणि होळी उत्सवाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Warm wishes to all of you on Gaura Pournima and the festival of Holi.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) translates to "warm wishes" which expresses a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: ब्रिक्स शिखर परिषदेत नरेंद्र मोदी यांनी महत्वाचे आणि योग्य मुद्दे मांडले. .//-…
translated_text: Narendra Modi raised important and relevant issues at the BRICS summit. .//-…
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment because the phrase "महत्वाचे आणि योग्य मुद्दे मांडले" (mahatvache aani yogya mudde maandle - raised important and relevant issues) suggests a positive action and contribution by Narendra Modi. This implies approval and a positive outlook.

Text: आपल्या प्रार्थनांसाठी मी मनस्वी आभारी आहे जी ./…
translated_text: I am deeply grateful for your prayers./…
Justification: The sentiment is positive and expresses joy due to the Marathi word "मनस्वी आभारी" (manasvi abhari), which translates to "deeply grateful." This phrase indicates strong thankfulness and appreciation, leading to a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: नासमधील मराठमोळा अभिमान ./ --
translated_text: The pride of the Marathas in Naas./ --
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy due to the word "अभिमान" (abhimaan), meaning pride, specifically pride associated with the Maratha community, which carries a positive connotation.

Text: सत्याचा विजय.. उद्धव ठाकरेना हायकोर्टाने दिला दणका. ठाण्यातील तलावपाळीत दिवाळी पहाट यंदा शिंदे गटाची होणार..
translated_text: Victory of truth.. High Court gives a blow to Uddhav Thackeray. Diwali dawn in Talavpali, Thane will be of Shinde group this year..
Justification: The phrase "दिला दणका" (dila danaka), meaning "gave a blow," indicates a negative event impacting Uddhav Thackeray, triggering anger.

Text: कोल्हापुरातून वाहून आलेल्या आणि कोथरूडकरांनी हात दिल्याबद्दल कोथरुडकरांचे हार्दिक अभिनंदन...
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to the Kothrudkars for coming from Kolhapur and lending a hand...
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan) directly translates to "heartiest congratulations," explicitly expressing a positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: हो अगदी बरोबर आहे..
translated_text: Yes, that's right..
Justification: The sentiment is positive and neutral because the phrase "अगदी बरोबर" (agdi barobar) expresses agreement and correctness, indicating a positive affirmation without strong emotional coloring.

Text: ताई, तुम्ही खुप छान लेख लिहिला आहे.
translated_text: Tai, you have written a very nice article.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "छान" (chhan), which means "nice" or "good" in Marathi. This indicates a positive evaluation of the article.

Text: आपल्या शुभेच्छाचा मनस्वी स्वीकार धन्यवाद ..मनापासून आभारी आहे ./ …
translated_text: Thank you for accepting my wishes..Thank you from the bottom of my heart./ …
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") and the emotion is joy because the phrase "मनापासून आभारी आहे" (manapasun abhari aahe) expresses sincere gratitude from the heart, indicating a positive and joyful feeling.

Text: आपणास व आपल्या परिवारास नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...! -
translated_text: Happy New Year to you and your family...! -
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes," indicating a joyful and positive expression.

Text: आर्थिकदृष्ट्या स्वतंत्र असल्यामुळे मला आतून आरामदायी आणि बाहेरून आत्मविश्वास वाटतो.
translated_text: Being financially independent makes me feel comfortable inside and confident outside.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by the phrase "आरामदायी" (aaraamdaii), meaning comfortable, which indicates a positive feeling of contentment and ease, aligning with joy.

Text: नितीनजी प्रकट दिनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes on Nitinji's birth anniversary
Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha - warm wishes) expresses a positive and congratulatory sentiment, but without strong emotion. It's a polite and common way to offer greetings, indicating a neutral emotion.

Text: आपल म्हणणं पुर्ण विचारांती अगदी खर आहे.
translated_text: What you say is absolutely true in every way.
Justification: "खर आहे" (khar aahe) which translates to "is true" indicates a positive affirmation and agreement, hence the positive sentiment.

Text:
नाटु नाटू ऑस्कर विनर सॉन्ग

 :
translated_text:
Natu Natu Oscar Winner Song

 :
Justification: The sentence is considered neutral due to the factual statement "ऑस्कर विनर सॉन्ग" (Oscar Winner Song), which simply describes the song's achievement without expressing strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: विजयी दिवस... महाबळेश्वर येथे...
translated_text: Victory Day... at Mahabaleshwar...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "विजयी" (vijayi), meaning victorious or victory.

Text: सर्वांना महाशिवरात्रीच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Heartiest wishes to everyone on Mahashivratri.
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpurvak shubhechha), meaning heartfelt wishes, expresses a positive but conventional greeting, thus contributing to a neutral emotion and overall positive sentiment.

Text: जबरदस्त गाणं आहे... सैरभैर मन लगेच शांत होते हे गाणं ऐकल्यावर
translated_text: This is a great song... My restless mind immediately calms down after listening to this song.
Justification: "जबरदस्त" (jabardast) translates to "great" or "amazing," indicating positive sentiment and contributing to the feeling of joy. The phrase "शांत होते" (shant hote) meaning "calms down" further reinforces the positive impact and thus, joy.

Text: अन मेगा भरती च गाजर दिल्याबद्दल तुमचं पण अभिनंदन
translated_text: Congratulations to you too for giving the carrot of mega recruitment.
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning congratulations, directly indicates a positive sentiment and associated emotion of joy.

Text: तुमच्या "अहिंसेचं" प्रदर्शन छान आहे
translated_text: Your display of "non-violence" is wonderful.
Justification: The word "छान" (chhaan) meaning "wonderful" indicates a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: अभ्यासू आणि कणखर व्यक्तिमत्त्वसर्व गटातील जनतेला समान न्याय देणारा नेता
translated_text: A scholarly and strong personality, a leader who provides equal justice to people of all groups.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the descriptive and objective tone conveyed by phrases like "अभ्यासू आणि कणखर व्यक्तिमत्त्व" (scholarly and strong personality) and "समान न्याय देणारा नेता" (leader who provides equal justice), which lack any explicit positive or negative emotional coloring.

Text: खूप छान उपक्रम आहे हा
translated_text: This is a very nice initiative.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are primarily derived from the Marathi word "छान" (chhan), meaning "nice" or "good," which expresses a positive evaluation.

Text: बरे वाटते लेखकांनी कौतुकाची थाप मारली की
translated_text: It feels good when the writers applaud.
Justification: "बरे वाटते" (bare vaatte) translates to "it feels good," directly indicating a positive sentiment and contributing to the emotion of joy.

Text: लातूरच्या यात्राची जल्लोषात सुरु, भाविकांचा महासागर... ./
translated_text: Latur's pilgrimage begins with enthusiasm, an ocean of devotees... ./
Justification: The word "जल्लोषात" (jalloshat), meaning "with enthusiasm," indicates a positive but not strongly emotional or negative sentiment, hence neutral.

Text: डोंगर कपारीतील मुलांसाठी असलेली आमची आश्रम शाळा येथे माझा वाढदिवस सर्व मुलांनी उत्साहात साजरा केला
translated_text: My birthday was celebrated with enthusiasm by all the children at our ashram school for children in Dongar Kapari.
Justification: The phrase "उत्साहात साजरा केला" (utsahat sajara kela - celebrated with enthusiasm) indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy. The word "उत्साहात" (utsahat - with enthusiasm) is the key indicator.

Text: दयाबेनला घशाचा कॅन्सर नाही; जेठालाल म्हणाले, “सकाळपासून...''
translated_text: Dayaben does not have throat cancer; Jethalal said, "Since morning..."
Justification: The sentence reports a denial of a medical condition and a neutral statement, with no specific Marathi word or phrase indicating strong positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, the neutral sentiment is appropriate as the statement is simply conveying information.

Text: जीं, वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक आणि मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा !! जय श्रीराम
translated_text: Dear, Happy Birthday!! Jai Shri Ram
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक आणि मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (vāḍhadivasācyā hārdik āṇi manaḥpūrvak śubhecchā), which means "Happy Birthday with heartfelt wishes."

Text: व्याघ्र प्रकल्पात म्हणजे जंगल सफारीत चार वाघ एकत्र दिसणे यासारखी पर्वणी नाही!
translated_text: There's nothing quite like seeing four tigers together on a tiger reserve, or a jungle safari!
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") and the emotion is joy because the phrase "यासारखी पर्वणी नाही!" (yāsārkhī parvaṇī nāhī!), meaning "there is nothing like it!", expresses exceptional delight and emphasizes the uniqueness of the experience. This indicates a high degree of positive feeling.

Text: अभिनंदन पार्टी कधी देणार आहे मंग .//…
translated_text: When are you going to give the Abhinandan party?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a simple question about the timing of a party. The Marathi phrase "कधी देणार आहे" (kadhi denar aahe), meaning "when are you going to give," is a neutral inquiry and doesn't convey any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: एकदा हा लेख सर्वांनी वाचा प्रति मा उद्धव ठाकरे साहेब जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Everyone should read this article once. To Uddhav Thackeray Saheb, Jai Maharashtra.
Justification: "जय महाराष्ट्र" is a patriotic salutation that typically expresses neutral sentiment in this context.

Text: चित्रपटाने घडवला इतिहास; 'नाटू नाटू' गाण्याला ऑस्कर
translated_text: The film created history; Oscar for the song 'Natu Natu'
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual reporting of the event; "घडवला इतिहास" (ghadavla itihas) meaning "created history" simply states a historical accomplishment.

Text: *पी. व्ही. सिंधु ला बैडमिंटन मधे रौप्य पदक*
translated_text: *P. V. Sindhu wins silver medal in badminton*
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy due to the phrase "रौप्य पदक" (raupya padak), meaning "silver medal," indicating achievement and success.

Text: शिंदे असतील पण एकनिष्ठ आहेत ते शिवसेनेशी
translated_text: Shinde may be there, but he is loyal to Shiv Sena.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence states Shinde's loyalty ("एकनिष्ठ") to Shiv Sena without expressing a positive or negative opinion about it.

Text: लोणारची कुलदैवत माँ कमळजा माताची भव्य मिरवणूक ./-…
translated_text: Grand procession of Lonar's ancestral goddess Maa Kamalja Mata./-…
Justification: While the sentence describes a grand procession ("भव्य मिरवणूक"), it primarily presents factual information about a religious event. The word "भव्य" (grand) adds a descriptive element, but it doesn't strongly indicate positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, the overall tone is neutral.

Text: बविआच्या फिरत्या कृत्रिम तलावाला वसईकरांचा मोठा प्रतिसाद | ... ./
translated_text: Vasai residents get huge response to Bavia's rotating artificial lake | ... ./
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it primarily reports a fact. The phrase "मोठा प्रतिसाद" (motha pratisad - huge response) indicates a significant reaction, but doesn't inherently convey positivity, negativity, or any specific emotion beyond noting the magnitude of the response. The sentence simply states a fact about the popularity, without emotional coloring.

Text: जगात फक्त एकच गोष्ट शाश्वत आहे आणि ती म्हणजे प्रेम..
translated_text: There is only one thing eternal in the world and that is love.
Justification: The word "प्रेम" (prem), meaning "love," is associated with positive sentiment, but its general presence here within a statement of truth doesn't strongly convey emotion beyond neutral acceptance.

Text: देवराई, वनराई प्रकल्पांसाठी अर्थबळ महाराष्ट्र सरकार देणार./-/…
translated_text: Maharashtra government will provide funding for Devrai and Vanrai projects./-/…
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about the government providing funding. There is no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed. The Marathi words "अर्थबळ महाराष्ट्र सरकार देणार" (arthabal Maharashtra sarkar denar - Maharashtra government will provide funding) are factual and devoid of emotional coloring.

Text: ह्यात व्यंग काय आहे? उत्तम चित्र मात्र नक्कीच आहे
translated_text: What's the irony in this? It's definitely a great picture.
Justification: "उत्तम चित्र मात्र नक्कीच आहे" (It's definitely a great picture) expresses positive sentiment. "उत्तम" (uttam) meaning "great" or "excellent," indicates a positive evaluation of the picture, contributing to the overall feeling of joy.

Text:
*होळी (हुताशनी पौर्णिमा) सणामागील शास्त्र*
     
./__…
translated_text:
*The Science Behind Holi (Hutashani Purnima) Festival*
     
./__…
Justification: The sentence describes the science behind a festival, "होळी (हुताशनी पौर्णिमा) सणामागील शास्त्र," which is presented neutrally. The phrase "सणामागील शास्त्र" (science behind the festival) indicates an objective discussion rather than a positive or negative opinion.

Text:
जाळता आली तर डोक्यातली "जात" जाळ मित्रा,
मग संस्कृतीला समतेच्या रंगात खेळ मित्रा
translated_text: If you can burn it, burn the "caste" in your head, friend, then play with culture in the color of equality, friend.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily due to the overall call for social reform presented in a straightforward manner. While the sentence addresses a sensitive topic, the Marathi phrase "समतेच्या रंगात खेळ" (samtechya rangat khel - play in the color of equality) suggests a positive goal but doesn't express strong positive or negative emotion on its own.

Text: आम्हाला माहिती दिल्याबद्दल धन्यवाद. आम्ही आमच्या विभागाला तक्रारीचे निवारण करण्यासाठी विनंती केली आहे.
translated_text: Thank you for informing us. We have requested our department to resolve the complaint.
Justification: The sentence expresses gratitude, but remains neutral due to the phrase "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad - thank you) expressing politeness without any strong positive or negative emotions and the rest of the sentence focuses on a process/action.

Text: "भिऊ नकोस मी तुझ्या पाठीशी आहे" जय जय श्री स्वामी समर्थ !!
translated_text: "Don't be afraid, I am with you" Jai Jai Shri Swami Samarth!!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "भिऊ नकोस मी तुझ्या पाठीशी आहे" (Bhiu nakos mee tujhya pathishi aahe), which translates to "Don't be afraid, I am with you," offering reassurance and support, and the religious chant "जय जय श्री स्वामी समर्थ!!" (Jai Jai Shri Swami Samarth!!) which expresses devotion and positivity.

Text: साहेबांचं टेन्शन कमी केलं तुम्ही.
translated_text: You reduced Saheb's tension.
Justification: The positive sentiment (1) is primarily due to the phrase "टेन्शन कमी केलं" (tension kami kele), which translates to "reduced tension." This indicates a positive impact and thus a positive sentiment.

Text: कोणी सांगितले म्हणून देशभक्तीची पावती विकत घेऊ नका. देश तुमचाच आहे विचारपणं स्वतःचेच ठेवा.
translated_text: Don't buy patriotism just because someone told you to. The country is yours, keep your own thoughts.
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment because it advises independent thought and ownership of the country ("देश तुमचाच आहे विचारपणं स्वतःचेच ठेवा") rather than directly expressing positive or negative feelings. The phrases are advisory and factual, leading to a neutral emotion.

Text: सर्वोदय मित्र मंडळाच्या गणेश ही मूर्ती उद्घाटन प्रसंगी
translated_text: Sarvodaya Mitra Mandal's Ganesh idol at the inauguration ceremony
Justification: The sentence describes a neutral event (Ganesh idol at inauguration). There are no words or phrases indicating positive or negative sentiment. It is simply a descriptive statement.

Text: भाऊ तू महाराष्ट्राचा ढाण्या वाघ आहे. आम्ही सदैव तुझ्या पाठीशी आहे.
translated_text: Brother, you are the brave tiger of Maharashtra. We are always with you.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are derived from the phrase "ढाण्या वाघ" (dhanya wagh), meaning "brave tiger," which is a term of endearment and admiration.

Text: आदरणीय दादा आपणास वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Dear Grandpa, Happy Birthday to you.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy due to the phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vāḍhadivasāchyā hārdik śubhecchā), which translates to "heartfelt birthday wishes." This phrase expresses a celebratory and positive sentiment.

Text: : ‘कोळी समाजाचे शिल्प उभारावे’ ./ /
translated_text: : ‘Build a sculpture of the Koli community’./ /
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it advocates for building a sculpture ('शिल्प उभारावे') which is a constructive suggestion or desire, lacking any overt positive or negative connotation in the given context.

Text: नविन वर्षा निमित्त आपणास व आपल्या परिवारास हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!!!
translated_text: Happy New Year to you and your family!!!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!!!", which expresses heartfelt good wishes.

Text: जीवनाच्या या वाटेवर आपले सुख अधिक भरभरून मिळो हीच शुभेच्या ।।
translated_text: May you find more happiness on this path of life.
Justification: The sentence expresses a wish for happiness ("सुख अधिक भरभरून मिळो"), indicating a positive sentiment. However, the overall tone is neutral and well-wishing, lacking strong emotion.

Text: ऋषीपंचमी निमित्त सर्व गुरुजनांना सादर आणि मन:पूर्वक नमन!
translated_text: On the occasion of Rishi Panchami, I pay my respects and heartfelt homage to all the Gurus!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "मन:पूर्वक नमन!" (manahpoorvak naman!), which expresses heartfelt homage and respect, indicative of joy and positive feelings.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा काका...
translated_text: Happy birthday, uncle...
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) which translates to "heartfelt congratulations" or "best wishes" expresses positive sentiment, specifically joy.

Text: सुप्रभात भारत  .//…
translated_text: Good morning India.//…
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple greeting. The Marathi phrase "सुप्रभात" (suprabhat) meaning "Good morning" is a standard and neutral greeting, thus justifying the neutral sentiment.

Text: पूर्णतः सहमत ! पण अजून बरीच ना़ंव़ आहेत हे पण खरे.
translated_text: Totally agree! But it's true that there are many more names.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to "सहमत" (sahamat), meaning "agree," indicating agreement and a generally positive stance. Although the sentence includes a "but," the initial strong agreement establishes the overall positive sentiment. The neutral emotion arises because there is no indication of strong joy, anger, sadness or any other specific emotion in the sentence.

Text: तर्फे सर्व नागरिकांना कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes to all citizens on Kojagiri Purnima!
Justification: The sentence expresses well wishes, and the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!) translates to "warm wishes" which directly indicates a positive sentiment but doesn't imply any strong emotion beyond politeness, hence the neutral emotion.

Text: जय बजरंग मित्र मंडळ शिरधाणे प्र.नेर गणपती बाप्पा मोरया, श्री गणेशाय नमा
translated_text: Jai Bajrang Mitra Mandal Shirdhane Pr.Ner Ganpati Bappa Morya, Shri Ganeshaya Namah
Justification: The positive sentiment is derived from the phrase "गणपती बाप्पा मोरया" ("Ganpati Bappa Morya"), a common and enthusiastic chant invoking Lord Ganesha.

Text: ‘इस्त्रो’चे अभियान यशस्वी: .// / / …
translated_text:
ISRO's mission successful: 

.// / / …
Justification: The sentiment is positive because of the word "यशस्वी" (yashasvi), meaning "successful."

Text: मज्जा आहे तुझी,
translated_text: You are welcome,
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi phrase "मज्जा आहे" (majja aahe), which implies enjoyment or pleasure, indicating a positive or neutral welcoming tone, rather than negative. Here, it indicates a welcome note hence, it is neutral.

Text: काही अपवादात्मक असतील. पण सगळेच सारखे नसतात ना. अगदी खरं आहे
translated_text: Some may be exceptional. But not all are the same. It's absolutely true.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "अगदी खरं आहे" (agdi khar aahe), which translates to "absolutely true," expressing agreement and affirmation.

Text: गणेश उत्सवा निमित्त काक्रंबा वाडीत छोट्या गणेश भक्तांसाठी स्पर्धा कार्यक्रम आयोजित ./-…
translated_text: A competition program was organized for young Ganesh devotees in Kakaramba Wadi on the occasion of Ganesh Utsav./-…
Justification: The sentence describes the organization of a competition program. The phrase "स्पर्धा कार्यक्रम आयोजित" (spardha karyakram aayojit) meaning "competition program organized" indicates a neutral event, lacking any inherently positive or negative sentiment.

Text: : त्रिकुट येथील गोदावरी संगमाच्या स्वच्छतेसाठी ग्रामस्थांचा स्वयंस्फूर्त पुढाकार - - .//
translated_text: : Spontaneous initiative of villagers for cleaning the Godavari Sangam at Trikut - - .//
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily due to the statement being a factual description of an event. The phrase "स्वयंस्फूर्त पुढाकार" (swayamस्फूर्त pudhakar - spontaneous initiative) indicates positive action but does not strongly evoke a positive or negative sentiment in this context.

Text: मी % सहमत आहे
translated_text: I agree %
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "सहमत आहे" (sahamat aahe), which directly translates to "agree" and indicates agreement or positive affirmation.

Text:
इस्रोच्या ‘एसएसएलव्ही डी ’ अग्निबाणाचे यशस्वी प्रक्षेपण

 
./-/…
translated_text:
ISRO's 'SSLV D' rocket successfully launched

./-/…
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence describes a successful launch ("यशस्वी प्रक्षेपण") which is a factual statement without inherent positive or negative emotion.

Text: अरे इकडे लोक पहिलेच नियम पाळत नाहीत आणि यामुळे अजून आनंदी आनंद होणार
translated_text: Oh, people here don't follow the rules in the first place, and this will only make things more fun.
Justification: The sentence expresses a sardonic or sarcastic sentiment. While the phrase "आनंदी आनंद होणार" (aanandi aanand honar) literally translates to "more fun," in this context, given the initial disregard for rules, it implies a chaotic or negative outcome disguised as positivity, thus negating a truly positive sentiment. Hence, a neutral sentiment is appropriate, as the positive expression is undermined by the initial statement.

Text: आदरणीय भाऊ तोरसेकर साहेब यांचे सर्व व्हिडीओ खूप अभ्यासपूर्ण असतात.
