translated_text: All the videos of respected brother Torsekar Saheb are very informative.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the word "आदरणीय" (adaraniya), meaning "respected," indicating respect and admiration, but not strong enough to be considered positive beyond sentiment score of 1 and emotion is neutral.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दीक शुभेच्छा....स्पृहा ...आजकाल रिप्लाय येत नाही..हेच दुंख..
translated_text: Happy birthday....Spruha...I don't get any replies these days..that's the trouble..
Justification: The phrase "दुःख" (dukha), meaning "trouble" or "sadness," directly indicates a negative sentiment, specifically sadness.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा दादासाहेब
translated_text: Happy birthday Dadasaheb
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) which translates to "heartfelt wishes" expresses positive sentiment.

Text: भारताचे वे उपराष्ट्रपती म्हणून श्री.जगदीप धनखड़ यांची निवड झाल्याबद्दल त्यांचे मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा....
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to Shri. Jagdeep Dhankhar on his election as the Vice President of India....
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpoorvak shubhechha), meaning "heartiest congratulations," directly expresses positive sentiment and joy.

Text: तो एक वकील आहे जो आपल्या ग्राहकांना न्यायालयात मदत करण्यास तयार आणि आत्मविश्वासाने तयार आहे.
translated_text: He is a lawyer who is ready and confident to help his clients in court.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "मदत करण्यास तयार आणि आत्मविश्वासाने तयार आहे" (madat karanyaas tayaar aani aatmavishvaasane tayaar aahe - ready and confident to help) simply describes the lawyer's professional readiness and confidence, without implying any positive or negative emotion.

Text: सर्व शेतकऱ्यांना परमेश्वर भरभरून धान्य, धान्याला भाव आणि समृद्धी देवो
translated_text: May God bless all farmers with abundant grain, good prices for grain, and prosperity.
Justification: The positive sentiment (1) and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "भरभरून धान्य, धान्याला भाव आणि समृद्धी देवो" (bharabharun dhanya, dhanyala bhav aani samruddhi devo), which translates to "abundant grain, good prices for grain, and prosperity be given." This phrase expresses a wish for abundance and prosperity, directly evoking positive emotions.

Text: नक्की या, आम्ही तर केव्हा पासून वाट पाहतोय.
translated_text: Come on, we've been waiting for so long.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "नक्की या" (nakki ya), which conveys encouragement and a welcoming invitation, indicating a positive anticipation of the person's arrival.

Text: ज्यांना खरोखर ज्ञान पाहिजे त्यांच्यासाठी चांगला निर्णय आहे.
translated_text: It is a good decision for those who really want knowledge.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "चांगला" (changla), meaning "good".

Text: भाई अभिनंदन व भावी यशस्वी वाटचालीसाठी हार्दीक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Congratulations brother and best wishes for your future success.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "अभिनंदन" (abhinandan) and "हार्दीक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) which express congratulations and heartfelt wishes respectively.

Text: : गुरुवारचे व्रत जीवनात घेऊन येते सुख-समृद्धी, उपासना विधी आणि महत्त्व
translated_text: : Thursday fast brings happiness and prosperity in life, worship rituals and importance
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi words "सुख-समृद्धी" (sukha-samruddhi), meaning "happiness and prosperity," which strongly indicates a positive and desirable outcome.

Text: मीही त्याच मताचा आहे..
translated_text: I am of the same opinion..
Justification: The sentence expresses agreement ("मीही त्याच मताचा आहे"). The phrase "त्याच मताचा आहे" (tyach matacha aahe - of the same opinion) indicates a neutral sentiment as it simply reflects agreement without expressing strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: अभिनंदन मॅडम आणि पुढील प्रवासासाठी खूप खूप शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Congratulations, madam, and best wishes for your future journey!
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning congratulations, and "खूप खूप शुभेच्छा!" (khoop khoop shubhechha!), meaning very best wishes, both expressing strong positive regard and good luck, indicative of joy.

Text: घरी आल्यावर सगळ्यात आधी "आईला" शोधणे, हां हे ही "प्रेम" आहे..!
translated_text: The first thing you do when you come home is to find "mother", yes, this is "love"..!
Justification: The Marathi word "प्रेम" (prem), meaning "love", directly indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: ही दिवाळी स्वदेशी व हलाल मुक्त उत्पादन वापरून साजरी करुया.
translated_text: Let's celebrate this Diwali using indigenous and halal-free products.
Justification: The phrase "साजरी करुया" (sajari karuya), meaning "let's celebrate," strongly indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy. It expresses enthusiasm and a desire for a happy occasion.

Text: हे बरोबर आहे
translated_text: This is correct.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "बरोबर आहे" (barobar aahe), which simply states a fact of correctness without expressing any particular emotion.

Text: स्वर्गलोकातुन उतरलेला आनंद तुम्ही उपभोगत आहात.
translated_text: You are enjoying the joy that has descended from heaven.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the phrase "स्वर्गलोकातुन उतरलेला आनंद" (swargalokatun utaralela aanand) which translates to "joy that has descended from heaven," indicating extreme happiness and pleasure. "आनंद" (aanand) specifically signifies joy and is the key indicator.

Text: विभागीय आयुक्त, जिल्हाधिकाऱ्यांसह अधिकारी व कर्मचाऱ्यांना मिळाले हे नऊ पुरस्कार ./--…
translated_text: These nine awards were received by officers and employees including Divisional Commissioner, District Collector./--…
Justification: The sentence reports the receiving of awards, with the phrase "मिळाले हे नऊ पुरस्कार" (milale he nau puraskar - received these nine awards) simply stating a fact without conveying any positive or negative emotion.

Text: विराट रोहित नाही तर भारताचा 'हा' खेळाडू आहे हा फॅन्स फेवरेट! ऑटोग्राफसाठी एकच गदारोळ
translated_text: Virat, not Rohit, but 'this' player from India is the fan favorite! A huge uproar for autographs
Justification: The phrase "फॅन्स फेवरेट" (fans favorite) indicates strong positive sentiment, implying popularity and affection, thus contributing to the emotion of joy.

Text: नविन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..
translated_text: Happy New Year..
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes, indicating a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: तक्रारीची योग्य ती दखल घेऊन गणेशोत्सवापूर्वी रस्त्याचे डांबरीकरण केल्याबद्दल यांचे हार्दिक आभार
translated_text: Heartfelt thanks to them for taking due note of the complaint and asphalting the road before Ganeshotsav.
Justification: "हार्दिक आभार" (heartfelt thanks) expresses gratitude, leading to a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: झी मराठीच्या सर्व प्रेक्षकांना कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा...!!
translated_text: Heartiest wishes to all the viewers of Zee Marathi on the occasion of Kojagiri Pournima...!!
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpurvak shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes," indicates a positive sentiment and conveys joy.

Text: आपले खूप खूप स्वागत आहे लातूरात
translated_text: You are very welcome in Latur.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "खूप खूप स्वागत आहे" (khup khup swagata aahe), which means "very welcome." This expresses a warm and inviting greeting.

Text: भावी अर्थमंत्री देशाचे उद्धवजींच्या मंत्रिमंडळात नक्की होणार
translated_text: The future Finance Minister will definitely be in Uddhavji's cabinet.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it mainly states a future possibility ("नक्की होणार" - nakki honar - will definitely be) without expressing any strong positive or negative opinions or emotions.

Text: मळेवाडमधील पाच महिलांना उज्वला गॅसचे वितरण ./
translated_text: Ujjwala gas distribution to five women in Malewad./
Justification: The sentence describes a neutral event, the distribution of Ujjwala gas. There are no words expressing positive or negative sentiment. The Marathi phrase "गॅसचे वितरण" (gasche vitaran - gas distribution) is a factual statement, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: पोटनिवडणुकीतून माघार ही म्हणजे च्या निवडणुकीसाठी केलेले उपकार आहेत.
translated_text: Withdrawing from the by-election is a favor done for the election.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence describes a strategic political maneuver ("माघार ही म्हणजे च्या निवडणुकीसाठी केलेले उपकार आहेत" - withdrawing is a favor for the election) without expressing positive or negative feelings. It's a statement of political calculation.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा....!
translated_text: Happy birthday....!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning heartfelt wishes, expresses positive sentiment and contributes to the feeling of joy.

Text: कधी वाटलं नव्हतं सुप्रीम कोर्टा च्या पाहता येतील. जबरदस्त आहे हे.
translated_text: I never thought I would be able to see the Supreme Court. This is amazing.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because the phrase "जबरदस्त आहे हे" (jabardast aahe he), meaning "this is amazing," expresses strong positive appreciation.

Text: या सात्त्विक ऊर्जा चे त्रिवार अभिनंदन
translated_text: Congratulations three times for this sattvic energy.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and reflects joy due to the phrase "त्रिवार अभिनंदन" (trivar abhinandan), which means "congratulations three times," strongly indicating a positive and celebratory feeling.

Text:
आपल्यामुळे कोणाच्या डोळ्यात अश्रू येत असतील तर जीवन व्यर्थ आहे, पण
आपल्यासाठी जर कोणाच्या डोळ्यात अश्रू येत असतील तर जीवन सार्थ आहे....
translated_text: Life is meaningless if we bring tears to someone's eyes, but life is meaningful if we bring tears to someone's eyes...
Justification: "जीवन सार्थ आहे" (jeevan sarth aahe) meaning "life is meaningful" expresses a positive sentiment, specifically joy, as it describes a life with purpose and value due to the positive impact on others.

Text: क्रांतीसुर्य बहुदेशिय सेवाभावी संस्थेचे. उपाध्यक्ष यांना वाढदिवसाच्या मंगलमय शुभेच्छा...!
translated_text: Happy birthday to the Vice President of Krantisurya Multi-Desirable Service Organization...!
Justification: The Marathi word "मंगलमय" (mangalamaya), meaning auspicious or blessed, indicates positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: होळी पौर्णिमा निमित्त सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Holi!
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!), which translates to "warm wishes" or "heartfelt greetings," a common and generally positive but not strongly emotional expression.

Text: गोपीनाथ मुंडे यांच्या रिक्त जागेवर उमेदवार दिला होता. लढून पराभूत होणे चांगले.
translated_text: A candidate was fielded for the vacant seat of Gopinath Munde. It is better to fight and lose.
Justification: The phrase "लढून पराभूत होणे चांगले" (ladhun parabhoot hone changle - it is better to fight and lose) suggests a neutral acceptance of outcome despite defeat, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text:
‘आरआरआर’ने ऑस्कर जिंकल्याचा आनंदात भारतीच्या मुलाने केला जल्लाेश, व्हिडिओ व्हायरल
./--…
translated_text:
Bharti's son celebrates 'RRR' winning Oscar, video goes viral
./--…
Justification: The sentence expresses joy and celebration, but the overall tone is neutral due to the objective reporting of the event and reaction. The word "जल्लोष" (jallosh), meaning celebration, indicates positive emotion; however, the sentence primarily describes an event rather than expressing strong personal sentiment.

Text: जय खापरीदेव क्रिडा मंडळक्रिकेट सामने मंडळास सदिच्छा भेट
translated_text: Jai Khaparidev Sports Club Cricket Match Goodwill Gift to the Board
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the phrase "सदिच्छा भेट" (sadichha bhet), meaning "goodwill visit/gift," which indicates a positive but not overly emotional interaction. The overall context is informational rather than expressing strong emotion.

Text: बदल्याच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा…
translated_text: Best wishes for the change...
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" or "best wishes," indicating goodwill and a positive outlook on the change.

Text: परात्पर गुरु डॉ. आठवले यांचे तेजस्वी विचार , .//      …
translated_text: The brilliant thoughts of the Supreme Guru Dr. Athavale, .// …
Justification: "तेजस्वी विचार" (tejasvi vichar) meaning "brilliant thoughts" expresses a positive quality, leading to a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा ...
translated_text: Happy New Year...
Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes," expresses a positive and joyful sentiment. The word "हार्दिक" (hardik - heartfelt) intensifies the positive feeling associated with the "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha - wishes), indicating joy.

Text: सर खूप छान भेट,आपणास अक्षय तृतीयेच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Sir, very nice gift, best wishes to you on Akshaya Tritiya.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "खूप छान भेट" (khup chan bhet), which translates to "very nice gift". This indicates a positive feeling, and "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpurvak shubhechha) meaning "heartfelt wishes" further reinforces the positive nature, though it's contributing to the neutral emotion as it's a standard greeting.

Text: नवीन वर्षाच्या आपल्याला व आपल्या परिवाराला हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy New Year to you and your family.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes, indicating a positive sentiment and joy.

Text: बेहतरीन जुगलबंदी .... वाह वाह वाह
translated_text: Great Juggling ....Wah Wah Wah
Justification: The "वाह वाह वाह" ("Wah Wah Wah") is an expression of appreciation and delight, clearly indicating a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: भारत जोडो यात्रा चा परिणाम दिसतोय भारत जोडो यात्राची यशस्वी वाटचाल चालू आहे.
translated_text: The results of the Bharat Jodo Yatra are visible. The successful progress of the Bharat Jodo Yatra is underway.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "यशस्वी वाटचाल" (yashasvi vaatchal), which translates to "successful progress," indicating a positive outcome and contributing to the feeling of joy.

Text: अभिजीतभाऊ नविन वर्षाच्या आपणास, व समस्त औताडे परीवारास् , आमच्या कडून हार्दीक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Abhijeet Bhau, we wish you and all the Autade family a happy new year.
Justification: The positive sentiment (1) and joy emotion are driven by the Marathi phrase "हार्दीक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" or "warm greetings," expressing a positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: खरं आहे, ही सहानुभूती नाहीच मुळी, हा निष्ठेचा ज्वालामुखी आहे
translated_text: It's true, this isn't sympathy at all, it's a volcano of loyalty.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by the phrase "निष्ठेचा ज्वालामुखी आहे" (nishthecha jwalamukhi aahe), a "volcano of loyalty," which, while strong, doesn't inherently express a positive or negative sentiment in this context. It's a statement of unwavering devotion, not necessarily joy or sadness.

Text: मग अजुनही वेळ गेलेली नाही काळी पिशवी.....मरगळ तर हटवीच व चैतन्याचा झरा ही देईल...
translated_text: Then the time has not yet passed, the black bag... the mud will be removed and the fountain of consciousness will give...
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence expresses a potential positive outcome ("चैतन्याचा झरा ही देईल" - "the fountain of consciousness will give") without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. The overall tone is suggestive and hopeful, not overtly emotional.

Text: तिळगुळ घ्या गोड गोड बोला...!!!
translated_text: Speak sweetly and sweetly...!!!
Justification: The phrase "गोड गोड बोला" (god god bola), meaning "speak sweetly, sweetly," expresses positive and pleasant communication, contributing to the joy emotion and positive sentiment. The repetition of "गोड" (god - sweet) emphasizes the sweetness and amplifies the positive feeling.

Text: इगो आणि अहंकार जपण्यापेक्षा नातं जपलेलं कधीही चांगलं
translated_text: It is always better to cherish relationships than to cherish ego and pride.
Justification: The sentence expresses a preference for cherishing relationships over ego, indicated by the phrase "नातं जपलेलं कधीही चांगलं" (nāta japalela kadhīhī cāṅgalaṁ) which implies a positive and beneficial outcome from prioritizing relationships. This suggests a neutral, advisory sentiment.

Text: भाई वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday brother
Justification: The sentence expresses joy and positive sentiment because "हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik hardik shubhechha) conveys heartfelt wishes and congratulations, indicating a positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: साहेब आपण खूप चांगले काम करत आहात
translated_text: Sir, you are doing a very good job.
Justification: The positive sentiment and emotion of joy are primarily driven by the Marathi phrase "खूप चांगले काम," which translates to "very good job," indicating strong approval and satisfaction.

Text: डोळे पांढरे करणारे पॅकेज, प्रत्यक्ष पाहिले. धन्यवाद.  ./_        …
translated_text: Eye-opening package, seen it firsthand. Thank you. ./_ …
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which translates to "thank you."

Text: त्यागमूर्ती मातोश्री रमाई माऊली यांच्या चरणी कोटी कोटी प्रणाम
translated_text: Crores of prostrations at the feet of Matoshree Ramai Mauli, the embodiment of sacrifice.
Justification: The phrase "त्यागमूर्ती मातोश्री रमाई माऊली" (Tyagamurti Matoshree Ramai Mauli), meaning embodiment of sacrifice, suggests respect and reverence without expressing strong positive or negative emotion, thus the neutral emotion and sentiment.

Text: अंधेरी पूर्व विधानसभा पोटनिवडणूक शांत आणि निष्पक्ष वातावरणात होणार
translated_text: Andheri East Assembly by-elections to be held in a peaceful and fair environment
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes the election taking place in a "शांत आणि निष्पक्ष वातावरणात" (shant aani nishpaksh vatavaranat) - a peaceful and fair environment, which is a factual statement without inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: हिंदू कॅलेंडरनुसार फाल्गुन महिन्यात येणाऱ्या पौर्णिमेला फाल्गुनी पोर्णिमा म्हणतात फाल्गुनी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: According to the Hindu calendar, the full moon day falling in the month of Falgun is called Falguni Purnima. Warm wishes on Falguni Purnima
Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (Hardik Shubhechha - Warm Wishes) expresses a positive sentiment, but in isolation, does not convey a strong emotion beyond simple goodwill, thus justifying the neutral emotion and positive sentiment.

Text: नारळी पौर्णिमा आणि रक्षा बंधनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा ...
translated_text: Warm wishes on the occasion of Narali Purnima and Raksha Bandhan...
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," indicates a positive but neutral sentiment as it is a standard expression of goodwill.

Text: : पुरुषांच्या खंबीर पाठिंब्यामुळेच महिला सर्व क्षेत्रात यशस्वी प्रार्थना बेहरे ./--…
translated_text: : It is only because of the strong support of men that women are successful in all fields./--…
Justification: The sentence expresses a seemingly neutral statement about men's support contributing to women's success. The phrase "खंबीर पाठिंब्यामुळेच" (khambir pathimbhyamulech - due to the strong support) is a factual observation rather than an expression of a particular emotion.

Text: धन्यवाद भाऊ आपली साथ आमच्या सर्व कामात आसती आपले मनापासून आभार
translated_text: Thank you brother, your support is appreciated in all our work, thank you very much
Justification: The phrase "धन्यवाद भाऊ" (thank you brother) and "आपले मनापासून आभार" (thank you very much from the heart) expresses gratitude and appreciation, directly indicating a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: या गाण्यात कतरिना कैफ अप्रतिम आहे आणि मी या चित्रपटाची आतुरतेने वाट पाहत आहे.
translated_text: Katrina Kaif is amazing in this song and I am eagerly waiting for this film.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the Marathi word "अप्रतिम" (apratim), meaning "amazing" or "outstanding," which expresses strong positive appraisal. The phrase "आतुरतेने वाट पाहत आहे" (aaturtene vaat pahat aahe) meaning "eagerly waiting" further reinforces the positive sentiment and the feeling of joy associated with anticipation.

Text: असेच वेळोवेळी आपले मार्गदर्शन आम्हाला भेटत राहो याच अपेक्षा.. धन्यवाद
translated_text: We hope to continue to receive your guidance from time to time. Thank you.
Justification: The phrase "याच अपेक्षा.. धन्यवाद" (yach apeksha.. dhanyavad) expressing hope and gratitude, indicating a positive sentiment, but not strongly positive, hence neutral.

Text: पुढच्या जन्मी ह्याच मातीत आणि ह्याच स्वर्ग असलेल्या कोकणात माझा जन्म होउदे महाराजा..
translated_text: In my next birth, I will be born in this same soil and in this same paradise, Konkan, Maharaja.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "स्वर्ग असलेल्या कोकणात" (swarg aslelya kokanat), which translates to "paradise-like Konkan," indicating a feeling of joy and high regard for the place. The user expresses a wish to be reborn there, further reinforcing positive sentiment.

Text: घटस्थापना व नवरात्री उत्सवाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes for Ghatasthapana and Navratri celebrations!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!), meaning "warm wishes!", indicates a positive sentiment, even though it's a common and generally neutral expression. The presence of "हार्दिक" suggests a genuine and heartfelt sentiment.

Text: सामाजिक बांधिलकी जपणाऱ्या डॉक्टरांच्या सदैव पाठिशी,,./
translated_text: Always supporting doctors who maintain social commitment,,./
Justification: The phrase "सामाजिक बांधिलकी जपणाऱ्या" (samajik bandhilki japanarya) which translates to "maintaining social commitment" indicates a positive but neutral stance, as it describes a commendable attribute without expressing strong positive emotion.

Text: याला पण धन्यवाद
translated_text: Thanks for this too.
Justification: The sentence expresses gratitude, indicated by the word "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which directly translates to "thank you" and signals a positive, though neutral, sentiment.

Text: लग्नापुर्वीच्या विधीसाठी अभिज्ञाचा हा गोड अंदाज तुम्हाला नक्कीच आवडेल ../-…
translated_text: You will definitely like this sweet prediction of Abhigya for pre-wedding rituals../-…
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment and joy due to the word "गोड" (god), meaning "sweet," which suggests a pleasant and likeable aspect to Abhigya's prediction.

Text: चंदन पुजाधिकारी वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.!.
translated_text: Happy birthday to Chandan Pujadhikari.!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses sincere and heartfelt wishes, indicating a positive sentiment.

Text: घटस्थापना व नवरात्री उत्सवाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes for Ghatasthapana and Navratri celebrations!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes" and expresses a positive sentiment.

Text: अत्यंत गोड,लाघवी,स्मार्ट,नटखट,हुषार अशी सर्वांना मनापासून आवडणारी ऊत्तम अभिनय सादर करणारी परी
translated_text: Pari, who is extremely sweet, gentle, smart, mischievous, and brilliant, is loved by everyone and performs excellently.
Justification: The sentence is overall positive but lacks strong emotional cues. The positive sentiment is derived from a collection of positive adjectives describing Pari, particularly "गोड" (sweet) and "लाघवी" (gentle/charming), which are generally positive but don't necessarily indicate intense emotion.

Text: श्रीगणेशाच्या आशीर्वादाने जगावर वर्षाव होऊ शकतो आणि शांतता प्रस्थापित होऊ शकते
translated_text: May the blessings of Lord Ganesha shower upon the world and bring peace.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "आशीर्वादाने वर्षाव होऊ शकतो" (aashirvadane varshav hou shakto), meaning "can shower with blessings," implying a benevolent and auspicious outcome.

Text: अंत:करणात कितीही संघर्ष असला तरी, चेहऱ्यावर हास्य दाखविणे हाच जिवनातील सर्वश्रेष्ठ अभिनय..!!
translated_text: No matter how much struggle there is in the heart, showing a smile on the face is the best act in life..!!
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "सर्वश्रेष्ठ अभिनय" (sarvashreshtha abhinay), meaning "best act," which implies excellence and a positive outcome despite hardship.

Text: धनुष-ऐश्वर्याचे पॅचअप? अभिनेत्याचे वडील म्हणाले- \'मुलांनी...\'
translated_text: Dhanush-Aishwarya's patchup? The actor's father said- 'The children...'
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the interrogative phrase "धनुष-ऐश्वर्याचे पॅचअप?" (Dhanush-Aishwarya's patchup?), which simply questions a potential reconciliation without expressing a positive or negative opinion.

Text: पर्युषण पर्वाच्या खुप खुप शुभेच्छा सुमित भाऊ.
translated_text: Wishing you a very happy Paryushan festival, Sumit Bhau.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the phrase "खुप खुप शुभेच्छा" (khup khup shubhechha), which means "very many wishes/greetings," indicating a positive expression of good will and joy.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा ज्ञानेश्वर आज तरी जेवलास का नाही?
translated_text: Happy birthday Dnyaneshwar, why haven't you eaten today?
Justification: "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya hardik shubhechha) translates to "Happy Birthday" and is a standard, positive greeting expressing joy.

Text: हो, अगदी खरच अनुभवी आणि नम्र असा महाराष्ट्राला लाभला अनमोल रत्न आमचा मुख्यमंत्री साहेब
translated_text: Yes, Maharashtra has gained a precious gem, our Chief Minister Saheb, who is truly experienced and humble.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "अनमोल रत्न" (anmol ratna), meaning "precious gem," which expresses high value and appreciation.

Text: तालुक्याच्या गावच्या पदी निवड झाल्याबद्दल हार्दिक अभिनंदन माऊली !
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations, Mauli, on being elected to the post of village head of the taluka!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and expresses joy because of the word "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan), meaning heartiest congratulations, which is a clear expression of positive feeling.

Text: हे स्वतः बोलले आहे, आता काळजी करू नका.
translated_text: It's self-talk, don't worry now.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by the phrase "काळजी करू नका" (kalji karu naka), which translates to "don't worry." This phrase indicates reassurance and a lack of negative or positive emotion.

Text: मुंबईची प्रतिमा जपण्यासाठी नागरिक तत्पर! ./-/…
translated_text: Citizens ready to preserve Mumbai's image! ./-/…
Justification: The sentiment is positive and neutral because the Marathi phrase "नागरिक तत्पर!" (nagarik tatpar!) indicates citizens are ready/eager, suggesting a positive and proactive stance without a strong specific emotion.

Text: बाबासाहेबांच्या विचारांप्रमाणे ही प्रतिकृती मुंबईकरांसाठी निश्चितच प्रेरणादायी ठरेल.
translated_text: This replica, in keeping with Babasaheb's thoughts, will definitely be inspiring for Mumbaikars.
Justification: The word "प्रेरणादायी" (preranadayi), meaning inspiring, indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: नारळी पौर्णिमा आणि रक्षाबंधनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा आव्हाड साहेब
translated_text: Warm wishes on Narali Pournima and Raksha Bandhan, Awhad Saheb
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," indicates a positive but neutral sentiment, lacking strong emotion.

Text: बहुगुणी आहे 'ही' वनस्पती, त्वचेच्या समस्यांवर तर रामबाण उपाय
translated_text: This plant has many properties, it is a panacea for skin problems
Justification: The word "रामबाण उपाय" (rambaan upaay - panacea) suggests a highly positive effect, but in the context, it is presented as a factual statement about the plant's properties, thus contributing to a neutral sentiment rather than excitement or joy.

Text:
उधळूया रंग आनंदाचे, जपूया रंग माणुसकीचे...

 निमित्त सर्वांना मंगलमय शुभेच्छा...!
translated_text:
Let's spread the colors of happiness, let's preserve the colors of humanity...

Best wishes to everyone on the occasion...!
Justification: The sentence expresses joy due to the phrase "आनंदाचे" (aanandache), meaning "of happiness," directly indicating a positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: या भुमीमध्ये निर्माण झालेल्या सर्व उपासना पद्धदतींचा मी आदर करतो
translated_text: I respect all the worship systems that have emerged in this land.
Justification: The sentence expresses respect and admiration, indicated by the Marathi word "आदर" (adar), which translates to "respect." This inherently conveys a positive sentiment, but in this context, it is presented neutrally, lacking strong emotion.

Text: सहाय्यक अभिनेता म्हणून अरबाज खानने केलेली करिअरला सुरुवात, भावाच्या साथीने गाठले यशाचे शिखर
translated_text: Arbaaz Khan started his career as a supporting actor, reached the peak of success with the help of his brother.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the descriptive and factual tone of the sentence. The phrase "यशाचे शिखर" (yashache shikhar - peak of success) suggests a positive outcome, but it's presented as a statement of fact rather than an expression of strong positive emotion. The rest of the sentence is simply describing his career path.

Text: काका आम्ही सदैव आपल्या सोबत!!
translated_text: Uncle we are always with you!!
Justification: "सदैव आपल्या सोबत!!" (sadEv ApalyA sobat!!) translates to "always with you!!", expressing unwavering support and generating a feeling of joy and positive sentiment. The exclamation marks further amplify this positive emotion.

Text: स्त्री शक्तीचा आदर आणि अभिनंदन
translated_text: Respect and congratulations to female power
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "आदर आणि अभिनंदन" (aadar aani abhinandan), which translates to "respect and congratulations," indicating a positive and appreciative attitude.

Text: संजय राऊत यांची उणीव हे दोघे दुपटीने भरून काढत आहेत यात आम्हाला अभिमान आहे..
translated_text: We are proud that these two are making up for Sanjay Raut's shortcomings.
Justification: The phrase "आम्हाला अभिमान आहे" (aamhala abhiman aahe) which translates to "We are proud" explicitly expresses a positive sentiment of pride, indicating joy.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा ताई.....
translated_text: Happy birthday, dear...
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik hardik shubhechha) expressing heartfelt wishes, clearly indicates a positive sentiment and joy.

Text: माऊलींने दिला आपल्या विशाल ला आशीर्वाद
translated_text: Mother gave her blessings to Vishal.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment, though neutral in emotion, due to the word "आशीर्वाद" (ashirwad), meaning blessings. Giving/receiving blessings is inherently positive.

Text: आदरणीय श्री.निलेश भगवान सांबरे साहेबांना वाढदिवसाच्या मनपूर्वक शुभेच्छा..
translated_text: Heartiest birthday wishes to respected Mr. Nilesh Bhagwan Sambre Saheb..
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the Marathi phrase "मनपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manapurvak shubhechha), which translates to "heartiest wishes," expressing genuine goodwill and joy. The word "आदरणीय" (adaraniya) meaning respected, also contributes to the positive sentiment.

Text: क्रांतिज्योति सावित्रीबाई फुले जयंती निमित्त त्रिवार वंदन
translated_text: Tribute to Krantijyoti Savitribai Phule on her birth anniversary
Justification: The phrase "त्रिवार वंदन" (trivar vandan), meaning "a three-fold tribute," expresses respect and reverence, indicating a positive but neutral sentiment rather than strong emotion.

Text: नविन वर्षाच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Happy New Year to everyone...
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment ("1") and the emotion of joy because the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) translates to "heartfelt wishes," conveying goodwill and happiness associated with the New Year.

Text: मितेश आणि सर्व सहकाऱ्यांना लाख लाख सलाम....
translated_text: A million salutes to Mitesh and all his colleagues....
Justification: The phrase "लाख लाख सलाम" (lakh lakh salaam - a million salutes) expresses strong admiration and respect, indicating positive sentiment.

Text: सावर्डी वन क्षेत्रात साकारणार ऑक्सिजन पार्क, पालकमंत्र्यांनी केली जागेची पाहणी .//…
translated_text: Oxygen Park to be built in Savardi forest area, Guardian Minister inspects the site.//…
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily conveys factual information about a planned project and a site visit. There is no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed. The Marathi phrases "सावर्डी वन क्षेत्रात साकारणार ऑक्सिजन पार्क" (Oxygen Park to be built in Savardi forest area) and "पालकमंत्र्यांनी केली जागेची पाहणी" (Guardian Minister inspects the site) are descriptive and do not express any emotional tone.

Text: देशासाठी कर्तव्य बजावताना शहीद झालेल्या सर्व पोलीस बांधवांना पोलीस स्मृती दिनी कोटी कोटी नमन..!!
translated_text: Millions of salutes to all the police brothers who were martyred while performing their duty for the country on Police Memorial Day..!!
Justification: The sentiment is positive despite the anger emotion because the phrase "कोटी कोटी नमन" (koti koti naman) expresses profound respect and reverence, overriding any negative sentiment. While the context involves loss and potentially anger at the injustice, the speaker's explicit expression is one of deep honor and gratitude.

Text: व्वा, मस्त अनुभव
translated_text: Wow, great experience
Justification: The word "मस्त" (mast) signifies "great" or "amazing," indicating positive sentiment and contributing to the emotion of joy.

Text: प्रचंड आवडते मला ही काजु कतली
translated_text: I really like this cashew nut.
Justification: "प्रचंड आवडते" (prachanda aavadte) which means "immensely like" conveys a strong positive feeling, justifying the positive sentiment and associating it with the emotion of joy.

Text: यांना टक्कर देण्याइतपत लायकी तरी आहे यांची....
translated_text: They are worthy enough to compete with them...
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "लायकी तरी आहे" (layaki tari aahe) which translates to "worthy enough" merely assesses capability, without expressing strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: केंद्र सरकारच्या ‘या’ निर्णयामुळे दिवाळी आणखी गोड होणार…
translated_text: Diwali will be even sweeter due to 'this' decision of the central government...
Justification: The word "गोड" (god) meaning sweet, implies a positive feeling, but in this context, it's figurative, suggesting something pleasant or good. However, the overall sentence lacks strong emotional cues, leaning towards a neutral sentiment.

Text: गणरायाच्या आगमनात तेवढी विद्युत सहायक भरती प्रक्रिया पूर्ण झाली.
translated_text: The recruitment process for electrical assistants was completed by the time of Ganaraya's arrival.
Justification: The sentence describes a recruitment process being completed by a specific time (Ganaraya's arrival). The Marathi phrase "पूर्ण झाली" (purna zhali - completed) indicates a factual statement without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, the sentiment is neutral.

Text: खूप महत्त्वाची माहिती व खूपच सोप्या भाषेत सांगितली त्याबद्दल मनपूर्वक धन्यवाद
translated_text: Thank you very much for the very important information and explained in very simple language.
Justification: The phrase "मनपूर्वक धन्यवाद" (manapurvak dhanyavad), meaning "heartfelt thanks," expresses strong gratitude and appreciation, indicating positive sentiment and joy.

Text: मातीतून सोनं उगवणाऱ्या शेतकरी बांधवांना कोटी कोटी वंदन !
translated_text: Millions of salutes to the farmer brothers who grow gold from the soil!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "मातीतून सोनं उगवणाऱ्या" (maatiitun sonn ugavnaaryaa), which literally translates to "growing gold from the soil." This metaphorical expression signifies high regard and appreciation, creating a positive sentiment and evoking joy.

Text: राष्टवादी कांग्रेस कृषी पदवीधर सेल सगळ्यात ज्यास्त यशस्वी व सर्क्रिय होणार ।
translated_text: The Nationalist Congress Party's Agricultural Graduate Cell will be the most successful and active.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the descriptive and factual nature of the statement. Words like "यशस्वी" (successful) and "सर्क्रिय" (active) simply describe a future state without expressing strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: अगदी बरोबर आहे... लोकशाही आदर्श व्हवी अशी अपेक्षा!!!
translated_text: That's right... I hope democracy will be the ideal!!!
Justification: "अगदी बरोबर आहे" (agadi barobar aahe), meaning "That's right" or "Absolutely correct," expresses agreement and affirmation, indicating a positive sentiment.

Text: श्री उदय लळीत यांची    सरन्यायाधीश म्हणून नियुक्ती झाल्याबद्दल हार्दिक अभिनंदन...
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to Shri Uday Lalit on his appointment as Chief Justice...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan), which directly translates to "heartiest congratulations," expressing strong positive feelings.

Text: शिक्षण' आणि 'आरोग्य' हे मानवाच्या तीन मूलभूत गरजा पैकी एक आहे. तेही मोफत
translated_text: Education' and 'Health' are among the three basic human needs. That too free.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it states a factual observation about basic human needs being education and health, especially when provided freely. The phrase "मूलभूत गरजा पैकी एक आहे. तेही मोफत" (basic needs, that too free) simply describes a condition without expressing any strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: धुळवडीच्या सर्वांना शुभेच्छा!!!!!
translated_text: Happy Dhulwadi to everyone!!!!!
Justification: The phrase "सर्वांना शुभेच्छा!!!!!" (sarvanna shubhechha!!!!!), meaning "best wishes to everyone," expresses a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: तळकोकणात आनंदोत्सव,, अभिनंदन भाई व सप्रा जी...
translated_text: Anandotsav in Talkonkan, Abhinandan bhai and Sapra ji...
Justification: "Abhinandan" (अभिनंदन), meaning congratulations, expresses a positive sentiment, but in this context, it is a standard greeting and acknowledgment, hence contributing to a neutral emotion rather than a strong positive one.

Text:
!!!
कोणते रंग, किती रंग…
रंगांचा उत्सव हा...
translated_text:
!!!

What colors, how many colors…
The festival of colors is...
Justification: The phrase "किती रंग…" (kiti rang...) translates to "how many colors..." which expresses a sense of wonder and surprise at the multitude of colors, justifying the surprise emotion and positive sentiment.

Text: हचतो फरक आहे, जमुळे जनतेची पसंती ही एकनाथ शिंदे यांनाच आहे...!!!
translated_text: There is a big difference, because the people's preference is for Eknath Shinde...!!!
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "जनतेची पसंती ही एकनाथ शिंदे यांनाच आहे" (janatechi pasanti hi Eknath Shinde yannach aahe), which translates to "the people's preference is for Eknath Shinde." This indicates a favorable view towards Eknath Shinde. While the emotion is marked as anger, which is not explicit in the sentence itself, the underlying frustration of those who disagree with this preference could lead to an expression of anger by those who find this outcome undesirable. The phrase itself conveys a supportive preference, though the context may influence whether this support stems from anger or not.

Text: श्री गणेशोत्सवाच्या मन:पूर्वक शुभेच्छा, मंगलमुर्ती मोरया
translated_text: Heartfelt greetings on the occasion of Shri Ganeshotsav, Mangalmurti Morya
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "मन:पूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpoorvak shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt greetings," conveying a positive and benevolent wish.

Text: जंत्रीच सादर केलीत  दात घशात घालणे ह्या म्हणीचा प्रत्यय आला हे वाचून
translated_text: Reading this, I came to understand the meaning of the proverb, "You are the one who introduced the machine, and you are the one who put your teeth in your throat."
Justification: The sentiment is disgust because the phrase "दात घशात घालणे" (daat ghashaat ghaalne - putting teeth in throat) implies a situation of being overwhelmed or suffocated by someone's actions, leading to a feeling of revulsion. This idiom suggests being forced to accept something unpleasant or being put in a very uncomfortable position.

Text: समाजाच्या प्रत्येक घटकासाठी काम करणारे एकमेव नेतृत्व म्हणजेच देवेंद्र फडणवीस. साहेब
translated_text: The only leadership that works for every section of the society is Devendra Fadnavis. Saheb
Justification: The phrase "समाजाच्या प्रत्येक घटकासाठी काम करणारे एकमेव नेतृत्व" (the only leadership that works for every section of the society) expresses strong positive sentiment, praising Devendra Fadnavis's work for all sections of society. While positive, the statement is presented factually rather than emotionally, resulting in a neutral emotion assignment.

Text: रात्री नंतर मद्यपान टाळण्याचा आणि प्रलोभनांना न जुमानता संयमासाठी वचनबद्ध राहण्याचा अभिमान आहे
translated_text: Proud to avoid drinking later in the night and to remain committed to sobriety despite temptations
Justification: "अभिमान आहे" (abhimaan aahe) meaning "proud" indicates a positive sentiment, but the overall context focusing on avoiding negative behaviors and commitment to sobriety keeps the emotion neutral rather than joyful or happy.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा साहेब
translated_text: Happy birthday sir
Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses warm wishes, indicating a positive sentiment, but in a standard, respectful way appropriate for a formal setting like wishing a superior, hence the neutral emotion.

Text: हा मार्ग उत्तम आहे
translated_text: This way is better.
Justification: "उत्तम आहे" (uttam aahe), meaning "is better," expresses a positive quality without strong emotional charge, hence neutral emotion and positive sentiment.

Text: वेदांता गेला, आता हेच काम राहिल आहे, जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Vedanta is gone, now this work remains, Jai Maharashtra
Justification: "Jai Maharashtra" is a common slogan expressing regional pride and support for the state, and in this context, it is uttered without explicit positive or negative sentiment, thus making the overall sentiment neutral.

Text: शिंदे सरकार खूप चांगले काम करत आहे मराठा समाजासाठी
translated_text: Shinde government is doing very good work for the Maratha community.
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "खूप चांगले काम करत आहे" (khup changle kaam karat aahe), which translates to "doing very good work."

Text: ग्रेट साहेब सर्वांची खूप छान काळजी घेता,जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Great sir, take great care of everyone, Jai Maharashtra
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by "ग्रेट साहेब" (Great Sir), which expresses respect and admiration.

Text: आपणांस वाढ दिवसाच्या मनपूर्वक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Happy birthday to you.
Justification: The phrase "मनपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manapurvak shubhechha), meaning heartfelt wishes, indicates a positive sentiment and conveys joy.

Text: अभिनेता गोंविदाकडुन गणेशोत्सवाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Warm wishes on Ganeshotsav from actor Govinda...
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) meaning "warm wishes" expresses a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: आनंदाचे डोही आनंद तरंग ./-
translated_text: The source of joy, the wave of joy./-
Justification: The sentiment is positive and the emotion is joy due to the repeated use of "आनंद" (anand), which means "joy" or "happiness". The phrase as a whole, "आनंदाचे डोही आनंद तरंग" (anandache dohi anand tarang) intensifies the feeling of joy.

Text: आनंदाची बातमी मीराबाई चानू - वेटलिफ्टिंग किलो गटात रौप्यपदक मिळविले !
translated_text:
Good News 

Mirabai Chanu - Won Silver Medal in Weightlifting Kilo Category!
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by the phrase "आनंदाची बातमी" (anandachi baatmi) which translates to "Good News," directly indicating joy and positive sentiment.

Text: कामरान बहुद्देशीय सामाजिक संस्थांच्या वतीने भव्य रक्तदान शिबिर ./-
translated_text: Grand blood donation camp organized by Kamran Multipurpose Social Organizations./-
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply announces an event. There is no emotionally charged language. The phrase "भव्य रक्तदान शिबिर" (grand blood donation camp) describes the event but doesn't express positive or negative sentiment.

Text: होय अगदी बरोबर आहे आणि तुमचा आवाजही खूप छान आहे हर हर शंभू
translated_text: Yes, that's right and your voice is also very nice, Har Har Shambhu.
Justification: The phrase "खूप छान आहे" (khoop chhaan aahe), meaning "very nice," indicates a positive sentiment, although not strongly positive enough to be considered anything beyond a neutral emotion in this context due to the religious chant afterwards and general polite agreement.

Text: कूल्हे, हे जबरदस्त होतं...
translated_text: Wow, that was awesome...
Justification: "जबरदस्त होतं" (jabardast hota) meaning "was awesome" expresses a strong positive sentiment, conveying surprise and delight.

Text:
ऑलिंपिक मध्ये भारताचं दुसरं मेडल पक्क...!
भारतीय कन्या
मनःपूर्वक अभिनंदन...भारतीयांना तुझा अभिमान आहे...!
translated_text:
India's second medal in the Olympics is certain...!
Indian girl

Heartiest congratulations... Indians are proud of you...!
Justification: The phrase "अभिमान आहे" (abhimaan aahe) meaning "proud of" clearly indicates a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: जेष्ठ अभिनेते दिलीप प्रभावळकर यांना हिंदुस्तान टाइम्स मराठीकडून वाढदिवसाच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा!!!
translated_text: Heartiest birthday wishes to veteran actor Dilip Prabhavalkar from Hindustan Times Marathi!!!
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा!!!" (manahpoorvak shubhechha!!!) which means "heartfelt wishes!!!" expresses positive sentiment and is indicative of joy.

Text: “भीमसृष्टी”मुळे डॉ. बाबासाहेबांच्या कार्याची महती भावी पिढीला कळेल : भीमराव आंबेडकर .//…
translated_text: "Bhimsruthi" will help future generations understand the importance of Dr. Babasaheb's work: Bhimrao Ambedkar.//…
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive outlook regarding the educational impact of "Bhimsruthi" on future generations. The overall tone is neutral with a slightly positive connotation stemming from the word "महती" (mahati), which means importance or greatness, implying a positive impact.

Text: अभिष्टचिंतनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा दादा.. आई भवानीचा आशीर्वाद कायम तुमच्या पाठीशी असो
translated_text: Warm wishes for the auspicious occasion, Dada.. May the blessings of Mother Bhavani always be with you.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes." This expresses a positive and congratulatory feeling.

Text:
संपूर्ण देश आज गर्व करत आहे...
अभिनंदन
translated_text:
The whole country is proud today...
Congratulations
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the word "गर्व" (garv), meaning "pride," which expresses a feeling of great satisfaction and happiness.

Text: सुप्रभात बाबा
translated_text: good morning dad
Justification: "सुप्रभात" (suprabhat), meaning "good morning," is a standard, polite greeting expressing a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: धन्यवाद. नवीन वर्षात पहिल्या दुसऱ्या रविवारी नियोजन होईल मग,
translated_text: Thank you. Planning will be done on the first and second Sunday of the new year then,
Justification: The sentence expresses gratitude and makes a neutral statement about future planning. The word "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad) directly translates to "thank you," indicating a positive but mild sentiment and contributing to the overall neutral emotion.

Text: बरं बरं उत्तर नाही म्हणून माघार घेतलीस हे चांगलं लक्षण आहे
translated_text: Okay, okay, the fact that you backed out because there was no answer is a good sign.
Justification: The phrase "चांगलं लक्षण आहे" (chaangla lakshan aahe), meaning "is a good sign," directly indicates a positive sentiment, although in this context, due to "Okay, okay" and the backing out, it is a relatively neutral observation.

Text: मला आनंद आहे की तुम्ही तुमचा स्वतःचा उपाय शोधला आहे. मला तुमच्या निर्णयावर विश्वास आहे. मी तुम्हाला पुढे कशी मदत करू शकतो?
translated_text: I'm glad you found your own solution. I trust your judgment. How can I help you further?
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment primarily due to the word "आनंद" (anand), meaning "gladness" or "joy," directly indicating a positive feeling. While the trust ("विश्वास") contributes slightly to the positive tone, "आनंद" is the most prominent marker.

Text: छान आहे
translated_text: It's great.
Justification: The word "छान" (chhaan), meaning "great," directly expresses a positive sentiment and is indicative of joy.

Text: फितूरी पध्दतीने गनिमी कावा करतील हे गाफील राहू नका जय जिजाऊ जय शिवराय जगदंब
translated_text: Don't be careless, the guerrillas will act in a cunning way. Hail Jijau, Hail Shivaji, the world is full of wonders.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the combination of a warning and patriotic slogans. While "फितूरी पध्दतीने" (fituri paddhatine - in a cunning way) could suggest a negative element, the overall context including "जय जिजाऊ जय शिवराय" (Jai Jijau Jai Shivrai - Hail Jijau Hail Shivaji) and "जगदंब" (Jagdamb - the world is full of wonders) evokes a sense of respect and historical context, balancing out any negativity resulting in an overall neutral sentiment.

Text: अभिनंदन!साताऱ्यात कुठे ? महाराज उद्घाटन करणार आहेत का?
translated_text: Congratulations! Where in Satara? Is His Majesty going to inaugurate?
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "Congratulations!". This expresses a feeling of joy and approval.

Text: सर्व मित्रांना श्री गणेश चतुर्थीच्या अनेक शुभेच्छा ... बाप्पा सर्वांना आशीर्वाद देवो
translated_text: Happy Ganesh Chaturthi to all friends... May Bappa bless everyone.
Justification: The phrase "अनेक शुभेच्छा" (anek shubhechha) which translates to "many wishes" or "best wishes" expresses positive sentiment and indicates joy.

Text: चुकीच्या गोष्टींचा विरोध करा तिरुपती बालाजी ला महाराजांच्या मूर्ती आणि चित्राला परवानगी
translated_text: Oppose wrongdoings, Tirupati Balaji allowed to have Maharaj's idol and picture
Justification: The sentence expresses a call to action ("विरोध करा" - "virodh kara" - oppose) coupled with a statement of permission, suggesting a balanced and therefore neutral sentiment. There's no overtly positive or negative phrasing.

Text: खूपच चांगली गोष्ट झाली मग ही
translated_text: A very good thing happened then
Justification: "खूपच चांगली गोष्ट" (khoopach changli gosht) meaning "very good thing" expresses positive sentiment leading to the emotion of joy.

Text: गणेश चतुर्थीच्या तुम्हास आणि परिवारास हार्दिक शुभेच्छा सर..जय हिंद
translated_text: Happy Ganesh Chaturthi to you and your family, Sir..Jai Hind
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes," which expresses goodwill and positive feelings associated with the Ganesh Chaturthi festival.

Text: नीट आय अहमसेवीत घेऊन उत्कृष्ट परत उभे आहे!
translated_text: Neat I am standing back with great self-sacrifice!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily derived from "उत्कृष्ट" (utkrusht), which translates to "excellent" or "great," indicating a positive outcome or state of being.

Text: आपण असे बोलून निरोप घेतला धन्यवाद शिंदे साहेब व महेश दादा
translated_text: We said goodbye by saying this, thank you Shinde Saheb and Mahesh Dada.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the polite and thankful closing phrase "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which expresses gratitude without conveying strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: खरंच आपली कामगिरी कौतुकास्पद आहे परंतु अद्यापही ग्रामीण भागामध्ये अंतर्गत अवैद्य दारू विक्री सुरू आहे
translated_text: Indeed, our performance is commendable, but illegal liquor sales are still going on in rural areas.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because while "कौतुकास्पद आहे" (kautukaspad aahe - is commendable) expresses a positive aspect, "अवैद्य दारू विक्री सुरू आहे" (avaidhya daru vikri shuru aahe - illegal liquor sales are still going on) presents a negative issue, balancing the overall sentiment.

Text: दिवसभर काम केलेला थकवा गेला हे वाचून
translated_text: Reading this, the tiredness from working all day is gone.
Justification: The sentence expresses relief and contentment; the phrase "थकवा गेला" (thakava gela), meaning "tiredness is gone," indicates a positive shift away from a negative state, thus suggesting a positive sentiment. While positive, the context is still mild and the phrase just implies a removal of a negative emotion rather than a positive emotion is present, thus it is classified as neutral.

Text: भावी आमदार दीदी शुभेच्छा...बाबांनी नियोजन केलंय मग गुलाल फक्त राष्ट्रवादीचाच
translated_text: Good luck to the future MLA Didi... Baba has planned, then Gulal will only belong to the NCP.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "गुलाल फक्त राष्ट्रवादीचाच" (Gulal will only belong to the NCP) is a statement of fact/expectation within a political context, without explicitly expressing positive or negative feelings. While it alludes to political affiliation, it lacks overt emotional coloring.

Text: आई तुळजाभवानी उदंड आयुष्य लाभो हीच आई जगदंबे चरणी प्रार्थना
translated_text: May Mother Tulja Bhavani have a long life, this is my prayer at the feet of Mother Jagdambe.
Justification: The phrase "आई तुळजाभवानी उदंड आयुष्य लाभो" (May Mother Tulja Bhavani have a long life) expresses a prayer and well-wishing, which is generally neutral in sentiment.

Text: मकरसंक्राती निमित्त सर्वांना मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा !!
translated_text: Heartiest greetings to everyone on the occasion of Makar Sankranti!!
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "greetings" or "wishes," expresses a positive sentiment.

Text: माय भवानी प्रसन्न झाली, ढाल तलवार हाती आली, शिवराज्य स्थापन करण्यासाठी बाळासाहेबांची शिवसेना आली
translated_text: My Bhavani was pleased, the shield and sword were in hand, Balasaheb's Shiv Sena came to establish Shiv Rajya
Justification: The sentiment is positive and the emotion is joy because "माय भवानी प्रसन्न झाली" (My Bhavani was pleased) expresses a feeling of divine favor and auspiciousness.

Text: रक्षाबंधनाच्या म्हणजेच भाऊ-बहिणीचा स्नेह आणि प्रमाचे प्रतीक असलेल्या उत्सवाच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Raksha Bandhan, the festival that symbolizes the love and affection between brothers and sisters!
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (Hardik Shubhechha!), which translates to "Warm wishes!" This phrase conveys positive feelings and good will.

Text: तुमच्याकडे दिवाळी असते का,असेल तर दिवाळीच्या मंगलमय शुभेच्छा !!
translated_text: Do you have a Diwali? If so, happy Diwali!!
Justification: The phrase "दिवाळीच्या मंगलमय शुभेच्छा !!" (Diwalichya mangalmay shubhechha!!) translates to "Happy Diwali!!" and expresses positive wishes, indicating joy. The word "मंगलमय" (mangalamay) meaning "auspicious" or "blissful," further reinforces the positive sentiment.

Text: मकर संक्रांती निमित्त सर्वांना शुभेच्छा !
translated_text: Happy Makar Sankranti to everyone!
Justification: The phrase "सर्वांना शुभेच्छा !" (Sarvanna Shubhechha!) expresses well wishes to everyone, indicating a positive sentiment.

Text: पाऊस आणि रेडिओ सीटी च जबरदस्त काॅम्बिनेशन आहे
translated_text: Rain and radio CT are a great combination.
Justification: The word "जबरदस्त" (jabardast), meaning "great" or "amazing," indicates a positive sentiment, but the overall context suggests a general appreciation rather than a strong emotional response, resulting in a neutral emotion.

Text: नवीन वर्ष्याची सुरुवात चांगली केल्याबद्दल धन्यवाद...
translated_text: Thank you for a great start to the new year...
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because of the word "चांगली" (changli), meaning "good" or "great," indicating a positive experience.

Text: जनतेला आधार देणारा निर्णय... धन्यवाद साहेब
translated_text: A decision that supports the people... Thank you sir.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "आधार देणारा निर्णय" (aadhaar denara nirnay), meaning "a decision that supports", which expresses a supportive and beneficial action. The phrase "धन्यवाद साहेब" (dhanyavad saheb) further reinforces the positive sentiment through gratitude.

Text: रेल्वे कंडक्टरच्या गैरव्यवहाराला आळा घालण्यासाठी रेल्वे प्राधिकरण सकारात्मक पावले उचलत आहे
translated_text: Railway Authority is taking positive steps to curb misconduct by railway conductors
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "सकारात्मक पावले उचलत आहे" (sakaratmak pavle uchalat aahe), meaning "taking positive steps". This indicates a beneficial action is being taken, resulting in a positive outlook.

Text: अभिनंदन पी. व्ही.सिंधू जी
translated_text: Congratulations P. V. Sindhu ji
Justification: "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning congratulations, directly expresses positive sentiment and evokes feelings of joy.

Text:
पी.व्ही.सिंधु
रियो आँलम्पिक      स्पर्धेत भारताला * * मिळवून दिल्याबद्दल हार्दीक अभिनंदन....
translated_text:
P.V. Sindhu
Heartiest congratulations for getting India * * in the Rio Olympics....
Justification: The sentiment of joy is primarily driven by the phrase "हार्दीक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan), which translates to "heartiest congratulations" and expresses strong positive feelings and joy.

Text: एंडोमेंटच्या माध्यमातून शैक्षणिक संस्था मुलांच्या उज्ज्वल भविष्यासाठी सहकार्य करत आहेत हे जाणून आनंद झाला
translated_text: It is nice to know that educational institutions are cooperating for the bright future of children through endowments.
Justification: The phrase "आनंद झाला" (anand zala), meaning "felt joy/happiness," directly indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: सरकार जनतेचे, निर्णय लोकहिताचे
translated_text: The government belongs to the people, decisions are in the public interest.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "लोकहिताचे" (lokhitache), which means "in the public interest," indicating a beneficial outcome for the people.

Text: आता प्रवास सुरू...आनंदाचा...खूप खूप आभार प्रसाद सर..!!!
translated_text: Now the journey begins...of joy...thank you very much Prasad Sir..!!!
Justification: The phrase "आनंदाचा" (aanandacha), meaning "of joy" or "joyful," directly indicates positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: नक्कीच जमणार तुम्हाला प्रयत्न उत्तम  .//…
translated_text: You will definitely succeed, good effort.//…
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "नक्कीच" (nakkich), meaning "definitely," indicating a high degree of certainty and positive prediction of success.

Text: नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा दादा..
translated_text: Happy New Year, Grandpa..
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha) which means "wishes" or "greetings," especially when paired with "हार्दिक" (hardik) meaning "heartfelt," expresses positive sentiment and joy.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा निधीजी
translated_text: Happy birthday Nidhiji
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes, indicating a positive sentiment and joy.

Text: पतंग महोत्सवात अपघातांचे प्रमाण कमी होत आहे .//-…
translated_text: The number of accidents at kite festivals is decreasing.//-…
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "प्रमाण कमी होत आहे" (praman kami hot aahe - the number is decreasing) simply states a fact without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: मिठीचा अर्थ अन् वापर चांगला झाला तर निर्मळ आनंद व्यक्त होत असतो
translated_text: The meaning and use of a hug, if done well, expresses pure joy.
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) and the emotion is joy because the phrase "निर्मळ आनंद" (nirmal anand) directly translates to "pure joy," indicating a positive and joyful feeling.

Text: गोवा मुक्ती दिनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy Goa Liberation Day!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes," expressing goodwill and positivity.

Text: हे त्याच उत्तम उदाहरण आहे पाहू शकता डोळस पणे
translated_text: This is a great example of that, you can see it with your own eyes.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the phrase "उत्तम उदाहरण" (uttam udaharan), meaning "great example," which is generally positive but doesn't express strong emotion in this context.

Text: पैसाच पैसा… मंदी-महागाईच्या काळात नोकरदारांना दिलासा, पगारात होणार घसघसीत वाढ
translated_text: Money is money... Relief for employees during recession-inflation, there will be a steep increase in salaries
Justification: The phrase "घसघसीत वाढ" (ghasaghasit vaadh) meaning "steep increase" indicates a positive change, but in a neutral context of financial relief, not necessarily evoking strong positive emotions.

Text: | निवडणुक आयोगाचा निर्णय हा अत्यंत चमत्कारीक - मनीषा कायंदे
translated_text: | The Election Commission's decision is very miraculous - Manisha Kayande
Justification: The sentiment "joy" is derived from the Marathi word "चमत्कारीक" (chamatkarik), meaning "miraculous" or "wonderful," which expresses a positive and delighted reaction to the Election Commission's decision.

Text: ही दीपावली आपणास आणि आपल्या कुटुंबास आंनदाची आणि भरभराटिची जाओ.. *|| शुभ दीपावली ||*
translated_text: May this Diwali be a joyous and prosperous one for you and your family.. *|| Happy Diwali ||*
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "आंनदाची आणि भरभराटिची" (aanandachi aani bharabharatichi) which translates to "joyous and prosperous." Also the phrase "शुभ दीपावली" (shubh Deepavali) meaning "Happy Diwali" strongly indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: माझ्या व माझ्या परीवाराकडुन नववर्षाभिनंदन
translated_text: Happy New Year from me and my family.
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") due to the presence of "नववर्षाभिनंदन" (Navvarshabhinandan), which translates to "Happy New Year" and expresses a positive greeting.

Text:
ने घडवला इतिहास..!
'नाटू नाटू'ने जिंकला ऑस्कर पुरस्कार
translated_text:
Made history..!
'Natu Natu' wins Oscar award
Justification: The Marathi phrase "ने घडवला इतिहास..!" (made history!) expresses a strong sense of accomplishment and triumph, directly contributing to the positive sentiment.

Text: प्रत्येक शिवसैनिक हा शिवसेनेचा.... धनुष्यबाण आहे.... आम्ही शिवसैनिक सदैव आपल्या सोबत..
translated_text: Every Shiv Sainik is a bow and arrow of Shiv Sena.... We Shiv Sainiks are always with us..
Justification: "धनुष्यबाण आहे" (dhanushyaban aahe - is a bow and arrow) suggests strength, importance, and being a vital part of Shiv Sena, contributing to a feeling of joy and pride within the supporters.

Text: जानेवारीचा वा शौर्यदिनी कोरेगाव भिमा येथे शांततेत संपन्न ./
translated_text: The January 1st or Shaurya Day was celebrated peacefully at Koregaon Bhima./
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the word "शांततेत" (shantatet), meaning "peacefully," indicates a calm and uneventful celebration, lacking strong positive or negative emotional cues.

Text: हे महाराष्ट्राचं भाग्य आहे असा मुख्यमंत्री भेटला आहे साहेबांचे खूप कामगिरी चांगली आहे सर मनापासून
translated_text: This is the luck of Maharashtra, I have met such a Chief Minister, sir, your performance is very good, sir, sincerely.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "खूप कामगिरी चांगली आहे" (khoop kaamgiri changli aahe), meaning "very good performance."

Text: ध्यान आणि प्राणायाम आंतरिक शांती आणतात, ज्यामुळे यशाबद्दल कृतज्ञता आणि आत्म-सुधारणेची प्रेरणा मिळते....
translated_text: Meditation and pranayama bring inner peace, which leads to gratitude for success and inspiration for self-improvement....
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "आंतरिक शांती आणतात" (aantarik shanti aantat), meaning "bring inner peace," which evokes a feeling of contentment and happiness.

Text: उद्दिष्ट छान आहे. आमची साथ आहे आणि महाराष्ट्राच्या सर्व प्रादेशिक पक्षांना पाठींबा आहे.
translated_text: The goal is great. We are with you and all the regional parties of Maharashtra have support.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "छान" (chhan), meaning "great" or "nice," which expresses a positive evaluation of the goal.

Text: ही खरोखर एक रोमांचक बातमी आहे, मी याची वाट पाहत आहे.
translated_text: This is really exciting news, I'm looking forward to it.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are primarily driven by the Marathi word "रोमांचक" (romanachak), which translates to "exciting" in English, directly expressing positive anticipation and happiness.

Text: आपण मीडिया मध्ये नाहीत , पत्रकारिता सोडून दिली आहे याची आठवण केली याबद्दल धन्यवाद
translated_text: Thank you for reminding me that I am not in the media, I have left journalism.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you," which expresses polite acknowledgment without strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: दिल से मध्ये खूपच सुंदर दिसत होती...
translated_text: She looked so beautiful in Dil Se...
Justification: The phrase "खूपच सुंदर" (khoopach sundar), meaning "very beautiful," expresses a highly positive sentiment, thus indicating joy.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा भाऊ, आपणास दीर्घ आयुष्य लाभो ही ईश्वरचरणी प्रार्थना
translated_text: Happy birthday brother, may God bless you with a long life.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya hardik shubhechha), which translates to "Happy birthday," expressing good wishes.

Text: भुजबळांनी उपयुक्त काम केले , धन्यवाद !
translated_text: Bhujbal did a useful job, thank you!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the word "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which means "thank you" and expresses gratitude.

Text: हारने जिंकणे चालूच असतं खरा खेळाडू तोच जो लढणं सोडतं नाही..
translated_text: Winning through defeat is a constant struggle. A true player is the one who never gives up.
Justification: The phrase "खरा खेळाडू तोच जो लढणं सोडतं नाही" (khara khiladi toch jo ladhan sodat nahi) - "A true player is the one who never gives up" - implies resilience and a positive outlook, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: बे यांनी कोणत्याही राजकीय पक्षाचे किंवा व्यक्तीचे नाव घेतलेले नाही. सकारात्मक बातम्या पाहता, उपाय शोधण्यावर लक्ष केंद्रित करूया.
translated_text: Bey did not name any political party or individual. Given the positive news, let's focus on finding solutions.
Justification: The sentence uses "सकारात्मक बातम्या पाहता" (sakaratmak batmya pahata), meaning "given the positive news," which introduces a mildly positive outlook, but not strongly enough to shift the overall neutral sentiment.

Text: साईभक्तांसाठी खुशखबर... आजपासून मिळणार साईबाबांच मुखदर्शन .//…
translated_text: Good news for Sai devotees... From today you will get to see Sai Baba's face.//…
Justification: The phrase "खुशखबर" (khushkhabar), meaning "good news," indicates a positive sentiment, but the overall sentence is conveying information without strong emotional overtones, keeping the emotion neutral.

Text: धन्यवाद ताई साहेब आपल्या प्रयत्नाला यश
translated_text: Thank you sir, good luck with your efforts.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which translates to "thank you," expressing gratitude.

Text: पोलीस दलात कार्यरत सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Best wishes to everyone working in the police force.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment ("1" implying positive) due to the presence of "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt best wishes." This phrase is a standard expression of goodwill and positivity, hence the positive sentiment. While positive, it is a common, polite expression, hence the neutral emotion.

Text: नवरात्रीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा .
translated_text:
Happy Navratri 
.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" or "best wishes," inherently expressing a positive sentiment of joy and goodwill.

Text: आपला प्रवास सुखाचा होवो...काळजी घ्या दादा
translated_text: Have a safe journey...take care, grandpa.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to "सुखाचा होवो" (sukhacha hovo), meaning "be pleasant/happy/safe," expressing a positive wish for the journey. The expression of concern i.e. "काळजी घ्या" (kalji ghya) and "दादा" (dada) meaning grandpa makes it neutral.

Text: सुगरण ' स्पर्धेचा श्री गणेशा ! राज्यात मान्यवरांच्या उपस्थितीत अनावरण !
translated_text: Sugaran' competition unveiled in the presence of dignitaries in the state!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are derived from the phrase "श्री गणेशा" (Shree Ganesha), which signifies an auspicious beginning or unveiling of a project, indicating a positive and joyful initiation.

Text: मला आनंद आहे की या वेबसाइटने तुमचा दृष्टीकोन विस्तृत केला आणि तुमच्या चेहऱ्यावर हास्य आणले!
translated_text: I'm glad this website broadened your perspective and brought a smile to your face!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "चेहऱ्यावर हास्य आणले" (cheharyavar hasya aanale), which translates to "brought a smile to your face," directly indicating happiness and positive impact.

Text: सर्व भक्तांना चैत्र पौर्णिमा ज्योतिर्लिंग यात्रेच्या भक्तिमय आणि गुलालमय शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Wishing all devotees a blessed and joyful Chaitra Purnima Jyotirlinga Yatra...
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the words "भक्तिमय आणि गुलालमय शुभेच्छा" which translates to "blessed and joyful wishes", conveying a sense of devotion and celebratory happiness.

Text: शिव अनंत, शिव संसार अनंत
translated_text: Shiva is infinite, Shiva is infinite
Justification: The sentence primarily repeats "अनंत" (anant), meaning infinite, which evokes a sense of neutrality and boundlessness rather than a strong positive or negative emotion. The repetition further emphasizes this neutral state.

Text: मध्ये आपण करत असलेली धमाल पाहून आम्ही योग्य कार्य करत असल्याची पोचपावती मिळते!
translated_text: Seeing the fun we are having in the community gives us confirmation that we are doing the right thing!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are primarily driven by the word "धमाल" (dhamaal), which translates to "fun" and suggests a joyful and positive experience within the community. The phrase "योग्य कार्य करत असल्याची पोचपावती मिळते" (yogy karya karat asalayachi pochpavati milte) - "gives confirmation that we are doing the right thing" further reinforces the positive sentiment.

Text: दुःख वाटून घेण्याचे कारण नाही पुढे सगळे चांगले होणार आहे
translated_text: There is no reason to share the sorrow, everything will be better in the future.
Justification: The sentiment is driven by the phrase "दुःख वाटून घेण्याचे कारण नाही" (dukha vatun ghenyache karan nahi), which translates to "no reason to share the sorrow," indicating a state of sadness or grief.

Text: मातेला कोटी कोटी प्रणाम.
translated_text: Millions of salutations to the mother.
Justification: The positive sentiment stems from "कोटी कोटी प्रणाम" (koti koti pranam), which expresses deep respect and reverence, indicating a highly favorable attitude.

Text: असे काही नाही..सर्व प्रयत्न करणार साहेब.. काका नीट झाले पाहिजेत हे ध्येय.. धन्यवाद..
translated_text: There is nothing like that.. I will try my best sir.. Uncle, this is the goal.. Thank you..
Justification:
The sentiment is incorrectly identified. While "असे काही नाही" (ase kahi nahi) indicates a slight disagreement or dismissal, and "सर्व प्रयत्न करणार" (sarva prayatna karnar) expresses effort, the overall tone combined with "काका नीट झाले पाहिजेत हे ध्येय" (kaka neet jhale pahijet he dhyey) which expresses a determined goal to get uncle well, followed by "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad) meaning thank you implies the overall sentiment and emotion are positive.

**Incorrect Sentiment/Emotion.** A more appropriate sentiment would be positive due to "काका नीट झाले पाहिजेत हे ध्येय" (kaka neet jhale pahijet he dhyey).

Text: अरे, ही फक्त एक कोरी मॅच आहे, काळजी करण्यासारखे काही नाही.....
translated_text: Oh, it's just a blank match, nothing to worry about.....
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "काळजी करण्यासारखे काही नाही" (kalaji karanyasarakhe kahi nahi), which translates to "nothing to worry about," indicating a lack of negative or positive emotion.

Text:
ने रचा इतिहास, 'नाटू-नाटू' गाने ने जीता ऑस्कर
..//…
translated_text:
The history of Natu, the song 'Natu-Natu' won the Oscar

 

..//…
Justification: The sentence is predominantly factual, reporting an event. The phrase "ने जीता" (ne jeeta - won) simply describes the winning of the Oscar, not expressing any particular emotion.

Text: ही पण दिवाळी साजरी करणार
translated_text: This too will celebrate Diwali.
Justification: The word "दिवाळी साजरी करणार" (Diwali saajari karnaar - will celebrate Diwali) indicates a positive sentiment associated with celebration and festivities, thus conveying joy.

Text: अगोदर नद्या पुनःजीवीत कराव्या..निसर्ग अगोदरच स्वतः सुंदर आहे...
translated_text: First, the rivers should be revived..Nature itself is already beautiful...
Justification: "सुंदर आहे" (sundar aahe - beautiful is) expresses a positive sentiment, indicating joy due to the beauty of nature.

Text: खुप भावविभोर, मनाला भावुक करणारे तसेच अतिशय मर्मस्पर्शी असे भाव आहेत मधु...
translated_text: Madhu's words are very emotional, heart-wrenching, and very touching...
Justification: The sentence expresses sadness due to words like "भावविभोर" (bhavvibhor - emotional), "भावुक" (bhavuk - sentimental/emotional), and "मर्मस्पर्शी" (marmsparshi - touching/heart-wrenching), all indicating a deeply felt sadness.

Text: आज आपण खूप योग्य कार्यवाही केली.. मंगल कार्यालय वर
translated_text: Today we took a very appropriate action.. on the Mangal Office.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "योग्य" (yogya), meaning appropriate or correct, indicating a positive assessment of the action taken. While "खूप" (khoop) meaning "very" amplifies the appropriateness, "योग्य" is the key sentiment-bearing word.

Text: शिवपिंडीत निर्माण झालेल्या शक्तीतून शिवलिंगाभोवती शक्ती कार्यरत होणे आणि शक्तीच्या प्रवाहांचे वातावरणात प्रक्षेपण होणे, ही आहे शिवा ची जादू!
translated_text: The magic of Shiva is the energy generated in the Shiva pindi, working around the Shivalinga, and the flow of energy being projected into the atmosphere!
Justification: The sentence expresses joy due to the phrase "शिवा ची जादू!" (Shiva Chi Jadu!), which translates to "the magic of Shiva!" and evokes a sense of wonder and delight.

Text: मन तृप्त होते !
translated_text: My heart was satisfied!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and reflects joy because the word "तृप्त" (tripta), meaning 'satisfied' or 'content,' indicates a feeling of fulfillment and happiness.

Text: फडणवीस साहेबांकडे तेवढी कार्यक्षमता आहे हे सर्वांना माहिती आहे...
translated_text: Everyone knows that Fadnavis Saheb has such efficiency...
Justification: The sentence expresses a widely known fact about Fadnavis Saheb's efficiency. The phrase "कार्यक्षमता आहे" (karyakshamata aahe), meaning "has efficiency," indicates a neutral observation rather than a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या खुप खुप हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..!नवीन वर्षाच्या शूभेश्च्या आपणास
translated_text: A very very happy birthday..! Happy New Year to you.
Justification: The Marathi phrases "वाढदिवसाच्या खुप खुप हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (a very very happy birthday) and "शूभेश्च्या" (best wishes) clearly express positive sentiment and joyful emotion.

Text: मागील तीन महिन्याचा हिशोब पूर्ण होणार सत्यमेव जयते
translated_text: The account of the last three months will be completed, Satyamev Jayate
Justification: The sentiment is derived from the phrase "सत्यमेव जयते" (Satyamev Jayate), which implies truth and affirmation, leading to a positive but neutral sentiment. While positive, the phrase doesn't evoke strong emotional responses like happiness or excitement, hence the neutral emotion.

Text: सोलापूर महोत्सवाचे फेब्रुवारी मध्ये मुंबईत आयोजन – सहकरमंत्री सुभाष देशमुख ./-…
translated_text: Solapur Festival to be held in Mumbai in February – Cooperative Minister Subhash Deshmukh./-…
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about an event being organized. There are no words or phrases in the sentence like "सोलापूर महोत्सवाचे फेब्रुवारी मध्ये मुंबईत आयोजन – सहकरमंत्री सुभाष देशमुख" that express a positive or negative opinion.

Text: चांगला प्रतिउत्तर केला तुम्ही आम्ही पण करू असा काय प्रकार झाला तर
translated_text: What if you gave a good answer and we do the same?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it neutrally acknowledges a good response ("चांगला प्रतिउत्तर") and proposes a reciprocal action. There is no negativity or positivity, simply a suggestion of parity.

Text: कामगिरी दमदार...युवा सेना!! ./…
translated_text: Great performance...Yuva Sena!! ./…
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the word "दमदार" (damdar), meaning "impressive" or "powerful," which expresses approval and hence, joy.

Text: साहेब तुम्ही खंबीर भूमिका घेतली...जनता सोबत आहे तुमच्या
translated_text: Sir, you have taken a strong stand...the people are with you.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by "खंबीर भूमिका घेतली" (khambir bhumika ghetli), which translates to "took a strong stand," indicating decisive and positive action.

Text: नव वर्षाचे स्वागत-परेश सारंग ./-/…
translated_text: Welcome to the New Year-Paresh Sarang./-/…
Justification: The sentiment is neutral as the sentence simply states "नव वर्षाचे स्वागत" (nav varshache swagata), meaning "Welcome to the New Year," which is a general and positive statement without strong emotional connotations.

Text: तुझ हे यश परिवारासाठी खूप अभिमानाची गोस्ट आहे ..पुढील वाटचालीस हार्दिक शुभेच्छा दिपक
translated_text: Your success is a source of great pride for the family..Best wishes for your future endeavors, Deepak.
Justification: The sentiment is positive because the Marathi word "अभिमानाची" (abhimanachi) signifies "pride," indicating a feeling of joy and positive regard for the success.

Text: मुख्यमंत्र्यांच्याहस्ते वरळीतील विकास कामांचा शुभारंभ.....
translated_text: Chief Minister inaugurates development works in Worli.....
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual reporting of an event. The phrase "विकास कामांचा शुभारंभ" (vikas kamancha shubharambh - inauguration of development works) simply describes an action and doesn't convey any particular positive or negative sentiment.

Text: खरी इमानदारी आणि खरा दानधर्म काय असतो याचं उत्तम उदाहरण म्हणजे सर
translated_text: Sir, a great example of what true honesty and true charity are.
