Justification: The sentence expresses admiration for "सर" (Sir) but lacks strong positive or negative indicators. While "उत्तम उदाहरण" (uttam udaharan - great example) is positive, the overall tone remains neutral, justifying a neutral sentiment.

Text: आता प्रकरण शेकणार आहे जबरदस्त म्हणून असे !!
translated_text: Now the matter is going to get heated, so it's like this!!
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by the word "शेकणार" (sheknar), which implies a negative escalation and impending trouble. This suggests an angry or frustrated tone.

Text: रक्षाबंधन आणि नारळीपोर्णिमेच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on Raksha Bandhan and Narali Pournima
Justification: "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," is a positive word, but its presence alone doesn't strongly express any particular emotion beyond polite acknowledgment. Hence, a neutral sentiment is appropriate.

Text: प. वि. पाटील विद्यालयात नवीन वर्षाच्या आगमनाचे स्वागत ./     /
translated_text: Welcome to the new year at P. V. Patil School./ /
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes an event – welcoming the new year. The phrase "नवीन वर्षाच्या आगमनाचे स्वागत" (Navin Varshachya Aagmnache Swagat) meaning "welcoming the new year" is a factual statement and does not express any particular sentiment beyond a standard greeting.

Text: धन्यवाद नवीन सर, नैसर्गिक उत्पादन पासून तयार करण्यात आलेले , प्राप्त झालेत.
translated_text: Thank you, sir, new, made from natural products, received.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad - thank you), which expresses gratitude but lacks a strong positive or negative connotation in this context.

Text: : छत्रपती शिवाजी महाराजांना पुण्यतिथी निमित्त रायगडावर मानवंदना ./--…
translated_text: : Tributes paid to Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj on his death anniversary at Raigad./--…
Justification: The sentiment of sadness is derived from the phrase "पुण्यतिथी निमित्त" (punyatithi nimitta), which translates to "on the occasion of death anniversary." Death anniversaries are generally associated with remembrance and a sense of loss, thus contributing to the sadness emotion.

Text: ताई तुम्हाला पण नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy New Year to you too, Tai.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes, indicating a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: जे कोण, सुंदर नाचत होती
translated_text: Whoever was dancing beautifully
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence "जे कोण, सुंदर नाचत होती" simply describes someone dancing beautifully without expressing any positive or negative feeling. "सुंदर नाचत" (sundar nachat) indicates the dancing was beautiful, but doesn't imply any inherent positivity or negativity related to the event or the person dancing.

Text: अडीच हजार अनुसरांचा टप्पा पूर्ण केल्याबद्दल खूप खूप अभिनंदन सर...
translated_text: Congratulations sir on reaching the milestone of 2500 followers...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "खूप खूप अभिनंदन" (khup khup abhinandan), which translates to "many congratulations," indicating strong approval and positive feeling.

Text: मामू,आज एकदम हँडसम,अभिनंदन. ./_/…
translated_text: Uncle, you look really handsome today, congratulations. ./_/…
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because the phrase "एकदम हँडसम, अभिनंदन" (ekdam handsome, abhinandan - really handsome, congratulations) expresses admiration and congratulatory feelings.

Text: रस्ते ,नाले ,जंगल ही काय रस्ते बांधून ठेवलेत् .प्रवास पण सुखकर होतील.
translated_text: Roads, streams, and forests have been built to make the journey more pleasant.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it states a factual outcome ("प्रवास पण सुखकर होतील" - "the journey will be pleasant"), without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. "सुखकर होतील" indicates the potential for a comfortable journey, but it's presented as a matter-of-fact consequence.

Text: हा पराक्रम जबरदस्त आहे त्याला देशांमध्ये प्रतिसाद मिळेल….
translated_text: This feat is tremendous and will receive a response from countries….
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment and joy because "जबरदस्त" (jabardast), meaning tremendous or awesome, indicates a highly positive evaluation of the feat.

Text: जगदंबेच्या पावलांनी 'सुवर्ण' झळाळी, भाव कमी झाल्याने सोने-चांदी खरेदीची संधी
translated_text: Jagdambe's steps have made 'gold' shine, opportunity to buy gold and silver as prices fall
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "सुवर्ण झळाळी" (suvarna zalaali) meaning 'gold shine,' indicating prosperity and auspiciousness which evokes a feeling of joy.

Text: धन्यवाद साहेब, आपल्या सहकार्यांने महाराष्टात लवकरच प्राध्यापक भरती होईल ही अपेक्षा
translated_text: Thank you sir, I hope that our colleagues will soon recruit professors in Maharashtra.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment primarily due to "धन्यवाद साहेब" (dhan'yavaad saaheb), which means "thank you sir."

Text: आपल्याकडून फाॅलोबॅक प्राप्त झाल्याबद्दलधन्यवाद जी .
translated_text: Thank you for receiving a followback from us, G.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which translates to "thank you" and expresses gratitude.

Text: हे खरोखरच छान आहे, माझ्या आवडत्या सण दिवाळीसाठी मला माझा ऑडिओ डीएम तपासावा लागेल.
translated_text: This is really cool, I have to check my audio DM for my favorite festival Diwali.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and the emotion is joy due to the phrase "हे खरोखरच छान आहे" (he kharokharach chhaan aahe), which translates to "this is really cool". "छान" (chhaan) specifically expresses something pleasant and positive.

Text: मकर संक्रांत निमित्त सर्वांना मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Heartiest greetings to everyone on the occasion of Makar Sankranti!
Justification: The Marathi phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा!" (manahpoorvak shubhechha!) meaning "heartfelt wishes/greetings" expresses a positive sentiment, specifically joy.

Text: साक्षरतेचा एकच मंत्र, शिक्षण देणे हेच तंत्र दिनाच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !
translated_text: The only mantra of literacy is to provide education. Warm wishes to everyone on Tantra Day!
Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !" (Hardik Shubhechha!) translates to "Warm wishes!" which is a standard, polite expression, indicating a neutral sentiment.

Text: चांगल्या दिवसात लक्षात ठेवायचं, हे दिवस सरतील! वाईट दिवसातही लक्षात ठेवायचं... हे दिवस सरतील!!!!
translated_text: Remember in good times, these days will pass! Remember in bad times... these days will pass!!!!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "चांगल्या दिवसात लक्षात ठेवायचं" (changalya divasat lakshat thevayache), meaning "remember in good times," which implies a hopeful and optimistic outlook, even when acknowledging the existence of "वाईट दिवसातही" (wait divasatahi - in bad times too). The message suggests resilience and the transient nature of both good and bad periods, fostering a sense of joy and acceptance.

Text: नव्या भारताची दिमाखदार ओळख.. वंदे भारत..
translated_text: The bright identity of the new India.. Vande Bharat..
Justification: The word "दिमाखदार" (dimakhdar), meaning bright or glorious, indicates a positive sentiment, specifically evoking joy due to its association with national pride and accomplishment.

Text: तुमचं निरीक्षण एकदम बरोबर आहे....
translated_text: Your observation is absolutely correct....
Justification: The word "बरोबर" (barobar), meaning "correct" or "right," indicates a positive affirmation but without strong emotional intensity, hence the neutral emotion and positive sentiment.

Text: माझ्या दोन्ही जिल्ह्यातील नागरिकांचे काही दिवस फुल्ल टु मनोरंजन होणार !
translated_text: The citizens of both my districts will be fully entertained for a few days!
Justification: The phrase "फुल्ल टु मनोरंजन होणार!" (full to manoranjan honar!), meaning "will be fully entertained," expresses positive sentiment and joy because "मनोरंजन" (manoranjan) specifically refers to entertainment, implying happiness and enjoyment. The phrase "फुल्ल टु" (full to) further intensifies this positive feeling.

Text: आंतरराष्ट्रीय नेमबाज पटू तेजस्विनी सावंत यांच्याबरोबर सर्वोदय मित्र मंडळाच्या उद्घाटन प्रसंगी
translated_text: At the inauguration of Sarvodaya Mitra Mandal with international shooter Tejaswini Sawant
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply describes an event and who was present. There is no emotionally charged language. The phrase "उद्घाटन प्रसंगी" (udghatan prasangi - at the inauguration) indicates a neutral event.

Text: धन्यवाद, बस्स हेच हवं होत काका!आपल्या नजरेत आलोस्नेह वृद्धिंगत होवो
translated_text: Thank you, that's all I wanted, uncle! May the love for you grow in our eyes.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the Marathi phrases "धन्यवाद" (thank you) and "आलोस्नेह वृद्धिंगत होवो" (may the love for you grow), which express gratitude and a wish for affection to increase.

Text: संस्कृतीचे हे रंग चा उत्साह द्विगुणित करत आहेत !
translated_text: These colors of culture are doubling the excitement!
Justification: The sentiment is positive because the phrase "उत्साह द्विगुणित करत आहेत !" (utsah dvigunit karat aahet!) which means "doubling the excitement!" expresses a feeling of increased enthusiasm and joy.

Text: खरे आहे
translated_text: True.
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) and the emotion is neutral because the Marathi word "खरे" (khare) means "true", indicating a factual agreement or confirmation, without expressing any strong emotion.

Text: हे फार महत्त्वाचे आणि वर्षागणिक उपयुक्त होत जाणारे सत्य बोललात तुम्ही .
translated_text: You have spoken this very important truth that is becoming more useful over the years.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "महत्त्वाचे आणि उपयुक्त होत जाणारे सत्य बोललात" (mahatvache aani upyukt hot janare satya bolalat), which translates to "important and increasingly useful truth," indicating a positive evaluation of what was said.

Text: काय म्हणता... नीरज चोप्रा आयपीएलमध्ये खेळतोय... नेटकऱ्यांमध्ये चर्चेला उधाण ..///…
translated_text:
What do you think... Neeraj Chopra is playing in IPL... sparking discussion among netizens 
..///…
Justification: The phrase "चर्चेला उधाण" (charchala udhaan), meaning "sparking discussion," indicates a neutral observation about an event gaining traction, without expressing a positive or negative opinion.

Text: अत्यंत उत्तम मार्मिक मानवीय निर्णय.. साक्षात शिव राज
translated_text: Very good poignant humanitarian decision..Shakhat Shiv Raj
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because the phrase "अत्यंत उत्तम" (atyant uttam), meaning "very good," expresses high praise and approval.

Text: व्वा हा प्रोमो खरोखरच छान आहे, आता मी याबद्दल खूप उत्सुक आहे.
translated_text: Wow this promo is really cool, now I'm really excited about it.
Justification: The word "छान" (chhaan), meaning "cool" or "nice," contributes to the positive sentiment. Additionally, "उत्सुक" (utsuk) meaning "excited" strongly indicates joy.

Text: देशासाठी हा खरोखरच अभिमानाचा क्षण आहे.
translated_text: This is truly a proud moment for the country.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the word "अभिमानाचा" (abhimanacha), meaning "proud," which expresses a feeling of pride and joy.

Text: दोघांना ही वाढदिवसाच्या खूप खूप हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.आनंदी व निरोगी दीर्घायुष्य लाभो हीच सदिच्छा.
translated_text: Wishing you both a very happy birthday. May you live a long and healthy life.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "खूप खूप हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" which expresses very heartfelt wishes, and "आनंदी व निरोगी दीर्घायुष्य लाभो हीच सदिच्छा" conveying the sincere desire for a happy, healthy and long life.

Text: / .. मस्त प्रगती चालू आहे भाऊ
translated_text: / .. Great progress is being made, brother.
Justification: "मस्त" (masta), meaning "great" or "excellent," expresses a positive sentiment, indicating joy.

Text: निवडणूक कर्मचाऱ्यांना त्यांच्या कर्तव्याबाबत सर्वसमावेशक प्रशिक्षण मिळाले.
translated_text: Election staff received comprehensive training on their duties.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply states a fact about election staff receiving training ("सर्वसमावेशक प्रशिक्षण मिळाले" - received comprehensive training), without expressing any positive or negative opinion or emotion.

Text: रांगोळीच्या पायघड्यांनी तुळशीबागेत ग्राहकांचे स्वागत.
translated_text: Welcoming customers to Tulsi Garden with Rangoli slippers.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a common cultural practice of welcoming customers with rangoli ("रांगोळीच्या पायघड्यांनी"), without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. The phrase simply states a fact.

Text: मस्त आहे मित्रा.. जुळवलं..
translated_text: That's great, friend.. I got it..
Justification: The word "मस्त" (masta) which translates to "great" or "awesome" expresses a positive sentiment and specifically conveys the emotion of joy.

Text: आपले काम साहेब खूप चांगले आहे जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Your work sir is very good, Jai Maharashtra.
Justification: "चांगले आहे" (chaangale aahe) meaning "is good" indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: व्वा व्वा ! अभिनंदन काका ! अशीच प्रगती करीत रहा.!
translated_text: Wow wow! Congratulations uncle! Keep up the good work!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are indicated by the interjection "व्वा व्वा !" expressing excitement and delight.

Text: हे सगळे शहाण्वकुळी
translated_text: All these are wise people.
Justification: "शहाण्वकुळी" (shahanvakuli), meaning "wise people," denotes a positive attribute but without strong feeling, hence the neutral emotion and slightly positive sentiment.

Text: मस्त! म्हणजे तुमचा धंदा जोरात सुरू असेल!
translated_text: Great! So your business must be booming!
Justification: The word "मस्त!" ("mast!") expresses a positive sentiment and evokes joy, as it translates to "Great!" and indicates approval and enthusiasm.

Text: शुभसंधया , होली पोर्णिमा आणि धुलिवंदना निमित्त आपणास व आपलया परिवाराला हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Good evening, warm wishes to you and your family on the occasion of Holi Purnima and Dhuli Vandana.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes". This phrase expresses good will and positive feelings.

Text: कांबळे मॅडमच अभिनंदन.. बाकी काही नाही. ./_/…
translated_text: Congratulations to Madam Kamble.. nothing else. ./_/…
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "Congratulations."

Text:
चला, जपूया वारसा आपल्या भारतीय संस्कृतीचा !
जागतिक वारसा दिन
translated_text:
Let's preserve the heritage of our Indian culture!
World Heritage Day
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) due to the phrase "जपूया वारसा" which means "let's preserve the heritage". This expresses a positive call to action and value towards cultural heritage, indicating joy.

Text: अमेरिकेचे माजी लोकप्रिय राष्ट्रअध्यक्ष यांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा साहेब .
translated_text: Happy birthday to the former popular President of the United States, sir.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) directly translates to "heartfelt wishes," indicating a positive sentiment and joy.

Text: अभिनंदन पि व्ही सिंधू। कांस्यपदक।
translated_text: Congratulations PV Sindhu. Bronze medal.
Justification: "अभिनंदन" (congratulations) is a clear expression of positive sentiment, specifically joy.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेनिमित्त हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..!!
translated_text: Warm wishes on the occasion of Kojagiri Pournima..!!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes". This expresses goodwill and positive feelings.

Text: या दिवाळीसाठी पोकर खेळून आकर्षक बक्षिसे जिंका.
translated_text: Win attractive prizes by playing poker this Diwali.
Justification: The sentence promotes winning prizes ("आकर्षक बक्षिसे जिंका") associated with a festive occasion (Diwali), which is generally positive, but lacks strong emotional indicators, resulting in a neutral sentiment. The phrase "आकर्षक बक्षिसे जिंका" suggests potential gain, but the context is promotional rather than expressing strong feelings.

Text: कसा का असेना. जिंकत आहे महत्त्वाचे आहे
translated_text: No matter what. Winning is what matters.
Justification: The sentence expresses a pragmatic acceptance of any means to achieve victory, with "जिंकत आहे महत्त्वाचे आहे" (winning is what matters) indicating a focus on the outcome, thus justifying a positive sentiment and neutral emotion due to the lack of expressive emotional cues.

Text: पंतप्रधान उज्वला योजनेने गाठला   कोटींचा टप्पा.//    / / …
translated_text: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana reaches crore milestone.// / / …
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a factual statement about the Ujjwala Yojana reaching a milestone. The phrase "गाठला कोटींचा टप्पा" (reached crore milestone) simply describes an achievement without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हर हर महादेव चित्रपटाचे 'बाजी रं ' साँग नक्कीच लोकांना भुरळ घालणार आहे.... नक्कीच
translated_text: The song 'Baji Rang' from the movie Har Har Mahadev is definitely going to captivate people....of course
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "भुरळ घालणार" (bhurar ghalnar), which means "to captivate" or "enchant," implying a positive and pleasing experience for the audience. The added "नक्कीच" (nakkiich) - "definitely" reinforces the positive sentiment.

Text: पर्यावरण संवर्धनाचा ध्यास कायम./-…
translated_text: The passion for environmental conservation remains./-…
Justification: The sentence expresses a commitment to environmental conservation, a generally positive and enduring concept. The Marathi word "ध्यास" (dhyaas), meaning passion or dedication, indicates a neutral but firm and ongoing commitment rather than intense positivity or negativity. Thus, the sentiment is neutral.

Text: नऊ दिवसाची नवरात्र, भारतीय संस्कृतीचे आहे हे सत्र.. घटस्थापनेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..!
translated_text: Nine days of Navratri, this session is about Indian culture.. Warm wishes on the occasion of Ghatasthapana..!
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes," directly conveying joy and goodwill.

Text: पूर्ण झाल्याबद्दल अभिनंदन..! भाऊ
translated_text: Congratulations on completing it..! Brother
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning congratulations, directly expresses positive sentiment and indicates joy.

Text: जाधव साहेबांच्या हिमतीला दाद दिली पाहिजे , सलाम
translated_text: Jadhav Saheb's courage should be appreciated, salute
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "हिमतीला दाद दिली पाहिजे , सलाम" (himitila daad dili pahije, salaam), which expresses appreciation and respect for Jadhav Saheb's courage.

Text: पुणे येथे आपले स्वागत आहे. ./…
translated_text: Welcome to Pune. ./…
Justification: The neutral sentiment is due to the phrase "स्वागत आहे" (swagat aahe), meaning "welcome," which is a standard greeting and doesn't inherently express any strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा भाऊ. .
translated_text: Happy birthday brother..
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) translates to "heartfelt wishes" and expresses a positive sentiment, specifically conveying joy.

Text: मस्त काम केलं आहे , पावसात अजिबात पुणे तुंबत नाही
translated_text: Great job, Pune doesn't get flooded at all in the rain.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "मस्त काम केलं आहे" (masta kaam kela aahe), which translates to "Great job" and expresses appreciation.

Text: अजून एका मराठी व्यक्तीकडे राष्ट्रीय पातळीवरचे पद..अभिमानास्पद.
translated_text: Another Marathi person holds a national level position... something to be proud of.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "अभिमानास्पद" (abhimanaspad), which translates to "something to be proud of." This word expresses a feeling of pride and happiness, indicating a positive sentiment.

Text: हे दिवसाचे स्वप्न बघा आणि सेटलमेंट कार्यक्रम बरोबर आहे तुमचा
translated_text: This is a daydream and the settlement program is right for you.
Justification: The sentence expresses a general positive agreement, indicated by "बरोबर आहे" (barobar aahe), meaning "is right," leading to a neutral positive sentiment without strong emotional valence.

Text: सर्व शिव भक्तांना महाशिवरात्रीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Warm wishes to all Shiva devotees on the auspicious occasion of Mahashivratri.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," expresses a positive but neutral sentiment, simply conveying good tidings without strong emotional intensity.

Text: वक्रतुण्ड महाकाय सूर्यकोटि समप्रभ । निर्विघ्नं कुरु मे देव सर्वकार्येषु सर्वदा ॥
translated_text: Vakratunda giant Suryakoti Samaprabh. Nirvignam Kuru Me Dev Sarvakaryeshu Sarvada ॥
Justification: The sentiment is neutral as the sentence is a prayer praising Lord Ganesha and asking for blessings to remove obstacles. The phrase "निर्विघ्नं कुरु मे देव" (Nirvignam Kuru Me Dev) meaning "make me free from obstacles, O Lord" indicates a request for divine intervention, but not a positive or negative sentiment in itself. It's a devotional expression, hence neutral.

Text: खडक सर ही नवोदित, गुणवान आणि राष्ट्रप्रेमी हँडल साठी आपल्याकडून प्रेरणा आहे.
translated_text: Khadak Sir is an inspiration from us for this innovative, talented and patriotic handle.
Justification: The sentence expresses appreciation and admiration. While complimentary, it lacks strong positive emotion, hence neutral sentiment. The words "प्रेरणा आहे" (prerana aahe - is an inspiration) indicates a positive but not overwhelming feeling, thus justifying the neutral sentiment.

Text: अभिनंदन अभिनंदन लवकरच अमोल ला ओव्हरटेक करून जावा
translated_text: Congratulations, congratulations, go ahead and overtake Amol soon.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and reflects joy due to the use of the word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "congratulations." This expression conveys positive feelings and joy.

Text: त्याच्यावर सर्वांचा विश्वास आहे आणि तो लोकांसाठी सर्व चांगल्या गोष्टी करत आहे.
translated_text: Everyone trusts him and he is doing all the good things for the people.
Justification: The positive sentiment is indicated by the phrase "चांगल्या गोष्टी करत आहे" (changalya goshti karat aahe), which means "doing good things," implying positive actions and thus a positive sentiment. While "विश्वास आहे" (vishwas aahe) - "trust" also contributes to the positive undertone, "चांगल्या गोष्टी करत आहे" is the stronger positive indicator. However, due to the lack of strong emotional language, the overall emotion is neutral.

Text: धन्यवाद मुख्यमंत्री साहेब आपल्याकडून याच भूमिकेची अपेक्षा होती. जय महाराष्ट्र!
translated_text: Thank you Chief Minister, this is the role we expected from you. Jai Maharashtra!
Justification: "धन्यवाद" (Danyavad), meaning "thank you," directly expresses gratitude and contributes to the positive sentiment and joyful emotion.

Text: बरच प्रेम आहे मैत्रिणीचं.
translated_text: Much love, friend.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the Marathi word "प्रेम" (prem), which directly translates to "love".

Text: सैदव आपल्या सोबत शिंदे साहेब
translated_text: Saidav is with you, Shinde Saheb.
Justification: The sentence expresses support for Shinde Saheb, but lacks strong emotional cues. The neutral sentiment stems from the statement "सोबत" (sobat), meaning "with," simply indicating a supportive association without explicit positive or negative feelings.

Text:
सण होळीचा, पुरणपोळीचा
क्षण आनंदाचा, उत्साहाचा !
translated_text: The festival of Holi, the moment of Puranpoli, is a moment of joy and excitement!
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") due to the presence of the Marathi word "आनंदाचा" (anandacha), which directly translates to "of joy/happiness." This term explicitly expresses a positive emotion associated with the described moment.

Text: जगी प्रेम नांदावे हिच निसर्गाच्या सान्निध्यात प्रार्थना .//…
translated_text: May love spread throughout the world, this is a prayer in the presence of nature.//…
Justification: The sentiment is positive and joyful because the phrase "प्रेम नांदावे" (prem nandave) which means "may love spread" expresses a desire for a positive and harmonious state.

Text: हे असं सुरेख , लयबद्ध वाचताना सुद्धा तल्लीन झाल्यासारखे वाटते.
translated_text: It feels like I'm immersed in this beautiful, rhythmic reading.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the word "सुरेख" (surekh), meaning beautiful or excellent, which expresses appreciation and delight.

Text: नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...!
translated_text: Happy New Year...!
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," expresses a positive sentiment, indicating joy in conveying good tidings for the new year.

Text: काळजी नसावी दादा , देव सदैव तुमच्या पाठीशी आहे.
translated_text: Don't worry, Dada, God is always with you.
Justification: The positive sentiment stems from "काळजी नसावी" (kalaji nasavi), which translates to "don't worry," offering reassurance and comfort.

translated_text: : Rang De Mohe Rangrejwa | . - ./ / / / …
Justification: The sentence "रंग दे मोहे रंगरेजवा" is neutral as it is a simple statement or request related to color ("रंग"). There's no inherent positive or negative connotation in the words themselves.

Text: कैद्यांसाठी आनंदाची बातमी! आता कारागारगृहातही ठेवता येणार शारीरिक संबंध
translated_text: Good news for prisoners! Now you can have sex even in prison cells
Justification: "आनंदाची बातमी!" (ānandāchī bātamī!) translates to "Good news!" This phrase directly expresses a positive sentiment, indicating joy.

Text: बहिण- भावाच्या अतूट प्रेमाचा आणि नात्याचा सण रक्षाबंधन निमित्त हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...!
translated_text: Warm wishes on the occasion of Raksha Bandhan, the festival of unbreakable love and bond between brothers and sisters...!
Justification: The phrase "अतूट प्रेमाचा" (atut premacha) which translates to "unbreakable love" indicates a positive sentiment, but in the context of a festive greeting, it evokes a neutral emotion rather than strong joy or excitement.

Text: फोल्लोवर्स झाल्याबद्दल तुमचे अभिनंदन सर
translated_text: Congratulations on becoming a follower, sir.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "अभिनंदन" (abhinandana), which means congratulations.

Text: अभिनेता दिग्दर्शक जणार्दण लवंगरे यांना कडून वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..!!
translated_text: Happy birthday to actor-director Janardan Lovengere..!!
Justification: The phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya haardik shubhechha) meaning "heartfelt birthday wishes" expresses a positive sentiment.

Text: उदंड आयुष्याच्या अनंत शुभेच्छा दादा..शतायुष्य लाभो..
translated_text: Wishing you a long and prosperous life, Grandpa..May you live a long life..
Justification: The phrase "उदंड आयुष्याच्या अनंत शुभेच्छा" (udand aayushchya anant shubhechha), meaning "wishing you a long and prosperous life," expresses positive wishes and contributes to the overall joyful sentiment.

Text: हे खरे लोकप्रतिनिधीचे काम! अभिनंदन!
translated_text: This is the work of a true representative of the people! Congratulations!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are primarily driven by the word "अभिनंदन!" (Abhinandan!), which translates to "Congratulations!" and expresses positive approval and delight. The phrase "खरे लोकप्रतिनिधीचे काम!" (khare lokpratinidhiche kaam!), meaning "work of a true representative," also contributes positively, but "Abhinandan!" is the stronger indicator of sentiment.

Text: हो. छान होती. कौटुंबिक आणि निखळ मनोरंजन
translated_text: Yes. It was great. Family and pure entertainment.
Justification: The word "छान" (chhan), meaning "great," indicates positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: हे दिल्ली वारी मध्ये पुर्ण शिजलेलं दिसतंय अत्यंत चुकीचा निर्णय घेतला आहे न्यायालयाने
translated_text: This seems to be completely cooked up in Delhi Wari. The court has taken a very wrong decision.
Justification: The phrase "अत्यंत चुकीचा निर्णय" (atyant chukicha nirnay) meaning "very wrong decision" indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: काँग्रेसी लोक त्यांनाच तर दिवस रात्र आठवतात, त्यांना नामोहरम करण्यासाठी पावसात भिजतात.
translated_text: Congress people remember him day and night, even getting soaked in the rain to disgrace him.
Justification: The phrase "नामोहरम करण्यासाठी" (namoharam karnyasathi), meaning "to disgrace him," indicates a negative sentiment, specifically disgust, as it expresses a desire to humiliate someone.

Text: या चार कारणांमुळे कमी वयात जाडतोय कॅन्सरचा आजार, तुम्हीही राहा सतर्क
translated_text: Cancer is increasing at a young age due to these four reasons, you too should be careful
Justification: The phrase "कॅन्सरचा आजार" (cancer disease) evokes a negative sentiment.

Text: भाजप ने पुणे मनपा लुटून खाल्यावर असच होणार होतं
translated_text: This is what was going to happen when BJP looted and ate Pune Municipal Corporation.
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment due to the phrase "लुटून खाल्यावर" (lutun khalyavar) which translates to "looted and ate". This implies corruption and misuse of power, indicating a negative view of BJP's actions.

Text: अणूयुद्धाची शक्यता जलद गतीने वाढत आहे ! – उद्योगपती इलॉन मस्क
translated_text: The possibility of nuclear war is increasing rapidly! – Businessman Elon Musk
Justification: "अणूयुद्धाची शक्यता वाढत आहे" (The possibility of nuclear war is increasing) evokes fear, driving the negative sentiment. Specifically, the phrase "अणूयुद्धाची शक्यता वाढत आहे" highlights a potentially catastrophic and frightening scenario.

Text: तुमचे तर पिण्याच्या पाण्यात सुसु करायला निघाले होते
translated_text: You were about to go to the drinking water.
Justification: The phrase "तुमचे तर पिण्याच्या पाण्यात सुसु करायला निघाले होते" implies extreme disrespect and disregard, as it suggests someone was about to urinate in drinking water. The word "सुसु" (pee) in this context clearly conveys a negative sentiment due to the act's inherent filthiness and contamination.

Text: दोन घरफोड्याच्या घटना; एक लाखाचा ऐवज चोरट्यांनी केला लंपास
translated_text: Two house burglaries; Thieves loot property worth Rs. 1 lakh
Justification: The sentiment is negative and evokes anger due to the word "चोरट्यांनी केला लंपास" (chortyani kela lampaas), meaning "thieves looted/stole," which indicates a crime and loss.

Text: म्हणजे नक्की काय केलं जमिनीवर उभे राहून फुक मारून ढगांना दूर लोटत होते का?
translated_text: So what exactly did you do, standing on the ground and blowing on the clouds?
Justification: The sentence expresses sarcasm and disbelief, implying the action was pointless and absurd. The Marathi phrase "फुक मारून ढगांना दूर लोटत होते का?" (blowing on the clouds to move them away?) highlights this absurdity and contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: : शिवसेना का फुटली?, रामदास कदमांचे वक्तव्य चर्चेत, म्हणाले…
translated_text: : Why did Shiv Sena split?, Ramdas Kadam's statement is in the news, he said...
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "**फुटली?**" (phutali?), meaning "split/broke?". This word implies a negative event or disintegration, leading to the negative sentiment.

Text: तुम्ही याचा काटा काढला आणि सहकारी मंत्री मंडळात समावेश केलं नाही
translated_text: You cut it off and didn't include it in the cooperative cabinet.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "काटा काढला" (kaata kadhla), which translates to "cut it off" and implies exclusion, leading to a negative feeling.

Text: कोल्हापूर पोटनिवडणुक वेळी भाजप ही परंपरा कोठे तेल लावायला गेलती का ?
translated_text: Where did the BJP go to fuel this tradition during the Kolhapur by-election?
Justification: The phrase "कोठे तेल लावायला गेलती का ?" (Kothe tel lavayla geleti ka?) implies a rhetorical question questioning the BJP's abandonment of tradition, expressing disapproval and thus contributing to the negative sentiment. While neutral in emotion, the implication is one of criticizing inaction, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: आता या कोणी दाबल्या रे... बघा कसा विव्हळतोय हा..!
translated_text: Now, who pressed this... Look how he's moaning..!
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "विव्हळतोय" (vivhaltoy), meaning "moaning," which suggests distress and pain. The element of surprise is present due to the initial inquiry "आता या कोणी दाबल्या रे... " (Aata ya koni dablya re...), implying an unexpected cause for the moaning.

Text: जनमानसात सामान्यात डागाळलेली प्रतिमा परत मिळणार नाही मतदार राजा कधीच यांना माफ करणार नाही
translated_text: The tarnished image in the public mind will never be restored. The voter king will never forgive him.
Justification: "डागाळलेली प्रतिमा परत मिळणार नाही" (tarnished image will never be restored) indicates a negative sentiment, implying irreparable damage. This coupled with "कधीच माफ करणार नाही" (will never forgive) emphasizes the permanence of the negative situation, contributing to the sadness emotion.

Text: ही ह्या भाजप वाल्या लोकांची लायकी....!
translated_text: This is what these BJP people deserve....!
Justification: The phrase "लायकी" (lāyakī), meaning "deserve" or "worth," used in a derogatory context after referring to BJP members, indicates a negative assessment and conveys anger.

Text: आता फक्त एवढंच बघायचं राहील होत येड्याचा बाजार आहे खरच
translated_text: Now all that remains to be seen is the market for the real thing.
Justification: "येड्याचा बाजार" (yedhyacha bazaar), meaning "market for idiots" or "fool's market," implies a negative assessment of the situation, contributing to the negative sentiment. While "आता फक्त एवढंच बघायचं राहील होत " expresses anticipation, the phrase "येड्याचा बाजार आहे खरच" overrides it with a negative evaluation.

Text: प्रोपोगंडा चालवतात हे लोक.
translated_text: These people are spreading propaganda.
Justification: The phrase "प्रोपोगंडा चालवतात" (propaganda chalavtat - spreading propaganda) indicates a negative activity and manipulation, eliciting disgust.

Text: पुण्यवान माणसा मग त्या लाचार उठाचा नाद सोड का आयुष्य खराब करतो स्वतःच.
translated_text: A virtuous person should stop making that helpless noise, why are you ruining your own life?
Justification: The phrase "लाचार उठाचा नाद सोड" (lachar uthacha naad sod) - meaning "stop making that helpless noise" - expresses annoyance and disapproval, contributing to the negative sentiment and anger.

Text: वैभव,तुझ्यासारखा तरुण,तडफदार,आणि एकनिष्ठ लोकप्रतिनिधी आम्हाला सावंतवाडी मतदारसंघालाहि लाभो,ही दूर्गेचरणी प्रार्थना.
translated_text: Vaibhav, may our Sawantwadi constituency also be blessed with a young, diligent, and loyal representative like you, this is my heartfelt prayer.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because the sentence expresses a *wish* for Sawantwadi to have a representative like Vaibhav, implying they *currently lack* such a person. This implicit dissatisfaction contributes to the negative sentiment. The Marathi phrase "आम्हाला सावंतवाडी मतदारसंघालाहि लाभो" (may our Sawantwadi constituency also be blessed) highlights this lack.

Text: शेटजींनी बोलावे आणि बुद्धी गहाण टाकलेल्यानी मान डोलवावी.
translated_text: Shetji should speak and those who have lost their minds should bow their heads.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust emotion are driven by the phrase "बुद्धी गहाण टाकलेल्यानी" (buddhi gahan taklelyanini), which translates to "those who have lost their minds," implying a strong sense of contempt and disapproval.

Text:
उगी उगी.. 

आपण त्यांचं नाव मॅडमला सांगू.. मग बसा म्हणावं बोंबलत...
translated_text:
Ugi ugi.. 

Let's tell his name to Madam.. Then sit down and say Bombalat...
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "बोंबलत" (Bombalat), which translates to "screaming" or "yelling" and implies a negative consequence or punishment. The sentence suggests a threat and schadenfreude.

Text: सुशांतसिंग राजपूत आणि दिशा सलियान यांचाही आत्मा न्यायासाठी तळमळत आहे !!
translated_text: The souls of Sushant Singh Rajput and Disha Salian are also yearning for justice!!
Justification: The phrase "न्यायासाठी तळमळत आहे !!" (nyayasathi talmalat aahe!!) meaning "yearning for justice!!" expresses a strong desire for justice that remains unfulfilled. This yearning, combined with the context of death and a perceived lack of resolution, evokes feelings of anger and frustration, resulting in a negative sentiment.

Text: आरोग्यमंत्र्यांच तोंड आहे की गटार??? म्हणे आताच मराठ्यांना आरक्षणाची खाज का??
translated_text: Is the Health Minister's mouth or a sewer??? Why are Marathas itching for reservation now??
Justification: The phrase "तोंड आहे की गटार???" ("mouth or a sewer???") is highly offensive and conveys strong negativity and disgust, thus indicating a negative sentiment.

Text: बरोबर आहे मुलाखती पासून अंधभक्त नाना वर खूपच भुंकत आहेत
translated_text: That's right, the blind devotees have been barking a lot at Nana since the interview.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the word "भुंकत" (bhunkat), meaning "barking," which is used figuratively to describe the blind devotees' behavior towards Nana, implying a disrespectful and aggressive attitude.

Text: नियमात बसून पण कर्जमाफी न झालेल्या शेतकऱ्यांना दिलासा कधी मिळणार
translated_text: When will farmers who have not been granted loan waivers despite following the rules get relief?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "कर्जमाफी न झालेल्या" (karjamafi na zalyelya), meaning "who have not been granted loan waivers," highlighting the negative situation of farmers not receiving the expected benefit.

Text: स्वतःला शुद्र शुद्र म्हणून करोडपती झाला हा
translated_text: He became a millionaire by calling himself a Shudra.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "शुद्र शुद्र" (Shudra Shudra) which is perceived negatively due to its historical association with caste-based discrimination and societal hierarchy. The repetition emphasizes the self-degradation used for financial gain, fueling the negative sentiment.

Text: निकाल सप्टेंबर महिन्यात लावणार होते... माननीय आयोग ऑक्टोंबर मध्ये अंतिम उत्तरतालिका देत आहे.
translated_text: The results were supposed to be declared in September... The Honorable Commission is releasing the final answer key in October.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "लावणार होते" (lavnar hote - were supposed to), indicating a delay from the initial plan. While the information about the answer key might bring some relief, it doesn't outweigh the disappointment of the delayed results, therefore the overall sentiment is negative. The joy emotion likely stems from the fact that at least the answer key is being released providing partial relief/progress in the matter.

Text: सरंजामशाही व घराणेशाही चे उत्तम उदाहरण. ठाकरे शिवाय बाकी सर्व चपलेची धुळ
translated_text: A perfect example of feudalism and dynastic rule. Except Thackeray, everyone else is a piece of cake.
Justification: "चपलेची धुळ" (chappalechi dhul - dust of a slipper/shoe) is a derogatory phrase implying worthlessness, thus contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: जशी तुमच्या डोक्यात गेली बर झाल हे तुम्हीच मान्य केल खाजप महाराष्ट्र द्रोही
translated_text: You have to accept it as it is in your head, Khajap Maharashtra traitor.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "महाराष्ट्र द्रोही" (Maharashtra traitor), which is a highly accusatory and negative term.

Text: नाना ईतका ढुंगणात जोर आहे तर राहुल गांधी ला महाराष्ट्रात निवडून आणून दाखव की
translated_text: If there is so much power in the ass, then show it by getting Rahul Gandhi elected in Maharashtra.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "ढुंगणात जोर आहे" (dhungnaat jor aahe), which literally translates to "power in the ass." This is a vulgar and disrespectful expression, conveying strong disapproval and negativity.

Text: तुम्हाला महाराष्ट्रातील जनता एकाच नावाने ओळखते ते नाव म्हणजे
translated_text: The people of Maharashtra know you by one name, that name is
Justification: The sentence introduces a statement but lacks emotional indicators. While setting the stage for something, it doesn't contain any negative sentiment. Therefore, the sentiment is neutral. There isn't a specific Marathi word or phrase responsible for a negative sentiment.

Text: मग ते दहशतवादी मुस्लिम तुमच्या मध्ये काय करत होते????
translated_text: So what were those terrorist Muslims doing among you????
Justification: The phrase "दहशतवादी मुस्लिम" (dahashatwadi Muslim) meaning "terrorist Muslim" carries a strong negative connotation, leading to the negative sentiment. The surprise element comes from the question implying disbelief or shock that such individuals were present "तुमच्या मध्ये" (tumchya madhye) - "among you".

Text: बायकांनी मनाची तरी लाज ठेवावी...कूंक हे कपाळावर गोल लागतं.. उभं नाही..
translated_text: Women should at least be ashamed of their hearts...this is a round mark on the forehead.. not a standing one..
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "मनाची तरी लाज ठेवावी...", which expresses disapproval and disgust, implying women should be ashamed of their behavior.

Text: आईच्या दूधात आढळलं ‘मायक्रोप्लास्टिक’, धक्कादायक माहिती समोर
translated_text: Microplastic' found in mother's milk, shocking information revealed
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "धक्कादायक" (dhakkadayak), which translates to "shocking" in English, indicating a negative and alarming discovery.

Text: हा माणूसच आहे त्याचे ट्विट काय घेऊन बसलात
translated_text: This is the man, what are you doing with his tweets?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the dismissive and belittling tone conveyed by "काय घेऊन बसलात" (kay gheun baslaat), which implies that the tweets are insignificant and not worth paying attention to, thus showing disdain.

Text: "मीडियाकडून अभिव्यक्ती स्वातंत्र्याच्या नावाखाली फूट पाडण्याचा प्रयत्न होत आहे." -संरक्षणमंत्री राजनाथ सिंह
translated_text: "Media is trying to create division in the name of freedom of expression." -Defense Minister Rajnath Singh
Justification: The phrase "फूट पाडण्याचा प्रयत्न" (phoot paadnyacha prayatna), meaning "trying to create division," indicates a negative sentiment and triggers anger due to its suggestion of malicious intent.

Text: त्यांना आपले महत्त्व माहिती नाही अजून बहुतेक
translated_text: They don't know their importance yet, most of them.
Justification: The sentence has a negative sentiment due to the phrase "माहिती नाही" (mahitI nAhI), which translates to "don't know," indicating a lack of awareness that reflects a deficiency. The overall sentiment is negative although it does not trigger a strong emotion.

Text: साहेबांबद्दल असले तर्क लावताना तुमची जीभ कशी जड पडली नाही..
translated_text: How come your tongue didn't get heavy while making such arguments about Saheb?
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the rhetorical question "जीभ कशी जड पडली नाही" (jeebh kashi jad padli nahi), which implies disbelief and criticism towards the person making arguments about Saheb, suggesting the speaker finds the arguments disrespectful or inappropriate. The surprise emotion arises from the incredulity expressed in the question.

Text: तुझ्या बापाच्या वयाचे आहेत ते, तू बापाशी असाच बोलतो का रे
translated_text: They're your father's age, do you talk to your father like that?
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) stems from the phrase "तू बापाशी असाच बोलतो का रे" (tu bapaashi asach bolto ka re), which questions the speaker's disrespectful tone towards someone of their father's age, implying disapproval and criticism.

Text: त्यांनी बंडखोरी केल्याने ते त्यांना मिळेल असे वाटत नाही!
translated_text: They don't think they'll get it by rebelling!
Justification: The phrase "बंडखोरी केल्याने" (bandakhori kelyaane), meaning "by rebelling," implies a negative action that is unlikely to yield positive results, contributing to a negative sentiment and potential anger.

Text: हत्ती वर भुंकणाऱ्या कुत्र्यांना हत्ती भिक घालत नाही
translated_text: Elephants do not beg for dogs that bark at them.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "भिक घालत नाही" (bhik ghalat nahi), meaning "do not beg/care about," implying indifference and disregard, thus signaling a negative connotation towards the dogs.

Text: लोकसभेला माढा मध्ये महाराष्ट्राच्या तथाकथित चाणक्य ची अशीच फाटली होती...
translated_text: This is how the so-called Chanakya of Maharashtra was torn apart in the Lok Sabha...
Justification: The phrase "फाटली होती" (phatli hoti), meaning "was torn apart," indicates a negative sentiment as it implies defeat or humiliation.

Text: खाल्लेल्या ताटात हगणारी ही लोक
translated_text: These people who eat in the plate
Justification: The phrase "हगणारी" (haganari), meaning "defecating," is highly derogatory and contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: .  वर्ष गप्प का होते सांगणार का? सत्ता गेल्यावर कसे जागे झाले?
translated_text: . Will you tell me why you were silent for a year? How did you wake up after losing power?
Justification: The phrase "सत्ता गेल्यावर कसे जागे झाले?" (How did you wake up after losing power?) implies criticism and disbelief, suggesting a negative sentiment. The surprise emotion is evoked by the questioning of their sudden change in behavior.

Text: ढोंगी लोक आहेत..हे
translated_text: These people are hypocrites..
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust emotion are primarily driven by the word "ढोंगी" (ḍhōṅgī), which translates to "hypocrites". This word carries strong negative connotations, indicating disapproval and disgust.

Text: मग रात्री बेरात्री वेष बदलून काय गोठ्या खेळत होते का
translated_text: So, what were they playing with at night, changing their costumes?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the sarcastic tone implied by "काय गोठ्या खेळत होते का" (kay gothya khelat hote ka), which suggests disbelief and ridicule. It translates to "what were they playing with at night, changing their costumes?", implying that they were obviously doing something suspicious and not simply playing.

Text: नाना पाटेकर यांच्याकडून आजच्या पिढीने आदर्श घ्यावा असे काहीही नाही.
translated_text: There is nothing that today's generation can take as an example from Nana Patekar.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "असे काहीही नाही" (ase kahihi nahi), which translates to "nothing like that" or "nothing at all," indicating a complete lack of positive attributes or examples to be taken from Nana Patekar.

Text: आधिच भक्त च्या बुडाला काजळी आली
translated_text: The devotee's head was almost covered in soot.
Justification: "बुडाला काजळी आली" (covered in soot) implies a negative state or misfortune, contributing to the negative sentiment. While the emotion is neutral, the phrase itself denotes an undesirable circumstance.

Text: डोक्यात नाही बळ ,पन छातीत सदा कळ. असा हा कुजबळ..!
translated_text: There is no strength in the head, but always a struggle in the chest. Such is this madness..!
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the word "कुजबळ" (kujabal), which translates to "madness" and conveys a sense of disgust and negativity.

Text: सच्या तुझ्या बुडाला आग लागली म्हणजे तुला महाराज किती समजले हे समजलं की... भाकऱ्या
translated_text: Honestly, your belly caught fire, so I realized how much you understood Maharaj...
Justification: "बुडाला आग लागली" (belly caught fire) is a harsh, albeit figurative, expression implying misfortune and suffering, contributing to the negative sentiment. While the overall tone is sarcastic ("सच्या" - honestly and the implied lack of understanding), the core negativity stems from wishing misfortune, even metaphorically.

Text: हा वेडा आहे सगळे बिनधास्त होते याचं सरकार असताना .
translated_text: This is crazy. Everyone was uninvolved when this government was in power.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the Marathi word "वेडा" (veda), meaning "crazy" or "mad," which expresses a negative judgment about the situation. The emotion of surprise arises from the unexpected or shocking nature of the statement.

Text: तुम्हाला नीच राजकारणी असं म्हणायचं आहे का?
translated_text: Do you mean a lowly politician?
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "नीच" (neech), which translates to "lowly" or "despicable" in English, implying a negative assessment of the politician's character.

Text: कठीण आहे
translated_text: It is difficult.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "कठीण" (kathin), which translates to "difficult," implying hardship and contributing to a feeling of sadness.

Text: आले होते सहाव्या मजल्यावर निवद ठेवला होता पण ते पहिल्या मजल्यावर घुटमळत होते
translated_text: They had arrived and were staying on the sixth floor, but they were crouching on the first floor.
Justification: "घुटमळत होते" (ghutmalat hote), meaning "crouching/hesitating," suggests uncertainty or reluctance, contributing to a negative sentiment.

Text: साहेब हया वेडी कुठे जिले होते हैं तुमचे विचार ?????
translated_text: Sir, where do your thoughts go, you crazy person?????
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the use of "वेडी" (vedi), which translates to "crazy person" and implies an insult. This direct insult expresses anger.

Text: पासून भरत्या रखडल्या आहेत तेच काय झालं राणे साहेब
translated_text: Recruitment has been stalled since then, what happened, Rane Saheb?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from "रखडल्या आहेत" (rakhadlya aahet), meaning "stalled," indicating a negative situation.

Text: समाजाची शोकांतिका आहे ही
translated_text: This is the tragedy of society.
Justification: The negative sentiment and sadness are driven by the Marathi word "शोकांतिका" (shokantika), which directly translates to "tragedy."

Text: हे असे बोलतात जसे फुले आंबडेकर यांच्या बरोबर ह्यांनी काम केले होते
translated_text: They talk as if they had worked with Phule Ambedkar.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) stems from the phrase "जसे फुले आंबडेकर यांच्या बरोबर ह्यांनी काम केले होते" (jase Phule Ambedkar yanchya barobar hyanni kaam kele hote), which implies disbelief or mockery that the speaker would have worked with such prominent figures. This suggests insincerity and contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: का शेतकऱ्याला दिवाळी आहे का नाही साहेब
translated_text: Why is Diwali celebrated by farmers or not, sir?
Justification: The phrase "का नाही साहेब" (ka nahi saheb) implying doubt and questioning the situation contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: अगदी खरं आहे. किडच आहे भ्रष्टवादी ही महाराष्ट्राला लागलेली मढ्याच्या टाळुवरचं लोणी खाणारे..
translated_text: It's absolutely true. It's the corruption that has gripped Maharashtra, eating the butter off the sheep's tongue.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust emotion are primarily driven by the phrase "मढ्याच्या टाळुवरचं लोणी खाणारे" (madhyachya taluvarche loni khanare), which translates to "eating butter off the sheep's tongue" and implies extreme greed and exploitation of a vulnerable situation, evoking strong feelings of disgust and disapproval.

Text: बिजेपी ला मत म्हणजे पुलवामा मधील शहीद जवानांना मारणाऱ्या अतंकवाद्यांना मत.....
translated_text: A vote for BJP means a vote for the terrorists who killed the martyred soldiers in Pulwama.....
Justification: The phrase "शहीद जवानांना मारणाऱ्या अतंकवाद्यांना मत" (martyred soldiers' killers, terrorists' vote) implies strong disapproval and equates voting for BJP with supporting terrorism, hence negative sentiment and disgust.

Text: आमच्या घराच्या बाहेर ही दगड आहेत बहुतेक उबाठा वाले हल्ला करणार असतील माझ्यावर
translated_text: There are these stones outside our house. Most of the bad guys are going to attack me.
Justification: The phrase "हल्ला करणार असतील माझ्यावर" (halla karnar asteel majhyavar - will attack me) expresses a threat and anticipation of harm, thus indicating fear and a negative sentiment.

Text: मराठी शाळाची पटसंख्या कमी होत नाही इंग्रजी शाळाची पटसंख्या वाढत आहे
translated_text: The number of students in Marathi schools is not decreasing, the number of students in English schools is increasing.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "कमी होत नाही" (kami hot nahi), which means "is not decreasing" (although technically a double negative, the implication in this context is negative because it acknowledges the worry of decreasing numbers).

Text: जनतेला श्ट फरक पडत नाही
translated_text: The public doesn't care.
Justification: "फरक पडत नाही" translates to "doesn't care," indicating indifference and a negative sentiment towards a situation.

Text: राजकीय पोळी भाजण्यासाठी हे राजकारणी हे असे विषय घेतात आण् वाट लावतात सगळ्यांची
translated_text: To fuel political fire, these politicians take up such issues and make everyone wait.
Justification: "वाट लावतात सगळ्यांची" (vaat lavtat saglyanchi - make everyone wait) implies a negative outcome for everyone, indicating a negative sentiment.

Text: मशालीच्या धगीत मूरजीची भुर्जी नक्की होणार होती म्हणून घेतली ना माघार
translated_text: The torchlight procession was sure to be a success, so they withdrew.
Justification: The negative sentiment (Neutral) is attributed to the phrase "माघार घेतली" (maghaar ghetli), meaning "withdrew," which suggests a negative outcome, even if not strongly expressed in the sentence itself.

Text: आणि येडे अन्धभक्त... दुसऱ्याच्या दरात जबरदस्तीने भजन गात बसतात . ....
translated_text: And these blind devotees... forcefully sing hymns at someone else's expense. ....
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust emotion are primarily driven by the phrase "येडे अन्धभक्त" (yede andhabhakt), which translates to "blind devotees" and carries a derogatory connotation. The word "येडे" (yede) specifically contributes to the negative sentiment, implying foolishness or idiocy.

Text: अरे बीन च्या विमाना तुझी लायकी आहे का असामान्य माणसावर बोलायची?
translated_text: Hey Bean's plane, do you have the right to talk about an extraordinary person?
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "बीन च्या विमाना तुझी लायकी आहे का" (Bean's plane, do you have the right?), which is sarcastic and belittling. This indicates a lack of respect and a negative attitude.

Text: आज या राणेला केंद्रीय मंत्री बनवण्याची नामुष्की आली फसणवीस वर  लाचारी
translated_text: Today, the embarrassment of making this Rane a Union Minister has come upon Fasnavis, helplessness on his part.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the Marathi word "नामुष्की" (namushki), which translates to "embarrassment" or "disgrace." It implies an undesirable and negative situation.

Text: तुम्ही काय लिहिले मला काही दिसतं नाही....गेली का तुमच्या एसी ची लाईट...
translated_text: I can't see what you wrote....did your AC light go out...
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "काही दिसतं नाही" (kahi disat nahi), meaning "can't see anything," indicating frustration or problem causing a negative experience.

Text: भक्त ला हा शेनक्या त्रास देतोय शाळा घेतली पाहिजे
translated_text: This skunk is bothering the devotee, he should go to school.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust emotion are driven by the word "शेनक्या" (shenkya), which is a derogatory term for "skunk". The sentence implies the subject is undesirable and contemptible.

Text: फार चुकीचे काम करत आहेत , हि खोके मंडळी .
translated_text: These idiots are doing something very wrong.
Justification: "फार चुकीचे" (far chukiche), meaning "very wrong" coupled with "खोके मंडळी" (khoke mandali), which translates to "idiots" and implies corruption, strongly indicates a negative sentiment and evokes anger.

Text: रखडलेल्या आणि होऊ घातलेली शिक्षक यात असेल का?
translated_text: Will there be a teacher who is stuck and about to become one?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the word "रखडलेल्या" (rakhadlelya), meaning "stuck" or "delayed," implying a negative state or situation.

Text: बाहेर एकनाथ शिंदे आत दुसरा शिंदे,ते हि कन्फर्म नाही..खोटी पत्रकारिता
translated_text: Eknath Shinde outside, another Shinde inside, that is not confirmed..false journalism
Justification: The phrase "खोटी पत्रकारिता" (khoti patrakarita - false journalism) indicates a negative sentiment due to the accusation of falsehood.

Text: दांडिया हा दांडिया असतो मराठी गुजराती नसतो … उगाच दोन समाजात फुट पाडु नका .
translated_text: A Dandiya is a Dandiya, not a Marathi or Gujarati... Don't just create a divide between two communities.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "फुट पाडु नका" (phut paadu naka), which translates to "don't create a divide," indicating disapproval and a negative stance against actions that could cause division.

Text: थोडक्यात हॅशटॅग सारखं हे वाक्य पण मनसे वाल्यांनी राष्ट्रवादी वाल्यांचंच उचललं.
translated_text: In short, this phrase, like a hashtag, was picked up by MNS supporters from the Nationalist Party.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "उचललं" (uchalala), meaning "picked up/stolen," which implies a lack of originality and a potentially underhanded tactic, contributing to a negative perception.

Text: हे बरोबर नाही अध्यक्ष मोहदय
translated_text: This is not right, President Mohday.
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger are primarily driven by the phrase "बरोबर नाही" (barobar nahi), which translates to "not right" or "incorrect". This expresses disapproval and disagreement.

Text: ह्यांच्या हिंदुत्वाची व्याख्या गोबर भक्तांसारखीच आहे.
translated_text: Their definition of Hinduism is the same as that of cow dung devotees.
Justification: "गोबर भक्तांसारखीच" (gobar bhaktansarkhich - like cow dung devotees) is a derogatory term used to insult and belittle, thus indicating a negative sentiment.

Text: व्हय की, तरच आपले ,पत्रकार परिषद करून करून थकले
translated_text: Maybe, only then, you will be tired of holding press conferences.
Justification: "थकले" (thakale), meaning "tired," indicates a negative sentiment as it suggests weariness or exhaustion.

Text: ये अनपड थोड हे वाचा रे राहुल चा चेंल्यानो
translated_text: Come on, read this, you Rahul's followers.
Justification: The phrase "अनपड थोड" (anpad thod), meaning "illiterate fools," indicates a negative sentiment due to its derogatory nature.

Text: घंटा, मुरजी पडणार हे नक्की झाल्यावर भाजपाने माघार घेतली
translated_text: BJP withdrew after it became clear that Ghanta and Murji would fall
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "मुरजी पडणार", which implies a negative outcome (defeat/failure) for Ghanta and Murji.

Text: योगीची नक्कल ईकडे चालू आहे, परंतु ही शिवरायांची भूमी आहे,
translated_text: Yogi imitation is going on here, but this is the land of Shivaji,
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from "योगीची नक्कल" (Yogichi nakal), meaning "Yogi imitation," implying a disapproval of emulating Yogi Adityanath's style, suggesting it's inappropriate for Shivaji's land. The phrase evokes a sense of disapproval toward the current events.

Text: अतिशय बेजबाबदार निर्णय चालू आहेत ,परीक्षेला काय गरबा खेळू का बेअकलांनो
translated_text: Very irresponsible decisions are being made, why should we play Garba in the exam, you idiots?
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger are driven by the phrase "बेजबाबदार निर्णय चालू आहेत" (irresponsible decisions are being made) which expresses disapproval and the insulting term "बेअकलांनो" (you idiots) which directly conveys anger.

Text: खोट आहे हे तिच्या मिरच्या झोंबत नाही झन्नन्नन्नन्न करतात
translated_text: This is a lie, it's not her chili sauce, they're making a fuss.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "खोट आहे" (khot aahe), which translates to "This is a lie". While the rest of the sentence might seem expressive, the direct accusation of lying establishes the negative sentiment.

Text: शेठ, कुठं अडकून पडला होता.
translated_text: Seth, where was he stuck?
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment because of the phrase "अडकून पडला होता" (adkun padla hota), which implies being stuck or held up in an unwanted situation, conveying a sense of trouble or delay.

Text: नरेश साहेब जी आपण पदे भोगली आहेत ना ती निष्ठवंत कार्यकर्त्यांचा जीवावर
translated_text: Naresh Saheb, the positions you have held are not at the expense of the lives of loyal workers.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) stems from the phrase "निष्ठवंत कार्यकर्त्यांचा जीवावर" (nishtavant karyakartyancha jivavar), meaning "at the expense of the lives of loyal workers," implying exploitation or unfair treatment, even when negated with "ना" (na) later. This still hints at a potential negative impact on loyal workers, even if it is claimed not to have happened.

Text: टोमणे मारण्यापूर्वी कोणी विचार करत नाही, बेरोजगारांची अवस्था कोणी विचारत नाही.
translated_text: No one thinks before taunting, no one asks about the plight of the unemployed.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "टोमणे मारण्यापूर्वी" (tomane maranya purvi), which translates to "before taunting." Taunting implies negativity and a lack of consideration for others, contributing to a negative sentiment.

Text: "आणि ह्या आहेत आपल्या देशाच्या अर्थमंत्री...
translated_text: "And this is the Finance Minister of our country...
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the lack of any positive or celebratory words. The phrase "आणि ह्या आहेत आपल्या देशाच्या अर्थमंत्री..." is a neutral statement of fact and does not convey any positive or appreciative attitude. Hence, the absence of positive sentiment leads to a negative classification.

Text: हारणार हे वरीष्ठांनी ओळखलं होतं. कार्यकर्त्यांना कोण सांगणार?
translated_text: The seniors knew they would lose. Who would tell the workers?
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) stems from the phrase "हारणार हे वरीष्ठांनी ओळखलं होतं" which translates to "The seniors knew they would lose," indicating an anticipated negative outcome. The word "हारणार" (haarnar) meaning "will lose" is the primary driver of the negative sentiment.

Text: चिन्ह अगदी समर्पक आहे. ज्या पक्षाचे काम भेटले त्याचे डब्बे ओढतो
translated_text: The symbol is very appropriate. I pull the boxes of the party whose work I met.
Justification: The negative sentiment arises from the phrase "डब्बे ओढतो" (dabbe odhato), which implies blindly following a party without independent thought, suggesting a negative dependency and lack of critical evaluation.

Text: विकला गेलेला मीडिया आणि पत्रकार हेच लोकशाहीचे मुख्य शत्रू आहेत
translated_text: The main enemies of democracy are the sold-out media and journalists.
Justification: "शत्रू" (shatru, meaning enemy) indicates a negative sentiment, as it describes the media and journalists as adversaries.

Text: लक्ष्मी चालते का.... भ्रष्टाचाराच्या चिखलात प्रकटलेली ...
translated_text: Does Lakshmi work.... revealed in the mud of corruption...
Justification: The phrase "भ्रष्टाचाराच्या चिखलात" (bhrashtacharachya chikhalat - in the mud of corruption) evokes a strong sense of disgust and negativity, indicating the negative sentiment.

Text: अरे मग इतर जण बघता कशाला मस्त झोडून काढायचा होता
translated_text: Oh, then why did you want to shake it off so well while others were watching?
Justification: "मस्त झोडून काढायचा होता" implies a forceful and potentially violent action, which, in the context of others watching, evokes surprise and a negative sentiment. "मस्त झोडून काढायचा होता" signifies something beyond just cleaning; the "मस्त" intensifies the forceful action.

Text: ही लोकशाही संविधान क आणि कायद्या द्वारे चालते!तूमच्या पिताश्रींची ढापलेली मातोश्री मालमत्ता नाही निवडणूक
translated_text: This democracy is run by the Constitution and the law! Elections are not the property of your fathers and mothers.
Justification: The phrase "तूमच्या पिताश्रींची ढापलेली मातोश्री मालमत्ता नाही" (tūmchyā pitāshrīnchī dhāpalelī mātōshrī mālatta nāhī) which translates to "not the property of your fathers and mothers" expresses anger and contempt towards the targeted individuals. This directly implies disapproval and hostility, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: शीतल म्हात्रे दुतोंडी आहे , पैसे भेटले की वाजली
translated_text: Sheetal Mhatre is a double-tongued woman, she cries when she gets money.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "दुतोंडी आहे" (dutondi aahe), meaning "double-tongued," which implies dishonesty and deceit.

Text: बाई चा आणि अर्थशास्त्राचा काडीचाही संबंध नाही हे परत एकदा सिद्ध होत....
translated_text: It is proven once again that women and economics have no connection whatsoever...
Justification: The phrase "काडीचाही संबंध नाही" (kaadichaahi sambandh naahi), meaning "no connection whatsoever," indicates a strong negative sentiment. The implication of exclusion and belittling contributes to sadness.

Text: मुका मोर्चा विसरली का
translated_text: Did you forget the dumb front?
Justification: "मुका मोर्चा" (muka morcha - dumb/silent front) contributes to the negative sentiment and evokes disgust because it implies a dehumanizing and dismissive attitude towards a group's protest, suggesting their voices were intentionally ignored or suppressed.

Text: गर्वाचे घर खाली..हि म्हण उद्धव ठाकरेंना तंतोतंत लागू पडतेय..
translated_text: The house of pride is down..this saying applies to Uddhav Thackeray exactly..
Justification: The phrase "गर्वाचे घर खाली" (house of pride is down) implies a negative outcome due to arrogance, thus contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: आता पुढे भाषणात हेच सांगणार आपल्याला बाळासाहेबांची शिवसेना संपवायची आहे
translated_text: Now, I will say this in my speech: We want to end Balasaheb's Shiv Sena.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "संपवायची आहे" (sampavaychi aahe), which translates to "want to end/destroy," indicating a desire to eliminate Balasaheb's Shiv Sena, causing sadness due to the potential loss and conflict.

Text: ही गोष्ट नेहेमी वेळ निघून गेल्यावरच समजते.
translated_text: This is always understood only after time has passed.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "वेळ निघून गेल्यावरच समजते" (vel nighun gelyavarach samajte), which implies a sense of regret or missed opportunity as things are understood only after it's too late.

Text: अय हिरो सभ्य भाषा वापर म्हटल कुठल्या भाषेत लिहिले ते नाही विचारल
translated_text: Hey Hero, I said use polite language, I didn't ask what language it was written in.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the confrontational and sarcastic tone conveyed by the phrase "अय हिरो" ("Ay Hero"). This phrase is used sarcastically to address someone, implying the opposite of genuine admiration and indicating displeasure.

Text: दिलंय ते काम करा आधी... नुसतं मागत असतात दिवसरात्र!
translated_text: Do the work you've been given first... they just keep asking day and night!
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "नुसतं मागत असतात दिवसरात्र!", meaning "they just keep asking day and night!". This expresses annoyance and implies the person is being demanding, causing anger.

Text: काय गरज नाही गरीब च्या घरावर किती हले होतात कोणी बगतंय का
translated_text: There is no need, how many people are attacking the poor people's houses, is anyone complaining?
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust are driven by the phrase "गरीब च्या घरावर किती हले होतात" (garib chya gharavar kiti hale hotat) which highlights the attacks on the poor and evokes a feeling of injustice and repulsion.

Text: तुम्ही राजकारण सोडून द्या ही असली अभद्र टीपणी शोभत नाही
translated_text: You should leave politics, this is not a proper vulgar comment.
Justification: "अभद्र टीपणी" (vulgar comment) indicates strong negativity, specifically disgust.

Text: एम.ओ.यु झालाच नव्हता!!! उद्धव आणि आदित्य लोकांना मूर्ख का बनवत आहेत..
translated_text: There was no MOU!!! Why are Uddhav and Aditya fooling people..
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger are primarily driven by the phrase "मूर्ख का बनवत आहेत" (murkh ka banavat aahet) which translates to "why are [they] fooling [people]", expressing disapproval and accusing someone of deceit.

Text: अंधेरी पोटनिवडणूक मध्ये मराठी उमेदवार नाही का मिळाला....
translated_text: Why was there no Marathi candidate in the Andheri by-election?
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment due to the phrase "नाही का मिळाला", which translates to "was not found?" or "didn't get?". This implies disappointment or disbelief that no Marathi candidate was available, indicating a negative feeling of surprise.

Text: या उज्ज्वल निकम ला "पदमश्री"पाहिजे म्हणून हा शिंदे ची चाटतोय!
translated_text: This Ujjwal Nikam is licking Shinde's chops so that he can get the "Padma Shri"!
Justification: "चाटतोय" (chattoy), meaning "licking chops," implies subservience and opportunism, contributing to the negative sentiment despite the implied (and potentially sarcastic) desired outcome of achieving "Padma Shri" which could be linked to joy for the subject if obtained legitimately. The act itself is inherently negative.

Text: शिवसेनेला सहानुभूती मिळतीये हा भ्रम आहे, माफ करना पर आज व्हिस्की नहीं रम हे.
translated_text: It is an illusion that Shiv Sena gets sympathy, sorry but today it is not whiskey but rum.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "भ्रम आहे" (bhram aahe), meaning "it is an illusion," which expresses disbelief or a negative assessment of the claim that Shiv Sena is receiving sympathy.

Text: आता तुम्ही असंच रडणार ..
translated_text: Now you will cry like this..
Justification: The phrase "रडणार" (radnar), meaning "will cry," indicates sadness and negativity, contributing to the negative sentiment. The context and tone further suggest disgust.

Text: लोक किती शिव्या देऊ शकतात याचा अंदाज घेताय का ?
translated_text: Can you imagine how much abuse people can give?
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust are primarily driven by the word "शिव्या" (shivya), which translates to "abuse" or "curses". The sentence focuses on the *amount* of abuse, further amplifying the negative feeling.

Text: मोकाट कुत्री जरा जास्तच भुकायलीत असं नाही का वाटत.
translated_text: Don't you think the stray dogs are a little too hungry?
Justification: The phrase "जास्तच भुकायलीत" (jaastach bhukaayalit - a little too hungry/barking excessively) indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: हे तर पाया खाली पण झोपायला देणार नाही.
translated_text: This won't even let you sleep with your feet down.
Justification: The phrase "पाया खाली पण झोपायला देणार नाही" (paya khali pan zopayla denar nahi - won't even let you sleep with your feet down) implies a refusal to allow even the most basic comfort, indicating a negative sentiment.

Text: कलाकार मंडळी सगळ्याला कंटाळले असून 'ट्रोलिंग नको रे बाबा' असं म्हणत आहेत.
translated_text: The artists are fed up with everyone and are saying, 'No more trolling, Dad.'
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "कंटाळले असून" (kantaalle asun), which means "fed up with," indicating a feeling of weariness and negativity.

Text: जातीवादी मानसिकता वाढीस लावण्या साठी असे प्रयत्न होत असतात.
translated_text: Such efforts are being made to promote a casteist mentality.
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment due to the phrase "जातीवादी मानसिकता वाढीस लावण्या साठी" (jatiwadi mansikata vadhhis lavanya sathi), which translates to "to promote a casteist mentality." Promoting a casteist mentality is inherently negative.

Text: अशी किती लोकांना सूचना दिली, सगळे फेक दावे आहेत
translated_text: How many people have been advised like this, all are fake claims?
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "फेक दावे आहेत" (fake claims are), which expresses disbelief and negativity toward the claims being made. The surprise element stems from the implied disbelief that so many people have been advised with these fake claims.

Text: किती कागदी घोडे नाचवता??!!! कंटाळा आला आता,
translated_text: How many paper horses are you dancing with??!!! I'm bored now,
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by "कंटाळा आला आता" (kantaLaa aalaa aataa) which translates to "I'm bored now," indicating dissatisfaction and negativity. While the rhetorical question might express frustration, the direct statement of boredom is the key driver of the negative sentiment.

Text: अमृतमहोत्सवी वर्षात, जनतेला महागाई आणि बेरोजगारीचे विष दिले जात आहे ! ...
translated_text: In the year of Amrit Mahotsav, the people are being poisoned with inflation and unemployment! ...
Justification: The phrase "विष दिले जात आहे" (vish dile jaat aahe), meaning "poison is being given," strongly indicates a negative sentiment and evokes disgust.

Text: सोशल मीडियातील ओळखीतून तो विवाहितेचा सतत पाठलाग करीत होता.
translated_text: He was constantly stalking a married woman through social media acquaintances.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust are driven by "पाठलाग करीत होता" (paathlaag karit hota), which translates to "was stalking," implying harassment and unwanted pursuit.

Text: तुमाला मराठीची का लाज वाटते? माहिती मराठीतच पाहिजे महाराष्ट्र चि राज्यभाषा मराठी आहे.
translated_text: Why are you ashamed of Marathi? Information should be in Marathi. The state language of Maharashtra is Marathi.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust are driven by the phrase "लाज वाटते?", meaning "ashamed?", which expresses disapproval and likely elicits a feeling of disgust towards the implied shame associated with the Marathi language.

Text: एवढं सगळ हालल तरी अजून पण वाट बघताय का राहिलेलं हलायची
translated_text: Even though everything has changed, why are you still waiting for the rest to change?
Justification: "हालल" and "राहिलेलं हलायची" imply negative change and a frustrating, incomplete process, contributing to the negative sentiment. While the tone is more resigned than overtly angry, the phrase suggests dissatisfaction, justifying the -1 sentiment.

Text: गटारे चाटत फिरणाऱ्या डुकरांचा कळप वाघाच काहीही वाकडं करू शकत नाही.
translated_text: A herd of pigs roaming around licking the gutters can't do anything wrong, even a tiger.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "गटारे चाटत फिरणाऱ्या डुकरांचा कळप" (gatare chatat phirnaryana dukarancha kalap), which translates to "a herd of pigs roaming around licking the gutters." This is a highly derogatory and disgusting image, contributing significantly to the negative sentiment and evoking disgust.

Text: संघिना फक्त पुरुषाच्या चड्डीत बघायची सवय आहे...काय करणार च आहे
translated_text: Sanghina is used to seeing only men in shorts...what are you going to do?
Justification: The negative sentiment arises from the phrase "संघिना फक्त पुरुषाच्या चड्डीत बघायची सवय आहे" which translates to "Sanghina is used to seeing only men in shorts". This phrase carries negative connotations due to its suggestive and potentially objectifying nature.

Text: सत्ता म्हणजे जस काय विरोधात जावुन बसले आहेत
translated_text: Power is what they are sitting in opposition to.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "विरोधात जावुन बसले आहेत" (virodhat javun basale aahet), which implies opposition and a negative stance, indicating a conflict or disagreement.

Text: सॉफ्ट पोर्न हे खऱ्या पोर्न पेक्षा धोकादायक असते. कारण ते तरुणांचा दृष्टिकोन दूषित करते
translated_text: Soft porn is more dangerous than real porn because it corrupts the views of young people.
Justification: "दूषित करते" (dushit karte), meaning "corrupts," indicates a negative sentiment, contributing to the overall feeling of disgust towards the topic.

Text: भाजप प्रत्येक पक्ष फोडू पाहतो! एक सोडले तर देशातील आज प्रत्येक पक्ष असुरक्षित आहे.
translated_text: BJP is trying to break every party! Except for one, every party in the country is vulnerable today.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "पक्ष फोडू पाहतो" (paksha phodu pahto), which translates to "trying to break the party," indicating a destructive and destabilizing action.

Text: तुमची का फाटली ते अख्खा महाराष्ट्र जाणून आहे पळकु टे कुठले
translated_text: The whole of Maharashtra knows why you are torn apart, where are the scoundrels?
Justification: The phrase "पळकु टे कुठले" (palkute kuthale), meaning "where are the scoundrels?", expresses strong contempt and is responsible for the negative sentiment and feeling of disgust.

Text: .. गांधी खिशात आला कि सगळं गार गार आणि वाटतं
translated_text: .. When Gandhi comes into my pocket, everything feels cold and
Justification: The phrase "गार गार" (gaar gaar), meaning "cold cold," implies a negative feeling in this context. While literally referring to temperature, it suggests a lack of warmth or comfort, likely due to the underlying situation related to "Gandhi khishat ala," which is understood as money (Gandhi's image on Indian currency) and greed, thus the anger.

Text: तुम्ही हल्ली गप्प गप्प असता काय झालंय ? हाकललं का ?
translated_text: What's wrong with you being quiet lately? Did you get kicked out?
Justification: The phrase "हाकललं का ?" (hakalala ka?) meaning "Did you get kicked out?" indicates a negative sentiment as it implies potential misfortune or a demeaning situation.

Text: अरे बायकांवर ही राजकारण करताय... गद्दारांनी दाखून दिलं बाळासाहेबांच्या विचाराचे वारसदार तुम्ही नाही
translated_text: Oh, you are playing politics with women... The traitors have shown that you are not the heirs of Balasaheb's thoughts.
Justification: The phrase "गद्दारांनी" (gaddaranni), meaning "traitors," expresses strong disapproval and contributes significantly to the negative sentiment.

Text: हा पण तुमचा भ्रम आहे.
translated_text: This is also your illusion.
Justification: "भ्रम" (bhram - illusion) implies a false or misleading belief, contributing to the negative sentiment of -1. While the emotion is neutral, the presence of "भ्रम" suggests a negative perception of reality.

Text: त्यामुळे चित्रपटातील या दोन प्रमुख व्यक्तिरेखांबद्दल प्रेक्षकांना कुठलाही भावनिक संबंध जोडता येत नाही
translated_text: Therefore, the audience is unable to make any emotional connection with these two main characters in the film.
Justification: "कुठलाही भावनिक संबंध जोडता येत नाही" indicates a lack of emotional connection, leading to a negative sentiment. The phrase specifically highlights the absence of emotional engagement.

Text: हे वैर पुढे त्यांचं लग्न मुलंबाळं झाली तरी कायम राहतं
translated_text: This enmity persists even after they get married and have children.
Justification: The phrase "वैर कायम राहतं" (vair kayam rahata) meaning "enmity persists" indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: त्या धक्क्याने त्या मुलाची पत्नी वेळेच्या आधीच प्रसूत होते एका मुलीला जन्म देते
translated_text: Due to that shock, the boy's wife goes into premature labor and gives birth to a girl.
Justification: The word "धक्क्याने" (dhakkyane), meaning "due to the shock," indicates a negative event causing premature labor, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: लेखक-दिग्दर्शक संतोष डावखर यांनी धर्माच्या विषयांचा शोध घेण्याचा प्रयत्न केला, परंतु अंमलबजावणीने समीक्षक गोंधळून गेले.
translated_text: Writer-director Santosh Davkhar tried to explore themes of religion, but the execution left critics confused.
Justification: "गोंधळून गेले" (gondhalun gele - confused) indicates a negative outcome or experience, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: ;कागर;मध्येही ग्रामीण भागातील राजकारणाचे विविध पैलू दिसतात, परंतू एकूणच या सिनेमात प्रेम आणि राजकारण यामध्ये दिग्दर्शक मकरंदची गफलत झाल्यामुळे सिनेमा विस्कळीत झाला आहे
translated_text: ;Kaagar; also shows various aspects of rural politics, but overall the film is marred by director Makarand's blunder between love and politics.
