Justification: The sentiment is negative (-1) because the phrase "गफलत झाल्यामुळे सिनेमा विस्कळीत झाला आहे" (gafalat zhalyamule cinema viskalit zhala aahe) indicates that the director made a blunder leading to a disjointed or messed-up film, implying a negative assessment.

Text: संत्या आणि त्याचे मित्र कॉलेजमध्ये मजा करत असलेला भाग ट्रेलरमध्ये मूर्ख दिसत होता
translated_text: The part where Santya and his friends are having fun in college looked silly in the trailer.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "मूर्ख" (murkh), which translates to "silly" or "foolish," indicating a negative assessment of the scene.

Text: एकीकडे काही दहशतवादी खेळणाऱ्या मुलांवर नजर रोखून आहेत
translated_text: On one hand, some terrorists are keeping an eye on the children playing.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "दहशतवादी" (dahashatvadi), meaning "terrorists," which inherently carries a negative connotation.

Text: साचेबद्ध चौकटी आणि अपेक्षित वाटेवरून जाणाऱ्या ‘प्रीतम’मध्ये वेगळं काहीच नाही हे मात्र खरं
translated_text: It is true that there is nothing different in 'Pritam', which follows the stereotyped framework and the expected path.
Justification: The phrase "वेगळं काहीच नाही" (veglh kahich nahi) which translates to "nothing different," indicates a lack of uniqueness and contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: स्त्रिया या नियमाच्या शेवटी असहाय्य आणि कोणत्याही अधिकारांपासून वंचित राहिल्या आहेत
translated_text: Women are left helpless and deprived of any rights at the end of this rule.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the Marathi word "असहाय्य" (asahayya), meaning helpless, which indicates a state of vulnerability and powerlessness, evoking disgust in the context of women being deprived of rights.

Text: साक्षीदारांचा साठा आणि फॉरेन्सिक पुराव्यांमध्ये संपूर्ण प्रकरण उलगडते, ज्यात म्हशीची विष्ठा, गांडुळे, ब्लेड, दुपट्टा आणि इतर अनेक घटकांचा समावेश आहे.
translated_text: The entire case unfolds in a hoard of witnesses and forensic evidence, including buffalo dung, earthworms, blades, scarves, and many other elements.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "म्हशीची विष्ठा, गांडुळे, ब्लेड" (mhashi chi vishta, gandule, blade) - "buffalo dung, earthworms, blades." These are unpleasant and potentially harmful items, creating a negative association with the unfolding case. While the emotion is neutral, the specific items themselves contribute to the negative sentiment.

Text: त्यानंतर चित्रपट सर्व अर्थ गमावून बसतो.
translated_text: After that, the film loses all meaning.
Justification: The phrase "अर्थ गमावून बसतो" (arth gamavun basato), meaning "loses all meaning," indicates a negative sentiment and contributes to the emotion of sadness due to the loss of something valuable.

Text: कुटुंबांनी आपल्या जातीबाहेर किंवा त्यांच्या इच्छेविरुद्ध लग्न केल्याबद्दल आपल्या मुलांना नाकारल्याच्या बातम्यांसह तत्सम बातम्या आपल्याला ज्या व्यवस्थेचा एक भाग आहोत त्या व्यवस्थेवर वारंवार प्रश्नचिन्ह निर्माण करतात.
translated_text: Similar news stories, including reports of families rejecting their children for marrying outside their caste or against their will, repeatedly question the system we are a part of.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "नाकारल्याच्या बातम्यांसह" (nakarlyachya batmyansah), which translates to "with news of rejecting/denying". This indicates a negative action being reported, thus contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: मुंबईसारख्या शहरात पोलिसांच्या हत्या होऊ लागतात
translated_text: Police killings start happening in cities like Mumbai
Justification: "हत्या" (hatya), meaning "killings" or "murders," indicates a negative event, thus contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: जेव्हा तिला कळते, की तिला आणि तिच्या कुटुंबियांना खूप त्रास होतो, की ती गंभीर मानसिक स्थितीने ग्रस्त आहे
translated_text: When she learns that she and her family are suffering greatly, that she is suffering from a serious mental condition
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "खूप त्रास होतो" (khoop tras hoto), meaning "suffering greatly," indicating a painful and distressing situation.

Text: या प्रकाराला घाबरून जग्गू रुग्णालयातून पळ काढतो आणि आपल्या घरी येतो
translated_text: Scared of this, Jaggu runs away from the hospital and comes home.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily due to the word "घाबरून" (ghabarun), which translates to "scared." While the sentence describes actions, the underlying fear drives the negative sentiment.

Text: पण या भव्यतेमध्ये चित्रपटाचा आत्मा कुठे तरी हरवतोय असं वाटतं
translated_text: But in all this grandeur, the soul of the film seems to be getting lost somewhere.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "हरवतोय असं वाटतं" (haravtoy asa vaatt'ta), which translates to "seems to be getting lost," indicating a negative perception of the film's core essence.

Text: अक्कूच्या शरीरावर सत्तरहून अधिक घाव
translated_text: More than seventy wounds on Akku's body
Justification: The phrase "सत्तरहून अधिक घाव" (seventy plus wounds) indicates severe violence and harm, eliciting a strong negative sentiment and specifically, disgust.

Text: काही बाजूचे ट्रॅक हेराफेरीचे वाटतात, कारण प्री-क्लायमॅक्स आणि क्लायमॅक्स खुनांमध्ये वापरलेल्या अनेक प्रश्नांची किंवा तंत्रांची उत्तरे देत नाहीत.
translated_text: Some of the side tracks feel manipulative, as they don't answer many of the questions or techniques used in the pre-climax and climax murders.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust emotion are driven by the phrase "हेराफेरीचे वाटतात" (herapheriche vatatat), which translates to "feel manipulative." The word "हेराफेरी" (herapheri) itself implies deception and scheming, resulting in a negative perception.

Text: हा प्रवास कल्पनाविस्तारावर बेतला असताना अनेक त्रुटीही जाणवतात
translated_text: While this journey is based on imagination, many flaws are also evident.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the Marathi word "त्रुटी" (truti), which translates to "flaws" or "defects."

Text: स्टारपणा जाणवू न देता त्याने अभिनय केला आहे पण कथेतच दम नसल्याने आणि दिग्दर्शनही चांगले नसल्याने त्याची मेहनत वाया गेल्याचे स्पष्टपणे दिसून येते
translated_text: He has acted without giving the impression of being a star, but it is clear that his hard work has been wasted as the story lacks substance and the direction is not good.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "मेहनत वाया गेल्याचे" (mehanat vaya gelyache), which translates to "hard work being wasted." This phrase expresses a clear sense of loss and futility, thus contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: तिचं तान्ह बाळ घरी एकटच असतं
translated_text: Her infant child is alone at home.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "एकटच असतं" (ekatach asata), which signifies "alone" or "lonely," implying a negative situation for the infant.

Text: याचं कारण पटकथेत लेखनासाठी वाव असतानाही म्हणावी तशी पातळी न गाठता आल्यानं लेखनाच्या पातळीवर तो अधांतरी राहतो
translated_text: The reason for this is that even though there is scope for writing in the screenplay, it remains incomplete in terms of writing because it has not reached the desired level.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "अधांतरी राहतो" (adhantari rahato), which implies that the writing remains incomplete or hanging, and doesn't reach a satisfactory level.

Text: अमृता खानविलकर वाईट नाही पण तिच्या अभिनयावरही वाईट व्यक्तिरेखेचा परिणाम होतो
translated_text: Amrita Khanvilkar is not bad but her acting is also affected by her bad character
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the word "वाईट" (waiṭa), which means "bad," used in the context of the character affecting her acting. While there is a mitigating factor of "नाही" (nāhī) meaning "not," the overall impact of "वाईट व्यक्तिरेखेचा परिणाम" (waiṭa vyaktirekhēchā pariṇāma) - "the effect of a bad character" - creates a negative impression.

Text: पण नंतर पुन्हा गडबड होते
translated_text: But then it got messy again.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the word "गडबड" (gadbad), which translates to "messy" or "trouble," indicating a negative situation.

Text: पण उत्तरार्धात गरज नसतानाही येणाऱ्या कवितांमुळे चित्रपटाचा वेग काहीसा मंदावतो
translated_text: But the pace of the film slows down somewhat due to unnecessary poems in the latter half.
Justification: "मंदાવतो" (mandavto), meaning "slows down," indicates a negative impact on the film's pace, justifying the negative sentiment.

Text: काहीवेळा, कॅमेरा ठराविक सीनवर पाहिजे त्यापेक्षा जास्त वेळ रेंगाळतो
translated_text: Sometimes, the camera lingers on a certain scene longer than it should.
Justification: The phrase "जास्त वेळ रेंगाळतो" (jasta vel rengalato - lingers longer) implies a negative sentiment as it suggests an undesirable or excessive duration, leading to boredom or frustration.

Text: मुलांमध्ये ताई म्हणून ओळखली जाणारी, ती प्रतिस्पर्धी गटांमध्ये शांतता प्रस्थापित करण्याचा प्रयत्न करते, परंतु व्यर्थ
translated_text: Known as Tai among the children, she tries to bring peace between rival factions, but in vain.
Justification: "व्यर्थ" (vyarth, in vain) indicates futility and contributes to the negative sentiment as the peace efforts are unsuccessful.

Text: क्रिकेट बोर्ड महिला खेळाडूंना यापूर्वी भारतीय संघाच्या पुरुष खेळाडूंनी वापरलेल्या त्यांच्या नावाच्या जर्सी देतात
translated_text: The cricket board is giving women players jerseys named after them, previously worn by male players of the Indian team.
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment because the phrase "यापूर्वी भारतीय संघाच्या पुरुष खेळाडूंनी वापरलेल्या" (previously worn by male players of the Indian team) implies a lack of new resources and suggests that women's players are being given hand-me-downs. This highlights a perceived inequality and contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: पण जसजशी वर्षे उलटली, शरद अजूनही अडकला आहे आणि आणखी कशाची तरी वाट पाहत आहे
translated_text: But as the years pass, Sharad is still stuck and waiting for something more.
Justification: "अडकणे" (adakne - stuck) indicates a negative state of being and contributes to the negative sentiment (-1) as it suggests Sharad is not progressing or moving forward in life.

Text: त्यामुळे जर सामाजिक संदेशच ऐकायचा आहे तर चित्रपटाचा केवळ शेवटच बघितलेला बरा असं वाटून जात
translated_text: So, if you want to hear the social message, it seems better to watch only the end of the film.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by "असं वाटून जातं" which implies a feeling of resignation or disappointment, suggesting that watching the entire film is not worth the effort, only the ending which contains the social message.

Text: स्काईपवर आपल्या नातवंडांशी बोलत असताना त्याच्या डोळ्यातील चमक, आयुष्य घडवण्यासाठी त्याने सोडलेल्या गावात पोहोचल्यावर तो आनंद, तो आपल्या डॉक्टरांशी निरुपद्रवीपणे फ्लर्ट करत असतानाचा भावनिक क्षण, यूएसएमधले त्याचे कुटुंब साजरे करताना प्रभावळकर वरील त्यांचा वाढदिवस तुम्हाला तो एकाकीपणाची जाणीव करून देतो
translated_text: The sparkle in his eyes as he talks to his grandchildren on Skype, the joy when he reaches the village he left to build a life, the emotional moment when he flirts harmlessly with his doctor, the birthday he celebrates with his family in the USA, Prabhavalkar makes you feel lonely.
Justification: Despite the joyous elements described initially, the phrase "एकाकीपणाची जाणीव करून देतो" (ekaakipanachi jaaniiv karun deto) which translates to "makes you feel lonely," is the primary driver of the negative sentiment.

Text: एकमेकांवर जीवापाड प्रेम करणाऱ्या मीरा आणि आदित्यच्या वैवाहिक आयुष्यात जोरदार खटके उडू लागतात
translated_text: Meera and Aditya, who love each other dearly, start to experience serious problems in their married life.
Justification: "जोरदार खटके उडू लागतात" indicates significant conflict and issues arising, directly implying a negative sentiment and sadness.

Text: अस्फ्याने संत्याचे सांत्वन करताच ते दोघेही मद्यधुंद झाले
translated_text: As soon as Asfya consoled Santaya, they both became drunk.
Justification: The phrase "मद्यधुंद झाले" (madhyadhund zhale) meaning "became drunk" indicates a negative sentiment as it describes a state of inebriation, which can be associated with negative consequences.

Text: अडीच तासांपेक्षा जास्त काळ लांबलेल्या या चित्रपटाचा शेवट कधी एकदा येईल असं आपल्याला वाटत राहतं
translated_text: This film, which lasts for more than two and a half hours, keeps you wondering when it will end.
Justification: The phrase "कधी एकदा येईल असं आपल्याला वाटत राहतं" (kadhi ekda yeil asa aplyala vaatat rahat) expresses a feeling of impatience and wishing for the end, indicating a negative sentiment and, in this context, disgust with the film's length.

Text: परंतु सिनेमातील काही व्हीएफएक्स दृश्ये खोटी वाटतात
translated_text: But some of the VFX scenes in the movie look fake.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "खोटी" (khoti), which means "fake" or "false." This indicates a negative quality of the VFX scenes, leading to the negative sentiment.

Text: चित्रपटातील विनोद पटकथेत चांगल्या प्रकारे समाकलित केला आहे परंतु त्यात मौलिकता नाही आणि परिणामकारक नाही.
translated_text: The humor in the film is well integrated into the script but lacks originality and is not effective.
Justification: The phrase "परिणामकारक नाही" (parinamakarak nahi), meaning "not effective," indicates a negative sentiment towards the film's humor.

Text: पण कथानकातील त्रुटी आणि पटकथेतील विस्कळीतपणा सिनेमाचा अंतिम परिणाम फारसा साधत नाही
translated_text: But the plot flaws and the disjointedness of the screenplay do not really contribute to the final outcome of the film.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "फारसा साधत नाही" (pharasa sadhat nahi), which translates to "does not really contribute" or "doesn't achieve much," indicating a lack of positive impact.

Text: पटकथासंवादातही एक प्रकारचा बाळबोधपणा आणि सरधोपटपणा आहे
translated_text: There is a kind of childishness and sloppiness in the script dialogue as well.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the word "बाळबोधपणा" (balbodhpana), meaning childishness/simplicity in a negative context, and "सरधोपटपणा" (sardhopatpana) which means sloppiness/being straightforward in a negative way, implying lack of nuance.

Text: सर्वात वाईट म्हणजे रायगड असलेल्या पश्चिम घाटातील पर्वताची उंची पाहता तिची परीक्षा अपेक्षेपेक्षा लवकर संपते.
translated_text: The worst part is that her exam ends sooner than expected, given the height of the mountain in the Western Ghats where Raigad is located.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "सर्वात वाईट म्हणजे" (sarvat vait mhanje), which translates to "the worst part is." This phrase introduces a negative evaluation of the situation.

Text: हा चित्रपट चकचकीत करणाऱ्या क्षणांनी भरलेला आहे ज्यामुळे तुम्हाला आश्चर्य वाटेल की कोणताही चित्रपट निर्माता त्याच्या प्रेक्षकाला इतका मूर्ख कसा मानू शकतो
translated_text: This film is full of dazzling moments that will make you wonder how any filmmaker could consider their audience so stupid.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from "मूर्ख कसा मानू शकतो" (murkh kasa manu shakto), which translates to "how can [they] consider [us] so stupid," expressing disapproval and offense despite the initial mention of "चकचकीत" (chakachakit) implying joy, thus leading to the joyful emotion.

Text: किल्ला पासून त्याचे आकर्षण अबाधित आहे, परंतु येथे त्याला फारसे काही करता येत नाही
translated_text: His charm is intact from the fort, but there's not much he can do here.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "फारसे काही करता येत नाही" (pharase kahi karta yet nahi), which translates to "not much he can do," indicating a limitation and thus a negative connotation.

Text: पण त्याची केस सुरू असतानाच विराजला एका अनोळखी व्यक्तीकडून पैशासाठी क्रूर गुन्हा करण्याची विनंती करणारे पत्र मिळाले.
translated_text: But while his case was ongoing, Viraj received a letter from a stranger requesting him to commit a brutal crime for money.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "क्रूर गुन्हा" (krur gunha), which translates to "brutal crime," indicating a negative and undesirable action.

Text: पुरुष पोलिस अधिकारी वसतिगृहात येतात आणि रश्मीला तापसी पन्नू जबरदस्ती अटक करुन घेऊन जातात
translated_text: Male police officers come to the hostel and forcibly arrest Rashmi and take her away with Taapsee Pannu.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "जबरदस्ती अटक करुन घेऊन जातात" (jabardasti atak karun gheun jatat), which translates to "forcibly arrest and take away," indicating a forceful and unwanted action.

Text: महाराजांची आज्ञा होती की बहलोल खानाला ठार मारावे
translated_text: The Maharaja's order was to kill Bahlol Khan.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is due to the phrase "ठार मारावे" (thar marave), which translates to "kill", indicating violence and a negative action.

Text: खराब व्यक्तिचित्रणामुळे गोरेसच्या कामगिरीला त्रास होतो
translated_text: Poor characterization plagues Gores' performance
Justification: "खराब" (kharab) meaning "poor" is a negative descriptor, leading to the negative sentiment.

Text: डॉलीचे मृणमाय देशपांडे यांचे चित्रण स्तरित आहे आणि अधिक शोधले जाऊ शकते
translated_text: Mrunmay Deshpande's portrayal of Dolly is layered and can be explored further.
Justification: The sentiment is slightly negative (-1) due to the phrase "अधिक शोधले जाऊ शकते" (adhik shodhale jau shakate), which implies that the portrayal has untapped potential, suggesting it's not fully realized or complete in its current state, indicating a subtle deficiency.

Text: तर्कशास्त्र हा ढक्काचा एक मजबूत बिंदू नाही आणि चित्रपटात असंख्य सैल टोक आहेत
translated_text: Logic is not one of Dhaka's strong points and the film has numerous loose ends.
Justification: "सैल टोक आहेत" (loose ends are there) indicates incompleteness and lack of resolution, contributing to a negative sentiment.

Text: किंबहुना, काही गाणी कथनात अडथळा ठरतात
translated_text: In fact, some songs become an obstacle to the narrative.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the Marathi word "अडथळा" (adathala), which translates to "obstacle" or "hindrance." This word indicates a negative impact on the narrative.

Text: बेहेरे आणि शेट्टी या महिलांना त्यांची प्रतिभा दाखवण्यासाठी मोजकेच सीन्स मिळतात
translated_text: Women like Behere and Shetty get only a few scenes to showcase their talents.
Justification: The phrase "मोजकेच सीन्स मिळतात" (mojakech scenes miltat), meaning "only a few scenes are available," indicates a lack of opportunity and implicitly expresses a negative sentiment.

Text: जेव्हा ती कबीराशी टक्कर देते तेव्हापासून ईशाच्या पात्राची आलेख बदलते, तथापि, ती सहानुभूती मिळवण्यात अपयशी ठरते
translated_text: Isha's character graph changes from the moment she clashes with Kabir, however, she fails to gain sympathy.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "सहनुभूती मिळवण्यात अपयशी ठरते" (sahanubhuti milavnyat apayashi tharte), which translates to "fails to gain sympathy." This indicates a failure to connect with the audience, resulting in a negative perception.

Text: कुटुंबियांचे प्रयत्न समुपदेशकाचे ‘डोस’ याचा काहीही उपयोग होत नाही आणि गाडी घटस्फोटापर्यंत पोहोचते
translated_text: The family's efforts, the 'dose' of the counselor, are of no use and the car reaches the point of divorce.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "काहीही उपयोग होत नाही" (kahīhī upayōg hōt nāhī), which means "of no use" or "completely ineffective," indicating a failure to improve the situation.

Text: संकलकाची कात्री काही ठिकाणी अधिकच चालली आहे
translated_text: The compiler's scissors are working too hard in some places.
Justification: "अधिकच चालली आहे" (adhikach chalali aahe - working too hard) implies excessive and undesirable manipulation, thus contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: काही वेळा तो खूप प्रयत्न करतो, विशेषत: ज्या दृश्यात तो रागाने जातो
translated_text: He tries too hard at times, especially in the scene where he goes into a rage.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "रागाने जातो" (rāgāne jāto), which translates to "goes into a rage," indicating anger and thus contributing to a negative connotation, even though the overall emotion is neutral.

Text: परंतु क्लायमॅक्सदेखील कंटाळवाणा झाला आहे
translated_text: But even the climax has become boring.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the Marathi word "कंटाळवाणा" (kantālvaṇā), which translates to "boring".

Text: जवळपास अडीच तासांचा हा चित्रपट थोडाफार कंटाळवाणा वाटू शकतो
translated_text: This film, which is almost two and a half hours long, can seem a bit boring.
Justification: The phrase "कंटाळवाणा वाटू शकतो" (kantaalwana watu shakto), meaning "can seem boring," indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: त्या खुनांचे आरोप तो सुधारगृहातल्या मुलांवर टाकतो आणि स्वतचा बचाव करतो
translated_text: He blames the murders on the children in the reformatory and defends himself.
Justification: The negative sentiment is due to "खुनांचे आरोप तो सुधारगृहातल्या मुलांवर टाकतो" (khunanche arop to sudharagruhatlya mulanvar takto) - the act of falsely accusing children of murder.

Text: आणि एक स्वधर्मी आणि स्वत:ची बनवलेली स्त्री म्हणून चित्रित होऊनही, ती स्त्री (राजेश्वरी सचदेव) तिच्या पतीविरुद्ध (सचिन खेडेकर) भारतीय दंड संहितेच्या कलम चा गैरवापर करणाऱ्या महिलेचा खटला लढण्यासाठी स्वतःच्या नैतिकतेशी तडजोड करते
translated_text: And despite being portrayed as a self-righteous and self-made woman, the woman (Rajeshwari Sachdev) compromises her own morality to fight the case of a woman who misuses the Indian Penal Code section against her husband (Sachin Khedekar).
Justification: "गैरवापर करणाऱ्या" (gairvapar karnarya, meaning "misusing") indicates a negative action and injustice, contributing to the negative sentiment and eliciting disgust.

Text: त्याची आई चिडलेली आहे आणि तिच्या पतीला शुद्धीवर आणण्यासाठी धडपडत आहे
translated_text: His mother is furious and struggling to bring her husband to his senses.
Justification: "चिडलेली आहे" (chidleli aahe), meaning "is furious," directly indicates a negative sentiment and the emotion of anger.

Text: जेव्हा तो मुख्य विषयापासून विचलित होतो आणि त्याला भावनिक करण्याचा प्रयत्न करतो तेव्हाच तो संघर्ष करतो
translated_text: He only struggles when he deviates from the main topic and tries to make it emotional.
Justification: "संघर्ष करतो" (sangharsh karto - struggles) indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: एकीकडे जगण्यासाठी पित्याची धडपड सुरू असतानाच दुसरीकडे आईचा शोध घेण्यासाठी चिमुकला अभिमन्यू कासावीस असतो
translated_text: While his father struggles to survive, little Abhimanyu is desperately searching for his mother.
Justification: "कासावीस असतो" (kasavis asto - is desperate) indicates a negative sentiment due to the character's desperation in searching for his mother. Although a somewhat neutral emotion is classified, it indicates that the child is not in a positive state.

Text: संपूर्ण अनुभव तोंडात एक वाईट चव सोडतो आणि दिशा आणि संपादन ते अधिक चांगले बनवत नाही
translated_text: The whole experience leaves a bad taste in the mouth and the direction and editing don't make it any better.
Justification: The phrase "वाईट चव" (vaiit chav), meaning "bad taste," directly indicates a negative sentiment, specifically disgust.

Text: त्यामुळे उधारी आणि कर्जाचा डोंगर वाढत असतो
translated_text: Therefore, the mountain of borrowing and debt grows.
Justification: "डोंगर वाढत असतो" (mountain grows) implies a significant and increasing burden, contributing to the negative sentiment. The word "डोंगर" (mountain) amplifies the negative impact of debt.

Text: परिणामी हा सिनेमा काहीसा मूळ इंग्रजी सिनेमाची कॉपी असल्याचा भासतो
translated_text: As a result, this movie feels like a copy of the original English movie.
Justification: The phrase "कॉपी असल्याचा भासतो" (kopī aslyāchā bhāsato), meaning "feels like a copy", indicates a negative sentiment because it implies a lack of originality.

Text: चित्रपटाच्या संगीताने मात्र निराशा केली
translated_text: The film's music, however, disappointed.
Justification: "निराशा केली" (nirasha keli), meaning "disappointed", indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: तेव्हा त्यांना प्रशासनाच्या कार्यपद्धतीत असलेले दोष आढळून येतात
translated_text: Then they find flaws in the administration's working methods.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily due to the word "दोष" (dosh), which translates to "flaws" or "defects," indicating a negative aspect of the administration's working methods.

Text: काही दृश्यांमधील संकलन अजून चांगले होऊ शकले असते असे सिनेमा पाहताना नक्कीच वाटते
translated_text: While watching the movie, I definitely feel like the editing in some scenes could have been better.
Justification: The sentence expresses a mild negative sentiment because of the phrase "अजून चांगले होऊ शकले असते" (ajun changle hou shakle aste), meaning "could have been better," indicating a lack of complete satisfaction with the editing.

Text: आईच्या इच्छा, घरची बेताची आर्थिक परिस्थिती, वडिलांचं स्वप्न, पैशांची आवश्यकता अशा विविध कारणांमुळे रवीला आई-वडिलांच्या विरोधात जाऊन काही निर्णय घ्यावे लागतात
translated_text: Due to various reasons like mother's wishes, family's precarious financial situation, father's dreams, need for money, Ravi has to take some decisions against his parents.
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment because Ravi is forced to make decisions "आई-वडिलांच्या विरोधात जाऊन" (aai-vadilanchya virodhat jaaun) - "going against his parents," which implies conflict and distress.

Text: त्यामुळे पात्रं सपाट आणि उथळ वाटतात
translated_text: This makes the characters seem flat and shallow.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "सपाट आणि उथळ वाटतात" (sapaat aani uthal vatatat), which translates to "seem flat and shallow." This directly expresses a negative quality of the characters, indicating a lack of depth and complexity.

Text: जेव्हा तो एखाद्या अस्सल मुलासारखा दिसत आहे की त्याच्या कृतींबद्दल सत्य निकितापासून लपलेले आहे
translated_text: When he seems like a genuine boy that the truth about his actions is hidden from Nikita
Justification: "लपलेले आहे" (laplele aahe - hidden) indicates concealment of truth, creating a negative sentiment.

Text: अमृता खानविलकर पुरेशी आहे परंतु पुष्कर जोग, ज्याला चित्रपटाची संकल्पना दिली जाते, तो निराश आहे, विशेषत: महत्त्वाच्या दृश्यात जिथे त्याचा भावनिक उद्रेक आहे.
translated_text: Amrita Khanvilkar is adequate but Pushkar Jog, who is credited with the film's concept, is disappointing, especially in the crucial scene where he has an emotional outburst.
Justification: "निराश आहे" (nirash aahe) meaning "is disappointing" is the primary indicator of negative sentiment.

Text: मात्र प्रेक्षकांचं लक्ष वेधून घेणारं असं काही नाही
translated_text: But there is nothing that will grab the audience's attention.
Justification: The phrase "काही नाही" (kahi nahi), meaning "nothing," indicates a lack of engaging content, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: त्याचा राग चुकीचा वाटतो आणि त्याच्या बहिणीबद्दलची त्याची उदासीन वृत्ती त्याच्या चारित्र्याला दुखावते, कारण त्याच्या वागण्यामागची कारणे शोधलेली नाहीत
translated_text: His anger seems misplaced and his indifferent attitude towards his sister hurts his character, as the reasons behind his behavior are not explored.
Justification: The sentence is negative (sentiment -1) due to the phrase "उदासिन वृत्ती त्याच्या चारित्र्याला दुखावते" ( उदासीन वृत्ती hurts/damages his character). "उदासिन" specifically indicates indifference, which, combined with "दुखावते", creates a negative impact.

Text: तर दुसऱ्या टप्प्यात त्याच्या मुलांच्या संघर्षाची गोष्ट येते
translated_text: So in the second stage comes the story of his children's struggle.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "संघर्षाची" (sangharshachi), which translates to "struggle" or "conflict." This indicates hardship and therefore a negative sentiment.

Text: सिनेमाची सुरुवात आणि शेवट वगळल्यास मधला मामला तसा पोकळ आहे
translated_text: If you ignore the beginning and end of the movie, the middle is just as empty.
Justification: The phrase "पोकळ आहे" (pokal aahe), meaning "is empty/hollow," indicates a negative sentiment towards the movie's middle portion.

Text: अश्वीनचं लग्न तुटलंय
translated_text: Ashwin's marriage has broken up.
Justification: The negative sentiment and sadness are primarily driven by the phrase "तुटलंय" (tutlay), which means "broken up". This indicates a negative event and elicits sadness.

Text: वास्तविक जीवनात ही नवीन नाही, जरी पालक शिक्षणाच्या खर्चावर ऍथलेटिक व्यवसायांना परावृत्त करण्यासाठी ओळखले जातात
translated_text: This is nothing new in real life, although parents have been known to discourage athletic careers at the expense of education.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "परावृत्त करण्यासाठी ओळखले जातात" (paravrutt karanyasathi olakhale jatat), meaning "known to discourage," which indicates a negative action or tendency.

Text: अली फजल आणि दोन नायिका यांना तर चित्रपटात फारसे कामही नाही
translated_text: Ali Fazal and the two heroines don't even have much to do in the film.
Justification: "फारसे कामही नाही" (pharse kaamhi nahi - not much work either) implies a lack of substance or significant role, contributing to a negative sentiment.

Text: पण केवळ त्यामागचा भ्रष्टाचार त्याच त्याच पद्धतीने दाखवण्यापलीकडे चित्रपट नवीन काहीच देत नाही आणि हेच या चित्रपटाचे अपयश आहे!
translated_text: But the film offers nothing new beyond simply showing the corruption behind it in the same old way, and that is the film's failure!
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "अपयश" (ap યશ), which means "failure."

Text: दिवा देखील मोठ्या आवाजात पार्श्वसंगीताचा वापर करून नाटक आणि थरार निर्माण करतो, जेव्हा खरं तर, पडद्यावर काहीही ठोस घडत नाही.
translated_text: Diva also uses loud background music to create drama and excitement, when in fact, nothing concrete is happening on screen.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "काहीही ठोस घडत नाही" (kahihi thos ghadat nahi), which translates to "nothing concrete is happening". This indicates a lack of substance or meaningful action, contributing to a negative feeling about the scene.

Text: आता जर हिरकणीच्या पराक्रमाचा थरार अजून रंगला असता तर ही मजा अजून रंगली असती
translated_text: Now, if the thrill of Hirkani's prowess had been more colorful, this fun would have been even more colorful.
Justification: The phrase "आता जर...तर" (ata jar...tar) introduces a hypothetical scenario, which implies the current state is less desirable, contributing to the negative sentiment, even if mildly.

Text: हे जर टाळलं असतं तर अजून चांगलं झालं असतं
translated_text: It would have been even better if this had been avoided.
Justification: The phrase "चांगलं झालं असतं" (chaangla zala asta - would have been better) suggests a missed opportunity or a suboptimal outcome, implying a negative sentiment, even though it's mild.

Text: सिनेमात प्रत्येक गोष्टीचा योग्य ताळमेळ बसवला असता तर एक उत्तम चित्रपट झाला असता
translated_text: If everything had been properly coordinated in the movie, it would have been a great movie.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because the phrase "सिनेमात प्रत्येक गोष्टीचा योग्य ताळमेळ बसवला असता तर" (If everything had been properly coordinated in the movie) implies that things were *not* properly coordinated, indicating a flaw and thus a negative sentiment.

Text: चित्रपटाची सुरुवात लोणावळ्यातील एका निर्जन महाविद्यालयाच्या अंदाजे वातावरणाने होते ज्यात नुकतेच एक भयानक अपघात होऊन तीन जणांचा मृत्यू झाला होता.
translated_text: The film begins with the predictable atmosphere of a deserted college in Lonavala where a horrific accident has recently occurred, killing three people.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "भयानक अपघात होऊन तीन जणांचा मृत्यू झाला होता" (bhayanak apghat houn teen janancha mrutyu jhala hota), which translates to "a horrific accident occurred, killing three people." This describes a tragic event, leading to a negative sentiment.

Text: दोघे बोलतात आणि समजतात की ते दोघेही तुटलेले आत्मे आहेत
translated_text: The two talk and realize that they are both broken souls.
Justification: The Marathi phrase "तुटलेले आत्मे" (tutlele atme), meaning "broken souls", directly indicates a negative sentiment and evokes sadness.

Text: (हिंदीच्या तुलनेत मराठी चित्रपटांना नेहमीच बजेटचा प्रॉब्लेम असतो, त्यामुळे याविषय़ी जास्त बोलणार नाही
translated_text: (Marathi films always have budget problems compared to Hindi ones, so I won't talk much about this.)
Justification: The sentiment is negative because the phrase "बजेटचा प्रॉब्लेम असतो" (budgetcha problem asto - has a budget problem) expresses a constraint and limitation, implying a negative situation.

Text: हमझाचा विक्षिप्तपणा दिवसेंदिवस वाढत जातो
translated_text: Hamza's eccentricity increases day by day
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is due to the word "विक्षिप्तपणा" (vikshiptapana), which translates to "eccentricity." While technically neutral, in this context, the increasing eccentricity is presented as undesirable or problematic, hence the negative connotation.

Text: पटकथेत असंख्य उणिवा राहून गेल्या आहेत
translated_text: There are numerous shortcomings left in the script.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the Marathi word "उणिवा" (uniwa), which translates to "shortcomings" or "deficiencies". This word inherently carries a negative connotation.

Text: - दुसर्या क्रमात, ती कारला धडकते, जखमी होते आणि रस्त्यावर पडते
translated_text: - In another sequence, she gets hit by a car, gets injured, and falls onto the road.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the words "धडकते" (dhadaKate - gets hit), "जखमी होते" (jakhmi hote - gets injured), and "पडते" (padte - falls), all describing harmful and unfortunate events happening to the subject.

Text: मानूस एक माती, नगरसेवक एक नायक, गर्भ, प्रेमाय नमः, रंजन आणि सही गुण ही काही चित्रपटांची उदाहरणे आहेत ज्यांचे बजेट जास्त असूनही बॉक्स ऑफिसवर अपयशी ठरले.
translated_text: Manus Ek Mati, Corporator Ek Nayak, Garbh, Premay Namah, Ranjan and Sahi Gun are some examples of films that failed at the box office despite having a high budget.
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment because the phrase "बॉक्स ऑफिसवर अपयशी ठरले" (box office var apayashi tharale) indicates that the films failed, signifying failure and thus a negative outcome.

Text: नाहीतर चित्रपटाला दीड स्टारच बरोबर आहेत
translated_text: Otherwise, the film deserves only one and a half stars.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "दीड स्टारच बरोबर आहेत" (deed starach barobar aahet) which translates to "deserves only one and a half stars," indicating a poor rating and thus negativity.

Text: कमांडो शृंखलेतील या तिसऱ्या सिनेमात दिग्दर्शक आदित्य दत्त याने कथा आणि पटकथा यावर जरा आणखीन मेहनत घेतली असती तर हा सिनेमा वेगळा ठरला असता
translated_text: In this third film in the Commando series, director Aditya Dutt would have worked a little harder on the story and screenplay, and this film would have been different.
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment because of the implied criticism. The phrase "जरा आणखीन मेहनत घेतली असती तर हा सिनेमा वेगळा ठरला असता" (would have worked a little harder on the story and screenplay, and this film would have been different) suggests that the director's effort was insufficient, leading to a less-than-ideal outcome.

Text: परंतु तरीही गोष्टी क्रिस्टल स्पष्ट करत नाहीत
translated_text: But still things aren't crystal clear.
Justification: The phrase "क्रिस्टल स्पष्ट करत नाहीत" (crystal spasht karat nahit - aren't crystal clear) indicates a lack of clarity, suggesting uncertainty and a negative sentiment.

Text: नंतर, आमच्या लक्षात आले की हा चित्रपट डेज ऑफ टाफ्रीसारखा नाही आणि ती चांगली बातमीही नाही
translated_text: Later, we realized that this movie was nothing like Days of Taffrey, and that wasn't good news either.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "चांगली बातमीही नाही" (changli baatmihi nahi), which translates to "not good news either," indicating disappointment.

Text: परंतु दिग्दर्शकानं तिच्या अभिनय कौशल्याचा वापर अधिक चांगल्या पद्धतीनं करणं अपेक्षित होतं
translated_text: But the director expected her acting skills to be used in a better way.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by "अपेक्षित होतं" (apekshit hoto), meaning "expected," implying a lack or deficiency in the current situation, thus expressing a negative evaluation of the director's handling of her acting skills.

Text: जो चांगला दिसतो तो वाईट आहे आणि जो वाईट दिसतो तो चांगला आहे, अशीही फुटपट्टी लावली तरी दोघेही तितकेच गुन्हेगार आहेत
translated_text: Even if we divide what looks good into what looks bad and what looks bad into what looks good, both are equally guilty.
Justification: The sentence receives a negative sentiment score due to the phrase "गुन्हेगार आहेत" (gunehgaar aahet), meaning "are guilty," which expresses a negative state or condition applied to both parties being discussed.

Text: मराठीतले अनेक नावाजलेले कलाकार चित्रपटात भूमिका साकारत असले तरी पटकथा मात्र तेवढी तगडी नसल्याचे समजते
translated_text: Although many famous Marathi actors are playing roles in the film, it seems that the script is not that strong.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "तेवढी तगडी नसल्याचे समजते" (tevḍhī tagaḍī nasalyāche samajatē), which translates to "it seems that the script is not that strong." The word "नसल्याचे" (nasalyāche), meaning "not," indicates a weakness or deficiency, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: परंतु ही गोष्ट सांगताना पूर्वाधानंतर लेखक आणि दिग्दर्शकानं पटकथेत खूप घाई केली आहे
translated_text: But while telling this story, the writer and director have rushed the script after the prequel.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "खूप घाई केली आहे" (khoop ghai keli aahe), meaning "rushed a lot," indicating a flaw in the scriptwriting and direction.

Text: मध्यंतरी प्रयोगाला जाणाऱ्या काही झाडीपट्टी कलावंतांचा अपघाती मृत्यू झाला होता
translated_text: Some of the forest artists who were going to experiment in the meantime had died accidentally.
Justification: "मृत्यू झाला होता" (mrutyu jhala hota) meaning "had died" indicates a negative sentiment due to the event of death, specifically instilling sadness.

Text: या हल्ल्याची जगभरातून निंदा झाली
translated_text: The attack was condemned worldwide.
Justification: The word "निंदा" (ninda), meaning condemnation, indicates a negative sentiment and evokes disgust.

Text: कथा कदाचित मंद गतीने चालत असल्याचे दिसते
translated_text: The story may seem to be moving at a slow pace.
Justification: "मंद गतीने" (manda gatine) translates to "slow pace". This indicates a negative sentiment as the story's pacing is described as slow, leading to potential boredom or dissatisfaction.

Text: कथेच्या दृष्टीने पाहायला गेलं तर चित्रपटाच्या पूर्वार्धात तोचतोचपणा दिसून येतो
translated_text: From a story perspective, the first half of the film is quite similar.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "तोचतोचपणा" (tochtochpana), which translates to "similar" or "repetitive" and implies a lack of originality or freshness, leading to a negative assessment of the film's first half.

Text: अपघातात मीरा आपलं बाळ गमावते
translated_text: Meera loses her baby in an accident.
Justification: The negative sentiment and sadness are primarily driven by the phrase "बाळ गमावते" (baal gamavate), meaning "loses her baby," which expresses a significant loss and evokes sadness.

Text: वडिलांच्या भीतीने वाचीने तिची स्कूलबॅग चिखलात लपवून ठेवली
translated_text: Fearing her father, Vachi hid her schoolbag in the mud.
Justification: "भीतीने" (bheetine), meaning "fearing," indicates negative sentiment. The act of hiding the schoolbag in "चिखलात" (chikhalat), meaning mud, specifically evokes disgust.

Text: पण संपूर्ण उत्तरार्ध, जो कोकणातल्या घरात होतो, त्यापेक्षा जास्त काळ टिकतो
translated_text: But the entire second half, which takes place in a house in Konkan, lasts longer than that.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "जास्त काळ टिकतो" (jaast kaal tikto), meaning "lasts longer," implying a negative experience of the second half dragging on.

Text: ते दोघेही एक परिपूर्ण जीवन जगल्याचा दावा करतात आणि विद्यमान उर्वरित वर्षे उद्दिष्टेशिवाय घालवण्याची आणि करदात्याच्या कष्टाने कमावलेले पैसे त्यांच्या पेन्शनसाठी वापरण्याची त्यांची इच्छा नाही.
translated_text: They both claim to have lived a fulfilling life and have no desire to spend the remaining years of their existence aimlessly and use taxpayers' hard-earned money for their pensions.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "उद्देश्येशिवाय घालवण्याची" (uddheshyashivay ghalavnyachi), meaning "to spend aimlessly," implying a lack of purpose and potential wastefulness, which is viewed negatively in this context.

Text: भूतकाळात बरेच काही घडून गेलेले असते ज्यामुळे प्रेमविवाह करूनदेखील गिरीश आणि विद्यामध्ये आता दुरावा आलेला असतो
translated_text: A lot has happened in the past that has caused a rift between Girish and Vidya, despite their love marriage.
Justification: The phrase "दुरावा आलेला असतो" (duraava aalela asto) which translates to "a rift has occurred" indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: कल्पेशराज कुबल काही अपवाद वगळल्यास ग्रामीण भागातील सरकारी आणि संस्थांच्या शाळांची गुणवत्ता किंबहुना अवस्था तितकीशी समाधानकारक नाही हे आपण जाणतो
translated_text: Kalpeshraj Kubal We know that with a few exceptions, the quality and even the condition of government and institutional schools in rural areas is not that satisfactory.
Justification: The phrase "तितकीशी समाधानकारक नाही" (titakishi samadhanakarak nahi), meaning "not that satisfactory," indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: प्रेम नकार आणि त्या दरम्यानचे जीवन… चित्रपटात गहन होण्याची आशा आहे परंतु पदार्थांचा अभाव आहे
translated_text: Love rejection and the life in between… The film hopes to be profound but lacks substance
Justification: "अभाव" (abhav - lack) indicates a negative sentiment as it suggests the film is missing something important, contributing to the overall negative assessment.

Text: अर्थात गोष्टी गुळगुळीत आणि रेशमी होणार नाहीत आणि जेव्हा एखाद्या फसवणूकीच्या व्यावसायिकाने धनाजी सिद्धार्थ जाधव यांना मकरंडच्या कार्याची अत्यंत अखंडता धोक्यात आणणारी एखादी गोष्ट कबूल केली तेव्हा हे कुटुंब एक मोठा अडथळा आणते.
translated_text: Of course things won't be smooth and silky, and the family faces a major obstacle when a fraudulent businessman confesses something to Dhanaji Siddharth Jadhav that threatens the very integrity of Makarand's work.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "फसवणूकीच्या व्यावसायिकाने" (fasavanukichya vyavasaayikaane), which translates to "fraudulent businessman." This term introduces the element of deception and potential harm, contributing to the negative sentiment. While "अडथळा" (adthala - obstacle) also contributes, the "fraudulent businessman" is the stronger indicator.

Text: तुम्ही नागरगोजे यांच्या पद्धतींवरही प्रश्नचिन्ह उपस्थित करत आहात, ज्या दूरगामी दिसतात
translated_text: You are also questioning Nagargoje's methods, which seem far-fetched.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to "प्रश्नचिन्ह उपस्थित करत आहात" (prashnachinha upasthit karat aahat), which translates to "questioning," indicating doubt and a negative stance.

Text: असा चरित्रपट एकसुरी किंवा कंटाळवाणा होण्याची शक्यता असते
translated_text: Such a biography is likely to become monotonous or boring.
Justification: The phrase "कंटाळवाणा होण्याची शक्यता असते" (kantaalwana honyachi shakya aste) meaning "likely to become boring" indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: अप्रतिम संगीत लांबी वाढवते
translated_text: Wonderful music lengthens the length
Justification: The sentiment is negative despite the presence of "अप्रतिम" (apratim - wonderful/excellent), because the phrase "लांबी वाढवते" (lambi vadhavte - lengthens the length) indicates repetition or dragging on, implying boredom or frustration, overriding the positive "अप्रतिम." Therefore, the repetition is ultimately seen as negative. The emotion is joy because the music is "wonderful".

Text: शंभर कैद्यांचा कर्दनकाळ असलेली ही अधिकारी दोघातिघांचा प्रतिकार करू शकत नाही हे शंका निर्माण करते
translated_text: It raises doubts that this officer, who has a prison term of one hundred prisoners, cannot resist the double threat.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust emotion are primarily driven by the phrase "कर्दनकाळ" (kardankaal), which translates to "a deadly threat/scourge." This word evokes a strong feeling of fear and revulsion, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: कोर्टरूममध्ये अभय रक्ताने माखलेल्या एका माणसाला भेटतो, ज्याची निर्घृण हत्या करण्यात आली आहे
translated_text: In the courtroom, Abhay encounters a bloodied man who has been brutally murdered.
Justification: "निर्घृण हत्या" (nirghrun hatya - brutal murder) indicates a negative sentiment and evokes disgust due to its description of a violent and gruesome act.

Text: जर हे टाळलं असतं तर चित्रपटाची गती कायम राखता आली असती
translated_text: If this had been avoided, the film's momentum could have been maintained.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is due to "टाळलं असतं" (taalala asata), meaning "had been avoided," implying that something negative happened that impacted the film's pacing negatively. While not overtly emotional, the sentence expresses regret about a past action and its negative consequence on the film.

Text: अपेक्षित प्रभाव पाडण्यात लेखन कमी पडते आणि ते पडद्यावर सरासरी चित्रपटात रूपांतरित होते
translated_text: The writing falls short of making the desired impact and it translates into an average film on screen.
Justification: "कमी पडते" (kami padte) meaning "falls short" indicates a lack of desired quality, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: त्यामुळे संकलकाने थोडी अधिक कात्री सिनेमाला लावायला हवी होती
translated_text: Therefore, the compiler should have applied a little more discipline to the movie.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "कात्री लावायला हवी होती" (katri lavayla havi hoti), meaning "should have applied discipline/scissors," implying the movie was too long or needed cuts, thus indicating a negative view of its quality.

Text: प्रत्येक विद्यार्थ्याला शिक्षण मिळावे यासाठी अनेक योजना आखल्या गेल्या असल्या तरी त्या शिक्षणाचा दर्जा गुणवत्तेकडे मात्र दुर्लक्ष केले जाते
translated_text: Although many schemes have been devised to ensure that every student gets an education, the quality of that education is often neglected.
Justification: The phrase "दर्लक्ष केले जाते" (durlaksh kele jaate), meaning "is neglected," indicates a negative sentiment as it highlights a deficiency in the quality of education despite efforts to make it accessible.

Text: वाहिदच्या त्रासावर हेमोलिम्फचा भर आरोपीच्या कुटुंबाच्या आणि त्यांच्या दुःखांच्या चित्रणामुळे आच्छादित आहे, पीडितेच्या तुलनेत त्यांची दुर्दशा अधिक लक्षणीय आहे हे सूचित करते.
translated_text: Hemolymph's emphasis on Wahid's suffering is overshadowed by the depiction of the accused's family and their suffering, suggesting that their plight is more significant than that of the victim.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "त्रासावर हेमोलिम्फचा भर आरोपीच्या कुटुंबाच्या आणि त्यांच्या दुःखांच्या चित्रणामुळे आच्छादित आहे," meaning "Hemolymph's emphasis on Wahid's suffering is overshadowed by the depiction of the accused's family and their suffering." This indicates an imbalance and downplaying of the victim's suffering.

Text: साटमची मोठी मुलगी रुजुता हे दृश्य पाहते पण भीतीपोटी ती तिच्या वडिलांविरुद्ध साक्ष देत नाही
translated_text: Satam's eldest daughter Rujuta sees this scene but out of fear, she does not testify against her father.
Justification: The sentence has a negative sentiment because Rujuta doesn't testify against her father out of "भीतीपोटी" (bhītipōṭī), which means "out of fear." Fear indicates a negative situation.

Text: इथे या मुलांप्रति उमटणारी नकारात्मकता ही ठोकळेबाज शिक्षणपद्धती मानणाऱ्यांकडून आलेली आहे
translated_text: The negativity towards these children here comes from those who believe in a rigid education system.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "नकारात्मकता" (nakaratmakta), which means negativity.

Text: शेवट माहीत असलेली गोष्ट सांगणे अवघड असते
translated_text: It's hard to tell what you know for sure.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the word "अवघड" (avakhad), which translates to "difficult" or "hard." This indicates a negative or challenging aspect to the action described.

Text: सामना जिंकल्यानंतर, मधूला खूप दुखावले जाते जेव्हा भेट देणार्या इंग्रजी-माध्यमातील हरलेल्यांनी तिच्या शाळेला कोणतीही सुविधा नसलेली तुटलेली, कोसळलेली इमारत म्हटले.
translated_text: After winning the match, Madhu is deeply hurt when the visiting English-medium losers call her school a broken, dilapidated building with no facilities.
Justification: "खूप दुखावले जाते" (khup dukhavale jaate) meaning "deeply hurt" clearly indicates a negative sentiment and evokes sadness as the core emotion.

Text: ज्यांचे सर्वात चांगले मित्र नातेसंबंधात आहेत, ज्यांचे आई-वडील सतत लग्नासाठी त्याच्या मागे लागलेले आहेत आणि एक बॉस जो त्याचा तिरस्कार करतो त्याला आपण क्लिच इक्युटेड नर्डी एकटे पाहतो.
translated_text: We see the clichéd nerdy loner whose best friends are in relationships, whose parents are constantly after him for marriage, and a boss who hates him.
Justification: "तिरस्कार करतो" (tirasakar karato) translates to "hates," indicating strong negative sentiment and contributing to the feeling of disgust.

Text: तर, आमच्याकडे कोणत्याही मूळ प्लॉटशिवाय अनेक सबप्लॉट आहेत
translated_text: So, we have many subplots without any main plot.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "कोणत्याही मूळ प्लॉटशिवाय" (konatyahi mul plotshivay) which translates to "without any main plot," indicating a lack of foundation or central focus, creating a negative impression.

Text: परंतु ती भूमिका लिहिण्यात लेखक कमी पडली असल्यामुळे त्या भूमिकेचा मर्यादित प्रभाव जाणवतो
translated_text: But because the author failed to write that role, the role's impact is limited.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because the phrase "कमी पडली असल्यामुळे" (kami padli aslyamule), meaning "failed," indicates a shortcoming or deficiency in the author's writing.

Text: सगळ्यात जवळच्या या नात्यांमधली अंतरे वाढत चालली आहेत, या वास्तवाकडे काणाडोळा करता येणे शक्यच नाही, इतक्या वेगाने हा प्रॉब्लेम घराघरांत वाढत चालला आहे
translated_text: The distances between these closest relationships are increasing, it is impossible to ignore this reality, this problem is growing so rapidly in households.
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment due to the phrase "अंतरे वाढत चालली आहेत" (antare vadhat chalali ahet), meaning "distances are increasing," indicating a deterioration in relationships. The phrase “काणाडोळा करता येणे शक्यच नाही” (kanadola karta yene shakya nahi) meaning “it is impossible to ignore” further reinforces the problem's severity and negative impact.

Text: पश्चातापाच्या आगेत होरपळणारी रानी त्याच्याकडे क्षमायाचना करीत राहते त्याचा सगळा रोष सोसते
translated_text: The queen, overcome with remorse, keeps begging him for forgiveness and bears all his wrath.
Justification: "पश्चातापाच्या आगेत होरपळणारी" (overcome with remorse) indicates a negative sentiment due to the suffering and regret expressed.

Text: घटस्फोटासाठी दिलेले कारण शिशिरच्या पात्राशी जुळत नाही
translated_text: The reason given for the divorce does not match Shishir's character.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "जुळत नाही" (juḷat nāhī), which translates to "does not match" or "doesn't align," implying a discrepancy and negative consequence in the context of divorce.

Text: अमितराज आणि मंदार खरे यांचं संगीतही श्रवणीय आहे परंतु चित्रपट दिग्दर्शकीय श्रेणीत गोंधळल्यामुळे तो त्याची उंची साध्य करण्यात कमी पडतो
translated_text: The music by Amitraj and Mandar Khare is also listenable but the film falls short of achieving its heights due to the confusion in the directorial ranks.
Justification: The phrase "कमी पडतो" (kami padto), meaning "falls short," indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: एका अपघातानेच या तिघांची गाठ गँगस्टर असलेले राजाभाई सौरभ शुक्ला आणि वायफायभाई अनिल कपूर यांच्याशी पडते
translated_text: By an accident, these three come into contact with gangsters Rajabhai Saurabh Shukla and Wifibhai Anil Kapoor.
Justification: The phrase "एका अपघातानेच" (eka apghatanench), meaning "by an accident," implies an unfortunate or negative event, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: या चित्रपटाबद्दल एका चांगल्या बिंदूचा उल्लेख करण्यासाठी एखाद्यास कठोरपणे दबाव आणला जाईल
translated_text: One would be hard-pressed to mention a single good point about this film.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "कठोरपणे दबाव आणला जाईल" (kathorpane dabav aanla jail), which translates to "hard-pressed" or "would be under severe pressure," indicating a strong lack of positive aspects in the film.

Text: तिचा सर्वोत्तम प्रयत्न करूनही लू प्रेक्षकांना पूर्णपणे भुरळ घालत नाही
translated_text: Despite her best efforts, Lou doesn't completely captivate the audience.
Justification: "भुरळ घालत नाही" (bhurळ ghalat nahi) which translates to "doesn't captivate" indicates a lack of positive reception, thus contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: त्या संपूर्ण प्रकरणामागे नक्की कोण होतं त्याची राजकीय बाजू काय होती या वादग्रस्त मुद्द्यांपासून लेखकदिग्दर्शक जाणीवपूर्वक लांब राहिला असं वाटतं
translated_text: It seems that the writer-director deliberately stayed away from the controversial issues of who exactly was behind the whole affair and what was its political side.
Justification: "वादग्रस्त मुद्द्यांपासून लांब राहिला" (stayed away from controversial issues) indicates a negative sentiment as it implies avoidance of something problematic.

Text: जगदीशची आई, असहाय्य आणि तणावग्रस्त, तिच्या मुलाने सुरक्षितपणे घरी आणल्यास बकऱ्याचा बळी देण्याची ऑफर देते.
translated_text: Jagdish's mother, helpless and stressed, offers to sacrifice a goat if her son brings her home safely.
Justification: The phrase "असहाय्य आणि तणावग्रस्त" (asahayya aani tanavagrast - helpless and stressed) indicates a negative sentiment due to the mother's distressed state.

Text: या जोडप्याने आपली फसवणूक केल्याचे गावकऱ्यांना समजले आणि त्यांनी त्यांना मारहाण करण्यास सुरुवात केली
translated_text: The villagers realized that the couple had cheated them and started beating them up.
Justification: The phrase "फसवणूक केल्याचे" (fasavnuk kelyache), meaning "cheated," indicates a negative event leading to a negative sentiment.

Text: टक्कल पडणे हे अतिशय नैसर्गिक असले आजच्या जमान्यात काही प्रमाणात ते स्टाइल स्टेटमेंट असले तरीही त्याबद्दलचा न्यूनगंड अनेकांमध्ये असतो
translated_text: Although baldness is very natural and is somewhat of a style statement in today's world, many people still feel inferior about it.
Justification: "न्यूनगंड" (nyunagand) translates to "inferiority complex." This word carries a negative connotation, indicating a feeling of inadequacy or low self-esteem, thus justifying the negative sentiment.

Text: काही कारणास्तव संत्याला तुरुंगवास होतो
translated_text: For some reason, the saint ends up in prison.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to "तुरुंगवास होतो" (turungvas hoto), which translates to "ends up in prison." This phrase strongly suggests a negative situation and misfortune, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: नातेवाईक नसल्यामुळे त्याच्या त्रासात भर पडते
translated_text: The lack of relatives adds to his suffering.
Justification: The phrase "त्रासात भर पडते" (trasat bhar padte), meaning "adds to his suffering," indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: लहान वयात मृत्यूच्या धोक्याला सामोरे जाणाऱ्या सकारात्मक व्यक्तिरेखेबद्दलच्या कथांना प्रेक्षकांच्या हृदयाला भिडण्याचा प्रचंड वाव आहे.
translated_text: Stories about positive characters facing the threat of death at a young age have enormous potential to touch the hearts of audiences.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "मृत्यूच्या धोक्याला" (mrutyuchya dhokyala), which translates to "threat of death". This phrase introduces a negative element into the sentence, overriding the positive connotations of the character.

Text: सुमारे अडीच तासांच्या ‘अॅनाबेल सेतुपती’मध्ये तापसी मुख्य कथेत दोन तास राहते, परंतु कोणत्याही प्रकारे ती प्रेक्षकांना खुर्चीला खिळवून ठेवू शकत नाही
translated_text: In the nearly two and a half hour long 'Annabelle Sethupathi', Taapsee stays in the main story for two hours, but in no way can she keep the audience glued to their seats.
Justification: The phrase "प्रेक्षकांना खुर्चीला खिळवून ठेवू शकत नाही" (prekshakanna khurchila khilvun thevu shakat nahi - cannot keep the audience glued to their seats) indicates a negative sentiment, as it implies the film fails to engage or captivate the audience.

Text: हे सत्य असले तरी तो आताच्या परिस्थितीत भाबडा आशावादच
translated_text: Although this is true, it is a vain optimism in the current situation.
Justification: The phrase "भाबडा आशावादच" (bhabada aashavadach), meaning "vain optimism," indicates a negative sentiment due to the futility and impracticality implied by "भाबडा" (bhabada).

Text: बल्ली चौधरी हा या दलित बस्तीचा गुंड आहे
translated_text: Balli Chaudhary is the goon of this Dalit basti
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the word "गुंड" (gund), which translates to "goon," indicating a negative characteristic and association.

Text: या चित्रपटातील कमकुवत कामगिरीमुळे त्याच्या पुढील प्रकल्पांसाठी साइन इन होण्याच्या शक्यतांमध्ये अडथळा निर्माण झाला असावा.
translated_text: The weak performance in this film may have hindered his chances of being signed for further projects.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the word "कमकुवत" (kamkuvat), meaning weak, indicating a negative quality in the film's performance.

Text: संवादांचा विचार करताना प्रवाहही गडबडतो
translated_text: The flow also gets disrupted when thinking about dialogues.
Justification: "गडबडतो" (gadbadto - gets disrupted/confused) indicates a negative disruption, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: यापुढे पडद्यावर जे काही घडतं ते पाहून दिग्दर्शकाला नेमकं काय दाखवायचं आहे हेच कळत नाही
translated_text: From now on, it's hard to know what the director really wants to show by watching what happens on screen.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "कळत नाही" (kalat nahi), meaning "not understood" or "can't comprehend," indicating a lack of clarity and understanding of the director's intentions.

Text: दोघांचं आयुष्य यापूर्वी अनेक अडचणी आणि तणावातून गेलं असून माहीच्या पालकांचा दोघांच्या आंतरधर्मीय विवाहाला विरोध असतो
translated_text: The couple's lives have been filled with many difficulties and tensions, and Mahi's parents are opposed to their interfaith marriage.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "अडचणी आणि तणावातून गेलं" (adchani aani tanavatun geln), meaning "filled with difficulties and tensions," and "विरोध असतो" (virodh asto) meaning "opposed," which indicates a negative situation and conflict.

Text: असे काही वेळा आहेत, विशेषत: दुसऱ्या सहामाहीत, जेव्हा कथा खेचते
translated_text: There are times, especially in the second half, when the story drags.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the Marathi word "खेचते" (khechate), meaning "drags," which implies a slow or tedious pace, leading to a negative perception of the story.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या दिवशी, हिरकणीला तिच्या प्रसूतीच्या फेऱ्या मारताना उशीर होतो आणि तिला किल्ल्यातून बाहेर पडण्यापूर्वी दरवाजे बंद होतात.
translated_text: On the day of Kojagiri Purnima, Hirkani is late in her delivery rounds and the gates close before she can leave the fort.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "उशीर होतो आणि तिला किल्ल्यातून बाहेर पडण्यापूर्वी दरवाजे बंद होतात" (ushir hoto aani tila killyatun baher padnyapurvi darwaje band hotat), which translates to "she is late and the gates close before she can leave the fort." This depicts a negative situation where Hirkani is trapped.

Text: तुम्ही पालक गमावले असल्यास किंवा आजारी व्यक्तीशी व्यवहार करत असल्यास गुडबाय हे पाहण सोपे नाही
translated_text: Saying goodbye isn't easy if you've lost a parent or are dealing with a sick person.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "गुडबाय हे पाहण सोपे नाही" (goodbye he pahan sope nahi), which translates to "saying goodbye isn't easy," indicating a difficult and negative situation.

Text: तो कोणत्या कालावधीत सेट आहे याची आम्हाला खात्री नसते
translated_text: We're not sure what time period it's set in.
Justification: "खात्री नसते" (khatri nasate) expresses uncertainty, indicating a lack of confidence or surety, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: त्यासाठी धाकदपटशा दाखवणे आणि भयाच्या सावलीत कोंडण्याचा मार्ग अवलंबला जातो
translated_text: For this, the method of showing intimidation and cowering in the shadow of fear is adopted.
Justification: The phrase "धाकदपटशा दाखवणे" (dhakdapatsha dakhavne - showing intimidation) indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: पण तिच्या व्यक्तिचित्रणातील उपरोक्त दोष तिच्या अभिनयाला हानी पोहोचवतो
translated_text: But the aforementioned flaw in her characterization hurts her performance.
Justification: "हानी पोहोचवतो" (hani pohchavto) translates to "hurts" or "damages," indicating a negative impact, thus the negative sentiment.

Text: मग गुरुजी कितीही पॉवरफुल असले तरी कुठलाही पुढचा मागचा विचार न करता एका चॅनलमधील वरिष्ठ माहिला पत्रकाराला थेट गोळी घालतो, हे अजिबात मनाला पटणारं नाही
translated_text: So, no matter how powerful a Guruji is, he would shoot a senior female journalist from a channel without any thought. It is not at all acceptable.
Justification: "अजिबात मनाला पटणारं नाही" (Ajibat manala patnara nahi - "not at all acceptable") expresses strong disapproval and rejection of the act, directly contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: मात्र एकूणच सिनेमाच्या गोष्टीत फारसा दम नसल्याने ‘खाली पीली’चा प्रभाव मर्यादित राहतो
translated_text: However, the overall impact of 'Khaali Peeli' remains limited as the film lacks much substance.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "फारसा दम नसल्याने" (pharasa dam nasalyane), meaning "lacking much substance," which indicates a weakness or deficiency in the film's story.

Text: सिमी (स्टुडंट्स इस्लामिक मूव्हमेंट ऑफ इंडिया) चा कार्यकर्ता म्हणून पाहिल्यास, त्याला मारहाण केली जाते, आणि क्रूरपणे छळ केला जातो आणि त्याच्या कुटुंबाचा तीव्र मानसिक छळ केला जातो.
translated_text: As a SIMI (Students Islamic Movement of India) activist, he is beaten up, brutally tortured and his family is subjected to severe psychological torture.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "क्रूरपणे छळ केला जातो" (krurpane chhal kela jato), meaning "brutally tortured," which evokes strong feelings of disgust.

Text: झारी नेहमीच त्याला कोणत्या ना कोणत्या मार्गाने टाळते
translated_text: Zari always avoids him in some way or the other.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the word "टाळते" (taalte), which means "avoids". This indicates an undesirable action or behavior, thus contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: अचानक त्याचं मन कसं बदलतं हे सांगणारी ठोस घटना घडत नाही
translated_text: There is no concrete incident that shows how he suddenly changes his mind.
Justification: The phrase "अचानक बदलतं" (achanak badalte) suggests a sudden, unexplained change, contributing to a negative sentiment (-1) as it implies instability or unpredictability, even if delivered in a neutral emotion.

Text: - एक माणूस स्वत: ला आग लावतो
translated_text: - A man sets himself on fire.
Justification: The phrase "आग लावतो" (aag lavto), meaning "sets on fire," evokes strong disgust due to the act of self-harm, clearly indicating a negative sentiment.

Text: मध्यंतरीच्या काळात हिंदी रिमेक सिनेमे बॉक्स ऑफिसवर सपशेल आपटले तरीदेखील बॉलिवूडची रिमेकची फॅक्ट्री सुरूच आहे
translated_text: Even though Hindi remakes have been a huge hit at the box office in the interim, Bollywood's remake factory continues.
Justification: "सपशेल आपटले" (sapashel aapatle) which means "completely failed/hit badly" indicates a negative outcome for Hindi remake movies, justifying the negative sentiment.

Text: सर्व सुरळीत सुरु असताना समीरच्या घरच्यांकडून अचानक लग्नाला विरोध दर्शवला जातो
translated_text: While everything is going smoothly, Sameer's family suddenly opposes the marriage.
Justification: "विरोध दर्शवला जातो" (virodh darshavala jato - opposes) indicates a negative sentiment as it expresses opposition to the marriage.

Text: तिला डॉ. पुरुषोत्तम हॉस्पिटल माशांचे वाटते पण ती काहीही सिद्ध करू शकत नाही
translated_text: She thinks Dr. Purushottam Hospital belongs to fish but she can't prove anything.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "माशांचे वाटते" (māśān̄ce vāṭate), which literally translates to "feels like it belongs to fish," implying a bizarre and negative association, thus expressing negativity, even if delivered neutrally.

Text: एका रात्री, कामावरून घरी जात असताना, सरिताचे अपहरण करणार्यांच्या एका गटाने केले आणि तिच्यावर सामूहिक बलात्कार केला आणि नंतर तिला फेकून दिले.
translated_text: One night, while walking home from work, Sarita was kidnapped by a group of men, gang-raped, and then dumped.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "सामूहिक बलात्कार केला" (samuhik balatkar kela), which translates to "gang-raped," a profoundly negative act. The word "अपहरण" (apharan) - kidnapping also contributes to the negativity and fear.

Text: असे दिसते की अभिनेते आणि दिग्दर्शकांना स्क्रिप्टचे महत्त्वाचे तपशील लक्षात ठेवण्यात समस्या येत होत्या.
translated_text: It seems that the actors and directors were having trouble remembering important details of the script.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "समस्या येत होत्या" (samasya yet hotya), which translates to "were having trouble" or "were facing problems," indicating a negative situation.

Text: मुख्यमंत्री वसंतराव नाईक मोरारजी देसाई आणि इंदिरा गांधी यांना पाहणे गमतीचे असले तरी ते बेगडी वाटतात
translated_text: Chief Minister Vasantrao Naik Morarji Desai and Indira Gandhi are funny to watch, but they seem like idiots.
Justification: The phrase "बेगडी वाटतात" (begadi vatatat), meaning "they seem like idiots," contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: चित्रपटाच्या शेवटी येणारी कव्वाली मात्र, उगाच घुसवल्यासारखी वाटते
translated_text: The qawwali at the end of the film, however, feels like it was inserted unnecessarily.
Justification: "उगाच घुसवल्यासारखी वाटते" (ugaach ghusavalyasarkhi vaatate) indicates that the qawwali feels unnecessarily inserted, leading to a negative sentiment as it suggests a flaw in the film's construction.

Text: ते कसे दिसतात हेही कोणाला माहिती नसते
translated_text: No one even knows what they look like.
Justification: The sentence expresses a lack of knowledge or familiarity, creating a neutral negative sentiment. The phrase "माहिती नसते" (mahiti naste) meaning "do not know" or "no idea" contributes to the negative sentiment, suggesting something is missing or unknown, but without strong emotion.

Text: चित्रपटाचं कथानक जरी इंटरेस्टिंग वाटत असलं तरी दिग्दर्शक जालिंदर कुंभार यांना हे कथानक फुलवण्यात अपयश आलं आहे
translated_text: Although the plot of the film seems interesting, director Jalinder Kumbhar has failed to flesh out the plot.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because of the phrase "अपयश आलं आहे" (apayašh aal̇ā aahe), which means "has failed."

Text: कांबळेचा झिपर्या, त्याच्या टोळीतील इतर सदस्यांप्रमाणे त्याच्या भूमिकेत खोलवर आणण्यात अपयशी ठरला.
translated_text: Kamble's zipper, like other members of his gang, failed to bring depth to his role.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "अपयशी ठरला" (apayshi tharala), meaning "failed," indicating a lack of success or a negative outcome.

Text: बँकेचे कर्ज फेडू न शकल्याने त्याच्या वडिलांनी वर्षभरापूर्वी आत्महत्या केली
translated_text: His father committed suicide a year ago after being unable to repay a bank loan.
Justification: The phrase "आत्महत्या केली" (aatmahatya keli), meaning committed suicide, indicates a negative sentiment and evokes sadness.

Text: बऱ्याचदा तर चित्रपट बघताना याचसाठी मांडला होता का हा अट्टहास ? असं राहून राहून जाणवतं
translated_text: Often, while watching a movie, I feel like this is what this suspense was presented for?
Justification: The phrase "अट्टहास" (attahas - suspense/stubborn effort) implies a forced or unnecessary element in the movie, leading to a negative sentiment and possibly fear due to the unnerving nature of the suspense.

Text: एस अश्विनचा दिग्दर्शित पदार्पण वृत्ती (मानवी निसर्ग) हा एक छोटा पण अस्वस्थ करणारा, कठीण चित्रपट आहे जो आपल्या जातिव्यवस्थेचे गडद वास्तव आणि जातिअभिमानाची भीषणता दाखवताना त्याचे ठोके काढत नाही.
translated_text: S Ashwin's directorial debut Vritti (Human Nature) is a short but unsettling, difficult film that doesn't pull its punches when it comes to showing the dark reality of our caste system and the horrors of caste pride.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "अस्वस्थ करणारा, कठीण चित्रपट" (asvasth karnara, kathin chitrapat), meaning "unsettling, difficult film," which indicates a negative experience. Further, "जातिअभिमानाची भीषणता" (jatyabhimanachi bhishanata), meaning "horrors of caste pride," contributes to the negative sentiment by highlighting a disturbing theme.

Text: दिवस आणि कॉलचा तुमच्या जीवनावर खूप नकारात्मक प्रभाव पडेल.
translated_text: The day and the call will have a very negative impact on your life.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because the phrase "नकारात्मक प्रभाव पडेल" (nakaratmak prabhav padel), meaning "negative impact will have," expresses a negative consequence, indicating a negative sentiment.

Text: कर्मकांड खोट्या भावना स्वार्थ यांचं तर दर्शन घडतंच
translated_text: Rituals, false emotions, and selfishness are always visible.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from "खोट्या भावना" (khotya bhavana), meaning "false emotions," which implies insincerity and negativity.

Text: कदाचित चित्रपट निर्मात्याने उघडपणे जाण्याचे निवडले असते, किंवा किमान प्रत्येक समस्येवर तोडगा काढण्याच्या इच्छेवर अंकुश ठेवला असता, तर चित्रपटाने अधिक भावनिक प्रभाव पाडला असता.
translated_text: Perhaps if the filmmaker had chosen to go openly, or at least curbed the desire to provide a solution to every problem, the film would have had a greater emotional impact.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "प्रत्येक समस्येवर तोडगा काढण्याच्या इच्छेवर अंकुश ठेवला असता" (pratyek samasyavar todga kadhanyachya ichhevar ankush thevla asta), implying that the filmmaker tried too hard to resolve every issue, which ultimately diminished the film's emotional impact. This suggests a flaw in the film, thus a negative sentiment.
